akk: KIŠIB ma-nu-ba-lúm-a-šur DUMU ṣí-lá-{d}IM KIŠIB šu-{d}EN.LÍL DUMU ma-nu-ki-a-šur KIŠIB MAN-a-šur DUMU a-ta-a
eng: Seal of Mannum-balum-Aššur son of Ṣilli-Adad, seal of Šu-Illil son of Mannum-kī-Aššur, seal of Puzur-Aššur son of Ataya.
transliteration: KIŠIB ma-nu-ba-lúm-a-šur DUMU ṣí-lá-{d}IM KIŠIB šu-{d}EN.LÍL DUMU ma-nu-ki-a-šur KIŠIB MAN-a-šur DUMU a-ta-a
translation: Seal of Mannum-balum-Aššur son of Ṣilli-Adad, seal of Šu-Illil son of Mannum-kī-Aššur, seal of Puzur-Aššur son of Ataya.

akk: 0.3333 ma-na 2 GÍN KÙ.BABBAR SIG₅ i-ṣé-er PUZUR₄-a-šur DUMU a-ta-a a-lá-ḫu-um i-šu iš-tù ḫa-muš-tim ša ì-lí-dan ITU.KAM ša ke-na-tim li-mu-um e-na-sú-in a-na ITU 14 ḫa-am-ša-tim i-ša-qal šu-ma lá iš-qú-ul 1.5 GÍN.TA a-na 1 ma-na-im i-na ITU.1.KAM ṣí-ib-tám ú-ṣa-áb
eng: Puzur-Aššur son of Ataya owes 22 shekels of good silver to Ali-ahum. Reckoned from the week of Ilī-dan, month of Ša-kēnātim, in the eponymy of Enna-Suen, he will pay in 14 weeks. If he has not paid in time, he will add interest at the rate 1.5 shekel per mina per month.
transliteration: 0.3333 ma-na 2 GÍN KÙ.BABBAR SIG₅ i-ṣé-er PUZUR₄-a-šur DUMU a-ta-a a-lá-ḫu-um i-šu iš-tù ḫa-muš-tim ša ì-lí-dan ITU.KAM ša ke-na-tim li-mu-um e-na-sú-in a-na ITU 14 ḫa-am-ša-tim i-ša-qal šu-ma lá iš-qú-ul 1.5 GÍN.TA a-na 1 ma-na-im i-na ITU.1.KAM ṣí-ib-tám ú-ṣa-áb
translation: Puzur-Aššur son of Ataya owes 22 shekels of good silver to Ali-ahum. Reckoned from the week of Ilī-dan, month of Ša-kēnātim, in the eponymy of Enna-Suen, he will pay in 14 weeks. If he has not paid in time, he will add interest at the rate 1.5 shekel per mina per month.

akk: KIŠIB šu-{d}EN.LÍL DUMU šu-ku-bi-im KIŠIB ṣí-lu-lu DUMU ú-ku
eng: Seal of Šu-Illil son of Šu-Kūbum, seal of Ṣilūlu son of Uku.
transliteration: KIŠIB šu-{d}EN.LÍL DUMU šu-ku-bi-im KIŠIB ṣí-lu-lu DUMU ú-ku
translation: Seal of Šu-Illil son of Šu-Kūbum, seal of Ṣilūlu son of Uku.

akk: i-nu-mì i-dí-a-bu-um a-wa-sú iq-bi-ú 10 ma-na KÙ.BABBAR a-na ša-lim-a-šùr i-dí-in um-ma šu-ut-ma i-ṣí-ba-at KÙ-pì-a li-il₅-qé
eng: When Iddin-abum spoke his will, he gave 10 minas ofדsilver to Šalim-Aššur. He said: He may take it from the interest on my silver.""
transliteration: i-nu-mì i-dí-a-bu-um a-wa-sú iq-bi-ú 10 ma-na KÙ.BABBAR a-na ša-lim-a-šùr i-dí-in um-ma šu-ut-ma i-ṣí-ba-at KÙ-pì-a li-il₅-qé
translation: When Iddin-abum spoke his will, he gave 10 minas ofדsilver to Šalim-Aššur. He said: He may take it from the interest on my silver.""

akk: KIŠIB a-lá-ḫi-im KIŠIB a-li-li KIŠIB a-bi₄-lá KIŠIB lá-qé-ep
eng: Seal of Ali-ahum, seal of Ali-ilī, seal of Abila, seal of Lā-qēp,
transliteration: KIŠIB a-lá-ḫi-im KIŠIB a-li-li KIŠIB a-bi₄-lá KIŠIB lá-qé-ep
translation: Seal of Ali-ahum, seal of Ali-ilī, seal of Abila, seal of Lā-qēp,

akk: KIŠIB a-šur-i-mì-tí DUMU a-mur-lu-ṣú KIŠIB a-bu-ša-lim DUMU a-šùr-e-mu-qí
eng: Seal of Aššur-imittī son of Amur-luṣu, seal of Abu-šalim son of Aššur-emūqī.
transliteration: KIŠIB a-šur-i-mì-tí DUMU a-mur-lu-ṣú KIŠIB a-bu-ša-lim DUMU a-šùr-e-mu-qí
translation: Seal of Aššur-imittī son of Amur-luṣu, seal of Abu-šalim son of Aššur-emūqī.

akk: a-na a-wa-tim a-ni-a-tim ša ili₅-ba-ni DUMU a-mur-a-šur ù a-ḫu-qar DUMU šu-IŠTAR GÍR ša a-šùr iṣ-bu-tù-ni-ma a-šùr-i-mì-tí DUMU a-mur-lu-ṣú ù a-bu-ša-lim DUMU a-šùr-e-mu-qí pí-šu-nu iš-me-ú-ni <gap>-ni <gap> a-šur <gap> ṭup-pu <gap> a-bi-ni
eng: For these proceedings concerning Ilī-bāni son of Amur-Aššur and Ahu-waqar son of Šu-Ištar - they seized Aššur's dagger and Aššur-imittī son of Amur-luṣu and Abu-šalim son of Aššur-emūqī heard their statement. <gap>
transliteration: a-na a-wa-tim a-ni-a-tim ša ili₅-ba-ni DUMU a-mur-a-šur ù a-ḫu-qar DUMU šu-IŠTAR GÍR ša a-šùr iṣ-bu-tù-ni-ma a-šùr-i-mì-tí DUMU a-mur-lu-ṣú ù a-bu-ša-lim DUMU a-šùr-e-mu-qí pí-šu-nu iš-me-ú-ni <gap>-ni <gap> a-šur <gap> ṭup-pu <gap> a-bi-ni
translation: For these proceedings concerning Ilī-bāni son of Amur-Aššur and Ahu-waqar son of Šu-Ištar - they seized Aššur's dagger and Aššur-imittī son of Amur-luṣu and Abu-šalim son of Aššur-emūqī heard their statement. <gap>

akk: a-na a-ḫa-tim
eng: To Ahātum;
transliteration: a-na a-ḫa-tim
translation: To Ahātum;

akk: KIŠIB a-lá-ḫi-im ù KIŠIB i-dí-a-bi₄-im
eng: seal of Ali-ahum and seal of Iddin-abum.
transliteration: KIŠIB a-lá-ḫi-im ù KIŠIB i-dí-a-bi₄-im
translation: seal of Ali-ahum and seal of Iddin-abum.

akk: KIŠIB a-lá-ḫi-im DUMU e-lá-lí KIŠIB en-nam-a-šur DUMU en-na-sú-in KIŠIB dan-a-šur DUMU šál-mì-ḫi-im KIŠIB pu-šu-ki-in DUMU sú-e-a
eng: Seal of Ali-ahum son of Elāli, seal of Ennam-Aššur son of Enna-Suen, seal of Dan-Aššur son of Šalim-ahum, seal of Pūšu-kēn son of Sueyya.
transliteration: KIŠIB a-lá-ḫi-im DUMU e-lá-lí KIŠIB en-nam-a-šur DUMU en-na-sú-in KIŠIB dan-a-šur DUMU šál-mì-ḫi-im KIŠIB pu-šu-ki-in DUMU sú-e-a
translation: Seal of Ali-ahum son of Elāli, seal of Ennam-Aššur son of Enna-Suen, seal of Dan-Aššur son of Šalim-ahum, seal of Pūšu-kēn son of Sueyya.

akk: šu-ma a-šur-ta-ak-lá-ku na-ru-qám a-na en-nam-a-šur i-tí-dí-in i-na 1 GÚ 2 ma-na KÙ.BABBAR ša ṭup-pì-šu ḫa-ar-mì-im ša en-nam-a-šur 2 ma-na KÙ.BABBAR i-lá-qé-ma 3 ma-na KÙ.GI iš-tí um-me-a-ni-šu šu-mì pu-šu-ki-in i-lá-pá-at šu-ma a-šur-ta-ak-lá-ku qá-sú im-ta-ḫa-aṣ <gap>-20 ma-na KÙ.BABBAR ki-ma 10 ma-na KÙ.GI iš-tù ḫa-muš-tim ša i-dí-a-šur ù i-ku-nim a-na 46 ḫa-am-ša-tim pu-šu-ki-in a-na en-nam-a-šur i-da-an-ma na-ru-uq en-nam-a-šur a-li ṭá-bu-šu-ni pu-šu-ki-in ú-šé-ra-áb šu-ma pu-šu-ki-in na-ru-qám a-na en-nam-a-šur lá i-tí-dí-in 10 ma-na KÙ.BABBAR ṣa-ru-pá-am pu-šu-ki-in a-na en-nam-a-šur i-ša-qal šu-ma en-nam-a-šur qá-tám im-ta-ḫa-aṣ 10 ma-na KÙ.BABBAR ṣa-ru-pá-am a-na pu-šu-ki-in i-ša-qal ta-aḫ-sí-is-tum a-ni-tum me-ḫi-ir ṭup-pì-im ḫa-ar-mì-im ša ku-nu-uk pu
eng: If Aššur-taklāku has given a joint-stock investment to Ennam-Aššur, then he will receive 2 minas of silver out of the 1 talent 2 minas of silver in his certified tablet, belonging to Ennam-Aššur, and he will write down 3 minas of gold in the name of Pūšu-kēn with his other investors. If Aššur-taklāku has refused him, then Pūšu-kēn will give 40? minas of silver, representing 10 minas of gold, within 46 weeks reckoned from the week of Iddin-Aššur and Ikūnum, and Pūšu-kēn will make Ennam-Aššur's joint-stock investment enter wherever it is favourable for him. If Pūšu-kēn has not given a joint-stock investment to Ennam-Aššur (in time), Pūšu-kēn must give 10 minas of refined silver to Ennam-Aššur. If Ennam-Aššur has refused, he must pay 10 minas of refined silver to Pūšu-kēn. This memorandum is a copy of a certified tablet sealed by Pūšu-kēn.
transliteration: šu-ma a-šur-ta-ak-lá-ku na-ru-qám a-na en-nam-a-šur i-tí-dí-in i-na 1 GÚ 2 ma-na KÙ.BABBAR ša ṭup-pì-šu ḫa-ar-mì-im ša en-nam-a-šur 2 ma-na KÙ.BABBAR i-lá-qé-ma 3 ma-na KÙ.GI iš-tí um-me-a-ni-šu šu-mì pu-šu-ki-in i-lá-pá-at šu-ma a-šur-ta-ak-lá-ku qá-sú im-ta-ḫa-aṣ <gap>-20 ma-na KÙ.BABBAR ki-ma 10 ma-na KÙ.GI iš-tù ḫa-muš-tim ša i-dí-a-šur ù i-ku-nim a-na 46 ḫa-am-ša-tim pu-šu-ki-in a-na en-nam-a-šur i-da-an-ma na-ru-uq en-nam-a-šur a-li ṭá-bu-šu-ni pu-šu-ki-in ú-šé-ra-áb šu-ma pu-šu-ki-in na-ru-qám a-na en-nam-a-šur lá i-tí-dí-in 10 ma-na KÙ.BABBAR ṣa-ru-pá-am pu-šu-ki-in a-na en-nam-a-šur i-ša-qal šu-ma en-nam-a-šur qá-tám im-ta-ḫa-aṣ 10 ma-na KÙ.BABBAR ṣa-ru-pá-am a-na pu-šu-ki-in i-ša-qal ta-aḫ-sí-is-tum a-ni-tum me-ḫi-ir ṭup-pì-im ḫa-ar-mì-im ša ku-nu-uk pu
translation: If Aššur-taklāku has given a joint-stock investment to Ennam-Aššur, then he will receive 2 minas of silver out of the 1 talent 2 minas of silver in his certified tablet, belonging to Ennam-Aššur, and he will write down 3 minas of gold in the name of Pūšu-kēn with his other investors. If Aššur-taklāku has refused him, then Pūšu-kēn will give 40? minas of silver, representing 10 minas of gold, within 46 weeks reckoned from the week of Iddin-Aššur and Ikūnum, and Pūšu-kēn will make Ennam-Aššur's joint-stock investment enter wherever it is favourable for him. If Pūšu-kēn has not given a joint-stock investment to Ennam-Aššur (in time), Pūšu-kēn must give 10 minas of refined silver to Ennam-Aššur. If Ennam-Aššur has refused, he must pay 10 minas of refined silver to Pūšu-kēn. This memorandum is a copy of a certified tablet sealed by Pūšu-kēn.

akk: KIŠIB a-šur-i-mì-tí DUMU du-dí-ki KIŠIB ú-ṣur-ša-a-šur DUMU a-ku-a KIŠIB a-šur-ba-ni
eng: Seal of Aššur-imittī son of Dudiki, seal of Uṣur-ša-Aššur son of Akuwa, seal of Aššur-bāni,
transliteration: KIŠIB a-šur-i-mì-tí DUMU du-dí-ki KIŠIB ú-ṣur-ša-a-šur DUMU a-ku-a KIŠIB a-šur-ba-ni
translation: Seal of Aššur-imittī son of Dudiki, seal of Uṣur-ša-Aššur son of Akuwa, seal of Aššur-bāni,

akk: kà-al-bi₄-im 15 ma-na URUDU ší-kam a-na šu-mì en-um-a-šur DUMU šál-ma-a-šur a-na ta-áp-ḫi-ri-im áš-qúl
eng: the dog". I paid 15 minas of -copper to the temple-funds on behalf of Ennam-Aššur son of Šalim-Aššur."
transliteration: kà-al-bi₄-im 15 ma-na URUDU ší-kam a-na šu-mì en-um-a-šur DUMU šál-ma-a-šur a-na ta-áp-ḫi-ri-im áš-qúl
translation: the dog". I paid 15 minas of -copper to the temple-funds on behalf of Ennam-Aššur son of Šalim-Aššur."

akk: KIŠIB ba-zi-a
eng: Seal of Baziya,
transliteration: KIŠIB ba-zi-a
translation: Seal of Baziya,

akk: šu-ḫu-bur ù ku-ul-ma-ku-ul-ma na-áš-pé-er-tí ma-ma-ḫi-ir ša 3 ma-na KÙ ú-šé-ru-šu-nu-tí-ni
eng: Šu-hubur and Kulma-kulma; Missive from Man-mahir stating that I released 3 minas of silver to them.
transliteration: šu-ḫu-bur ù ku-ul-ma-ku-ul-ma na-áš-pé-er-tí ma-ma-ḫi-ir ša 3 ma-na KÙ ú-šé-ru-šu-nu-tí-ni
translation: Šu-hubur and Kulma-kulma; Missive from Man-mahir stating that I released 3 minas of silver to them.

akk: a-na ku-li-a DUMU a-lá-bi₄-im ḫa-nu-nu DUMU en-um-a-šur ú-ṣur-ša-a-šùr DUMU PÚZUR-a-šur ú a-šur-lá-ma-sí DUMU a-šur-na-da
eng: To Kuliya, son of Ali-abum, Hanunu, son of Ennum-Assur, Usur-sa-Assur, son of Puzur-Assur and Assur-lamassi, son of Assur-nada,
transliteration: a-na ku-li-a DUMU a-lá-bi₄-im ḫa-nu-nu DUMU en-um-a-šur ú-ṣur-ša-a-šùr DUMU PÚZUR-a-šur ú a-šur-lá-ma-sí DUMU a-šur-na-da
translation: To Kuliya, son of Ali-abum, Hanunu, son of Ennum-Assur, Usur-sa-Assur, son of Puzur-Assur and Assur-lamassi, son of Assur-nada,

akk: KIŠIB pì-lá-aḫ-IŠTAR DUMU a-šur-na-da
eng: seal of Pilah-Istar son of Assur-nada.
transliteration: KIŠIB pì-lá-aḫ-IŠTAR DUMU a-šur-na-da
translation: seal of Pilah-Istar son of Assur-nada.

akk: KIŠIB pí-la-aḫ-IŠTAR DUMU i-bi₄-sú-a KIŠIB šu-ma-li-bi₄-a-šur DUMU ku-ús-ku-sí-im KIŠIB en-na-sú-in DUMU a-mur-{d}UTU KIŠIB a-al-DU₁₀ DUMU a-mur-{d}UTU
eng: Seal of Pilah-Ištar, son of Ibisua, seal of Šumma-libbi-Aššur, son of Kuskusum, seal of Ennam-Suen, son of Amur-Šamaš, seal of Āl-ṭāb, son of Amur-Šamaš,
transliteration: KIŠIB pí-la-aḫ-IŠTAR DUMU i-bi₄-sú-a KIŠIB šu-ma-li-bi₄-a-šur DUMU ku-ús-ku-sí-im KIŠIB en-na-sú-in DUMU a-mur-{d}UTU KIŠIB a-al-DU₁₀ DUMU a-mur-{d}UTU
translation: Seal of Pilah-Ištar, son of Ibisua, seal of Šumma-libbi-Aššur, son of Kuskusum, seal of Ennam-Suen, son of Amur-Šamaš, seal of Āl-ṭāb, son of Amur-Šamaš,

akk: ša ḫu-bu-ul en-na-sú-in ù a-al-DU₁₀ me-er-e a-mur-{d}UTU 3.5 ma-na 5 GÍN KÙ.BABBAR ṣa-ru-pu-um iš-tù ḫa-mu-uš-tim ša a-šùr-i-mì-tí ù a-mur-IŠTAR a-na 1 ma-na-im 2 GÍN.TA i-na ITU.KAM ṣí-ib-tám ú-ṣú-bu KÙ.BABBAR i-na qá-qá-ad šál-mì-šu-nu ra-ki-is ITU.KAM ša sà-ra-tim li-mu-um ša i qá-té sú-kà-lí-a il-qé-ú
eng: (to the effect) that the debtof Ennam-Suen andĀl-ṭāb, sons of Amur-Šamaš, is 3.5 minas 5 shekels of refined silver. From the week of Aššur-imittī and Amur-Ištar they will add per 1 mina2 shekels per month as interest.For the silver they are jointly liable. Month II,eponymy of the one who took over from Sukkalliya.
transliteration: ša ḫu-bu-ul en-na-sú-in ù a-al-DU₁₀ me-er-e a-mur-{d}UTU 3.5 ma-na 5 GÍN KÙ.BABBAR ṣa-ru-pu-um iš-tù ḫa-mu-uš-tim ša a-šùr-i-mì-tí ù a-mur-IŠTAR a-na 1 ma-na-im 2 GÍN.TA i-na ITU.KAM ṣí-ib-tám ú-ṣú-bu KÙ.BABBAR i-na qá-qá-ad šál-mì-šu-nu ra-ki-is ITU.KAM ša sà-ra-tim li-mu-um ša i qá-té sú-kà-lí-a il-qé-ú
translation: (to the effect) that the debtof Ennam-Suen andĀl-ṭāb, sons of Amur-Šamaš, is 3.5 minas 5 shekels of refined silver. From the week of Aššur-imittī and Amur-Ištar they will add per 1 mina2 shekels per month as interest.For the silver they are jointly liable. Month II,eponymy of the one who took over from Sukkalliya.

akk: KIŠIB en-na-nim DUMU šu-bé-lim KIŠIB ú-ṣú-ur-ša-a-šur DUMU a-mur-i-a
eng: Seal of Ennānum son of Šu-Bēlum, seal of Uṣur-ša-Aššur son of Amurriya.
transliteration: KIŠIB en-na-nim DUMU šu-bé-lim KIŠIB ú-ṣú-ur-ša-a-šur DUMU a-mur-i-a
translation: Seal of Ennānum son of Šu-Bēlum, seal of Uṣur-ša-Aššur son of Amurriya.

akk: 13.5 GÍN KÙ.BABBAR ṣa-ru-pá-am i-na ṣé-er ú-ṣú-ur-ša-a-šur DUMU a-mur-i-a i-ri-šum i-šu iš-tù ḫa-mu-uš₁₀-tim ša a-šur-i-mì-tí ù a-mur-IŠTAR 0.3333 GÍN.TA i-na ITU.KAM ú-ṣa-áb
eng: Uṣur-ša-Aššur son of Amurriya owes 13.5 shekels of refined silver to Irišum. Reckoned from the week of Aššur-imittī and Amur-Ištar he must add interest at the rate 0.3333 shekel per month.
transliteration: 13.5 GÍN KÙ.BABBAR ṣa-ru-pá-am i-na ṣé-er ú-ṣú-ur-ša-a-šur DUMU a-mur-i-a i-ri-šum i-šu iš-tù ḫa-mu-uš₁₀-tim ša a-šur-i-mì-tí ù a-mur-IŠTAR 0.3333 GÍN.TA i-na ITU.KAM ú-ṣa-áb
translation: Uṣur-ša-Aššur son of Amurriya owes 13.5 shekels of refined silver to Irišum. Reckoned from the week of Aššur-imittī and Amur-Ištar he must add interest at the rate 0.3333 shekel per month.

akk: KIŠIB šu-bé-lim DUMU ku-zi-zi-a
eng: Seal of Šu-Bēlum son of Kuziziya;
transliteration: KIŠIB šu-bé-lim DUMU ku-zi-zi-a
translation: Seal of Šu-Bēlum son of Kuziziya;

akk: KIŠIB a-mur-{d}UTU DUMU mì-šu-ra-bi KIŠIB na-bi-sú-in DUMU {d}AB-ba-ni KIŠIB i-ku-pí-a-šùr DUMU šu-IŠTAR
eng: Seal of Amur-Šamaš son of Miššu-rabi, seal of Nabi-Suen son of Illil-bāni, seal of Ikūn-pī-Aššur son of Šu-Ištar.
transliteration: KIŠIB a-mur-{d}UTU DUMU mì-šu-ra-bi KIŠIB na-bi-sú-in DUMU {d}AB-ba-ni KIŠIB i-ku-pí-a-šùr DUMU šu-IŠTAR
translation: Seal of Amur-Šamaš son of Miššu-rabi, seal of Nabi-Suen son of Illil-bāni, seal of Ikūn-pī-Aššur son of Šu-Ištar.

akk: a-na a-wa-tim a-ni-a-tim kà-ru-um kà-ni-iš i-dí-ni-a-tí-ma ṭup-pá-am ší-bu-tí-ni IGI GÍR ša a-šùr ni-dí-in
eng: The Kanesh colony gave us for these proceedings and we gave our testimony before Aššur's dagger.
transliteration: a-na a-wa-tim a-ni-a-tim kà-ru-um kà-ni-iš i-dí-ni-a-tí-ma ṭup-pá-am ší-bu-tí-ni IGI GÍR ša a-šùr ni-dí-in
translation: The Kanesh colony gave us for these proceedings and we gave our testimony before Aššur's dagger.

akk: KIŠIB kà-ri-im
eng: Seal of the
transliteration: KIŠIB kà-ri-im
translation: Seal of the

akk: KIŠIB šu-nu-nu DUMU a-mur-IŠTAR
eng: Seal of Šu-Nūnu son of Amur-Ištar.
transliteration: KIŠIB šu-nu-nu DUMU a-mur-IŠTAR
translation: Seal of Šu-Nūnu son of Amur-Ištar.

akk: ṭup-pu-um ša ší-bu-tí-a ša IGI šu-ga-ri-a-im ša a-šùr wa-bar-tum ša ša-mu-ḫa i-dí-ni-ma ṭup-pá-am a-dí-in
eng: Tablet with my testimony before the šugarri'ā'um of Aššur. The Šamuha station gave me, and I gave the tablet.
transliteration: ṭup-pu-um ša ší-bu-tí-a ša IGI šu-ga-ri-a-im ša a-šùr wa-bar-tum ša ša-mu-ḫa i-dí-ni-ma ṭup-pá-am a-dí-in
translation: Tablet with my testimony before the šugarri'ā'um of Aššur. The Šamuha station gave me, and I gave the tablet.

akk: KIŠIB a-ku-za DUMU šu-a-nim KIŠIB ú-ra-a DUMU ma-na-na KIŠIB a-šur-ba-ni DUMU ša-lim-a-šùr
eng: Seal of Akuza son of Šu-Anum, seal of Uraya son of Manana, seal of Aššur-bāni son of Šalim-Aššur.
transliteration: KIŠIB a-ku-za DUMU šu-a-nim KIŠIB ú-ra-a DUMU ma-na-na KIŠIB a-šur-ba-ni DUMU ša-lim-a-šùr
translation: Seal of Akuza son of Šu-Anum, seal of Uraya son of Manana, seal of Aššur-bāni son of Šalim-Aššur.

akk: a-na a-wa-tim a-ni-a-tim kà-ru-um kà-ni-iš-ki i-dí-ni-a-tí-ma IGI GÍR ša a-šùr ší-bu-tí-ni ni-dí-in
eng: The Kanesh colony gave us for these proceedings and we gave our testimony before Aššur's dagger.
transliteration: a-na a-wa-tim a-ni-a-tim kà-ru-um kà-ni-iš-ki i-dí-ni-a-tí-ma IGI GÍR ša a-šùr ší-bu-tí-ni ni-dí-in
translation: The Kanesh colony gave us for these proceedings and we gave our testimony before Aššur's dagger.

akk: a-na a-lá-ḫi-im
eng: To Ali-ahum;
transliteration: a-na a-lá-ḫi-im
translation: To Ali-ahum;

akk: KIŠIB a-mur-ša-ra-sà
eng: seal of Amur-šarrassa.
transliteration: KIŠIB a-mur-ša-ra-sà
translation: seal of Amur-šarrassa.

akk: KIŠIB DINGIR.SIPA DUMU a-ta-a KIŠIB šu-lá-ba-an DUMU ib-ni-lí KIŠIB PUZUR₄-a-bé-eḫ DUMU {d}a-šur-{d}UTU-ši
eng: Seal of Ilī-rē'ī, son of Ataya, seal of Šu-Labān, son of Ibni-ilī, seal of Puzur-Abeh, son of Aššur-šamšī,
transliteration: KIŠIB DINGIR.SIPA DUMU a-ta-a KIŠIB šu-lá-ba-an DUMU ib-ni-lí KIŠIB PUZUR₄-a-bé-eḫ DUMU {d}a-šur-{d}UTU-ši
translation: Seal of Ilī-rē'ī, son of Ataya, seal of Šu-Labān, son of Ibni-ilī, seal of Puzur-Abeh, son of Aššur-šamšī,

akk: KIŠIB šu-nu-nu DUMU a-mur-IŠTAR KIŠIB zu-zu DUMU en-um-ì-lí KIŠIB {d}MAR.TU-ba-ni DUMU šu-la-áb-ra-at
eng: Seal of Šu-Nūnu son of Amur-Ištar, seal of Zuzu son of Ennam-ilī, seal of Amurrum-bāni son of Šu-Ilabrat.
transliteration: KIŠIB šu-nu-nu DUMU a-mur-IŠTAR KIŠIB zu-zu DUMU en-um-ì-lí KIŠIB {d}MAR.TU-ba-ni DUMU šu-la-áb-ra-at
translation: Seal of Šu-Nūnu son of Amur-Ištar, seal of Zuzu son of Ennam-ilī, seal of Amurrum-bāni son of Šu-Ilabrat.

akk: KIŠIB ša-qí-il₅
eng: Seal of the
transliteration: KIŠIB ša-qí-il₅
translation: Seal of the

akk: da-tim ku-li-a ší-ip-ri-im ša kà-ri-im kà-ni-iš ù kà-ri-im dur₄-ḫu-mì-it a-na kà-ar-kà-ar-ma ù wa-ba-ra-tim a-dí kà-ri-im kà-ni-iš
eng: -payers, of Kuliya, the messenger of Kanesh, and of Durhumit, to every single and the, until Kanesh.
transliteration: da-tim ku-li-a ší-ip-ri-im ša kà-ri-im kà-ni-iš ù kà-ri-im dur₄-ḫu-mì-it a-na kà-ar-kà-ar-ma ù wa-ba-ra-tim a-dí kà-ri-im kà-ni-iš
translation: -payers, of Kuliya, the messenger of Kanesh, and of Durhumit, to every single and the, until Kanesh.

akk: KIŠIB ma-ma-ḫi-ir
eng: Seal of Man-mahir,
transliteration: KIŠIB ma-ma-ḫi-ir
translation: Seal of Man-mahir,

akk: dan-a-šur DUMU PUZUR₄-a-šur a-lá-ḫi-im a-ḫi-šu ù šu-IŠTAR DUMU šu-ki-tim a-na en-um-a-šur DUMU ša-lim-a-šur
eng: Dan-Aššur son of Puzur-Aššur, Ali-ahum his brother and Šu-Ištar son of Šukkutum; to Ennam-Aššur son of Šalim-Aššur.
transliteration: dan-a-šur DUMU PUZUR₄-a-šur a-lá-ḫi-im a-ḫi-šu ù šu-IŠTAR DUMU šu-ki-tim a-na en-um-a-šur DUMU ša-lim-a-šur
translation: Dan-Aššur son of Puzur-Aššur, Ali-ahum his brother and Šu-Ištar son of Šukkutum; to Ennam-Aššur son of Šalim-Aššur.

akk: KIŠIB ṣí-lu-uš-da-gan KIŠIB a-šùr-ba-ni DUMU i-dí-a-bi-im KIŠIB i-dí-a-bi-im DUMU a-šùr-ba-ni
eng: Seal of Ṣilluš-Dagān, seal of Aššur-bāni son of Iddin-abum, seal of Iddin-abum son of Aššur-bāni.
transliteration: KIŠIB ṣí-lu-uš-da-gan KIŠIB a-šùr-ba-ni DUMU i-dí-a-bi-im KIŠIB i-dí-a-bi-im DUMU a-šùr-ba-ni
translation: Seal of Ṣilluš-Dagān, seal of Aššur-bāni son of Iddin-abum, seal of Iddin-abum son of Aššur-bāni.

akk: 20 ma-na URUDU ma-sí-am i-ṣé-er i-dí-a-bi-im DUMU a-šùr-ba-ni ma-ma-ḫi-ir i-šu ITU.KAM ku-zal-li li-mu-um bu-zu-ta-a a-na ša-na-at i-ša-qal šu-ma lá iš-qú-ul a-na 10 ma-na-e 1 ma-na.TA i-na ITU.KAM ṣí-ib-tám ú-ṣa-áb
eng: Iddin-abum son of Aššur-bāni owes 20 minas of washed copper to Man-mahir. Month Kuzallu, eponymy Buzutaya. He will pay within a year. If he has not paid he will pay interest at the rate 1 mina per 10 minas per month.
transliteration: 20 ma-na URUDU ma-sí-am i-ṣé-er i-dí-a-bi-im DUMU a-šùr-ba-ni ma-ma-ḫi-ir i-šu ITU.KAM ku-zal-li li-mu-um bu-zu-ta-a a-na ša-na-at i-ša-qal šu-ma lá iš-qú-ul a-na 10 ma-na-e 1 ma-na.TA i-na ITU.KAM ṣí-ib-tám ú-ṣa-áb
translation: Iddin-abum son of Aššur-bāni owes 20 minas of washed copper to Man-mahir. Month Kuzallu, eponymy Buzutaya. He will pay within a year. If he has not paid he will pay interest at the rate 1 mina per 10 minas per month.

akk: KIŠIB šu-mì-a-bi-a DUMU zu-zu-ú KIŠIB lá-ba-na-da DUMU i-dí-sú-en₆ KIŠIB a-šùr-DU₁₀ DUMU e-na-ma-nim
eng: Seal of Šumi-abiya, son of Zuzū, seal of Labān-nādā, son of Iddin-Suen, seal of Aššur-ṭāb, son of Ennamānum.
transliteration: KIŠIB šu-mì-a-bi-a DUMU zu-zu-ú KIŠIB lá-ba-na-da DUMU i-dí-sú-en₆ KIŠIB a-šùr-DU₁₀ DUMU e-na-ma-nim
translation: Seal of Šumi-abiya, son of Zuzū, seal of Labān-nādā, son of Iddin-Suen, seal of Aššur-ṭāb, son of Ennamānum.

akk: 1 GÚ AN.NA ku-nu-ki ša a-lim{ki} i-ṣé-er a-šur-DU₁₀ a-ḫu-qar i-šu i-tù-a-ar DINGIR-šu-GAL ṣú-ḫa-ri-im ša a-šur-DU₁₀ iš-tù a-lim{ki} i-na ri-i-iš AN.NA 5 GÚ URUDU SIG₅ ma-sí-am ša-bu-ra-am a-na a-šur-DU₁₀ a-ḫu-qar i-ša-qal 1 GÚ AN.NA-ak-šu a-ḫu-qar i-lá-qé
eng: 1 talent of tin with seals of the city, Aššur-ṭāb owes to Ahu-waqar.When Ilšu-rabi, the servant of Aššur-ṭab, returns fromthe city, immediately when (he receives) the tin, 5 talents of refined copper of good quality, in pieces, Ahu-waqar will pay to Aššur-ṭāb (and) Ahu-waqar will get his 1 talent of tin.
transliteration: 1 GÚ AN.NA ku-nu-ki ša a-lim{ki} i-ṣé-er a-šur-DU₁₀ a-ḫu-qar i-šu i-tù-a-ar DINGIR-šu-GAL ṣú-ḫa-ri-im ša a-šur-DU₁₀ iš-tù a-lim{ki} i-na ri-i-iš AN.NA 5 GÚ URUDU SIG₅ ma-sí-am ša-bu-ra-am a-na a-šur-DU₁₀ a-ḫu-qar i-ša-qal 1 GÚ AN.NA-ak-šu a-ḫu-qar i-lá-qé
translation: 1 talent of tin with seals of the city, Aššur-ṭāb owes to Ahu-waqar.When Ilšu-rabi, the servant of Aššur-ṭab, returns fromthe city, immediately when (he receives) the tin, 5 talents of refined copper of good quality, in pieces, Ahu-waqar will pay to Aššur-ṭāb (and) Ahu-waqar will get his 1 talent of tin.

akk: a-na lu-zi-na DUMU a-šùr-ba-ni a-dí-da DUMU wa-ar-dí-i-li-šu ù a-lá-ḫi-im DUMU šál-ma-a-šùr
eng: To Luzina son of Aššur-bāni, Adida son of Warad-ilišu and Ali-ahum son of Šalim-Aššur;
transliteration: a-na lu-zi-na DUMU a-šùr-ba-ni a-dí-da DUMU wa-ar-dí-i-li-šu ù a-lá-ḫi-im DUMU šál-ma-a-šùr
translation: To Luzina son of Aššur-bāni, Adida son of Warad-ilišu and Ali-ahum son of Šalim-Aššur;

akk: KIŠIB en-na-sú-in DUMU i-dí-a-bi-im
eng: seal of Enna-Suen son of Iddin-abum.
transliteration: KIŠIB en-na-sú-in DUMU i-dí-a-bi-im
translation: seal of Enna-Suen son of Iddin-abum.

akk: KIŠIB a-šur-{d}UTU-ši DUMU šu-IŠTAR KIŠIB a-šur-lá-ma-sí KIŠIB dan-a-šur DUMU ku-sú-sà-ri-im
eng: Seal of Aššur-šamšī, son of Šu-Ištar, seal of Aššur-lamassī, seal of Dān-Aššur, son of Kususārum.
transliteration: KIŠIB a-šur-{d}UTU-ši DUMU šu-IŠTAR KIŠIB a-šur-lá-ma-sí KIŠIB dan-a-šur DUMU ku-sú-sà-ri-im
translation: Seal of Aššur-šamšī, son of Šu-Ištar, seal of Aššur-lamassī, seal of Dān-Aššur, son of Kususārum.

akk: <gap> ma-na KÙ ṣa-ru-pá-am i-ṣé-er a-šur-lá-ma-sí la-ma-sà-tum tí-šu iš-tù ḫa-mu-uš-tim ša kur-ub-IŠTAR ù ì-lí-iš-ta-kál a-na 4 ITU.KAM i-ša-qal šu-ma lá iš-qúl ki-ma a-wa-at kà-ri-im ṣí-ib-tám ú-ṣa-áb
eng: <gap> mina of refined silver Aššur-lamassī owes to Lamassutum. From the week of Kurub-Ištar and Iliš-tikal he will pay in 4 months. If he does not pay, he will add interest in accordance with the regulation of the colony.
transliteration: <gap> ma-na KÙ ṣa-ru-pá-am i-ṣé-er a-šur-lá-ma-sí la-ma-sà-tum tí-šu iš-tù ḫa-mu-uš-tim ša kur-ub-IŠTAR ù ì-lí-iš-ta-kál a-na 4 ITU.KAM i-ša-qal šu-ma lá iš-qúl ki-ma a-wa-at kà-ri-im ṣí-ib-tám ú-ṣa-áb
translation: <gap> mina of refined silver Aššur-lamassī owes to Lamassutum. From the week of Kurub-Ištar and Iliš-tikal he will pay in 4 months. If he does not pay, he will add interest in accordance with the regulation of the colony.

akk: KIŠIB bé-lí-a DUMU DINGIR-kur-ub KIŠIB ša-lim-a-šur DUMU {d}IM.SIG₅ KIŠIB a-lá-ḫi-im DUMU šu-ku-bi-im KIŠIB DU₁₀-pí-a-šùr DUMU a-lá-ḫi-im KIŠIB {d}UTU-a-bi DUMU sú-sà-nim
eng: Seal of Bēliya son of Ilī-kurub, seal of Šalim-Aššur son of Adad-damiq, seal of Ali-ahum son of Šu-Kūbum, seal of Ṭāb-pī-Aššur son of Ali-ahum, seal of Šamaš-abī son of Sūsānum.
transliteration: KIŠIB bé-lí-a DUMU DINGIR-kur-ub KIŠIB ša-lim-a-šur DUMU {d}IM.SIG₅ KIŠIB a-lá-ḫi-im DUMU šu-ku-bi-im KIŠIB DU₁₀-pí-a-šùr DUMU a-lá-ḫi-im KIŠIB {d}UTU-a-bi DUMU sú-sà-nim
translation: Seal of Bēliya son of Ilī-kurub, seal of Šalim-Aššur son of Adad-damiq, seal of Ali-ahum son of Šu-Kūbum, seal of Ṭāb-pī-Aššur son of Ali-ahum, seal of Šamaš-abī son of Sūsānum.

akk: 2 GÚ URUDU ma-sí-am ša DU₁₀-pí-a-šùr ki-ma {d}UTU-a-bi a-na lu-zi i-dí-nu-ma ṭup-pá-am ša lu-zi DU₁₀-pí-a-šur iḫ-ri-mu um-ma DU₁₀-pí-a-šùr-ma šu-ma URUDU i-na kà-ni-iš{ki} {d}UTU-a-bi ša ki-ma ku-a-tí il₅-qé-ú a-na 1 GÚ URUDU ma-sí-im ša tal-qé-ú 2 ma-na KÙ.BABBAR ta-ša-qal DU₁₀-pí-a-šur ù {d}UTU-a-bi ša-bu-ú ṭup-pu-um ša 2 ma-na KÙ.BABBAR ša ta-ar-ki-is-tí lu-zi ša e-li-a-ni sà-ar
eng: As to the 2 talents of washed copper that Ṭāb-pī-Aššur gave to Luzi on behalf of Šamaš-abī, and for which Ṭāb-pī-Aššur certified a tablet for Luzi: Ṭāb-pī-Aššur said: If your representatives have received the copper in Kanesh (from) Šamaš-abī, you must pay 2 minas of silver for every talent of washed copper." Ṭāb-pī-Aššur and Šamaš-abī have been satisfied. Any tablet concerning 2 minas of silver from the contract of Luzi that may appear will be invalid."
transliteration: 2 GÚ URUDU ma-sí-am ša DU₁₀-pí-a-šùr ki-ma {d}UTU-a-bi a-na lu-zi i-dí-nu-ma ṭup-pá-am ša lu-zi DU₁₀-pí-a-šur iḫ-ri-mu um-ma DU₁₀-pí-a-šùr-ma šu-ma URUDU i-na kà-ni-iš{ki} {d}UTU-a-bi ša ki-ma ku-a-tí il₅-qé-ú a-na 1 GÚ URUDU ma-sí-im ša tal-qé-ú 2 ma-na KÙ.BABBAR ta-ša-qal DU₁₀-pí-a-šur ù {d}UTU-a-bi ša-bu-ú ṭup-pu-um ša 2 ma-na KÙ.BABBAR ša ta-ar-ki-is-tí lu-zi ša e-li-a-ni sà-ar
translation: As to the 2 talents of washed copper that Ṭāb-pī-Aššur gave to Luzi on behalf of Šamaš-abī, and for which Ṭāb-pī-Aššur certified a tablet for Luzi: Ṭāb-pī-Aššur said: If your representatives have received the copper in Kanesh (from) Šamaš-abī, you must pay 2 minas of silver for every talent of washed copper." Ṭāb-pī-Aššur and Šamaš-abī have been satisfied. Any tablet concerning 2 minas of silver from the contract of Luzi that may appear will be invalid."

akk: KIŠIB a-mur-{d}UTU DUMU mì-šar-GAL KIŠIB la-qé-pí-im DUMU {d}AB-ba-ni KIŠIB e-la-ma DUMU i-dí-sú-in
eng: Seal of Amur-Šamaš, son of Mīšar-rabi, seal of Lā-qēpum, son of Ellil-bāni, seal of Elamma, son of Iddin-Suen,
transliteration: KIŠIB a-mur-{d}UTU DUMU mì-šar-GAL KIŠIB la-qé-pí-im DUMU {d}AB-ba-ni KIŠIB e-la-ma DUMU i-dí-sú-in
translation: Seal of Amur-Šamaš, son of Mīšar-rabi, seal of Lā-qēpum, son of Ellil-bāni, seal of Elamma, son of Iddin-Suen,

akk: ša ḫu-bu-ul e-la-ma DUMU i-dí-sú-in 0.5 ma-na 6 GÍN KÙ.BABBAR ṣa-ru-pá-am i-ṣé-er e-la-ma im-dí-lúm i-šu ITU.KAM kán-wár-ta li-mu-um i-dí-a-šùr DUMU ku-bi-dí um-ma e-la-ma-ma 1 ma-na 6 GÍN KÙ.BABBAR-áp-kà a-mur-IŠTAR il₅-qé e-la-ma a-na im-dí-lim a-mur-IŠTAR ú-kà-an-ma šu-ma i li-bi a-mur-IŠTAR lá uk-ta-in KÙ.BABBAR ù ṣí-ba-sú e-la-ma a-na im-dí-lim i-ša-qal
eng: about the debt of Elamma son of Iddin-Suen. 1 mina 6 shekels of refined silver Elamma owes to Imdī-ilum. Month IX, epoynmy of Iddin-Aššur, son of Kubīdi. Elamma said: 'Your 1 mina 6 shekels of silver Amur-Ištar has collected'. Elamma shall confirm Amur-Ištar (as having it) to Imdī-ilum and if he does not confirm that Amur-Ištar has it, Elamma will pay the silver and its interest to Imdī-ilum.
transliteration: ša ḫu-bu-ul e-la-ma DUMU i-dí-sú-in 0.5 ma-na 6 GÍN KÙ.BABBAR ṣa-ru-pá-am i-ṣé-er e-la-ma im-dí-lúm i-šu ITU.KAM kán-wár-ta li-mu-um i-dí-a-šùr DUMU ku-bi-dí um-ma e-la-ma-ma 1 ma-na 6 GÍN KÙ.BABBAR-áp-kà a-mur-IŠTAR il₅-qé e-la-ma a-na im-dí-lim a-mur-IŠTAR ú-kà-an-ma šu-ma i li-bi a-mur-IŠTAR lá uk-ta-in KÙ.BABBAR ù ṣí-ba-sú e-la-ma a-na im-dí-lim i-ša-qal
translation: about the debt of Elamma son of Iddin-Suen. 1 mina 6 shekels of refined silver Elamma owes to Imdī-ilum. Month IX, epoynmy of Iddin-Aššur, son of Kubīdi. Elamma said: 'Your 1 mina 6 shekels of silver Amur-Ištar has collected'. Elamma shall confirm Amur-Ištar (as having it) to Imdī-ilum and if he does not confirm that Amur-Ištar has it, Elamma will pay the silver and its interest to Imdī-ilum.

akk: KIŠIB šu-ku-bi₄-im DUMU qá-a-tim KIŠIB a-lá-ḫi-im DUMU a-šur-ma-lik KIŠIB ku-na-a DUMU ma-na-na
eng: Seal of Šu-Kūbum, son of Qa'atum, seal of Ali-ahum, son of Aššur-mālik, seal of Kunnāya, son of Manana.
transliteration: KIŠIB šu-ku-bi₄-im DUMU qá-a-tim KIŠIB a-lá-ḫi-im DUMU a-šur-ma-lik KIŠIB ku-na-a DUMU ma-na-na
translation: Seal of Šu-Kūbum, son of Qa'atum, seal of Ali-ahum, son of Aššur-mālik, seal of Kunnāya, son of Manana.

akk: KIŠIB MAN-a-šur
eng: Seal of Puzur-Aššur;
transliteration: KIŠIB MAN-a-šur
translation: Seal of Puzur-Aššur;

akk: a-na a-nu-<gap>-an
eng: to Anu<gap>
transliteration: a-na a-nu-<gap>-an
translation: to Anu<gap>

akk: KIŠIB a-lu-lá-a DUMU a-li-a KIŠIB a-šur-pì-lá-aḫ DUMU šu-a-nim
eng: Seal of Alulāya, son of Aliya, seal of Aššur-pilah, son of Šu-Anum.
transliteration: KIŠIB a-lu-lá-a DUMU a-li-a KIŠIB a-šur-pì-lá-aḫ DUMU šu-a-nim
translation: Seal of Alulāya, son of Aliya, seal of Aššur-pilah, son of Šu-Anum.

akk: a-mur-IŠTAR ú en-um-a-šur iṣ-bu-tù-ni-a-tí-ma dí-šu-nu ni-dí-ma i-ta-ma a-mur-IŠTAR i-na šu-ga-ri-e ša a-šur ṭup-pá-am en-um-a-šur ša be-ú-lá-at a-bi₄-šu IGI be-lá-nim ú ma-ṣí-ì-lí DUMU bu-zu-zi-im lá ú-kà-li-mu-ma i-ta-ma-ma ú en-um-a-šur ṭup-pá-am ša ku-nu-ki-šu en-um-a-šur a-na a-mur-IŠTAR i-dá-an ša ki-ma a-na be-ú-lá-at a-šur-i-mì-tí me-er-at e-lá-ma ú me-er-ú e-lá-ma a-na a-mur-IŠTAR lá i-tù-ru-ni ITU.1.KAM be-el-té-É.GAL-lim li-mu-um ša qá-té en-na-ma-nim a-wi-lu a-ni-ú-tum da-a-a-nu
eng: Amur-Ištar and Ennam-Aššur seized us and we passed for them the following verdict: Amur-Ištar will swear by the -emblem of Aššur that Ennam-Aššur did not show him the contract of the working capital of his father in the presence of Bēlānum and Maṣi-ilī, son of Buzuzum, and then, when he swears, Ennam-Aššur will give Amur-Ištar a tablet with his seal stating that the daughter of Elamma and the sons of Elamma will not raise claims against Amur-Ištar. Month I, eponymy of the successor of Ennamānum. The above mentioned men were judges.

translation: Amur-Ištar and Ennam-Aššur seized us and we passed for them the following verdict: Amur-Ištar will swear by the -emblem of Aššur that Ennam-Aššur did not show him the contract of the working capital of his father in the presence of Bēlānum and Maṣi-ilī, son of Buzuzum, and then, when he swears, Ennam-Aššur will give Amur-Ištar a tablet with his seal stating that the daughter of Elamma and the sons of Elamma will not raise claims against Amur-Ištar. eng: Concerning 14 minas of refined silver that Iddin-abum owes to Amur-Ištar. Reckoned from the week of Dalaš and Duhniš he must pay within 43 weeks. eng: Pilah-Ištar son of Aššur-rēʾī owes 6.8333 minas of refined silver to the merchant. Reckoned from the week of Enna-Suen son of Kurara he will pay back the silver in 7 weeks. If he has not paid back at the completion of his term, he will add interest at the rate 1.5 shekel per month per mina. Month Ab-šarrāni, in the eponymy Šu-Suen son of Babilum. I paid 3 shekels of silver to Šu-Ištar son of Malik-ilišu. I paid 2.5 shekels of silver for a -measure of acorns and gave them to Muza. 2 shekels of silver, the price of 2 belts for Aššur-malik son of Luzina. All this I paid on behalf of Kudātum.
transliteration: 6.8333 ma-na KÙ.BABBAR ṣa-ru-pá-am i-ṣé-er pí-lá-aḫ-IŠTAR DUMU a-šur-SIPA DAM.GÀR i-šu-ú iš-tù ḫa-mu-uš-tim ša en-na-sú-in DUMU ku-ra-ra a-na 7 ḫa-am-ša-tim KÙ.BABBAR i-ša-qal šu-ma i-na ma-lá u₄-me-šu KÙ.BABBAR lá iš-qú-ul 1.5 GÍN.TA i-na ITU.1.KAM a-na 1 ma-na-im ṣí-ib-tám ú-ṣa-áb ITU.1.KAM áb-ša-ra-ni li-mu-um šu-sú-in DUMU ba-bi-lim 3 GÍN KÙ.BABBAR a-na šu-IŠTAR DUMU ma-li-ki-il₅-šu áš-qúl 2.5 GÍN KÙ.BABBAR a-na a-lá-ni ša-ar-ša-ra-ni áš-qú-ul-ma a-na mu-za a-dí-in 2 GÍN KÙ.BABBAR ší-im 2 iš-ra-tim a-na a-šur-ma-lik DUMU lu-zi-na mì-ma a-nim a-šu-mì ku-da-tim ú-ša-qí-il₅

I paid 3 shekels of silver to Šu-Ištar son of Malik-ilišu. eng: 28 shekels of refined silver Abu-šalim, son of Aššur-bēl-awātim, owes to Ennam-Suen.From the week of the official who took over from Aššur-mālik,and Ennam-Suen, month IV, eponymy of the successor of Aššur-nādā, son of Puzur-Anna, he will pay 8 shekelswithin 3 weeks, 10 shekels within 6 weeks he will pay, and 10 shekels he will pay later, within another 10 weeks. If he does not pay when his term is over he will add interest per month in accordance with the regulation of the colony. The silver istemple fund of Aššur.
transliteration: 0.3333 ma-na 8 GÍN KÙ.BABBAR ṣa-ru-pá-am i-ṣé-er a-bu-ša-lim DUMU a-šur-be-el-a-wa-tim en-na-sú-in i-šu iš-tù ḫa-mu-uš-tim ša kà-ší-im ša qá-té a-šur-ma-lik ú en-na-sú-in ITU.KAM ma-ḫu-ur-ì-lí li-mu-um ša qá-té a-šur-na-da DUMU PUZUR₄-a-na 8 GÍN KÙ.BABBAR a-na 3 ḫa-am-ša-tim i-ša-qal 10 GÍN KÙ.BABBAR a-na 6 ḫa-am-ša-tim i-ša-qal 10 GÍN wa-ar-kà-tám a-na 10 ḫa-am-ša-tim i-ša-qal šu-ma i-na u₄-me-šu ma-al-ú-tim lá iš-qú-ul ki-ma a-wa-at kà-ri-im i ITU.KAM ṣí-ib-tám ú-ṣa-áb KÙ.BABBAR ik-ri-bu ša a-šur
translation: 28 shekels of refined silver Abu-šalim, son of Aššur-bēl-awātim, owes to Ennam-Suen.From the week of the official who took over from Aššur-mālik,and Ennam-Suen, month IV, eponymy of the successor of Aššur-nādā, son of Puzur-Anna, he will pay 8 shekelswithin 3 weeks, 10 shekels within 6 weeks he will pay, and 10 shekels he will pay later, within another 10 weeks. If he does not pay when his term is over he will add interest per month in accordance with the regulation of the colony. The silver istemple fund of Aššur.

akk: KIŠIB šu-ku-bi-im DUMU qá-a-tim KIŠIB en-nam-a-šur DUMU ú-sà-ri-a KIŠIB šu-IŠTAR DUMU da-da-nim KIŠIB a-šur-lá-ma-sí

transliteration: KIŠIB šu-ku-bi-im DUMU qá-a-tim KIŠIB en-nam-a-šur DUMU ú-sà-ri-a KIŠIB šu-IŠTAR DUMU da-da-nim KIŠIB a-šur-lá-ma-sí
translation: Seal of Šu-Kūbum, son of Qa'atum, seal of Ennam-Aššur, son of Uṣāriya, seal of Šu-Ištar, son of Dadānum, seal of Aššur-lamassī,

akk: ša 1 me-at 5 TÚG ku-ta-nu 4 GÚ 20 ma-na AN.NA ku-nu-ki 40 ma-na AN.NA qá-tim 13 TÚG šu-ru-tum qá-dum ša li-wi-tim 6 ANŠE 4 TÚG ku-ta-ni ša kà-ṣa-ri 1 TÚG ku-ta-nu ša ì-lí-a mì-ma a-nim a-na lá-qé-pí-im ni-ip-qí-id
eng: concerning 105 -textiles, 4 talents 20 minas of tin under seals, 40 minas of loose tin, 13 dark textiles, including those for wrapping, 6 donkeys, 4 -textiles of the transporters, 1 -textile of Iliya - all this we entrusted to Lā-qēpum.
transliteration: ša 1 me-at 5 TÚG ku-ta-nu 4 GÚ 20 ma-na AN.NA ku-nu-ki 40 ma-na AN.NA qá-tim 13 TÚG šu-ru-tum qá-dum ša li-wi-tim 6 ANŠE 4 TÚG ku-ta-ni ša kà-ṣa-ri 1 TÚG ku-ta-nu ša ì-lí-a mì-ma a-nim a-na lá-qé-pí-im ni-ip-qí-id
translation: concerning 105 -textiles, 4 talents 20 minas of tin under seals, 40 minas of loose tin, 13 dark textiles, including those for wrapping, 6 donkeys, 4 -textiles of the transporters, 1 -textile of Iliya - all this we entrusted to Lā-qēpum.

akk: KIŠIB šu-nu-nu DUMU a-mur-IŠTAR KIŠIB zi-ki-ki DUMU a-šur-SIPA KIŠIB a-bu-ša-lim DUMU PUZUR₄.IŠTAR
eng: Seal of Šu-Nūnu son of Amur-Ištar, seal of Zikiki son of Aššur-rē'ī, seal of Abu-šalim son of Puzur-Ištar.
transliteration: KIŠIB šu-nu-nu DUMU a-mur-IŠTAR KIŠIB zi-ki-ki DUMU a-šur-SIPA KIŠIB a-bu-ša-lim DUMU PUZUR₄.IŠTAR
translation: Seal of Šu-Nūnu son of Amur-Ištar, seal of Zikiki son of Aššur-rē'ī, seal of Abu-šalim son of Puzur-Ištar.

akk: 6 GÍN KÙ.BABBAR ṣa-ru-pá-am i-ṣé-er a-bu-ša-lim i-ri-šum i-šu a-na bu-qú-nim i-ša-qal šu-ma lá iš-qúl 0.1666 GÍN.TA i-na ITU.KAM ú-ṣa-áb
eng: Abu-šalim owes 6 shekels of refined silver to Irišum. He will pay at the shearing. If he has not paid, he will add 1 / 6 shekel per month.
transliteration: 6 GÍN KÙ.BABBAR ṣa-ru-pá-am i-ṣé-er a-bu-ša-lim i-ri-šum i-šu a-na bu-qú-nim i-ša-qal šu-ma lá iš-qúl 0.1666 GÍN.TA i-na ITU.KAM ú-ṣa-áb
translation: Abu-šalim owes 6 shekels of refined silver to Irišum. He will pay at the shearing. If he has not paid, he will add 1 / 6 shekel per month.

akk: KIŠIB a-šur-e-mu-qí KIŠIB en-nam-a-šùr DUMU me-na-a KIŠIB i-dí-a-bi-im
eng: Seal of Aššur-emūqī, seal of Ennam-Aššur s. of Menaya, seal of Iddin-abum.
transliteration: KIŠIB a-šur-e-mu-qí KIŠIB en-nam-a-šùr DUMU me-na-a KIŠIB i-dí-a-bi-im
translation: Seal of Aššur-emūqī, seal of Ennam-Aššur s. of Menaya, seal of Iddin-abum.

akk: ša ḫu-bu-ul i-dí-a-bi₄-im 13.3333 ma-na KÙ.BABBAR ṣa-ru-pu-um u₄-mu-šu ma-al-ú ša a-mur-IŠTAR
eng: Concerning Iddin-abum's debt of 13.3333 minas of refined silver. His term has expired. Concerning Amur-Ištar.
transliteration: ša ḫu-bu-ul i-dí-a-bi₄-im 13.3333 ma-na KÙ.BABBAR ṣa-ru-pu-um u₄-mu-šu ma-al-ú ša a-mur-IŠTAR
translation: Concerning Iddin-abum's debt of 13.3333 minas of refined silver. His term has expired. Concerning Amur-Ištar.

translation: Seal of Lāqēpum, son of Iliya; seal of Amur-Šamaš, son of Mīšu(r)-rabi; seal of Ezē, son of Šarrum-kēn; seal of Galdaya,

eng: To Ali-ahum son of Šalim-Aššur;
transliteration: a-na a-lá-ḫi-im DUMU ša-lim-a-šur
translation: To Ali-ahum son of Šalim-Aššur;

transliteration: KIŠIB zu-ku-a DUMU a-šur-i-dí
translation: seal of Zukuwa son of Aššūr-idī.

akk: ṭup-pu-um ša IGI GÍR ša {d}a-šùr a-na a-wa-tim a-ni-a-tim kà-ru-um dur₄-ḫu-mì-it i-dí-ni-a-tí-ma ší-bu-tí-ni ni-dí-in
eng: Tablet from before Aššur's dagger. The Durhumit colony gave us for these proceedings and we gave our testimony.
transliteration: ṭup-pu-um ša IGI GÍR ša {d}a-šùr a-na a-wa-tim a-ni-a-tim kà-ru-um dur₄-ḫu-mì-it i-dí-ni-a-tí-ma ší-bu-tí-ni ni-dí-in

akk: KIŠIB ša-ar-ni-ga-a-šu KIŠIB e-na-a-šur DUMU <gap> KIŠIB wa-al-ḫi-iš-na KIŠIB pé-ru-wa KIŠIB tù-wa-tù-ú-i

translation: Seal of Šarnigāšu, seal of Ennam-Aššur, son of <gap>, seal of Walhišna, seal of Peruwa, seal of Tuwatuwi.

akk: <gap> šu-ma KÙ.BABBAR i-ša-<gap>
eng: If they pay the silver <gap>
transliteration: <gap> šu-ma KÙ.BABBAR i-ša-<gap>
translation: If they pay the silver <gap>

transliteration: KIŠIB a-šur-i-dí KIŠIB en-num-a-šur KIŠIB en-num-a-šur
translation: Seal of Aššur-idī, seal of Ennam-Aššur, seal of Ennam-Aššur.

akk: ša ḫu-bu-ul en-num-a-šur 0.6666 ma-na 5 GÍN AN.NA i-ṣé-er en-um-a-šur lu-zi i-šu iš-tù ḫa-mu-uš-tim ša i-tur₄-DINGIR ú PUZUR₄-ša-du-e a-na ITU.KAM i-ša-qal šu-ma lá iš-qú-ul 3 GÍN.TA a-na 1 ma-na-im ú-ṣa-áb ITU.KAM ku-zal-li li-mu-um {d}UTU-ba-ni
eng: Concerning Ennam-Aššur's debt. Ennam-Aššur owes 0.6666 mina 5 shekels of tin to Luzi. Reckoned from the week of Itūr-ilī and Puzur-šadu'e he must pay in one month. If he has not paid, he will add (interest) at the rate 3 shekels per mina. Month Kuzallu, eponymy Šamaš-bāni.
transliteration: ša ḫu-bu-ul en-num-a-šur 0.6666 ma-na 5 GÍN AN.NA i-ṣé-er en-um-a-šur lu-zi i-šu iš-tù ḫa-mu-uš-tim ša i-tur₄-DINGIR ú PUZUR₄-ša-du-e a-na ITU.KAM i-ša-qal šu-ma lá iš-qú-ul 3 GÍN.TA a-na 1 ma-na-im ú-ṣa-áb ITU.KAM ku-zal-li li-mu-um {d}UTU-ba-ni
translation: Concerning Ennam-Aššur's debt. Ennam-Aššur owes 0.6666 mina 5 shekels of tin to Luzi. Reckoned from the week of Itūr-ilī and Puzur-šadu'e he must pay in one month. If he has not paid, he will add (interest) at the rate 3 shekels per mina. Month Kuzallu, eponymy Šamaš-bāni.

akk: KIŠIB a-zu-a DUMU sú-kà-lim KIŠIB en-na-ni-a DUMU i-zi-za-am-ì-lí KIŠIB en-nam-aš-šùr DUMU a-al-DU₁₀
eng: Seal of Azua, son of Sukkallum, seal of Ennāniya, son of Izzizam-ilī, seal of Ennam-Aššur, son of Āl-ṭāb,
transliteration: KIŠIB a-zu-a DUMU sú-kà-lim KIŠIB en-na-ni-a DUMU i-zi-za-am-ì-lí KIŠIB en-nam-aš-šùr DUMU a-al-DU₁₀
translation: Seal of Azua, son of Sukkallum, seal of Ennāniya, son of Izzizam-ilī, seal of Ennam-Aššur, son of Āl-ṭāb,

akk: ša 20-ma-na URUDU ša a-al-DU₁₀ DUMU a-šùr-DU₁₀ a-na a-al-DU₁₀ DUMU a-mur-a-šur ḫa-bu-lu-ni šu-ma a-al-DU₁₀ DUMU a-mur-a-šur ša-bu ša 12.1666 GÍN KÙ.BABBAR-im 1 ma-na-um 0.5 ma-na KÙ.BABBAR en-nam-a-šur DUMU a-al-DU₁₀ a-na a-al-DU₁₀ DUMU a-šùr-DU₁₀ i-ša-qal
eng: that as for the 20 minas of copper, which Āl-ṭāb, son of Aššur-ṭāb, owes to Āl-ṭāb, son of Amur-Aššur, if Āl-ṭāb, son of Amur-Aššur, has already
transliteration: ša 20-ma-na URUDU ša a-al-DU₁₀ DUMU a-šùr-DU₁₀ a-na a-al-DU₁₀ DUMU a-mur-a-šur ḫa-bu-lu-ni šu-ma a-al-DU₁₀ DUMU a-mur-a-šur ša-bu ša 12.1666 GÍN KÙ.BABBAR-im 1 ma-na-um 0.5 ma-na KÙ.BABBAR en-nam-a-šur DUMU a-al-DU₁₀ a-na a-al-DU₁₀ DUMU a-šùr-DU₁₀ i-ša-qal
translation: that as for the 20 minas of copper, which Āl-ṭāb, son of Aššur-ṭāb, owes to Āl-ṭāb, son of Amur-Aššur, if Āl-ṭāb, son of Amur-Aššur, has already

akk: KIŠIB a-ta-ta DUMU ša-lim-a-šur KIŠIB lá-qé-ep DUMU a-šur-i-dí KIŠIB en-um-A-šur
eng: Seal of Atata son of Šalim-Aššur, seal of Lā-qēp son of Aššur-idī, seal of Ennam-Aššur,
transliteration: KIŠIB a-ta-ta DUMU ša-lim-a-šur KIŠIB lá-qé-ep DUMU a-šur-i-dí KIŠIB en-um-A-šur
translation: Seal of Atata son of Šalim-Aššur, seal of Lā-qēp son of Aššur-idī, seal of Ennam-Aššur,

akk: wa-ar-dum ša ḫu-ra-ṣa-nim 5 GÍN KÙ.BABBAR i-ṣé-er en-um-a-šur lu-zi-i šu 1 TÚG ku-ta-nam ša 5 GÍN KÙ.BABBAR en-um-a-šur i-na ša-na-at ú-šé-lá-am šu-ma a-dí ša-na-at ku-ta-na-am lá uš-té-li-am i-ša-qal ITU.KAM té-i-na-tim li-mu-um e-lá-lí sà-an-gu₅-um
eng: huraṣānum's slave. Ennam-Aššur owes 5 shekels of silver to Luzi. Ennam-Aššur must bring up one -textile worth 5 shekels of silver within one year. If he has not brought up a within a year, he must pay 10 shekels of silver here. Month Te'inātum, eponymy Elālī, the high priest.
transliteration: wa-ar-dum ša ḫu-ra-ṣa-nim 5 GÍN KÙ.BABBAR i-ṣé-er en-um-a-šur lu-zi-i šu 1 TÚG ku-ta-nam ša 5 GÍN KÙ.BABBAR en-um-a-šur i-na ša-na-at ú-šé-lá-am šu-ma a-dí ša-na-at ku-ta-na-am lá uš-té-li-am i-ša-qal ITU.KAM té-i-na-tim li-mu-um e-lá-lí sà-an-gu₅-um
translation: huraṣānum's slave. Ennam-Aššur owes 5 shekels of silver to Luzi. Ennam-Aššur must bring up one -textile worth 5 shekels of silver within one year. If he has not brought up a within a year, he must pay 10 shekels of silver here. Month Te'inātum, eponymy Elālī, the high priest.

akk: ša-lim-a-šùr DUMU i-sú-rik₁₃ ù a-šu-wa-an-zi DUMU ḫa-ar-ša ša dí-nam ru-ba-um ù GAL sí-ki-tim dí-nam i-dí-nu-ni-ma ṣú-ḫa-ra-am ša šál-ma-a-šùr a-na i-id i-dí-nu-ni ša-lim-a-šùr ù a-šu-wa-an i-mì-ig-ru-ma ni-iš a-na ni-iš {d}a-šùr ni-iš ru-ba-im ni-iš GAL sí-ki-tim wa-li-iš-ra ù ni-iš e-ba-ru-tim ša a-wa-tí-šu-nu ig-mu-ru-ni it-mu-ú-ma 1 ma-na KÙ.BABBAR ù 1 TÚG ku-ta-nam ša-lim-a-šur a-na a-šu-wa-an i-dí-in-ma a-šu-wa-an ù a-ḫu-šu me-er-ú ḫa-ar-ša-a a-na ša-lim-a-šùr me-er-e-šu ù me-er-e i-dí-a-bi-im a-na mì-ma šu-um-šu ù-lá i-tù-ru šu-ma i-tù-ru lá-am-nu-ut a-na a-šùr ru-ba-im ù GAL sí-ki-tim
eng: Šalim-Aššur son of Issu-arik and Aššuwan(zi) son of Harša, for whom the king and the rabi sikkitim had given a verdict, stating that they should give a servant of Šalim-Aššur to the river ordeal - Šalim-Aššur and Aššuwan reached an agreement and they swore an oath by Anna, Aššur, the king, the rabi sikkitim Wališra and by the colleagues who settled their affair, so that Šalim-Aššur gave 1 min of silver and 1 kutānu-textile to Aššuwan, and Aššuwan and his brothers, sons of Harša, will not raise claim against Šalim-Aššur, his sons and Iddin-abum's sons for anything whatsoever. If they raise claim, it is an evil against Anna, Aššur, the king and the rabi sikkitim.
transliteration: ša-lim-a-šùr DUMU i-sú-rik₁₃ ù a-šu-wa-an-zi DUMU ḫa-ar-ša ša dí-nam ru-ba-um ù GAL sí-ki-tim dí-nam i-dí-nu-ni-ma ṣú-ḫa-ra-am ša šál-ma-a-šùr a-na i-id i-dí-nu-ni ša-lim-a-šùr ù a-šu-wa-an i-mì-ig-ru-ma ni-iš a-na ni-iš {d}a-šùr ni-iš ru-ba-im ni-iš GAL sí-ki-tim wa-li-iš-ra ù ni-iš e-ba-ru-tim ša a-wa-tí-šu-nu ig-mu-ru-ni it-mu-ú-ma 1 ma-na KÙ.BABBAR ù 1 TÚG ku-ta-nam ša-lim-a-šur a-na a-šu-wa-an i-dí-in-ma a-šu-wa-an ù a-ḫu-šu me-er-ú ḫa-ar-ša-a a-na ša-lim-a-šùr me-er-e-šu ù me-er-e i-dí-a-bi-im a-na mì-ma šu-um-šu ù-lá i-tù-ru šu-ma i-tù-ru lá-am-nu-ut a-na a-šùr ru-ba-im ù GAL sí-ki-tim
translation: Šalim-Aššur son of Issu-arik and Aššuwan(zi) son of Harša, for whom the king and the rabi sikkitim had given a verdict, stating that they should give a servant of Šalim-Aššur to the river ordeal - Šalim-Aššur and Aššuwan reached an agreement and they swore an oath by Anna, Aššur, the king, the rabi sikkitim Wališra and by the colleagues who settled their affair, so that Šalim-Aššur gave 1 min of silver and 1 kutānu-textile to Aššuwan, and Aššuwan and his brothers, sons of Harša, will not raise claim against Šalim-Aššur, his sons and Iddin-abum's sons for anything whatsoever. If they raise claim, it is an evil against Anna, Aššur, the king and the rabi sikkitim.

akk: KIŠIB lu-zi-na KIŠIB a-šur-DU₁₀
eng: Seal of Luzina, seal of Aššur-ṭāb,
transliteration: KIŠIB lu-zi-na KIŠIB a-šur-DU₁₀
translation: Seal of Luzina, seal of Aššur-ṭāb,

akk: KIŠIB en-nam-a-šur DUMU um-ma-sá
eng: Seal of Ennam-Aššur, son of Ummassa.
transliteration: KIŠIB en-nam-a-šur DUMU um-ma-sá
translation: Seal of Ennam-Aššur, son of Ummassa.

akk: a-šur-DÙL DUMU a-šùr-ša-dí-li ki-ma ku-li-a DUMU a-lá-bi₄-im a-na a-šur-e-mu-qí DUMU šu-ra-ma iṣ-ba-at-ni-a-tí-ma um-ma a-šur-DÙL-ma KÙ.BABBAR-áp be-lúm-ba-ni DAM.GÀR-ri-im ša ku-li-a tal-qé lá tal-qé-e IGI a-ni-e-ma i-ki-ir ú-ul kà-i-in um-ma a-šur-e-mu-qí-ma al-qé ú al-qé-ma ú u₄-ma-am a-lá-qé-ma a-na a-wa-tim a-ni-a-tim kà-ru-um kà-ni-eš TUR.GAL i-dí-na-ni IGI GÍR ša a-šur ší-bu-tí a-dí-in a-šur-lá-ma-sí DUMU i-tur₄-a-num tap-pá-i
eng: Aššur-ṣulūlī, son of Aššur-šād-ilī representing Kuliya, son of Ali-abum, seized us against Aššur-emūqī, son of Šu-rama, and Aššur-ṣulūlī said as follows: The silver of Bēlum-bāni, the agent of Kuliya, did you take it, yes or no? Deny or confirm before these men. Aššur-emūqī said: I took it, yes I took it and today I would (again) take it! For this affair the plenary Kanesh 'gave' me (as witness) and before Aššur's dagger I gave my testimony. Aššur-lamassī, son of Itūr-Anum, was my companion.
transliteration: a-šur-DÙL DUMU a-šùr-ša-dí-li ki-ma ku-li-a DUMU a-lá-bi₄-im a-na a-šur-e-mu-qí DUMU šu-ra-ma iṣ-ba-at-ni-a-tí-ma um-ma a-šur-DÙL-ma KÙ.BABBAR-áp be-lúm-ba-ni DAM.GÀR-ri-im ša ku-li-a tal-qé lá tal-qé-e IGI a-ni-e-ma i-ki-ir ú-ul kà-i-in um-ma a-šur-e-mu-qí-ma al-qé ú al-qé-ma ú u₄-ma-am a-lá-qé-ma a-na a-wa-tim a-ni-a-tim kà-ru-um kà-ni-eš TUR.GAL i-dí-na-ni IGI GÍR ša a-šur ší-bu-tí a-dí-in a-šur-lá-ma-sí DUMU i-tur₄-a-num tap-pá-i
translation: Aššur-ṣulūlī, son of Aššur-šād-ilī representing Kuliya, son of Ali-abum, seized us against Aššur-emūqī, son of Šu-rama, and Aššur-ṣulūlī said as follows: The silver of Bēlum-bāni, the agent of Kuliya, did you take it, yes or no? Deny or confirm before these men. Aššur-emūqī said: I took it, yes I took it and today I would (again) take it! For this affair the plenary Kanesh 'gave' me (as witness) and before Aššur's dagger I gave my testimony. Aššur-lamassī, son of Itūr-Anum, was my companion.

translation: Seal of Manum, son of Kabiya, seal of Aššur-ṭāb, son of Šu-Ištar, seal of Ahušu, son of Aššur-idī, seal of Šu-Ellil, son of Mannu-kī-Aššur.

akk: 5 ma-na KÙ.BABBAR li-tám dam-qám i-ṣé-er šu-{d}EN.LÍL DUMU ma-nu-ki-a-šur iš-ma-a-šur DUMU ḫi-na-a i-šu iš-tù ḫa-muš-tim ša ku-lu-ma-a ITU.KAM áb-ša-ra-ni li-mu-um sá-ma-a a-na <gap> ḫa-am-ša-tim i-ša-qal šu-ma lá iš-qúl ki-ma a-wa-at kà-ri-im 1.5 GÍN.TA i-na ITU.KAM-im a-na 1 ma-na-im ṣí-ib-tám ú-ṣa-áb
eng: 5 minas of good quality ilver Šu-Elil, son of Mannu-kī-Aššur, owes to Išme-Aššur, son of hinnāya. From the week of Kulumaya, month V, year eponymy of Samaya, he will pay within <gap> weeks; if he does not pay he will add in accordance with the regulation of the colony an interest of 1.5 shekel per month per mina.
transliteration: 5 ma-na KÙ.BABBAR li-tám dam-qám i-ṣé-er šu-{d}EN.LÍL DUMU ma-nu-ki-a-šur iš-ma-a-šur DUMU ḫi-na-a i-šu iš-tù ḫa-muš-tim ša ku-lu-ma-a ITU.KAM áb-ša-ra-ni li-mu-um sá-ma-a a-na <gap> ḫa-am-ša-tim i-ša-qal šu-ma lá iš-qúl ki-ma a-wa-at kà-ri-im 1.5 GÍN.TA i-na ITU.KAM-im a-na 1 ma-na-im ṣí-ib-tám ú-ṣa-áb

akk: 5 GÚ URUDU ma-sí-am i-ṣé-er a-mur-a-šur DUMU a-šur-be-el-a-wa-tim ù en-um-a-šur a-ḫi-šu li-ip-it-IŠTAR i-šu a-na MU.5.ŠÈ i-ša-qú-lu šu-ma lá iš-qú-lu 1.5 ma-na.TA i-na ITU.KAM-im ṣí-ib-tám ú-ṣú-bu i-ku-pì-a-šur DUMU ḫi-na-a qá-ta-tum ITU.KAM ṣí-ip-im li-mu-um bu-zu-ta-a
eng: 5 talents of refined copper āmur-Aššur, son of Aššur-bēl-awātim, <and> Ennam-Aššur, his brother, owe to Lipit-Ištar. They will pay in 5 years; when they do not pay they will add 1.5 mina per (talent) per month as interest. Ikūn-pī-Aššur, son of hinnāya, is guarantor. Month VII, eponymy year of Buzutaya.
transliteration: 5 GÚ URUDU ma-sí-am i-ṣé-er a-mur-a-šur DUMU a-šur-be-el-a-wa-tim ù en-um-a-šur a-ḫi-šu li-ip-it-IŠTAR i-šu a-na MU.5.ŠÈ i-ša-qú-lu šu-ma lá iš-qú-lu 1.5 ma-na.TA i-na ITU.KAM-im ṣí-ib-tám ú-ṣú-bu i-ku-pì-a-šur DUMU ḫi-na-a qá-ta-tum ITU.KAM ṣí-ip-im li-mu-um bu-zu-ta-a
translation: 5 talents of refined copper āmur-Aššur, son of Aššur-bēl-awātim, <and> Ennam-Aššur, his brother, owe to Lipit-Ištar. They will pay in 5 years; when they do not pay they will add 1.5 mina per (talent) per month as interest. Ikūn-pī-Aššur, son of hinnāya, is guarantor. Month VII, eponymy year of Buzutaya.

eng: Seal of Assur-taklaku, son of Ikunum, seal of Kinam-Assur, son of Babalum, seal of Assur-nada, son of Happuala,

akk: ša ḫu-bu-ul a-šùr-na-da DUMU ḫa-pu-a-lá 10 GÍN KÙ.BABBAR SAḪAR.BA i-ṣé-er a-šùr-na-da DAM.GÀR i-šu ITU.1.KAM ḫu-bu-ur li-mu-um ša qá-té a-bu-ša-lim DUMU ì-lí-a-lim a-na ITU.6.KAM i-ša-qal šu-ma lá iš-qúl 1.5 GÍN.TA KÙ.BABBAR i-na ITU.1.KAM-im ṣí-ib-tám a-na 1 ma-na-im ú-ṣa-áb wa-bi-il₅ ṭup-pí-im šu-ut DAM.GÀR-ru-um a-ma-kam tù-ur-IŠTAR DUMU zu-ma-<gap> be-lá-a-wa-tim ša-i-il₅-šu
eng: of the debt of Assur-nada, son of Happuala. 10 shekels of 'dust silver' Assur-nada owes to the creditor. Month VI, eponymy of the successor of Abu-salim, son of Ili-alum. He will pay within 6 months, if he does not pay he will add 1.5 shekel of silver per month as interest per mina. The bearer of this tab let is the creditor. Over there Turi-Istar, son of Zuma-x, (is) the litigant, ask him.
transliteration: ša ḫu-bu-ul a-šùr-na-da DUMU ḫa-pu-a-lá 10 GÍN KÙ.BABBAR SAḪAR.BA i-ṣé-er a-šùr-na-da DAM.GÀR i-šu ITU.1.KAM ḫu-bu-ur li-mu-um ša qá-té a-bu-ša-lim DUMU ì-lí-a-lim a-na ITU.6.KAM i-ša-qal šu-ma lá iš-qúl 1.5 GÍN.TA KÙ.BABBAR i-na ITU.1.KAM-im ṣí-ib-tám a-na 1 ma-na-im ú-ṣa-áb wa-bi-il₅ ṭup-pí-im šu-ut DAM.GÀR-ru-um a-ma-kam tù-ur-IŠTAR DUMU zu-ma-<gap> be-lá-a-wa-tim ša-i-il₅-šu
translation: of the debt of Assur-nada, son of Happuala. 10 shekels of 'dust silver' Assur-nada owes to the creditor. Month VI, eponymy of the successor of Abu-salim, son of Ili-alum. He will pay within 6 months, if he does not pay he will add 1.5 shekel of silver per month as interest per mina. The bearer of this tab let is the creditor. Over there Turi-Istar, son of Zuma-x, (is) the litigant, ask him.

akk: 0.5 ma-na KÙ.BABBAR ṣa-ru-pá-am i-ṣé-er IŠTAR-pá-li-il₅ DUMU šu-ku-bi₄-im DAM.GÀR-ru-um i-šu iš-tù ḫa-muš-tim ša {d}EN.LÍL-ba-ni ITU.KAM ṭí-i-na-tim 1 GÍN.TA i-na ITU.KAM a-na KÙ.BABBAR a-nim ṣí-ib-tám ú-ṣa-áb li-mu-um ḫa-na-na-ru-um
eng: 0.5 mina of refined silver Ištar-pālil, son of Šu-Kūbum, owes to the creditor. From the week-eponymy of Ellil-bāni, month X, he will add 1 shekel per month for this silver. Eponymy of hanna-nārum.
transliteration: 0.5 ma-na KÙ.BABBAR ṣa-ru-pá-am i-ṣé-er IŠTAR-pá-li-il₅ DUMU šu-ku-bi₄-im DAM.GÀR-ru-um i-šu iš-tù ḫa-muš-tim ša {d}EN.LÍL-ba-ni ITU.KAM ṭí-i-na-tim 1 GÍN.TA i-na ITU.KAM a-na KÙ.BABBAR a-nim ṣí-ib-tám ú-ṣa-áb li-mu-um ḫa-na-na-ru-um
translation: 0.5 mina of refined silver Ištar-pālil, son of Šu-Kūbum, owes to the creditor. From the week-eponymy of Ellil-bāni, month X, he will add 1 shekel per month for this silver. Eponymy of hanna-nārum.

transliteration: KIŠIB IŠTAR-pá-li-il₅ DUMU šu-ku-bi₄-im KIŠIB a-šùr-iš-ti-kál DUMU ḫi-na-a KIŠIB a-lá-ḫi-im DUMU sú-sà-a-a KIŠIB PÚZUR.IŠTAR DUMU šu-ku-bi₄-im KIŠIB be-lúm-ba-ni DUMU ga-zi-a KIŠIB áb-ša-lim

akk: DAM a-lá-ḫi-im 0.5 ma-na KÙ.BABBAR ṣa-ru-pá-am i-ṣé-er IŠTAR-pá-li-il₅ áb-ša-lim DAM a-lá-ḫi-im ù DUMU-e a-lá-ḫi-im DAM.GÀR i-šu iš-tù ḫa-mu-uš-tim ša ḫa-na-a ITU.KAM kán-war-ta 1.5 GÍN.TA ṣí-ib-tám i-na ITU.KAM a-na 1 ma-na-im ú-ṣú-bu KÙ.BABBAR i qá-qá-ad šál-mì-šu-nu ú ke-ni-šu-nu ra-ki-is li-mu-um ḫa-na-na-ru-um i ša-ḫa-at áb-ša-lim ú me-er-e a-
eng: the wife of Ali-ahum. 0.5 mina of refined silver Ištar-pālil, Ab-šalim, the wife of Ali-ahum, and the sons of Ali-ahum owe to the creditor. From the week-eponymy of hanāya, month IX, they will add 1.5 shekel as interest per month per mina. The silver is bound on the one of them who is solvent and reliable. Eponymy of hanna-nārum.
transliteration: DAM a-lá-ḫi-im 0.5 ma-na KÙ.BABBAR ṣa-ru-pá-am i-ṣé-er IŠTAR-pá-li-il₅ áb-ša-lim DAM a-lá-ḫi-im ù DUMU-e a-lá-ḫi-im DAM.GÀR i-šu iš-tù ḫa-mu-uš-tim ša ḫa-na-a ITU.KAM kán-war-ta 1.5 GÍN.TA ṣí-ib-tám i-na ITU.KAM a-na 1 ma-na-im ú-ṣú-bu KÙ.BABBAR i qá-qá-ad šál-mì-šu-nu ú ke-ni-šu-nu ra-ki-is li-mu-um ḫa-na-na-ru-um i ša-ḫa-at áb-ša-lim ú me-er-e a-
translation: the wife of Ali-ahum. 0.5 mina of refined silver Ištar-pālil, Ab-šalim, the wife of Ali-ahum, and the sons of Ali-ahum owe to the creditor. From the week-eponymy of hanāya, month IX, they will add 1.5 shekel as interest per month per mina. The silver is bound on the one of them who is solvent and reliable. Eponymy of hanna-nārum.

akk: 1 ma-na KÙ.BABBAR i-ṣé-er a-šur-SIPA DUMU a-šur-iš-tí-kál a-lá-ḫu-um i-šu ITU.1.KAM ša sà-ra-tim li-mu-um ša qá-tí a-šur-i-mì-tí ma-lá-ḫi-im 0.3333 ma-na.TA i-na ša-tim i-ša-qal šu-ma i-na ma-lá u₄-me-šu 0.3333 ma-na KÙ.BABBAR lá iš-qú-ul 0.5 GÍN.TA a-na 0.3333 ma-na-im ṣí-ib-tám i-na ITU.1.KAM ú-ṣa-ab
eng: Aššur-rē'ī son of Aššuriš-tikal owes 1 mina of silver to Ali-ahum. Month Ša-sarrātim, eponymy after that of Aššur-imittī the skipper. He will pay 0.3333 mina per year. If he has not paid 0.3333 mina of silver when his term is up, he will add interest at the rate 0.5 shekel per 0.3333 mina per month.
transliteration: 1 ma-na KÙ.BABBAR i-ṣé-er a-šur-SIPA DUMU a-šur-iš-tí-kál a-lá-ḫu-um i-šu ITU.1.KAM ša sà-ra-tim li-mu-um ša qá-tí a-šur-i-mì-tí ma-lá-ḫi-im 0.3333 ma-na.TA i-na ša-tim i-ša-qal šu-ma i-na ma-lá u₄-me-šu 0.3333 ma-na KÙ.BABBAR lá iš-qú-ul 0.5 GÍN.TA a-na 0.3333 ma-na-im ṣí-ib-tám i-na ITU.1.KAM ú-ṣa-ab
translation: Aššur-rē'ī son of Aššuriš-tikal owes 1 mina of silver to Ali-ahum. Month Ša-sarrātim, eponymy after that of Aššur-imittī the skipper. He will pay 0.3333 mina per year. If he has not paid 0.3333 mina of silver when his term is up, he will add interest at the rate 0.5 shekel per 0.3333 mina per month.

akk: 21 GÚ ša-áp-tám ša kà-né-eš ša É.GAL-lim en-um-a-šùr DUMU šál-ma-a-šur a-na ì-lí-dan i-na ku-bur-na-at i-ša-qal-ma ṣú-ḫa-ru ša en-um-a-šùr ša-lim-ar-dí 21 GÚ SÍG.ḪI.A i-na ku-bur-na-at ú-sà-na-aq-šu-ma ANŠE.ḪI.A ša en-nam-a-šur SÍG.ḪI.A a-na tù-ku-ub-tù ú-šé-ru-ú i-na ri-iš SÍG.ḪI.A ša i-ša-qú-lu-šu-ni 6.6666 ma-na KÙ.BABBAR li-tí SIG₅ ì-lí-dan DUMU i-dí-a-šur a-na en-um-a-šur i-ša
eng: Ennam-Aššur son of Šalim-Aššur shall give 21 talents of wool from Kanesh, from the palace, to Ilī-dan in Kuburnat, Ennam-Aššur's servant Šalim-wardī shall check the 21 talents of wool in Kuburnat, and on Ennam-Aššur's donkeys they will have brought the wool to Tukubtu. From the capital on the wool that they are going to pay him, Ilī-dan son of Iddin-Aššur shall give 6.6666 minas of good -silver to Ennam-Aššur.
transliteration: 21 GÚ ša-áp-tám ša kà-né-eš ša É.GAL-lim en-um-a-šùr DUMU šál-ma-a-šur a-na ì-lí-dan i-na ku-bur-na-at i-ša-qal-ma ṣú-ḫa-ru ša en-um-a-šùr ša-lim-ar-dí 21 GÚ SÍG.ḪI.A i-na ku-bur-na-at ú-sà-na-aq-šu-ma ANŠE.ḪI.A ša en-nam-a-šur SÍG.ḪI.A a-na tù-ku-ub-tù ú-šé-ru-ú i-na ri-iš SÍG.ḪI.A ša i-ša-qú-lu-šu-ni 6.6666 ma-na KÙ.BABBAR li-tí SIG₅ ì-lí-dan DUMU i-dí-a-šur a-na en-um-a-šur i-ša
translation: Ennam-Aššur son of Šalim-Aššur shall give 21 talents of wool from Kanesh, from the palace, to Ilī-dan in Kuburnat, Ennam-Aššur's servant Šalim-wardī shall check the 21 talents of wool in Kuburnat, and on Ennam-Aššur's donkeys they will have brought the wool to Tukubtu. From the capital on the wool that they are going to pay him, Ilī-dan son of Iddin-Aššur shall give 6.6666 minas of good -silver to Ennam-Aššur.
