akk: KIŠIB ḫi-na-a KIŠIB i-ku-pí-a-šùr DUMU en-um-a-šur
eng: Seal of hinnāya, seal of Ikuppi-Aššur, son of Ennam-Aššur,
transliteration: KIŠIB ḫi-na-a KIŠIB i-ku-pí-a-šùr DUMU en-um-a-šur
translation: Seal of hinnāya, seal of Ikuppi-Aššur, son of Ennam-Aššur,

akk: ša 1.5 ma-na KÙ.BABBAR me-eḫ-ra-at ba-áb-tí-šu ša lá-qé-ep e-lá-ma a-na lá-qé-ep ú-šé-bi-lu lá-qé-ep KÙ.BABBAR-áp-šu i-lá-qé ŠÀ.BA 5 GÍN KÙ.BABBAR ši-im 0.5 ku-ta-nim ṣa-ḫu-ru
eng: that Elamma sent to Lā-qēp 1.5 mina of silver as counter value of Lā-qēp's outstanding claims. Lā-qēp will take his silver (and) from it 5 shekels of silver, the price of 0.5 -textile, have been deducted.
transliteration: ša 1.5 ma-na KÙ.BABBAR me-eḫ-ra-at ba-áb-tí-šu ša lá-qé-ep e-lá-ma a-na lá-qé-ep ú-šé-bi-lu lá-qé-ep KÙ.BABBAR-áp-šu i-lá-qé ŠÀ.BA 5 GÍN KÙ.BABBAR ši-im 0.5 ku-ta-nim ṣa-ḫu-ru
translation: that Elamma sent to Lā-qēp 1.5 mina of silver as counter value of Lā-qēp's outstanding claims. Lā-qēp will take his silver (and) from it 5 shekels of silver, the price of 0.5 -textile, have been deducted.

akk: a-na a-la-ḫi-im
eng: To Ali-ahum;
transliteration: a-na a-la-ḫi-im
translation: To Ali-ahum;

akk: KIŠIB a-mur-IŠTAR
eng: seal of Amur-Ištar.
transliteration: KIŠIB a-mur-IŠTAR
translation: seal of Amur-Ištar.

akk: KIŠIB i-dí-{d}IM DUMU a-šur-DU₁₀ KIŠIB šu-<gap> KIŠIB a-šur-<gap>-šu-um
eng: Seal of Iddin-Adad son of Aššur-ṭāb, seal of Šu<gap>, seal of Aššur-<gap>
transliteration: KIŠIB i-dí-{d}IM DUMU a-šur-DU₁₀ KIŠIB šu-<gap> KIŠIB a-šur-<gap>-šu-um
translation: Seal of Iddin-Adad son of Aššur-ṭāb, seal of Šu<gap>, seal of Aššur-<gap>

akk: KIŠIB zu-ba DUMU en-na-nim KIŠIB PUZUR₄-{d}IŠKUR DUMU i-dí-IŠTAR
eng: Seal of Zuba, son of Ennānum, seal of Puzur-Adad, son of Iddin-Ištar;
transliteration: KIŠIB zu-ba DUMU en-na-nim KIŠIB PUZUR₄-{d}IŠKUR DUMU i-dí-IŠTAR
translation: Seal of Zuba, son of Ennānum, seal of Puzur-Adad, son of Iddin-Ištar;

akk: a-lá-bu-um DUMU zi-a tap-pá-i-ni a-na a-wa-tim a-ni-a-tim kà-ru-um kà-né-eš i-dí-ni-a-tí-ma ṭup-pá-am IGI IGI GÍR ša a-šùr ší-bu-tí-ni ni-dí-in
eng: Ali-abum, son of Ziya, was our companion. For these words the Kaneš colony made us available and this tablet we gave as our testimony rendered before Aššur's dagger.
transliteration: a-lá-bu-um DUMU zi-a tap-pá-i-ni a-na a-wa-tim a-ni-a-tim kà-ru-um kà-né-eš i-dí-ni-a-tí-ma ṭup-pá-am IGI IGI GÍR ša a-šùr ší-bu-tí-ni ni-dí-in
translation: Ali-abum, son of Ziya, was our companion. For these words the Kaneš colony made us available and this tablet we gave as our testimony rendered before Aššur's dagger.

akk: KIŠIB i-pí-lí-is KIŠIB a-šur-na-da DUMU a-mur-lu-sú KIŠIB la-qé-pí-im
eng: Seal of Ippilis, seal of Aššur-nādā, son of Amur-ilūssu, seal of Lā-qēpum,
transliteration: KIŠIB i-pí-lí-is KIŠIB a-šur-na-da DUMU a-mur-lu-sú KIŠIB la-qé-pí-im
translation: Seal of Ippilis, seal of Aššur-nādā, son of Amur-ilūssu, seal of Lā-qēpum,

akk: ša e-la-ma ù id-na-a ma-aḫ-ri-ni ni-kà-sé i-sí-ú-ma 0.5 ma-na 5 GÍN KÙ.BABBAR ṣa-ru-pu-um ù 13.5 ma-na URUDU SIG₅ i-lí-bi na-a iš-tù ḫa-mu-uš-tim ša am-ri-a ù e-lá-lí ki-ma a-wa-at kà-ri-im a-na ṣí-ib-tim i-lá-ak-šum 1.5 ma-na KÙ.BABBAR ṣí-ib-tum pá-ni-tum 0.8333 ma-na KÙ.BABBAR gám-ru-um ša iš-ta-pu-ru-šu-ni i li-bi₄-šu-ma
eng: that Elamma and Idnāya settled accounts in our presence (with the following result): 35 shekels of refined silver and 13.5 minas of refined copper are due by Idnāya. They become interest-bearing for him at the rate stipulated by the colony from the week-eponymy of Amriya and Elālī. 1.5 mina of silver, an earlier interest, (and) 0.8333 mina of silver, expenses, about which he wrote him repeatedly, he also owes.
transliteration: ša e-la-ma ù id-na-a ma-aḫ-ri-ni ni-kà-sé i-sí-ú-ma 0.5 ma-na 5 GÍN KÙ.BABBAR ṣa-ru-pu-um ù 13.5 ma-na URUDU SIG₅ i-lí-bi na-a iš-tù ḫa-mu-uš-tim ša am-ri-a ù e-lá-lí ki-ma a-wa-at kà-ri-im a-na ṣí-ib-tim i-lá-ak-šum 1.5 ma-na KÙ.BABBAR ṣí-ib-tum pá-ni-tum 0.8333 ma-na KÙ.BABBAR gám-ru-um ša iš-ta-pu-ru-šu-ni i li-bi₄-šu-ma
translation: that Elamma and Idnāya settled accounts in our presence (with the following result): 35 shekels of refined silver and 13.5 minas of refined copper are due by Idnāya. They become interest-bearing for him at the rate stipulated by the colony from the week-eponymy of Amriya and Elālī. 1.5 mina of silver, an earlier interest, (and) 0.8333 mina of silver, expenses, about which he wrote him repeatedly, he also owes.

akk: KIŠIB a-šùr-ba-ni
eng: Seal of Aššur-bāni;
transliteration: KIŠIB a-šùr-ba-ni
translation: Seal of Aššur-bāni;

akk: a-na šu-pè-e-nu-ma-an DUMU ma-lá <gap> a <gap>
eng: to Šuppinuman son of Mala<gap>
transliteration: a-na šu-pè-e-nu-ma-an DUMU ma-lá <gap> a <gap>
translation: to Šuppinuman son of Mala<gap>

akk: KIŠIB ib-ni-{d}IM KIŠIB id-na-a KIŠIB a-zu-za-a
eng: Seal of Ibnī-Adad, seal of Idnaya, seal of Azuzaya.
transliteration: KIŠIB ib-ni-{d}IM KIŠIB id-na-a KIŠIB a-zu-za-a
translation: Seal of Ibnī-Adad, seal of Idnaya, seal of Azuzaya.

akk: ša be-ú-lá-at PUZUR₄-ša-du-e ṭup-pu-um ša e-li-a-ni sà-ar ša ku-nu-ki ša i-ri-ší-im
eng: Concerning Puzur-šadu'e's working capital: any tablet that may appear is invalid - one with Irišum's seal.
transliteration: ša be-ú-lá-at PUZUR₄-ša-du-e ṭup-pu-um ša e-li-a-ni sà-ar ša ku-nu-ki ša i-ri-ší-im
translation: Concerning Puzur-šadu'e's working capital: any tablet that may appear is invalid - one with Irišum's seal.

akk: KIŠIB šu-nu-nu DUMU a-mur-IŠTAR KIŠIB zu-zu DUMU en-um-ì-lí KIŠIB {d}MAR.TU-ba-ni DUMU šu-lá-áb-ra-at KIŠIB šu-be-lim DUMU ili₅-ba-ni
eng: Seal of Šu-Nūnu son of Amur-Ištar, seal of Zuzu son of Ennam-ilī, seal of Amurrum-bāni son of Šu-Ilabrat, seal of Šu-Bēlum son of Ilī-bāni.
transliteration: KIŠIB šu-nu-nu DUMU a-mur-IŠTAR KIŠIB zu-zu DUMU en-um-ì-lí KIŠIB {d}MAR.TU-ba-ni DUMU šu-lá-áb-ra-at KIŠIB šu-be-lim DUMU ili₅-ba-ni
translation: Seal of Šu-Nūnu son of Amur-Ištar, seal of Zuzu son of Ennam-ilī, seal of Amurrum-bāni son of Šu-Ilabrat, seal of Šu-Bēlum son of Ilī-bāni.

akk: <gap> ma-na KÙ.BABBAR i-ṣé-er šu-bé-lim DUMU ili₅-ba-ni i-ri-šum i-šu a-na 2 ITU.KAM i-ša-qal ITU.KAM na-ar-ma-ak a-šur ša ke-na-tim li-mu-um ša qá-tí a-mur-a-šur DUMU kà-ri-a šu-ma lá iš-qú-ul 3 GÍN.TA i-na ITU.KAM ṣí-ib-tám ú-ṣa-áb
eng: Šu-Bēlum son of Ilī-bāni owes <gap> minas of silver to Irišum. He will pay within 2 months. Month Narmak-Aššur-ša-kēnātim, eponymy after that of Amur-Aššur son of Karriya. If he has not paid he will add interest at the rate 3 shekels per month.
transliteration: <gap> ma-na KÙ.BABBAR i-ṣé-er šu-bé-lim DUMU ili₅-ba-ni i-ri-šum i-šu a-na 2 ITU.KAM i-ša-qal ITU.KAM na-ar-ma-ak a-šur ša ke-na-tim li-mu-um ša qá-tí a-mur-a-šur DUMU kà-ri-a šu-ma lá iš-qú-ul 3 GÍN.TA i-na ITU.KAM ṣí-ib-tám ú-ṣa-áb
translation: Šu-Bēlum son of Ilī-bāni owes <gap> minas of silver to Irišum. He will pay within 2 months. Month Narmak-Aššur-ša-kēnātim, eponymy after that of Amur-Aššur son of Karriya. If he has not paid he will add interest at the rate 3 shekels per month.

akk: KIŠIB ba-ba-zu-a DUMU šu-a-nim KIŠIB DU₁₀-ṣí-li-a-šur DUMU a-li-li KIŠIB šu-IŠTAR DUMU a-šùr-lá-ma-sí
eng: Seal of Babazua son of Šu-Anum, seal of Ṭāb-ṣill-Aššur son of Ali-ilī, seal of Šu-Ištar son of Aššur-lamassī.
transliteration: KIŠIB ba-ba-zu-a DUMU šu-a-nim KIŠIB DU₁₀-ṣí-li-a-šur DUMU a-li-li KIŠIB šu-IŠTAR DUMU a-šùr-lá-ma-sí
translation: Seal of Babazua son of Šu-Anum, seal of Ṭāb-ṣill-Aššur son of Ali-ilī, seal of Šu-Ištar son of Aššur-lamassī.

akk: a-na a-wa-tim a-ni-a-tim kà-ru-um du-ur-ḫu-mì-it i-dí-ni-a-tí-ma IGI GÍR ša a-šur ší-bu-tí-ni ni-dí-in
eng: The Durhumit colony gave us for these proceedings and we gave our testimony before Aššur's dagger.
transliteration: a-na a-wa-tim a-ni-a-tim kà-ru-um du-ur-ḫu-mì-it i-dí-ni-a-tí-ma IGI GÍR ša a-šur ší-bu-tí-ni ni-dí-in
translation: The Durhumit colony gave us for these proceedings and we gave our testimony before Aššur's dagger.

akk: KIŠIB lá-qé-ep DUMU šu-a-šur KIŠIB ku-ra DUMU i-dí-a-šur KIŠIB a-šur-lá-ma-sí
eng: Seal of Lā-qēp son of Šu-Aššur, seal of Kura son of Iddin-Aššur, seal of Aššur-lamassī<gap>
transliteration: KIŠIB lá-qé-ep DUMU šu-a-šur KIŠIB ku-ra DUMU i-dí-a-šur KIŠIB a-šur-lá-ma-sí
translation: Seal of Lā-qēp son of Šu-Aššur, seal of Kura son of Iddin-Aššur, seal of Aššur-lamassī<gap>

akk: <gap> 12.5 ma-na 5 GÍN KÙ.BABBAR ṣa-ru-pá-am i-ṣé-er lá-qé-ep DUMU šu-a-šur DAM.GÀR-ru-um i-šu iš-tù ḫa-muš-tim ša ku-da-tim ITU.KAM té-i-na-tim li-mu-um a-šur-ma-lik DUMU a-lá-ḫi-im DINGIR ša-pá-tám i-li-ik-ma i e-ra-bi₄-šu-ma i kà-né-eš ITU.2.KAM i-lá-ak-ma KÙ.BABBAR i-ša-qal šu-ma lá iš-qú-ul 1 ma-na-im 1 GÍN.TA ṣí-ib-tám i-na ITU.KAM-im ú-ṣa-áb ša-ni-um ṭup-pu-šu
eng: Lā-qēp son of Šu-Aššur owes 12.5 minas 5 shekels of refined silver to a merchant. Reckoned from the week of Kudātum, month Tē'inātum, eponymy Aššur-malik son of Ali-ahum, when the (moon-)god reached the fifteenth day, he will pay the silver 2 months after his arrival in Kanesh. If he has not paid in time, he must add interest at the rate of 1 shekel per mina per month. His second tablet:
transliteration: <gap> 12.5 ma-na 5 GÍN KÙ.BABBAR ṣa-ru-pá-am i-ṣé-er lá-qé-ep DUMU šu-a-šur DAM.GÀR-ru-um i-šu iš-tù ḫa-muš-tim ša ku-da-tim ITU.KAM té-i-na-tim li-mu-um a-šur-ma-lik DUMU a-lá-ḫi-im DINGIR ša-pá-tám i-li-ik-ma i e-ra-bi₄-šu-ma i kà-né-eš ITU.2.KAM i-lá-ak-ma KÙ.BABBAR i-ša-qal šu-ma lá iš-qú-ul 1 ma-na-im 1 GÍN.TA ṣí-ib-tám i-na ITU.KAM-im ú-ṣa-áb ša-ni-um ṭup-pu-šu
translation: Lā-qēp son of Šu-Aššur owes 12.5 minas 5 shekels of refined silver to a merchant. Reckoned from the week of Kudātum, month Tē'inātum, eponymy Aššur-malik son of Ali-ahum, when the (moon-)god reached the fifteenth day, he will pay the silver 2 months after his arrival in Kanesh. If he has not paid in time, he must add interest at the rate of 1 shekel per mina per month. His second tablet:

akk: KIŠIB DINGIR-mu-ta-bi₄-il₅ DUMU a-mur-IŠTAR KIŠIB lá-qé-ep DUMU PUZUR₄-ša-du-e KIŠIB lá-qé-ep DUMU šu-a-šur
eng: Seal of Ilī-muttabbil son of Amur-Ištar, seal of Lā-qēp son of Puzur-šadu'e, seal of Lā-qēp son of Šu-Aššur.
transliteration: KIŠIB DINGIR-mu-ta-bi₄-il₅ DUMU a-mur-IŠTAR KIŠIB lá-qé-ep DUMU PUZUR₄-ša-du-e KIŠIB lá-qé-ep DUMU šu-a-šur
translation: Seal of Ilī-muttabbil son of Amur-Ištar, seal of Lā-qēp son of Puzur-šadu'e, seal of Lā-qēp son of Šu-Aššur.

akk: 10 ma-na KÙ.BABBAR ṣa-ru-pá-am i-ṣé-er lá-qé-ep DUMU šu-a-šur DAM.GÀR-ru-um i-šu iš-tù ḫa-muš-tim ša i-tur₄-DINGIR DUMU a-mur-IŠTAR ITU.KAM bé-el-té-kà-lim li-mu-um ša qá-tí šu-sú-in KÙ.BABBAR a-na 12 ḫa-am-ša-tim i-ša-qal šu-ma i ma-lá u₄-me-šu KÙ.BABBAR lá iš-qú-ul ki-ma a-wa-at kà-ri-im ṣí-ib-tám a-na ma-na-im i-na ITU.KAM-im ú-ṣa
eng: Lā-qēp son of Šu-Aššur owed 10 minas of refined silver to a merchant. Reckoned from the week of Itūr-ilī son of Amur-Ištar, month Bēlat-ekallim, eponymy after Šu-Suen, he must pay the silver within 12 weeks. If he has not paid the silver within his stipulated term, he must add interest in accordance with the rule of the colony per mina per month.
transliteration: 10 ma-na KÙ.BABBAR ṣa-ru-pá-am i-ṣé-er lá-qé-ep DUMU šu-a-šur DAM.GÀR-ru-um i-šu iš-tù ḫa-muš-tim ša i-tur₄-DINGIR DUMU a-mur-IŠTAR ITU.KAM bé-el-té-kà-lim li-mu-um ša qá-tí šu-sú-in KÙ.BABBAR a-na 12 ḫa-am-ša-tim i-ša-qal šu-ma i ma-lá u₄-me-šu KÙ.BABBAR lá iš-qú-ul ki-ma a-wa-at kà-ri-im ṣí-ib-tám a-na ma-na-im i-na ITU.KAM-im ú-ṣa
translation: Lā-qēp son of Šu-Aššur owed 10 minas of refined silver to a merchant. Reckoned from the week of Itūr-ilī son of Amur-Ištar, month Bēlat-ekallim, eponymy after Šu-Suen, he must pay the silver within 12 weeks. If he has not paid the silver within his stipulated term, he must add interest in accordance with the rule of the colony per mina per month.

akk: KIŠIB a-ba-ba
eng: Seal of Ababa;
transliteration: KIŠIB a-ba-ba
translation: Seal of Ababa;

akk: a-na a-lá-ḫi-im DUMU šál-ma-a-šur
eng: to Ali-ahum son of Šalim-Aššur.
transliteration: a-na a-lá-ḫi-im DUMU šál-ma-a-šur
translation: to Ali-ahum son of Šalim-Aššur.

akk: KIŠIB en-um-a-šur DUMU IŠTAR-lá-ma-sí KIŠIB in-ba-a-šur DUMU pì-lá-aḫ-sú-in KIŠIB PUZUR₄.IŠTAR DUMU DINGIR-na-da
eng: Seal of Ennam-Aššur, son of Ištar-lamassī, seal of Inib-Aššur, son of Pilah-Suen, seal of Puzur-Ištar, son of Ilī-nādā.
transliteration: KIŠIB en-um-a-šur DUMU IŠTAR-lá-ma-sí KIŠIB in-ba-a-šur DUMU pì-lá-aḫ-sú-in KIŠIB PUZUR₄.IŠTAR DUMU DINGIR-na-da
translation: Seal of Ennam-Aššur, son of Ištar-lamassī, seal of Inib-Aššur, son of Pilah-Suen, seal of Puzur-Ištar, son of Ilī-nādā.

akk: 3 GÍN KÙ.BABBAR i-ṣé-er PUZUR₄.IŠTAR DUMU DINGIR-na-da DAM.GÀR i-šu iš-tù ḫa-mu-uš-tim ša šu-ku-bi-im ú ka-zi-a 22.5 ŠE i-na ITU.KAM ṣí-ib-tám ú-ṣa-áb ITU.KAM ma-ḫu-ur-DINGIR li-mu-um ša qá-té {d}IŠKUR-ba-ni
eng: 3 shekels of silver Puzur-Ištar, son of Ilī-nādā owes to the creditor. From the week of Šu-Kūbum and Kaziya he will add 1 / 8 shekel per month as interest. Month IV, eponymy of the successor of Adad-bāni.
transliteration: 3 GÍN KÙ.BABBAR i-ṣé-er PUZUR₄.IŠTAR DUMU DINGIR-na-da DAM.GÀR i-šu iš-tù ḫa-mu-uš-tim ša šu-ku-bi-im ú ka-zi-a 22.5 ŠE i-na ITU.KAM ṣí-ib-tám ú-ṣa-áb ITU.KAM ma-ḫu-ur-DINGIR li-mu-um ša qá-té {d}IŠKUR-ba-ni
translation: 3 shekels of silver Puzur-Ištar, son of Ilī-nādā owes to the creditor. From the week of Šu-Kūbum and Kaziya he will add 1 / 8 shekel per month as interest. Month IV, eponymy of the successor of Adad-bāni.

akk: KIŠIB ì-lí-áš-ra-ni DUMU a-šur-DU₁₀ KIŠIB šu-sú-in DUMU da-dí-im KIŠIB e-nu-bé-lúm
eng: Seal of Ilī-ašranni, son of Aššur-ṭāb, seal of Šu-Suen, son of Dadum, seal of Ennam-Bēlum,
transliteration: KIŠIB ì-lí-áš-ra-ni DUMU a-šur-DU₁₀ KIŠIB šu-sú-in DUMU da-dí-im KIŠIB e-nu-bé-lúm
translation: Seal of Ilī-ašranni, son of Aššur-ṭāb, seal of Šu-Suen, son of Dadum, seal of Ennam-Bēlum,

akk: ša ší-tí ša ḫu-bu-ul ir-ma-a-šur i-na ITU.1.KAM bé-el-tí-É.GAL li-mu-um ša qá-té a-šur-na-da a-na <gap> nim i-ša-qal šu-ma lá iš-qúl 1.5 GÍN.TA 1 ma-na-um ki-ma a-wa-at kà-ri-im ṣí-ib-tám i-na ITU.KAM-im ú-ṣa-áb
eng: of the remainder of the debt of Ir'am-Aššur. In month I, eponymy of the successor of Aššur-nādā, to / within <gap> he will pay, If he does not pay 1.5 shekels per mina, in accordance with the regulation of the colony he will add as interest per month.
transliteration: ša ší-tí ša ḫu-bu-ul ir-ma-a-šur i-na ITU.1.KAM bé-el-tí-É.GAL li-mu-um ša qá-té a-šur-na-da a-na <gap> nim i-ša-qal šu-ma lá iš-qúl 1.5 GÍN.TA 1 ma-na-um ki-ma a-wa-at kà-ri-im ṣí-ib-tám i-na ITU.KAM-im ú-ṣa-áb
translation: of the remainder of the debt of Ir'am-Aššur. In month I, eponymy of the successor of Aššur-nādā, to / within <gap> he will pay, If he does not pay 1.5 shekels per mina, in accordance with the regulation of the colony he will add as interest per month.

akk: KIŠIB ḫa-nu-nu-DUB.SAR
eng: Seal of hanunu,
transliteration: KIŠIB ḫa-nu-nu-DUB.SAR
translation: Seal of hanunu,

akk: li-ip-tí-IŠTAR DUMU lá-li-im ù ú-ṣur-ša-IŠTAR a-na a-la-ḫi-im DUMU šál-ma-a-šur
eng: scribe, of Lipit-Ištar son of Lālum and of Uṣur-ša-Ištar; to Ali-ahum son of Šalim-Aššur.
transliteration: li-ip-tí-IŠTAR DUMU lá-li-im ù ú-ṣur-ša-IŠTAR a-na a-la-ḫi-im DUMU šál-ma-a-šur
translation: scribe, of Lipit-Ištar son of Lālum and of Uṣur-ša-Ištar; to Ali-ahum son of Šalim-Aššur.

akk: KIŠIB a-šùr-e-mu-qí KIŠIB en-nam-a-šùr DUMU me-na-a KIŠIB i-dí-a-bi-im
eng: Seal of Aššur-emūqi, seal of Ennam-Aššur son of Menaya, seal of Iddin-abum.
transliteration: KIŠIB a-šùr-e-mu-qí KIŠIB en-nam-a-šùr DUMU me-na-a KIŠIB i-dí-a-bi-im
translation: Seal of Aššur-emūqi, seal of Ennam-Aššur son of Menaya, seal of Iddin-abum.

akk: KIŠIB DINGIR-na-da DUMU ba-zi-a KIŠIB en-nam-a-šùr DUMU kà-ri-a KIŠIB ki-ta-a
eng: Seal of Ilī-nādā, son of Baziya, seal of Ennam-Ašsur, son of Kariya, seal of Kitaya,
transliteration: KIŠIB DINGIR-na-da DUMU ba-zi-a KIŠIB en-nam-a-šùr DUMU kà-ri-a KIŠIB ki-ta-a
translation: Seal of Ilī-nādā, son of Baziya, seal of Ennam-Ašsur, son of Kariya, seal of Kitaya,

akk: ša 0.5 ma-na KÙ.BABBAR ṣa-ru-pá-am ša e-lá-ma ki-ta-a i-bé-el iš-tí KÙ.BABBAR uk-ta-al šu-ma a-e-ša-ma ú-da-pí-ir 1 GÍN.TA i-na ITU.1.KAM i-ma-nu-šu
eng: that Kitaya will manage 0.5 mina of silver belonging to Elamma. He is held by the silver. If he goes away to somewhere else, he will charge him 1 shekel per month.
transliteration: ša 0.5 ma-na KÙ.BABBAR ṣa-ru-pá-am ša e-lá-ma ki-ta-a i-bé-el iš-tí KÙ.BABBAR uk-ta-al šu-ma a-e-ša-ma ú-da-pí-ir 1 GÍN.TA i-na ITU.1.KAM i-ma-nu-šu
translation: that Kitaya will manage 0.5 mina of silver belonging to Elamma. He is held by the silver. If he goes away to somewhere else, he will charge him 1 shekel per month.

akk: KIŠIB {d}MAR.TU-ba-ni DUMU šu-{d}NIN.ŠUBUR
eng: Seal of Amurrum-bāni son of Šu-Ilabrat.
transliteration: KIŠIB {d}MAR.TU-ba-ni DUMU šu-{d}NIN.ŠUBUR
translation: Seal of Amurrum-bāni son of Šu-Ilabrat.

akk: ṭup-pu-um ša ší-bu-tí-a ša IGI šu-ga-ri-a-e ša a-šur wa-bar-tum ša ša-mu-ḫa i-dí-ni-ma ší-bu-tí a-dí-in
eng: The tablet with my testimony before the šugarri'ā'u of Aššur. The station at Šamuha gave me and I gave my testimony.
transliteration: ṭup-pu-um ša ší-bu-tí-a ša IGI šu-ga-ri-a-e ša a-šur wa-bar-tum ša ša-mu-ḫa i-dí-ni-ma ší-bu-tí a-dí-in
translation: The tablet with my testimony before the šugarri'ā'u of Aššur. The station at Šamuha gave me and I gave my testimony.

akk: KIŠIB i-ku-pí-a DUMU e-dí-na-a KIŠIB i-ri-ší-im DUMU a-mur-{d}UTU KIŠIB {d}UTU.DU₁₀ DUMU am-ri-a
eng: Seal of Ikūn-pīya son of Eddinaya, seal of Irišum son of Amur-Šamaš, seal of Šamaš-ṭāb son of Amriya.
transliteration: KIŠIB i-ku-pí-a DUMU e-dí-na-a KIŠIB i-ri-ší-im DUMU a-mur-{d}UTU KIŠIB {d}UTU.DU₁₀ DUMU am-ri-a
translation: Seal of Ikūn-pīya son of Eddinaya, seal of Irišum son of Amur-Šamaš, seal of Šamaš-ṭāb son of Amriya.

akk: <gap> ma-na KÙ.BABBAR ṣa-ru-pá-am i-ṣé-er {d}UTU.DU₁₀ ḫu-dí-da tí-šu iš-tù ḫa-muš-tim ša pu-šu-ke-en₆ ù PUZUR₄-a-šur a-na 3 ḫa-am-ša-tim i-ša-qal šu-ma lá iš-qú-ul ki-ma a-wa-at kà-ri-im ṣí-ib-tám ú-ṣa-áb ITU.KAM ṣí-ip-im li-mu-um e-lá-lí KÙ.BABBAR ša DAM.GÀR-ri-im
eng: Šamaš-ṭāb owes <gap> minas of refined silver to hudida. Reckoned from the week of Pūšu-kēn and Puzur-Aššur he must pay within 3 weeks. If he has not paid, he must add interest in accordance with the rule of the colony. Month Ṣip'um, eponymy Elāli. The silver belongs to a merchant.
transliteration: <gap> ma-na KÙ.BABBAR ṣa-ru-pá-am i-ṣé-er {d}UTU.DU₁₀ ḫu-dí-da tí-šu iš-tù ḫa-muš-tim ša pu-šu-ke-en₆ ù PUZUR₄-a-šur a-na 3 ḫa-am-ša-tim i-ša-qal šu-ma lá iš-qú-ul ki-ma a-wa-at kà-ri-im ṣí-ib-tám ú-ṣa-áb ITU.KAM ṣí-ip-im li-mu-um e-lá-lí KÙ.BABBAR ša DAM.GÀR-ri-im
translation: Šamaš-ṭāb owes <gap> minas of refined silver to hudida. Reckoned from the week of Pūšu-kēn and Puzur-Aššur he must pay within 3 weeks. If he has not paid, he must add interest in accordance with the rule of the colony. Month Ṣip'um, eponymy Elāli. The silver belongs to a merchant.

akk: KIŠIB pá-ru-ur-tim
eng: Seal of Parrurtum;
transliteration: KIŠIB pá-ru-ur-tim
translation: Seal of Parrurtum;

akk: a-na i-dí-a-bi-im DUMU na-ar-me-a
eng: to Iddin-abum son of Narmea.
transliteration: a-na i-dí-a-bi-im DUMU na-ar-me-a
translation: to Iddin-abum son of Narmea.

akk: KIŠIB PUZUR₄-a-šur DUMU i-ku-pí-a KIŠIB dan-a-šur DUMU PUZUR₄-a-šur KIŠIB pè-ru-a DUMU šu-up-ip-ra KIŠIB pè-ru-a DUMU a-ra-wa KIŠIB za-ba DUMU ḫa-nu KIŠIB lu-lu DUMU ḫa-bi
eng: Seal of Puzur-Aššur, son of Ikūn-pīya, seal of Dān-Aššur, son of Puzur-Aššur, seal of Peruwa, son of Šuppibra, seal of Peruwa, son of Arawa, seal of Zaba, son of hanu, seal of Lullu, son of hapi,
transliteration: KIŠIB PUZUR₄-a-šur DUMU i-ku-pí-a KIŠIB dan-a-šur DUMU PUZUR₄-a-šur KIŠIB pè-ru-a DUMU šu-up-ip-ra KIŠIB pè-ru-a DUMU a-ra-wa KIŠIB za-ba DUMU ḫa-nu KIŠIB lu-lu DUMU ḫa-bi
translation: Seal of Puzur-Aššur, son of Ikūn-pīya, seal of Dān-Aššur, son of Puzur-Aššur, seal of Peruwa, son of Šuppibra, seal of Peruwa, son of Arawa, seal of Zaba, son of hanu, seal of Lullu, son of hapi,

akk: lu-lu DUMU ḫa-bi ša IŠTAR-lá-ma-sí DAM ku-ni-lim e-ḫu-zu iš-tù a-wi-il₅-tum me-ta-at-ni a-wa-tù-šu-nu i-gi₅-im-ra-ma lu gám-ra-am ša a-na a-wi-il₅-tim ig-mu-ru lu a-na ì-lí-a ša a-na ki-šar-ší-im i-ni-id-ú lu-lu gám-ra-am ig-mu-ru lu ša a-wi-il₅-tim lu a ša ì-lí-a a-na mì-ma šu-um-šu a-na me-er-e ḫa-ni-im lu-lu DUMU ḫa-be lá i-tù-ar
eng: <that is> Lullu, son of hapi, who had married Ištar-lamassī, wife of Kūn-ilum. After the lady had died, their affairs were were settled and for the expenses made for the lady, and those made for Iliya, who had been thrown into jail <and> whose expenses Lullu had paid, for both those made for the lady, and those made for Iliya, Lullu, son of hapi, will not raise any claims against the sons of hanum.
transliteration: lu-lu DUMU ḫa-bi ša IŠTAR-lá-ma-sí DAM ku-ni-lim e-ḫu-zu iš-tù a-wi-il₅-tum me-ta-at-ni a-wa-tù-šu-nu i-gi₅-im-ra-ma lu gám-ra-am ša a-na a-wi-il₅-tim ig-mu-ru lu a-na ì-lí-a ša a-na ki-šar-ší-im i-ni-id-ú lu-lu gám-ra-am ig-mu-ru lu ša a-wi-il₅-tim lu a ša ì-lí-a a-na mì-ma šu-um-šu a-na me-er-e ḫa-ni-im lu-lu DUMU ḫa-be lá i-tù-ar
translation: <that is> Lullu, son of hapi, who had married Ištar-lamassī, wife of Kūn-ilum. After the lady had died, their affairs were were settled and for the expenses made for the lady, and those made for Iliya, who had been thrown into jail <and> whose expenses Lullu had paid, for both those made for the lady, and those made for Iliya, Lullu, son of hapi, will not raise any claims against the sons of hanum.

akk: a-na ša ki-ma i-a-tí ù bé-lá-nim
eng: To my representatives and Bēlānum;
transliteration: a-na ša ki-ma i-a-tí ù bé-lá-nim
translation: To my representatives and Bēlānum;

akk: KIŠIB en-um-a-šur
eng: seal of Ennam-Aššur.
transliteration: KIŠIB en-um-a-šur
translation: seal of Ennam-Aššur.

akk: KIŠIB kà-ri-im
eng: Seal of the
transliteration: KIŠIB kà-ri-im
translation: Seal of the

akk: KIŠIB {d}IŠKUR-pí-la-aḫ DUMU a-ni-nim KIŠIB a-šur-lá-ma-sí DUMU la-qé-eb KIŠIB na-zi DUMU PUZUR₄-ba-ni-ni
eng: Seal of Adad-pilah, son of Anīnum, seal of Aššur-lamassī, son of Lā-qēp, seal of Nazi, son of Puzur-banini.
transliteration: KIŠIB {d}IŠKUR-pí-la-aḫ DUMU a-ni-nim KIŠIB a-šur-lá-ma-sí DUMU la-qé-eb KIŠIB na-zi DUMU PUZUR₄-ba-ni-ni
translation: Seal of Adad-pilah, son of Anīnum, seal of Aššur-lamassī, son of Lā-qēp, seal of Nazi, son of Puzur-banini.

akk: 3 ma-na KÙ.BABBAR ṣa-ru-pá-am i-ṣé-er a-šur-lá-ma-sí DUMU la-qé-ep e-lá-ma i-šu iš-tù ḫa-muš-tim ša e-lá-ma ú zu-ba a-na 24 ḫa-am-ša-tim i-ša-qal šu-ma i-na u₄-me-šu ma-al-ú-tim lá iš-qú-ul 1.5 GÍN.TA a-na 1 ma-na-im i-na ITU.KAM-im ṣí-ib-tám ú-ṣa-áb ITU.KAM be-el-tí-É.GAL-lim li-mu-um ša qá-té šu-ḫu-bu-ur 8 ma-na KÙ.BABBAR i-ṣé-er šu-li DUMU PUZUR₄-a-be-eḫ e-lá-ma i-šu 1.5 GÍN.TA ṣí-ib-tám i-na ITU.KAM-im a-na 1 ma-na-im ú-ṣa-áb li-mu-um ša qá-té ba-zi-a DUMU šé-ep-a-lim
eng: 3 minas of refined silver Aššur-lamassī, son of Lā-qēp, owes to Elamma. He will pay within 24 months from the week of Elamma and Zuba. If he does not pay when his term is up, he will add as interest 1.5 shekel per mina per month. Month I, eponymy of the successor of Šu-hubur. 8 minas of refined silver Šuli, son of Puzur-Abeh, owes to Elamma. He will add as interest 1.5 shekel per mina per month. Eponymy of the successor of Baziya, son of Šēp-ālim.
transliteration: 3 ma-na KÙ.BABBAR ṣa-ru-pá-am i-ṣé-er a-šur-lá-ma-sí DUMU la-qé-ep e-lá-ma i-šu iš-tù ḫa-muš-tim ša e-lá-ma ú zu-ba a-na 24 ḫa-am-ša-tim i-ša-qal šu-ma i-na u₄-me-šu ma-al-ú-tim lá iš-qú-ul 1.5 GÍN.TA a-na 1 ma-na-im i-na ITU.KAM-im ṣí-ib-tám ú-ṣa-áb ITU.KAM be-el-tí-É.GAL-lim li-mu-um ša qá-té šu-ḫu-bu-ur 8 ma-na KÙ.BABBAR i-ṣé-er šu-li DUMU PUZUR₄-a-be-eḫ e-lá-ma i-šu 1.5 GÍN.TA ṣí-ib-tám i-na ITU.KAM-im a-na 1 ma-na-im ú-ṣa-áb li-mu-um ša qá-té ba-zi-a DUMU šé-ep-a-lim
translation: 3 minas of refined silver Aššur-lamassī, son of Lā-qēp, owes to Elamma. He will pay within 24 months from the week of Elamma and Zuba. If he does not pay when his term is up, he will add as interest 1.5 shekel per mina per month. Month I, eponymy of the successor of Šu-hubur. 8 minas of refined silver Šuli, son of Puzur-Abeh, owes to Elamma. He will add as interest 1.5 shekel per mina per month. Eponymy of the successor of Baziya, son of Šēp-ālim.

akk: KIŠIB DINGIR-ba-ni DUMU ib-ni-lí KIŠIB a-šur-ma-lik DUMU PUZUR₄-a-šur KIŠIB i-dí-a-šur DUMU PUZUR₄-a-be-eḫ
eng: Seal of Ilī-bāni, son of Ibni-ilī, seal of Aššur-mālik, son of Puzur-Aššur, seal of Iddin-Aššur, son of Puzur-Abeh!.
transliteration: KIŠIB DINGIR-ba-ni DUMU ib-ni-lí KIŠIB a-šur-ma-lik DUMU PUZUR₄-a-šur KIŠIB i-dí-a-šur DUMU PUZUR₄-a-be-eḫ
translation: Seal of Ilī-bāni, son of Ibni-ilī, seal of Aššur-mālik, son of Puzur-Aššur, seal of Iddin-Aššur, son of Puzur-Abeh!.

akk: 4 GÚ 32 ma-na URUDU ḫa-bu-ra-ta-am i-ṣé-er i-dí-a-šur DUMU PUZUR₄-a-be-eḫ e-lá-ma i-šu iš-tù ḫa-muš-tim ša a-šur-re-ṣí a-na 14 ḫa-am-ša-tim i-ša-qal šu-ma lá iš-qúl ki-ma a-wa-at kà-ri-im ṣí-ib-t
eng: 4 talents 32 minas of copper from haburata Iddin-Aššur, son of Puzur-Abeh, owes to Elamma. He will pay within 14 weeks from the week of Aššur-rēṣī. If he does not pay he will add interest in conformity with the rule of the colony.
transliteration: 4 GÚ 32 ma-na URUDU ḫa-bu-ra-ta-am i-ṣé-er i-dí-a-šur DUMU PUZUR₄-a-be-eḫ e-lá-ma i-šu iš-tù ḫa-muš-tim ša a-šur-re-ṣí a-na 14 ḫa-am-ša-tim i-ša-qal šu-ma lá iš-qúl ki-ma a-wa-at kà-ri-im ṣí-ib-t
translation: 4 talents 32 minas of copper from haburata Iddin-Aššur, son of Puzur-Abeh, owes to Elamma. He will pay within 14 weeks from the week of Aššur-rēṣī. If he does not pay he will add interest in conformity with the rule of the colony.

akk: KIŠIB lá-qé-pì-im DUMU i-zi-za-am-DINGIR
eng: Seal of La-qēpum, son of Izzizam-ilī.
transliteration: KIŠIB lá-qé-pì-im DUMU i-zi-za-am-DINGIR
translation: Seal of La-qēpum, son of Izzizam-ilī.

akk: a-na a-wa-tim a-ni-a-tim kà-ru-um kà-ni-iš i-dí-na-ni-ma IGI GÍR ša a-šùr <gap>
eng: For these words the Kanesh colony made me available and before Aššur's dagger I gave my testimony.
transliteration: a-na a-wa-tim a-ni-a-tim kà-ru-um kà-ni-iš i-dí-na-ni-ma IGI GÍR ša a-šùr <gap>
translation: For these words the Kanesh colony made me available and before Aššur's dagger I gave my testimony.

akk: KIŠIB en-um-a-šur DUMU šu-{d}EN.LÍL KIŠIB šu-IŠTAR DUMU šu-ki-tim
eng: Seal of Ennam-Aššur son of Šu-Illil, seal of Šu-Ištar son of Šukkutum.
transliteration: KIŠIB en-um-a-šur DUMU šu-{d}EN.LÍL KIŠIB šu-IŠTAR DUMU šu-ki-tim
translation: Seal of Ennam-Aššur son of Šu-Illil, seal of Šu-Ištar son of Šukkutum.

akk: KIŠIB šu-IŠTAR DUMU šu-a-a
eng: Seal of Šu-Ištar son of Šuaya.
transliteration: KIŠIB šu-IŠTAR DUMU šu-a-a
translation: Seal of Šu-Ištar son of Šuaya.

akk: a-na a-wa-tim a-ni-a-tim kà-ru-um kà-ni-iš i-dí-ni-ma IGI GÍR ša a-šur ší-bu-tí a-dí-in DINGIR-ba-ni DUMU ú-zu-a tap-pá-i
eng: The Kanesh colony gave me for these proceedings and I gave my testimony before Aššur's dagger. Ilī-bāni son of Uzuwa was my absent partner.
transliteration: a-na a-wa-tim a-ni-a-tim kà-ru-um kà-ni-iš i-dí-ni-ma IGI GÍR ša a-šur ší-bu-tí a-dí-in DINGIR-ba-ni DUMU ú-zu-a tap-pá-i
translation: The Kanesh colony gave me for these proceedings and I gave my testimony before Aššur's dagger. Ilī-bāni son of Uzuwa was my absent partner.

akk: KIŠIB i-dí-a-bi₄-im DUMU i-tur₄-DINGIR KIŠIB ú-nu-ba KIŠIB a-ší-a-at
eng: Seal of Iddin-abum son of Itūr-ilī, seal of Unuba, seal of Ašiat.
transliteration: KIŠIB i-dí-a-bi₄-im DUMU i-tur₄-DINGIR KIŠIB ú-nu-ba KIŠIB a-ší-a-at
translation: Seal of Iddin-abum son of Itūr-ilī, seal of Unuba, seal of Ašiat.

akk: 15 ma-na URUDU ma-sí-a-am i-ṣé-er ú-nu-ba ú a-ší-a-at wa-ar-dí ša dan-a-šur lu-zi i-šu iš-tù ḫa-mu-uš-tim ša {d}MAR.TU-ba-ni ú a-šur-na-da a-na 4 ḫa-am-ša-tim i-ša-qú-lu i-na áb-na-tí-ni i-ša-qú-lu šu-ma lá iš-qú-lu ki-ma a-wa-at kà-ri-im ṣí-ib-tám ú-ṣú-bu ITU.KAM ḫu-bu-ur li-mu-um i-dí-a-bu-um
eng: Unuba and Ašiat, Dan-Aššur's slaves, owe 15 minas of washed copper to Luzi. Reckoned from the week of Amurrum-bāni and Aššur-nādā they must pay within 4 weeks. They must pay using our weight stones. If they have not paid (in time) they must add interest in accordance with the rule of the colony. Month hubur eponymy Iddin-abum.
transliteration: 15 ma-na URUDU ma-sí-a-am i-ṣé-er ú-nu-ba ú a-ší-a-at wa-ar-dí ša dan-a-šur lu-zi i-šu iš-tù ḫa-mu-uš-tim ša {d}MAR.TU-ba-ni ú a-šur-na-da a-na 4 ḫa-am-ša-tim i-ša-qú-lu i-na áb-na-tí-ni i-ša-qú-lu šu-ma lá iš-qú-lu ki-ma a-wa-at kà-ri-im ṣí-ib-tám ú-ṣú-bu ITU.KAM ḫu-bu-ur li-mu-um i-dí-a-bu-um
translation: Unuba and Ašiat, Dan-Aššur's slaves, owe 15 minas of washed copper to Luzi. Reckoned from the week of Amurrum-bāni and Aššur-nādā they must pay within 4 weeks. They must pay using our weight stones. If they have not paid (in time) they must add interest in accordance with the rule of the colony. Month hubur eponymy Iddin-abum.

akk: a-na a-lá-ḫi-im ú a-šùr-ma-lik
eng: To Ali-ahum and Aššur-malik;
transliteration: a-na a-lá-ḫi-im ú a-šùr-ma-lik
translation: To Ali-ahum and Aššur-malik;

akk: KIŠIB i-dí-a-bi-im
eng: Seal of Iddin-abum.
transliteration: KIŠIB i-dí-a-bi-im
translation: Seal of Iddin-abum.

akk: KIŠIB la-qé-pì-im DUMU a-šur-ma-lik KIŠIB dan-a-a DUMU a-ta-a KIŠIB im-dí-DINGIR DUMU šu-lá-ba-an
eng: Seal of Lā-qēpum, son of Aššur-mālik. seal of Dannaya, son of Ataya, seal of Imdī-ilum, son of Šu-Labān,
transliteration: KIŠIB la-qé-pì-im DUMU a-šur-ma-lik KIŠIB dan-a-a DUMU a-ta-a KIŠIB im-dí-DINGIR DUMU šu-lá-ba-an
translation: Seal of Lā-qēpum, son of Aššur-mālik. seal of Dannaya, son of Ataya, seal of Imdī-ilum, son of Šu-Labān,

akk: ša 10 ma-na AN.NA ša i-ku-pì-IŠTAR a-na e-lá-ma i-di-nu 1.6666 ma-na KÙ.BABBAR im-dí-DINGIR il₅-qé šu-ma um-me-a-nu i-ku-pì-IŠTAR ú-la me-er-ú-šu a-na e-lá-ma i-tù-ru im-dí-DINGIR ú-ba-áb-šu
eng: that for the 10 minas of tin that Ikūn-pī-Ištar had given to Elamma Imdī-ilum received 1.6666 mina of silver. If the investors of Ikūn-pī-Ištar or his sons raise a claim against Elamma Imdī-ilum will clear him.
transliteration: ša 10 ma-na AN.NA ša i-ku-pì-IŠTAR a-na e-lá-ma i-di-nu 1.6666 ma-na KÙ.BABBAR im-dí-DINGIR il₅-qé šu-ma um-me-a-nu i-ku-pì-IŠTAR ú-la me-er-ú-šu a-na e-lá-ma i-tù-ru im-dí-DINGIR ú-ba-áb-šu
translation: that for the 10 minas of tin that Ikūn-pī-Ištar had given to Elamma Imdī-ilum received 1.6666 mina of silver. If the investors of Ikūn-pī-Ištar or his sons raise a claim against Elamma Imdī-ilum will clear him.

akk: KIŠIB {d}MAR.TU-ba-ni DUMU ma-na-na KIŠIB pu-šu-ke-en₆ DUMU sú-e-a
eng: Seal of Amurrum-bāni son of Manana, seal of Pūšu-kēn son of Sueyya.

akk: KIŠIB zi-qí-qí DUMU ì-lí-dan KIŠIB šál-ma-a-šur DUMU ú-zu-a KIŠIB PUZUR₄.IŠTAR DUMU id-na-a
eng: Seal of Ziqiqi, son of Ilī-dān, seal of Šalim-Aššur, son of Uzua, seal of Puzur-Ištar, son of Idnāya.
transliteration: KIŠIB zi-qí-qí DUMU ì-lí-dan KIŠIB šál-ma-a-šur DUMU ú-zu-a KIŠIB PUZUR₄.IŠTAR DUMU id-na-a
translation: Seal of Ziqiqi, son of Ilī-dān, seal of Šalim-Aššur, son of Uzua, seal of Puzur-Ištar, son of Idnāya.

akk: KIŠIB a-šur-ṣú-lu-li DUMU šu-lá-ba-an KIŠIB a-šur-ma-lik DUMU šu-lá-ba-an
eng: Seal of Aššur-ṣululī, son of Šu-Labān, seal of Aššur-mālik, son of Šu-Labān.
transliteration: KIŠIB a-šur-ṣú-lu-li DUMU šu-lá-ba-an KIŠIB a-šur-ma-lik DUMU šu-lá-ba-an
translation: Seal of Aššur-ṣululī, son of Šu-Labān, seal of Aššur-mālik, son of Šu-Labān.

akk: KIŠIB en-um-a-šur DUMU i-ku-pí-a KIŠIB a-ni-na-a DUMU DIRI-im KIŠIB e-na-a-šur DUMU šu-ul-mì-ša-a-šùr
eng: Seal of Ennum-Assur, son of Ikuppiya, seal of Aninaya, son of Watrum, seal of Ennam-Assur, son of Sulmi-sa-Assur.
transliteration: KIŠIB en-um-a-šur DUMU i-ku-pí-a KIŠIB a-ni-na-a DUMU DIRI-im KIŠIB e-na-a-šur DUMU šu-ul-mì-ša-a-šùr
translation: Seal of Ennum-Assur, son of Ikuppiya, seal of Aninaya, son of Watrum, seal of Ennam-Assur, son of Sulmi-sa-Assur.

akk: 12 ma-na URUDU ší-kam i-ṣé-er en-um-a-šùr DUMU i-ku-pí-a DAM.GÀR i-šu iš-tù SAG ITU.KAM tí-i-na-tim a-na ITU.KAM i-ša-qal šu-ma lá iš-qú-ul a-na 10 ma-na na-e 0.5 ma-na.TA i-na ITU.KAM ṣí-ib-tám ú-ṣa-áb li-mu-um da-dí-a DUMU šu-{d}NIN.ŠUBUR wa-bi₄-il₅ ṭup-pì-im šu-ut DAM.GÀR
eng: 12 minas of copper Ennum-Assur, son of Ikuppiya, owes to the creditor. Reckoning from month <gap> he will pay in one month. If he does not pay he will add an interest of 0.5 mina per 10 minas per month. Eponymy of Dadiya, son of Su-Ilabrat. The bearer of the tablet is the creditor.
transliteration: 12 ma-na URUDU ší-kam i-ṣé-er en-um-a-šùr DUMU i-ku-pí-a DAM.GÀR i-šu iš-tù SAG ITU.KAM tí-i-na-tim a-na ITU.KAM i-ša-qal šu-ma lá iš-qú-ul a-na 10 ma-na na-e 0.5 ma-na.TA i-na ITU.KAM ṣí-ib-tám ú-ṣa-áb li-mu-um da-dí-a DUMU šu-{d}NIN.ŠUBUR wa-bi₄-il₅ ṭup-pì-im šu-ut DAM.GÀR
translation: 12 minas of copper Ennum-Assur, son of Ikuppiya, owes to the creditor. Reckoning from month <gap> he will pay in one month. If he does not pay he will add an interest of 0.5 mina per 10 minas per month. Eponymy of Dadiya, son of Su-Ilabrat. The bearer of the tablet is the creditor.

akk: KIŠIB ḫi-ta-ni DUMU DINGIR-na-da KIŠIB en-um-a-šùr DUMU <gap> KIŠIB a-mur-a-šùr DUMU i-šar-ki-it-a-šùr KIŠIB ku-na-na-a
eng: Seal of Hitani, son of Ili-nada, seal of Ennum-Assur, son of <gap>, seal of Amur-Assur, son of Isar-kitti-Assur, seal of Kunnanaya.
transliteration: KIŠIB ḫi-ta-ni DUMU DINGIR-na-da KIŠIB en-um-a-šùr DUMU <gap> KIŠIB a-mur-a-šùr DUMU i-šar-ki-it-a-šùr KIŠIB ku-na-na-a
translation: Seal of Hitani, son of Ili-nada, seal of Ennum-Assur, son of <gap>, seal of Amur-Assur, son of Isar-kitti-Assur, seal of Kunnanaya.

akk: KIŠIB a-mur-a-šùr DUMU da-dí-a KIŠIB <gap> DUMU ú-zu-bi₄-iš-ki-im KIŠIB <gap> DUMU a-šùr-{d}UTU-ši
eng: Seal of Amur-Assur, son of Dadiya, seal of <gap> son of Uzubiskum, seal of <gap> son of Assur-samsi.
transliteration: KIŠIB a-mur-a-šùr DUMU da-dí-a KIŠIB <gap> DUMU ú-zu-bi₄-iš-ki-im KIŠIB <gap> DUMU a-šùr-{d}UTU-ši
translation: Seal of Amur-Assur, son of Dadiya, seal of <gap> son of Uzubiskum, seal of <gap> son of Assur-samsi.

akk: KIŠIB i-dí-a-šur DUMU ì-lí-dan KIŠIB a-šur-SIPA DUMU i-dí-da KIŠIB e-lá-ma DUMU i-dí-sú-en₆ KIŠIB PUZUR₄.IŠTAR DUMU a-šur-ma-lik
eng: Seal of Iddin-Aššur, son of Ilī-dān, seal of Aššur-rē'ī, son of Idida, seal of Elamma, son of Iddin-Suen, seal of Puzur-Ištar, son of Aššur-mālik.
transliteration: KIŠIB i-dí-a-šur DUMU ì-lí-dan KIŠIB a-šur-SIPA DUMU i-dí-da KIŠIB e-lá-ma DUMU i-dí-sú-en₆ KIŠIB PUZUR₄.IŠTAR DUMU a-šur-ma-lik
translation: Seal of Iddin-Aššur, son of Ilī-dān, seal of Aššur-rē'ī, son of Idida, seal of Elamma, son of Iddin-Suen, seal of Puzur-Ištar, son of Aššur-mālik.

akk: i-dí-IŠTAR ù {d}NIN.ŠUBUR i-mì-ig-ru-ma É-tù ša kà-ni-iš ù ú-tù-up-tum ša i-dí-IŠTAR {d}NIN.ŠUBUR lá ṭá-ḫu a-na ḫu-bu-ul a-bi-šu-nu ki-la-la-šu-nu-ma i-za-zu a-na qú-bu-ur bu-zu-ur um-mì-šu-nu a-na gám-ri-im ù ḫu-bu-ul bu-zu-ur um-mì-šu-nu i-dí-IŠTAR-ma i-za-az i-nu-mì ša i-na a-lim i-za-ku-ú-ni É-tù ša kà-ni-iš lá i-ša-ku-nu
transliteration: i-dí-IŠTAR ù {d}NIN.ŠUBUR i-mì-ig-ru-ma É-tù ša kà-ni-iš ù ú-tù-up-tum ša i-dí-IŠTAR {d}NIN.ŠUBUR lá ṭá-ḫu a-na ḫu-bu-ul a-bi-šu-nu ki-la-la-šu-nu-ma i-za-zu a-na qú-bu-ur bu-zu-ur um-mì-šu-nu a-na gám-ri-im ù ḫu-bu-ul bu-zu-ur um-mì-šu-nu i-dí-IŠTAR-ma i-za-az i-nu-mì ša i-na a-lim i-za-ku-ú-ni É-tù ša kà-ni-iš lá i-ša-ku-nu

akk: 0.6666 ma-na LÁ 1 GÍN KÙ.BABBAR ší-im am-tim sú-la ù ga-na-be-li il₅-qé-ú am-tám iš-tí sú-la ù ga-na-be-li ga-za-zu iš-am-ší šu-ma ma-ma-an a-šu-mì am-tim a-na ga-za-zu i-tù-a-ar sú-la ù ga-na-be-li 0.6666 ma-na LÁ 1 GÍN KÙ.BABBAR i-ša-qú-lu ù a-ma-sú
transliteration: 0.6666 ma-na LÁ 1 GÍN KÙ.BABBAR ší-im am-tim sú-la ù ga-na-be-li il₅-qé-ú am-tám iš-tí sú-la ù ga-na-be-li ga-za-zu iš-am-ší šu-ma ma-ma-an a-šu-mì am-tim a-na ga-za-zu i-tù-a-ar sú-la ù ga-na-be-li 0.6666 ma-na LÁ 1 GÍN KÙ.BABBAR i-ša-qú-lu ù a-ma-sú

akk: KIŠIB šu-ku-bi-im KIŠIB šu-IŠTAR KIŠIB a-mur-a-šur
eng: Seal of Šu-Kūbum, seal of Šu-Ištar, seal of Amur-Ištar,
transliteration: KIŠIB šu-ku-bi-im KIŠIB šu-IŠTAR KIŠIB a-mur-a-šur
translation: Seal of Šu-Kūbum, seal of Šu-Ištar, seal of Amur-Ištar,

akk: a-na a-la-ḫi-im DUMU šál-ma-a-šur a-ni-na DUMU PUZUR₄-a-na ú a-šur-ma-lik DUMU a-lá-ḫi-im
eng: To Ali-ahum son of Šalim-Aššur, Annina son of Puzur-Anna and Aššur-malik son of Ali-ahum;
transliteration: a-na a-la-ḫi-im DUMU šál-ma-a-šur a-ni-na DUMU PUZUR₄-a-na ú a-šur-ma-lik DUMU a-lá-ḫi-im
translation: To Ali-ahum son of Šalim-Aššur, Annina son of Puzur-Anna and Aššur-malik son of Ali-ahum;

akk: KIŠIB zu-ku-a
eng: seal of Zukuwa.
transliteration: KIŠIB zu-ku-a
translation: seal of Zukuwa.

akk: 10 ma-na 15 GÍN URUDU ma-sí-a-am i-ṣé-er IŠTAR-ba-ni <gap> i-šu iš-tù ḫa-mu-uš-tim ša ì-li-a ù kàr-wa-a a-na ITU.KAM i-ša-qal šu-ma lá iš-qú-ul ki-ma a-wa-at kà-ri-im ṣí-ib-tám ú-ṣa-áb ITU.KAM ma-ḫu-ur-ì-lí li-mu-um DU₁₀-a-šur
transliteration: 10 ma-na 15 GÍN URUDU ma-sí-a-am i-ṣé-er IŠTAR-ba-ni <gap> i-šu iš-tù ḫa-mu-uš-tim ša ì-li-a ù kàr-wa-a a-na ITU.KAM i-ša-qal šu-ma lá iš-qú-ul ki-ma a-wa-at kà-ri-im ṣí-ib-tám ú-ṣa-áb ITU.KAM ma-ḫu-ur-ì-lí li-mu-um DU₁₀-a-šur

akk: KIŠIB pè-ru-a KIŠIB ša-ḫi-iš-nu-ma-an KIŠIB ba-ri-me-a
eng: Seal of Peruwa, seal of Šahišnuman, seal of Barimea.
transliteration: KIŠIB pè-ru-a KIŠIB ša-ḫi-iš-nu-ma-an KIŠIB ba-ri-me-a
translation: Seal of Peruwa, seal of Šahišnuman, seal of Barimea.

akk: a-na a-wa-tim a-ni-a-tim kà-ru-um dur₄-ḫu-mì-it i-dí-ni-a-tí-ma IGI GÍR ša a-šùr ší-bu-tí-ni ni-dí-in ṭup-pu-um a-šu-mì ku-uk-ra ša DUMU zu-za-nim
eng: For these words the Durhumit colony made us available and before Aššur's dagger we gave our testimony. A record concerning Kukra of the son of Zuzānum.
transliteration: a-na a-wa-tim a-ni-a-tim kà-ru-um dur₄-ḫu-mì-it i-dí-ni-a-tí-ma IGI GÍR ša a-šùr ší-bu-tí-ni ni-dí-in ṭup-pu-um a-šu-mì ku-uk-ra ša DUMU zu-za-nim
translation: For these words the Durhumit colony made us available and before Aššur's dagger we gave our testimony. A record concerning Kukra of the son of Zuzānum.

akk: KIŠIB a-ta-tí-a DUMU en-na-nim KIŠIB a-ḫu-wa-qar DUMU a-šur-SIPA KIŠIB a-mur-a-šur DUMU šu-iš-ḫa-ra KIŠIB {d}a-šur-{d}UTU-ši DUMU ili₅-ba-ni
eng: Seal of Atatiya, son of Ennānim, seal of Ahu-waqar, son of Aššur-rē'ī, seal of Amur-Aššur, son of Šu-Išhara, seal of Aššur-šamšī, son of Ilī-bāni,
transliteration: KIŠIB a-ta-tí-a DUMU en-na-nim KIŠIB a-ḫu-wa-qar DUMU a-šur-SIPA KIŠIB a-mur-a-šur DUMU šu-iš-ḫa-ra KIŠIB {d}a-šur-{d}UTU-ši DUMU ili₅-ba-ni
translation: Seal of Atatiya, son of Ennānim, seal of Ahu-waqar, son of Aššur-rē'ī, seal of Amur-Aššur, son of Šu-Išhara, seal of Aššur-šamšī, son of Ilī-bāni,

akk: KIŠIB e-lá-ma DUMU i-dí-sú-en₆ KIŠIB zu-za-a DUMU i-sí-ḫi-im KIŠIB en-na-sú-en₆ DUMU ku-ku-ra-nim
eng: Seal of Elamma, son of Iddin-Suen, seal of Susāya, son of Isihum, seal of Ennam-Suen, son of Kukurānum.
transliteration: KIŠIB e-lá-ma DUMU i-dí-sú-en₆ KIŠIB zu-za-a DUMU i-sí-ḫi-im KIŠIB en-na-sú-en₆ DUMU ku-ku-ra-nim
translation: Seal of Elamma, son of Iddin-Suen, seal of Susāya, son of Isihum, seal of Ennam-Suen, son of Kukurānum.

akk: KIŠIB na-bi-sú-in ù ku-zi-zi-a
eng: Seal of Nab-Suen and Kuziziya;
transliteration: KIŠIB na-bi-sú-in ù ku-zi-zi-a
translation: Seal of Nab-Suen and Kuziziya;

akk: KIŠIB a-ku-za DUMU šu-a-nim KIŠIB šu-a-nim DUMU <gap> ki KIŠIB i-dí-a-bi-im
eng: Seal of Akuza son of Šu-Anum, seal of Šu-Anum son of <gap>ki, seal of Iddin-abum.
transliteration: KIŠIB a-ku-za DUMU šu-a-nim KIŠIB šu-a-nim DUMU <gap> ki KIŠIB i-dí-a-bi-im
translation: Seal of Akuza son of Šu-Anum, seal of Šu-Anum son of <gap>ki, seal of Iddin-abum.

akk: KIŠIB bu-bu-ra-nu-um
eng: Sealed by Buburānum;
transliteration: KIŠIB bu-bu-ra-nu-um
translation: Sealed by Buburānum;

akk: a-na a-bi₄-a DUMU be-e-be ù a-šùr-DU₁₀ <gap>-nu a-bi₄-a šu-ma a-ḫu-a a-tù-nu iḫ-da
eng: to Abiya son of Bebe and Aššur-ṭab. <gap> Abiya. If you are truly my brothers, take care!
transliteration: a-na a-bi₄-a DUMU be-e-be ù a-šùr-DU₁₀ <gap>-nu a-bi₄-a šu-ma a-ḫu-a a-tù-nu iḫ-da
translation: to Abiya son of Bebe and Aššur-ṭab. <gap> Abiya. If you are truly my brothers, take care!

akk: KIŠIB ša
eng: Sealed by your
transliteration: KIŠIB ša
translation: Sealed by your

akk: ki-ma ku-a-tí a-na en-um-a-šur um-ma a-šur-ma-sú-i-ma áš-ku-ma a-lá-ni-<gap> lá tù-šé-ba-lá-am <gap> a šé-bi₄-lam ḫa-ra-<gap>
eng: representatives; to Ennam-Aššur. From Aššur-massuʾī: <gap> I set <gap> and you do not send <gap> send <gap>
transliteration: ki-ma ku-a-tí a-na en-um-a-šur um-ma a-šur-ma-sú-i-ma áš-ku-ma a-lá-ni-<gap> lá tù-šé-ba-lá-am <gap> a šé-bi₄-lam ḫa-ra-<gap>
translation: representatives; to Ennam-Aššur. From Aššur-massuʾī: <gap> I set <gap> and you do not send <gap> send <gap>

akk: KIŠIB ša-lim-a-šur
eng: Sealed by Šalim-Aššur;
transliteration: KIŠIB ša-lim-a-šur
translation: Sealed by Šalim-Aššur;

akk: a-na en-nam-a-šur ù a-lá-ḫi-im ša-na-am ša 20 ma-na ma-<gap>
eng: to Ennam-Aššur and Ali-ahum. A kettle of 20 minas <gap>
transliteration: a-na en-nam-a-šur ù a-lá-ḫi-im ša-na-am ša 20 ma-na ma-<gap>
translation: to Ennam-Aššur and Ali-ahum. A kettle of 20 minas <gap>

akk: KIŠIB ni-mar-IŠTAR DUMU PUZUR₄-a-šùr KIŠIB en-nam-a-šùr DUMU kà-ri-a
eng: Sealed by Nimar-Ištar son of Puzur-Aššur, by Ennam-Aššur son of Karriya;
transliteration: KIŠIB ni-mar-IŠTAR DUMU PUZUR₄-a-šùr KIŠIB en-nam-a-šùr DUMU kà-ri-a
translation: Sealed by Nimar-Ištar son of Puzur-Aššur, by Ennam-Aššur son of Karriya;

akk: a-šùr-na-da DUMU šu-{d}EN.LÍL tap-pá-i-ni a-na a-wa-tim a-ni-a-tim kà-ru-um kà-ni-iš i-dí-ni-a-tí-ma IGI GÍR ša a-šùr ší-bu-tí-ni ni-dí-in
eng: Aššur-nādā son of Šu-Illil is our (absent) partner. The Kanesh colony gave us for these proceedings and we gave our testimony before Aššur's dagger.
transliteration: a-šùr-na-da DUMU šu-{d}EN.LÍL tap-pá-i-ni a-na a-wa-tim a-ni-a-tim kà-ru-um kà-ni-iš i-dí-ni-a-tí-ma IGI GÍR ša a-šùr ší-bu-tí-ni ni-dí-in
translation: Aššur-nādā son of Šu-Illil is our (absent) partner. The Kanesh colony gave us for these proceedings and we gave our testimony before Aššur's dagger.

akk: KIŠIB PUZUR₄-tí-a-am-tim KIŠIB a-šur-i-mì-tí DUMU a-ta-a KIŠIB ú-ṣur-ša-a-šur DUMU a-šur-ma-lik KIŠIB a-da-da DUMU {d}IM.GAL KIŠIB a-šur-DU₁₀ DUMU sá-da-a
eng: Sealed by Puzur-Ti'amtum, by Aššur-imittī son of Ataya, by Uṣur-ša-Aššur son of Aššur-malik, by Adada son of Adad-rabi, by Aššur-ṭāb son of Sadaya.
transliteration: KIŠIB PUZUR₄-tí-a-am-tim KIŠIB a-šur-i-mì-tí DUMU a-ta-a KIŠIB ú-ṣur-ša-a-šur DUMU a-šur-ma-lik KIŠIB a-da-da DUMU {d}IM.GAL KIŠIB a-šur-DU₁₀ DUMU sá-da-a
translation: Sealed by Puzur-Ti'amtum, by Aššur-imittī son of Ataya, by Uṣur-ša-Aššur son of Aššur-malik, by Adada son of Adad-rabi, by Aššur-ṭāb son of Sadaya.

akk: ša 4 ma-na KÙ.BABBAR ṣa-ru-pá-am i-ṣé-er ú-ṣur-ša-a-šur ù a-šur-DU₁₀ ša-lim-a-šur i-šu-ú iš-tù ḫa-mu-uš-tim ša ma-nu-ki-a-šur ù i-ku-nim a-na 6 ḫa-am-ša-tim i-ša-qú-lu šu-ma lá iš-qú-lu 1.5 GÍN.TA i-na ITU.KAM-im a-na ma-na-im ú-ṣú-bu KÙ.BABBAR i-na qá-qá-ad šál-mì-šu-nu ra-ki-is
eng: Concerning the fact that Uṣur-ša-Aššur and Aššur-ṭāb owe 4 minas of refined silver to Šalim-Aššur. Reckoned from the week of Mannu-kī-Aššur and Ikūnum they must pay within 6 weeks. If they have not paid (in time) they will add interest at the rate 1.5 shekel per month per mina. They are jointly responsible for the silver.
transliteration: ša 4 ma-na KÙ.BABBAR ṣa-ru-pá-am i-ṣé-er ú-ṣur-ša-a-šur ù a-šur-DU₁₀ ša-lim-a-šur i-šu-ú iš-tù ḫa-mu-uš-tim ša ma-nu-ki-a-šur ù i-ku-nim a-na 6 ḫa-am-ša-tim i-ša-qú-lu šu-ma lá iš-qú-lu 1.5 GÍN.TA i-na ITU.KAM-im a-na ma-na-im ú-ṣú-bu KÙ.BABBAR i-na qá-qá-ad šál-mì-šu-nu ra-ki-is
translation: Concerning the fact that Uṣur-ša-Aššur and Aššur-ṭāb owe 4 minas of refined silver to Šalim-Aššur. Reckoned from the week of Mannu-kī-Aššur and Ikūnum they must pay within 6 weeks. If they have not paid (in time) they will add interest at the rate 1.5 shekel per month per mina. They are jointly responsible for the silver.

akk: a-na šál-ma-a-šur
eng: To Šalim-Aššur;
transliteration: a-na šál-ma-a-šur
translation: To Šalim-Aššur;

akk: KIŠIB ma-ma-ḫi-ir
eng: sealed by Man-mahir.
transliteration: KIŠIB ma-ma-ḫi-ir
translation: sealed by Man-mahir.

akk: KIŠIB lá-qé-ep DUMU {d}AB-ba-ni KIŠIB a-ku-za DUMU šu-a-nim
eng: Sealed by Lā-qēp son of Illil-bāni, by Akuza son of Šu-Anum.
transliteration: KIŠIB lá-qé-ep DUMU {d}AB-ba-ni KIŠIB a-ku-za DUMU šu-a-nim
translation: Sealed by Lā-qēp son of Illil-bāni, by Akuza son of Šu-Anum.

akk: ṭup-pu-um ša ba-áb DINGIR ša IGI GÍR ša a-šùr ša ší-bu-tí-ni
eng: The tablet from the Gate of the God from before Aššur's dagger, with our testimony.
transliteration: ṭup-pu-um ša ba-áb DINGIR ša IGI GÍR ša a-šùr ša ší-bu-tí-ni
translation: The tablet from the Gate of the God from before Aššur's dagger, with our testimony.

akk: KIŠIB en-na-nim DUMU a-lá-bi₄-im KIŠIB a-gi-a DUMU PUZUR₄-a-šùr
eng: Sealed by Ennānum son of Ali-abum, by Agiya son of Puzur-Aššur;
transliteration: KIŠIB en-na-nim DUMU a-lá-bi₄-im KIŠIB a-gi-a DUMU PUZUR₄-a-šùr
translation: Sealed by Ennānum son of Ali-abum, by Agiya son of Puzur-Aššur;

akk: {d}IM.GAL DUMU bu-zi tap-pá-i-ni a-na a-wa-tim a-ni-a-tim kà-ru-um kà-ni-iš i-dí-ni-a-tí-ma ṭup-pá-am ší-bu-tí-ni IGI GÍR ša a-šùr ni-dí-in
eng: Adad-rabi son of Buzi was our (absent) partner. The Kanesh colony gave us for these proceedings and we gave a tablet with our testimony before Aššur's dagger.
transliteration: {d}IM.GAL DUMU bu-zi tap-pá-i-ni a-na a-wa-tim a-ni-a-tim kà-ru-um kà-ni-iš i-dí-ni-a-tí-ma ṭup-pá-am ší-bu-tí-ni IGI GÍR ša a-šùr ni-dí-in
translation: Adad-rabi son of Buzi was our (absent) partner. The Kanesh colony gave us for these proceedings and we gave a tablet with our testimony before Aššur's dagger.

akk: KIŠIB MAR.TU-ba-ni DUMU ma-na-na KIŠIB ú-ra-a ŠEŠ-šu KIŠIB ḫa-da-a DUMU kà-ra-wa KIŠIB a-na-aḫ-DINGIR DUMU ḫi-šar KIŠIB a-da-da DUMU {d}IM.GAL KIŠIB da-ak-ni-iš KIŠIB ḫu-ra-ta KIŠIB PUZUR₄.IŠTAR KIŠIB i-dí-{d}UTU
eng: Sealed by Amurrum-bāni son of Manana, by Uraya his brother, by hadaya son of Karawa, by Anah-ilī son of hišar, by Adada son of Adad-rabi, by Dakniš, by hurata, by Puzur-Ištar, by Iddin-Šamaš, the sons of Dalaš.
transliteration: KIŠIB MAR.TU-ba-ni DUMU ma-na-na KIŠIB ú-ra-a ŠEŠ-šu KIŠIB ḫa-da-a DUMU kà-ra-wa KIŠIB a-na-aḫ-DINGIR DUMU ḫi-šar KIŠIB a-da-da DUMU {d}IM.GAL KIŠIB da-ak-ni-iš KIŠIB ḫu-ra-ta KIŠIB PUZUR₄.IŠTAR KIŠIB i-dí-{d}UTU
translation: Sealed by Amurrum-bāni son of Manana, by Uraya his brother, by hadaya son of Karawa, by Anah-ilī son of hišar, by Adada son of Adad-rabi, by Dakniš, by hurata, by Puzur-Ištar, by Iddin-Šamaš, the sons of Dalaš.

akk: me-er-e da-la-áš a-na 9 ma-na KÙ.BABBAR ša É ḫa-ar-ta ù 10 ma-na KÙ.BABBAR ša ḫa-al-ki-a-šu ù kà-ri-a me-er-ú da-la-áš a-na ša-lim-a-šùr ù me-er-e-šu ú-lá i-tù-ru GÍR ša a-šùr ú-ta-me-šu
eng: For the 9 minas of silver from harta's house and the 10 minas of silver from halkiaššu and Karriya, sons of Dalaš, they must not raise claims against Šalim-Aššur and his sons. I / he made him swear by Aššur's dagger.
transliteration: me-er-e da-la-áš a-na 9 ma-na KÙ.BABBAR ša É ḫa-ar-ta ù 10 ma-na KÙ.BABBAR ša ḫa-al-ki-a-šu ù kà-ri-a me-er-ú da-la-áš a-na ša-lim-a-šùr ù me-er-e-šu ú-lá i-tù-ru GÍR ša a-šùr ú-ta-me-šu
translation: For the 9 minas of silver from harta's house and the 10 minas of silver from halkiaššu and Karriya, sons of Dalaš, they must not raise claims against Šalim-Aššur and his sons. I / he made him swear by Aššur's dagger.

akk: KIŠIB šál-ma-a-šur
eng: Sealed by Šalim-Aššur;
transliteration: KIŠIB šál-ma-a-šur

transliteration: a-na i-dí-a-bi-im ù en-na-nim <gap>
translation: to Iddin-abum and Ennānum <gap>

eng: Sealed by Akuza son of Šu-Anum, by Lā-qēp son of Illil-bāni, by Ṣilūlu son of Uku.
transliteration: KIŠIB a-ku-za DUMU šu-a-nim KIŠIB lá-qé-ep DUMU {d}AB-ba-ni KIŠIB ṣí-lu-lu DUMU ú-ku
translation: Sealed by Akuza son of Šu-Anum, by Lā-qēp son of Illil-bāni, by Ṣilūlu son of Uku.

akk: a-na a-wa-tim a-ni-a-tim kà-ru-um kà-né-eš i-dí-ni-a-tí-ma IGI GÍR ša a-šùr i-na ba-áb DINGIR ṭup-pá-am ni-dí-in
eng: The Kanesh colony gave us for these proceedings and we gave a tablet before Aššur's dagger in the Gate of the God.
transliteration: a-na a-wa-tim a-ni-a-tim kà-ru-um kà-né-eš i-dí-ni-a-tí-ma IGI GÍR ša a-šùr i-na ba-áb DINGIR ṭup-pá-am ni-dí-in
translation: The Kanesh colony gave us for these proceedings and we gave a tablet before Aššur's dagger in the Gate of the God.

transliteration: KIŠIB ša-lim-a-šùr DUMU i-sú-rik₁₃
translation: Sealed by Šalim-Aššur son of Issu-arik;

akk: a-na en-um-a-šùr DUMU ú-zu-a ḫa-na-a i-dí-ku-bi₄-im a-šur-i-mì-tí DUMU du-dí-ki en-um-a-šùr ù a-lá-ḫi-im
eng: to Ennam-Aššur son of Uzuwa, hannaya, Iddin-Kūbum, Aššur-imittī son of Dudiki, Ennam-Aššur and Ali-ahum.
transliteration: a-na en-um-a-šùr DUMU ú-zu-a ḫa-na-a i-dí-ku-bi₄-im a-šur-i-mì-tí DUMU du-dí-ki en-um-a-šùr ù a-lá-ḫi-im
translation: to Ennam-Aššur son of Uzuwa, hannaya, Iddin-Kūbum, Aššur-imittī son of Dudiki, Ennam-Aššur and Ali-ahum.

akk: KIŠIB ú-ra-a DUMU ma-na-na KIŠIB ì-lí-dan DUMU i-dí-a-šur KIŠIB ma-nu-um-ba-lúm-a-šur DUMU ib-ki-im
eng: Sealed by Uraya son of Manana, by Ilī-dan son of Iddin-Aššur, by Mannum-balum-Aššur son of Ibkum.

akk: a-na a-wa-tim a-ni-a-tim kà-ru-um kà-né-eš i-dí-ni-a-tí-ma IGI GÍR ša a-šur ší-bu-tí-ni ni-dí-in
eng: The Kanesh colony gave us for these proceedings and we gave our testimony before Aššur's dagger.

translation: The Kanesh colony gave us for these proceedings and we gave our testimony before Aššur's dagger.

akk: a-na en-um-a-šur DUMU šál-ma-a-šur
eng: To Ennam-Aššur son of Šalim-Aššur;
transliteration: a-na en-um-a-šur DUMU šál-ma-a-šur
translation: To Ennam-Aššur son of Šalim-Aššur;

akk: KIŠIB a-na-a-na
eng: sealed by Anna-anna.
transliteration: KIŠIB a-na-a-na
translation: sealed by Anna-anna.

akk: a-na en-nam-a-šur i-ku-nim DUMU e-lá-lí ù am-ur-IŠTAR DUMU <gap>

translation: sealed by Aššur-malik son of Ikūn-pīya.

akk: a-na šu-a-nim DUMU ḫa-da-a

translation: To Šu-Anum son of hadaya;

translation: sealed by Sakliya.

translation: Sealed by Šu-Kūbum son of Aššur-idī, by Iddin-Ištar son of Aššur-idī;

akk: sú-in-na-da DUMU en-um-a-šùr tap-pá-i-ni a-na a-wa-tim a-ni-a-tim kà-ru-um kà-ni-iš ṣa-ḫe-er GAL i-dí-ni-a-tí-ma ší-bu-tí-ni IGI GÍR ša a-šùr ni-dí-in
eng: Suen-nādā son of Ennam-Aššur was our (absent) partner. The plenary assembly of the Kanesh colony gave us for these proceedings, and we gave our testimony before Aššur's dagger.

akk: KIŠIB en-na-nim DUMU a-la-bi-im KIŠIB dan-a-šùr DUMU ir-nu-id KIŠIB bu-zu-a DUMU a-šùr-DU₁₀ KIŠIB a-du-da DUMU zu-ú-a
eng: Sealed by Ennānum son of Ali-abum, by Dan-Aššur son of Irnuid, by Buzuwa son of Aššur-ṭāb, by Aduda son of Zuwa.
transliteration: KIŠIB en-na-nim DUMU a-la-bi-im KIŠIB dan-a-šùr DUMU ir-nu-id KIŠIB bu-zu-a DUMU a-šùr-DU₁₀ KIŠIB a-du-da DUMU zu-ú-a
translation: Sealed by Ennānum son of Ali-abum, by Dan-Aššur son of Irnuid, by Buzuwa son of Aššur-ṭāb, by Aduda son of Zuwa.

akk: ša 7 ma-na 7 GÍN AN.NA ša ni-ip-lá-tim ša ku-zi-a a-na ILLAT-tim ḫa-bu-lu AN.NA dan-a-šùr iš-qú-ul 7 GÍN.TA 1 ma-na 10 GÍN KÙ.BABBAR ṣa-ru-pá-am i-na KÙ.BABBAR-áp im-dí-dan iš-tí šál-ma-a-šùr dan-a-šùr il₅-qé šu-ma ša ki-ma im-dí-dan ù ku-zi-a a-na šál-ma-a-šùr a-na 7 ma-na 7 GÍN AN.NA i-tù-ru dan-a-šùr DUMU ir-nu-id ú-ba-áb-šu ITU.1.KAM ša sà-ra-tim li-mu-um i-dí-a-bu-um
eng: Concerning the 7 minas 7 shekels of tin from the balance payment that Kuziya owes to the caravan - Dan-Aššur has paid the tin. Reckoned at the rate 1:7 Dan-Aššur has received 1 mina 10 shekels of refined silver from Imdī-dan's silver from Šalim-Aššur. If Imdī-dan's representatives and Kuziya claim the 7 minas 7 shekels of tin from Šalim-Aššur, Dan-Aššur son of Irnuid will clear him. Month Ša-sarrātim, eponymy Iddin-abum.
transliteration: ša 7 ma-na 7 GÍN AN.NA ša ni-ip-lá-tim ša ku-zi-a a-na ILLAT-tim ḫa-bu-lu AN.NA dan-a-šùr iš-qú-ul 7 GÍN.TA 1 ma-na 10 GÍN KÙ.BABBAR ṣa-ru-pá-am i-na KÙ.BABBAR-áp im-dí-dan iš-tí šál-ma-a-šùr dan-a-šùr il₅-qé šu-ma ša ki-ma im-dí-dan ù ku-zi-a a-na šál-ma-a-šùr a-na 7 ma-na 7 GÍN AN.NA i-tù-ru dan-a-šùr DUMU ir-nu-id ú-ba-áb-šu ITU.1.KAM ša sà-ra-tim li-mu-um i-dí-a-bu-um
translation: Concerning the 7 minas 7 shekels of tin from the balance payment that Kuziya owes to the caravan - Dan-Aššur has paid the tin. Reckoned at the rate 1:7 Dan-Aššur has received 1 mina 10 shekels of refined silver from Imdī-dan's silver from Šalim-Aššur. If Imdī-dan's representatives and Kuziya claim the 7 minas 7 shekels of tin from Šalim-Aššur, Dan-Aššur son of Irnuid will clear him. Month Ša-sarrātim, eponymy Iddin-abum.

akk: KIŠIB a-ku-za DUMU šu-a-nim KIŠIB MAR.TU-ba-ni DUMU ma-na-na KIŠIB lá-qé-ep DUMU PUZUR₄.IŠTAR
eng: Sealed by Akuza son of Šu-Anum, by Amurrum-bāni son of Manana, by Lā-qēp son of Puzur-Ištar.
transliteration: KIŠIB a-ku-za DUMU šu-a-nim KIŠIB MAR.TU-ba-ni DUMU ma-na-na KIŠIB lá-qé-ep DUMU PUZUR₄.IŠTAR

eng: § The Kanesh colony gave us for these proceedings and we gave our testimony before Aššur's dagger. Itūr-ilī son of Amur-Ištar was our (absent) partner.
transliteration: a-na a-wa-tim a-ni-a-tim kà-ru-um kà-ni-iš-ki i-dí-ni-a-tí-ma IGI GÍR ša a-šùr ší-bu-tí-ni ni-dí-in i-tur₄-DINGIR DUMU a-mur-IŠTAR tap-pá-i-ni
translation: § The Kanesh colony gave us for these proceedings and we gave our testimony before Aššur's dagger. Itūr-ilī son of Amur-Ištar was our (absent) partner.

akk: KIŠIB a-lu-lá-a

transliteration: KIŠIB a-lu-lá-a
translation: Sealed by Alulaya;

akk: a-na en-nam-a-šur

transliteration: a-na en-nam-a-šur
translation: to Ennam-Aššur.

akk: KIŠIB a-ku-za KIŠIB la-li-im KIŠIB šu-ku-bi-im DUMU a-zu KIŠIB a-šùr-i-mì-tí DUMU i-ku-pì-IŠTAR KIŠIB i-tur₄-DINGIR DUMU a-mur-IŠTAR

translation: Sealed by Akuza, by Lalum, by Šu-Kūbum son of Azu, by Aššur-imittī son of Ikūn-pi-Ištar, by Itūr-ilī son of Amur-Ištar.

translation: The tablet from the Gate of the God with their testimony from before Aššur's dagger.

akk: KIŠIB tù-ra-mì-ili₅
eng: Sealed by Tūram-ilī;
transliteration: KIŠIB tù-ra-mì-ili₅
translation: Sealed by Tūram-ilī;

eng: to Ennam-Aššur and Šu-Kūbum son of Ennam-Anum.

eng: Sealed by the

translation: Sealed by the

eng: hahhum colony. The colony passed a verdict: If Šu-Bēlum and Enna-Suen, Iddin-abum's sons, do not leave and meet with Šalim-Aššur and do not discuss in order to come to an agreement, then they must release the goods to Šalim-Aššur. Aba was the arbitrator.

translation: hahhum colony. The colony passed a verdict: If Šu-Bēlum and Enna-Suen, Iddin-abum's sons, do not leave and meet with Šalim-Aššur and do not discuss in order to come to an agreement, then they must release the goods to Šalim-Aššur. Aba was the arbitrator.

transliteration: KIŠIB šu-ta-mu-zi
translation: Sealed by Šu-Tammuzī,

akk: a-na ša-lim-a-šùr qí-bi-ma um-ma i-dí-a-bu-um i-tur₄-DINGIR <gap> e-na-aḫ-DINGIR ù en-nam-a-šur-ma a-na É-bé-tí-kà né-ru-ub-ma ṭup-pé-kà ni-ip-té-ma ṭup-pá-am ša ḫu-bu-ul ú-ṣú-ur-ša-a-šur DUMU a-šur-ma-lik ù a-šur-DU₁₀ DUMU sá-da-a nu-šé-li-ma a-na a-bu-a ni-ip-qí-id a-ma me-ḫe-er-šu ší-ta-me
eng: To Šalim-Aššur from Iddin-abum, Itūr-ilī, <gap>, Enah-ilī and Ennam-Aššur: We entered your house, opened for your tablets, took out the tablet concerning the debt of Uṣur-ša-Aššur son of Aššur-malik and Aššur-ṭāb son of Sadaya, and entrusted it to Abuwa. Now, listen to the copy:
transliteration: a-na ša-lim-a-šùr qí-bi-ma um-ma i-dí-a-bu-um i-tur₄-DINGIR <gap> e-na-aḫ-DINGIR ù en-nam-a-šur-ma a-na É-bé-tí-kà né-ru-ub-ma ṭup-pé-kà ni-ip-té-ma ṭup-pá-am ša ḫu-bu-ul ú-ṣú-ur-ša-a-šur DUMU a-šur-ma-lik ù a-šur-DU₁₀ DUMU sá-da-a nu-šé-li-ma a-na a-bu-a ni-ip-qí-id a-ma me-ḫe-er-šu ší-ta-me
translation: To Šalim-Aššur from Iddin-abum, Itūr-ilī, <gap>, Enah-ilī and Ennam-Aššur: We entered your house, opened for your tablets, took out the tablet concerning the debt of Uṣur-ša-Aššur son of Aššur-malik and Aššur-ṭāb son of Sadaya, and entrusted it to Abuwa. Now, listen to the copy:

akk: KIŠIB PUZUR₄-tí-a-am-tim KIŠIB a-šur-i-mì-tí DUMU e-ta-a KIŠIB ú-ṣú-ur-ša-a-šur KIŠIB a-da-da-DUB.SAR KIŠIB a-šur-DU₁₀
eng: Sealed by Puzur-Ti'amtum, by Aššur-imittī son of Etaya, by Uṣur-ša-Aššur, by Adada, the scribe, and by Aššur-ṭāb.
transliteration: KIŠIB PUZUR₄-tí-a-am-tim KIŠIB a-šur-i-mì-tí DUMU e-ta-a KIŠIB ú-ṣú-ur-ša-a-šur KIŠIB a-da-da-DUB.SAR KIŠIB a-šur-DU₁₀

akk: IGI ú-ra-a IGI ì-lí-dan IGI ma-ni-um-ba-lúm-a-šùr

transliteration: <gap> ša-lim-ar-dí ú šu-nu-nu áp-qí-id

eng: Witnessed by Aššur-idī son of Mu-mulānum, by Aššur-taklāku son of Ikūnum son of Samaya.
transliteration: IGI a-šùr-i-dí DUMU mu-mu-lá-nim IGI a-šur-ta-ak-lá-ku DUMU i-ku-nim DUMU sá-ma-a mì-ma a-nim
translation: Witnessed by Aššur-idī son of Mu-mulānum, by Aššur-taklāku son of Ikūnum son of Samaya.

eng: Ennam-Aššur son of Suen-nādā has received 13 minas of refined silver, and Suen-nādā his son has received 5.3333 minas of refined silver .
transliteration: 13 ma-na KÙ.BABBAR ṣa-ru-pá-am en-um-a-šùr DUMU sú-in-na-da 5.3333 ma-na KÙ.BABBAR ṣa-ru-pá-am sú-in-na-da me-ra-šu il₅-qé-ú i-na ší-im <gap>
translation: Ennam-Aššur son of Suen-nādā has received 13 minas of refined silver, and Suen-nādā his son has received 5.3333 minas of refined silver .

transliteration: IGI a-šùr-i-mì-tí IGI iš-me-DINGIR IGI bi-<gap> DUMU ḫa-na-ni-a IGI DINGIR.SIPA DUMU ša-ak-ṣí-im
translation: Witnessed by Aššur-imittī, by Išme-ilum, by Bi<gap> son of hannāniya, by Ilī-rē'ī son of Šakṣum.

eng: Witnessed by Aššur-idī
transliteration: IGI a-šur-i-dí
translation: Witnessed by Aššur-idī

akk: en-um-a-šùr a-na a-lá-ḫi-im iṣ-ba-at-ni-a-tí-ma um-ma en-um-a-šùr-ma a-na a-lá-ḫi-im-ma al-kam lá-áš-a-al-kà um-ma a-lá-ḫu-um-ma a-na mì-nim ta-ša-a-lá-ni um-ma en-um-a-šùr-ma a-na ta-aḫ-sí-sá-tim ša a-na-ku ù a-ta ni-kà-sí ni-sí-ú i ku-nu-ki-kà ù ku-nu-ki-a kà-an-kà-ni ik-ra-ni ú-lá kà-i-na-ni um-ma a-lá-ḫu-um-ma ta-aḫ-sí-sá-tim ša ku-nu-ki-a ú ku-nu-ki-kà kà-an-kà-ni ke-na ku-nu-ku-a lá a-na-ki-ir um-ma en-um-a-šur-ma ša ni-iš a-lim{ki} <gap> ta-mu-ú kà-i-lá <gap> a-na a-lim{ki} ú be-lí-a a-wa-tí bi₄-lá a-na a-wa-tim a-ni-a-tím kà-ru-um kà-ni-iš i-dí-ni-a-tí-ma IGI GÍR ša a-šùr ší-bu-tí-ni ni-dí-in
eng: Ennam-Aššur seized us against Ali-ahum and said to Ali-ahum: Come, let me question you!" Ali-ahum answered: "Why do you want to question me?" Ennam-Aššur said: "About the memoranda stating that I and you settled accounts. Contest or confirm to me that they are sealed by you and me." Ali-ahum answered: "As to the memoranda sealed by me and by you - yes, I do not contest my seal." Ennam-Aššur said: "Keep in mind what was sworn by the City! Bring my case to the City assembly and my lord." The Kanesh colony gave us for these proceedings and we gave our testimony before Aššur's dagger.
transliteration: en-um-a-šùr a-na a-lá-ḫi-im iṣ-ba-at-ni-a-tí-ma um-ma en-um-a-šùr-ma a-na a-lá-ḫi-im-ma al-kam lá-áš-a-al-kà um-ma a-lá-ḫu-um-ma a-na mì-nim ta-ša-a-lá-ni um-ma en-um-a-šùr-ma a-na ta-aḫ-sí-sá-tim ša a-na-ku ù a-ta ni-kà-sí ni-sí-ú i ku-nu-ki-kà ù ku-nu-ki-a kà-an-kà-ni ik-ra-ni ú-lá kà-i-na-ni um-ma a-lá-ḫu-um-ma ta-aḫ-sí-sá-tim ša ku-nu-ki-a ú ku-nu-ki-kà kà-an-kà-ni ke-na ku-nu-ku-a lá a-na-ki-ir um-ma en-um-a-šur-ma ša ni-iš a-lim{ki} <gap> ta-mu-ú kà-i-lá <gap> a-na a-lim{ki} ú be-lí-a a-wa-tí bi₄-lá a-na a-wa-tim a-ni-a-tím kà-ru-um kà-ni-iš i-dí-ni-a-tí-ma IGI GÍR ša a-šùr ší-bu-tí-ni ni-dí-in
translation: Ennam-Aššur seized us against Ali-ahum and said to Ali-ahum: Come, let me question you!" Ali-ahum answered: "Why do you want to question me?" Ennam-Aššur said: "About the memoranda stating that I and you settled accounts. Contest or confirm to me that they are sealed by you and me." Ali-ahum answered: "As to the memoranda sealed by me and by you - yes, I do not contest my seal." Ennam-Aššur said: "Keep in mind what was sworn by the City! Bring my case to the City assembly and my lord." The Kanesh colony gave us for these proceedings and we gave our testimony before Aššur's dagger.

akk: IGI a-šur-GAL DUMU lá-qé-ep IGI ili₅-ba-ni DUMU a-mur-IŠTAR
eng: Witnessed by Aššur-rabi son of Lā-qēp, by Ilī-bāni son of Amur-Ištar."

translation: Witnessed by Aššur-rabi son of Lā-qēp, by Ilī-bāni son of Amur-Ištar."

akk: 1 ma-na KÙ.BABBAR i-ṣé-er a-li-li ù kà-ar-ší-ni wa-al-dí-lúm ù IŠTAR-lá-ma-sí i-šu-ú a-na ša tù-ùḫ-tù-ḫa-nim 1.5 ma-na KÙ.BABBAR ù 2 UDU.ḪI.A i-du-nu
eng: Alili and Karšini owe 1 mina of silver to Waldi-ilum and Ištar-lamassī. They will give 1.5 mina of silver plus 2 sheep by the feast for Tuhtuhānum. Before your lord and your lady.
transliteration: 1 ma-na KÙ.BABBAR i-ṣé-er a-li-li ù kà-ar-ší-ni wa-al-dí-lúm ù IŠTAR-lá-ma-sí i-šu-ú a-na ša tù-ùḫ-tù-ḫa-nim 1.5 ma-na KÙ.BABBAR ù 2 UDU.ḪI.A i-du-nu
translation: Alili and Karšini owe 1 mina of silver to Waldi-ilum and Ištar-lamassī. They will give 1.5 mina of silver plus 2 sheep by the feast for Tuhtuhānum. Before your lord and your lady.

akk: IGI bé-li-kà-ù bé-el-tí-kà IGI wa-al-dí-lim ù kà-ar-ni-kà-šu
eng: Witnessed by Waldi-ilum and Karnikašu.
transliteration: IGI bé-li-kà-ù bé-el-tí-kà IGI wa-al-dí-lim ù kà-ar-ni-kà-šu
translation: Witnessed by Waldi-ilum and Karnikašu.

akk: <gap> ma-na <gap> ša iš-tù ḫa-muš-tim ša a-šùr-ma-lik DUMU a-lá-ḫi-im li-mì-im i-na-a ša i-ṣé-er en-um-a-šur DUMU ša-lim-a-šùr dan-a-šùr DUMU ša-lim-a-ḫi-im i-šu-ú KÙ.BABBAR ú ṣí-ba-sú en-um-a-šùr a-ḫu-šu ki-ma dan-a-šur ša-bu-ú ṭup-pu-um ḫa-ar-mu-um ša ḫu-bu-ul en-um-a-šur DUMU ša-lim-a-šùr ša e-li-a-ni sà-ar
eng: <gap> minas of <gap> which Ennam-Aššur son of Šalim-Aššur owed to Dan-Aššur son of Šalim-ahum from the week of Aššur-malik son of Ali-ahum, eponymy Innaya, that silver and the accrued interest his brother Ennam-Aššur has been paid in full on behalf of Dan-Aššur. A certified tablet concerning the debt of Ennam-Aššur son of Šalim-Aššur that may appear will be invalid.
transliteration: <gap> ma-na <gap> ša iš-tù ḫa-muš-tim ša a-šùr-ma-lik DUMU a-lá-ḫi-im li-mì-im i-na-a ša i-ṣé-er en-um-a-šur DUMU ša-lim-a-šùr dan-a-šùr DUMU ša-lim-a-ḫi-im i-šu-ú KÙ.BABBAR ú ṣí-ba-sú en-um-a-šùr a-ḫu-šu ki-ma dan-a-šur ša-bu-ú ṭup-pu-um ḫa-ar-mu-um ša ḫu-bu-ul en-um-a-šur DUMU ša-lim-a-šùr ša e-li-a-ni sà-ar
translation: <gap> minas of <gap> which Ennam-Aššur son of Šalim-Aššur owed to Dan-Aššur son of Šalim-ahum from the week of Aššur-malik son of Ali-ahum, eponymy Innaya, that silver and the accrued interest his brother Ennam-Aššur has been paid in full on behalf of Dan-Aššur. A certified tablet concerning the debt of Ennam-Aššur son of Šalim-Aššur that may appear will be invalid.

akk: IGI ku-ku-wa DUMU bu-da-tim IGI a-šur-{d}UTU-ši DUMU <gap> IGI PUZUR₄-a-šur <gap> dan <gap>
eng: Witnessed by Kukuwa son of Budātum, by Ašsur-šamšī son of <gap>, Puzur-Aššur <gap>
transliteration: IGI ku-ku-wa DUMU bu-da-tim IGI a-šur-{d}UTU-ši DUMU <gap> IGI PUZUR₄-a-šur <gap> dan <gap>
translation: Witnessed by Kukuwa son of Budātum, by Ašsur-šamšī son of <gap>, Puzur-Aššur <gap>

translation: Aššur-imittī son of Etaya has received 17 minas of refined silver and 7.5 shekels of -gold from the proceeds of Ušinalam's wool.

eng: Witnessed by Ennam-Wēr son of Šudaya, by Il-ašrannī son of Sukalliya, by Enna-Suen son of Iddin-abum, by Abūbu's younger son
