akk: ta-ar-dí-im
transliteration: ta-ar-dí-im

akk: 2 né-pí-šu 15 ma-na.TA ú iš-tí-in né-pí-šu-um 10 ma-na ni-is-ḫa-sú DIRI ša-du-a-sú ša-bu-ú ŠU.NÍGIN 42.3333 ma-na KÙ.BABBAR ṣa-ru-pá-am ku-nu-ki-a a-na a-lu-wa ù e-ni-ša-ri-im áp-qí-id-ma a-na a-lim{ki} a ma-lá tí-ir-tí-šu a-ṣé-er ša-lim-a-šùr ú-šé-bi-il₅-šu-nu a-ḫa-ma 13.3333 ma-na URUDU SIG₅ a-na ga-am-ri-šu-nu ù 5 GÍN KÙ.BABBAR a-na ú-ku-ul-tí-šu-nu a-dí-in
eng: 2 packages of 15 minas each plus a single package of 10 minas, its import duty added, its transport tariff paid - in all 42 ⅓ minas of refined silver under my seal, I entrusted to Aluwa and Enišārum, and I sent them to the City to Šalim-Aššur in accordance with his orders. Furthermore, I paid 13 ⅓ minas of good copper for their expenses and 5 shekels of silver for their food.
transliteration: 2 né-pí-šu 15 ma-na.TA ú iš-tí-in né-pí-šu-um 10 ma-na ni-is-ḫa-sú DIRI ša-du-a-sú ša-bu-ú ŠU.NÍGIN 42.3333 ma-na KÙ.BABBAR ṣa-ru-pá-am ku-nu-ki-a a-na a-lu-wa ù e-ni-ša-ri-im áp-qí-id-ma a-na a-lim{ki} a ma-lá tí-ir-tí-šu a-ṣé-er ša-lim-a-šùr ú-šé-bi-il₅-šu-nu a-ḫa-ma 13.3333 ma-na URUDU SIG₅ a-na ga-am-ri-šu-nu ù 5 GÍN KÙ.BABBAR a-na ú-ku-ul-tí-šu-nu a-dí-in
translation: 2 packages of 15 minas each plus a single package of 10 minas, its import duty added, its transport tariff paid - in all 42 ⅓ minas of refined silver under my seal, I entrusted to Aluwa and Enišārum, and I sent them to the City to Šalim-Aššur in accordance with his orders. Furthermore, I paid 13 ⅓ minas of good copper for their expenses and 5 shekels of silver for their food.

akk: IGI ili₅-ba-ni DUMU ba-ší-lam IGI a-ḫu-qar DUMU zu-ur-zu-ur IGI tù-ra-am-ì-lí DUMU e-dí-na-a-šùr
eng: Witnessed by Ilī-bāni son of Baši-ilum, by Ahu-qar son of Zurzur, by Tūram-ilī son of Eddin-Aššur.
transliteration: IGI ili₅-ba-ni DUMU ba-ší-lam IGI a-ḫu-qar DUMU zu-ur-zu-ur IGI tù-ra-am-ì-lí DUMU e-dí-na-a-šùr
translation: Witnessed by Ilī-bāni son of Baši-ilum, by Ahu-qar son of Zurzur, by Tūram-ilī son of Eddin-Aššur.

akk: a-ḫa-ma 10.3333 ma-na 3.5 GÍN KÙ.BABBAR ṣa-ru-pá-am <gap> tum ni <gap> 0.5 GÍN ṣí-ba-tim ša i-na ṣé-ri-a il₅-qé-ú-ni a-na ḫu-bu-li-šu a-na kà-ri-im wa-aḫ-šu-ša-na áš-qúl ṣí-ba-at KÙ.GI ša ší-ip-kà-at a-šur-bé-el-a-wa-tim i-ší-tù
eng: Furthermore, 10 ⅓ minas 3 ½ shekels of refined silver <gap> ½ shekel interest that they took on my account, I paid for his debt to the Wahšušana colony. The interest on the gold that remained of Aššur-bēl-awātim's investment.§
transliteration: a-ḫa-ma 10.3333 ma-na 3.5 GÍN KÙ.BABBAR ṣa-ru-pá-am <gap> tum ni <gap> 0.5 GÍN ṣí-ba-tim ša i-na ṣé-ri-a il₅-qé-ú-ni a-na ḫu-bu-li-šu a-na kà-ri-im wa-aḫ-šu-ša-na áš-qúl ṣí-ba-at KÙ.GI ša ší-ip-kà-at a-šur-bé-el-a-wa-tim i-ší-tù
translation: Furthermore, 10 ⅓ minas 3 ½ shekels of refined silver <gap> ½ shekel interest that they took on my account, I paid for his debt to the Wahšušana colony. The interest on the gold that remained of Aššur-bēl-awātim's investment.§

akk: 2 GÚ 10 ma-na AN.NA ku-nu-ki 52 TÚG SIG₅ 3 ANŠE.ḪI.A ṣa-lá-mu ku-nu-ki ša a-šùr-ba-ni ù be-lúm-ba-ni ša tám-kà-ri-im a-na PUZUR₄-a-<gap> ip-qí-du lu-qú-tám a-ni-tám PUZUR₄-a-<gap> a-na a-lá-ḫi-im ip-qí-id
eng: 2 talents 10 minas of sealed tin, 52 good textiles, 3 black donkeys, sealed by Aššur-bāni and Bēlum-bāni and belonging to a merchant, they entrusted to Puzur-A<gap> Puzur-A<gap> entrusted these goods to Ali-ahum.
transliteration: 2 GÚ 10 ma-na AN.NA ku-nu-ki 52 TÚG SIG₅ 3 ANŠE.ḪI.A ṣa-lá-mu ku-nu-ki ša a-šùr-ba-ni ù be-lúm-ba-ni ša tám-kà-ri-im a-na PUZUR₄-a-<gap> ip-qí-du lu-qú-tám a-ni-tám PUZUR₄-a-<gap> a-na a-lá-ḫi-im ip-qí-id
translation: 2 talents 10 minas of sealed tin, 52 good textiles, 3 black donkeys, sealed by Aššur-bāni and Bēlum-bāni and belonging to a merchant, they entrusted to Puzur-A<gap> Puzur-A<gap> entrusted these goods to Ali-ahum.

akk: IGI a-šùr-ba-ni DUMU ku-ta-a IGI SIG₅-pí-a-šùr DUMU ÌR-ad-ì-lí-šu DUMU a-šùr-i-dí
eng: Witnessed by Aššur-bāni son of Kutaya, by Damiq-pī-Aššur son of Warad-ilīšu, (grand)son of Aššur-idī.
transliteration: IGI a-šùr-ba-ni DUMU ku-ta-a IGI SIG₅-pí-a-šùr DUMU ÌR-ad-ì-lí-šu DUMU a-šùr-i-dí
translation: Witnessed by Aššur-bāni son of Kutaya, by Damiq-pī-Aššur son of Warad-ilīšu, (grand)son of Aššur-idī.

akk: a-na 15 u₄-me-e ḫa-mu-uš-tum ša en-na-sú-in DUMU ku-ra-ra ù a-šùr-ma-lik DUMU lá-qé-pí-im šu-ma a-na 5 u₄-me-e a-lu-ú DUMU a-du-du-ú la i-li-kà-ma a-wa-tám i-dí-nam KÙ.BABBAR ša al-qé-ú i-na ṣí-ib-tí-a ú-ṣa-ḫa-ar-ma ù a-na ma-la ṭup-pí-šu KÙ.BABBAR ù ṣí-ba-sú ba-lu-um dí-ni-im ù ma-mì-tim i-ša-qá-lam
eng: Within 15 days (it is) the week of Enna-Suen son of Kurara and Aššur-malik son of Lā-qēp. If Alu son of Adudu has not come within 5 days and answered me in court, I shall deduct the money I took from my interest and then he must pay the silver and its interest in accordance with his tablet, without a verdict or an oath.
transliteration: a-na 15 u₄-me-e ḫa-mu-uš-tum ša en-na-sú-in DUMU ku-ra-ra ù a-šùr-ma-lik DUMU lá-qé-pí-im šu-ma a-na 5 u₄-me-e a-lu-ú DUMU a-du-du-ú la i-li-kà-ma a-wa-tám i-dí-nam KÙ.BABBAR ša al-qé-ú i-na ṣí-ib-tí-a ú-ṣa-ḫa-ar-ma ù a-na ma-la ṭup-pí-šu KÙ.BABBAR ù ṣí-ba-sú ba-lu-um dí-ni-im ù ma-mì-tim i-ša-qá-lam
translation: Within 15 days (it is) the week of Enna-Suen son of Kurara and Aššur-malik son of Lā-qēp. If Alu son of Adudu has not come within 5 days and answered me in court, I shall deduct the money I took from my interest and then he must pay the silver and its interest in accordance with his tablet, without a verdict or an oath.

akk: IGI {d}MAR.TU-ba-ni DUMU ma-na-na IGI na-áb-sú-in DUMU e-šu-ba-ni IGI lá-qé-pí-im DUMU i-ze-za-am-DINGIR
eng: Witnessed by Amurrum-bāni son of Manana, by Nāb-Suen son of Ešu-bāni, by Lā-qēp son of Izzizam-ilum.
transliteration: IGI {d}MAR.TU-ba-ni DUMU ma-na-na IGI na-áb-sú-in DUMU e-šu-ba-ni IGI lá-qé-pí-im DUMU i-ze-za-am-DINGIR
translation: Witnessed by Amurrum-bāni son of Manana, by Nāb-Suen son of Ešu-bāni, by Lā-qēp son of Izzizam-ilum.

akk: um-ma i-tur₄-DINGIR-ma ù e-na-aḫ-DINGIR-ma a-na a-lá-ḫi-im-ma a-li-ik ṭup-pè-e ša a-BA-kà ù a-ḫi-kà pé-té-ma a-šar KÙ.BABBAR 1 GÍN ba-áb-tum ša a-bi-kà i-ba-ší ša-dí-in-ma a-na ḫu-bu-lim ša a-bi-kà šu-qú-ul
eng: Itūr-ilī and Enah-ilī said to Ali-ahum: Go, open for your father's and your brother's tablets, and collect every single shekel's outstanding claim to your father, and pay it to cover your father's debt."
transliteration: um-ma i-tur₄-DINGIR-ma ù e-na-aḫ-DINGIR-ma a-na a-lá-ḫi-im-ma a-li-ik ṭup-pè-e ša a-BA-kà ù a-ḫi-kà pé-té-ma a-šar KÙ.BABBAR 1 GÍN ba-áb-tum ša a-bi-kà i-ba-ší ša-dí-in-ma a-na ḫu-bu-lim ša a-bi-kà šu-qú-ul
translation: Itūr-ilī and Enah-ilī said to Ali-ahum: Go, open for your father's and your brother's tablets, and collect every single shekel's outstanding claim to your father, and pay it to cover your father's debt."

akk: IGI a-dí-da DUMU ÌR-ad-i-li-šu IGI DU₁₀-ṣí-lá-a-šur DUMU a-li-li
eng: Witnessed by Adida son of Warad-ilišu, by Ṭāb-ṣill-Aššur son of Alili."
transliteration: IGI a-dí-da DUMU ÌR-ad-i-li-šu IGI DU₁₀-ṣí-lá-a-šur DUMU a-li-li
translation: Witnessed by Adida son of Warad-ilišu, by Ṭāb-ṣill-Aššur son of Alili."

akk: 20 ma-na URUDU ma-sí-am i-ṣé-er i-dí-a-bi-im ma-ma-ḫi-ir i-šu ITU.KAM li-mu-um bu-zu-ta-a a-na ša-na-at i-ša-qal šu-ma lá iš-qúl 1 ma-na.TA i-na ITU.KAM ṣí-ib-tám a-na 10 ma-na-e ú-ṣa-áb
eng: Iddin-abum owes 20 minas of washed copper to Man-mahir. Month Kuzallu, eponym of Buzutaya. He must pay in one year. If he has not paid in time, he must pay interest at the rate 1 mina per ten minas per month.
transliteration: 20 ma-na URUDU ma-sí-am i-ṣé-er i-dí-a-bi-im ma-ma-ḫi-ir i-šu ITU.KAM li-mu-um bu-zu-ta-a a-na ša-na-at i-ša-qal šu-ma lá iš-qúl 1 ma-na.TA i-na ITU.KAM ṣí-ib-tám a-na 10 ma-na-e ú-ṣa-áb
translation: Iddin-abum owes 20 minas of washed copper to Man-mahir. Month Kuzallu, eponym of Buzutaya. He must pay in one year. If he has not paid in time, he must pay interest at the rate 1 mina per ten minas per month.

akk: IGI ṣí-lu-uš-da-gan IGI a-šùr-ba-ni
eng: Witnessed by Ṣilluš-Dagān, by Aššur-bāni.
transliteration: IGI ṣí-lu-uš-da-gan IGI a-šùr-ba-ni
translation: Witnessed by Ṣilluš-Dagān, by Aššur-bāni.

akk: 2.8333 ma-na 7 GÍN KÙ.BABBAR ku-nu-ki ša en-um-a-šur DUMU e-lá-ma šu-sú-in DUMU ì-lí-a a-na lá-ma-sí-tim ù ir-ma-a-šur ip-qí-id-ma KÙ.BABBAR ir-ma-a-šur a-na a-lim{ki} a-šur ú-ba-al-šu a-na ḫu-bu-ul en-um-a-šur a-na DAM.GÀR i-ša-qal KÙ.BABBAR a šu-mì en-um-a-šur GÁN-lam e-tí-iq
eng: 2 minas 57 shekels of silver under the seals of Ennam-Aššur, son of Elamma, Šu-Suen, son of Iliya, entrusted to Lamassutum and Ir'am-Aššur and Ir'am-Aššur will bring the silver to the city of Assur. He will pay it for the debt of Ennam-Aššur to the creditor. The silver will travel overland in the name of Ennam-Aššur.
transliteration: 2.8333 ma-na 7 GÍN KÙ.BABBAR ku-nu-ki ša en-um-a-šur DUMU e-lá-ma šu-sú-in DUMU ì-lí-a a-na lá-ma-sí-tim ù ir-ma-a-šur ip-qí-id-ma KÙ.BABBAR ir-ma-a-šur a-na a-lim{ki} a-šur ú-ba-al-šu a-na ḫu-bu-ul en-um-a-šur a-na DAM.GÀR i-ša-qal KÙ.BABBAR a šu-mì en-um-a-šur GÁN-lam e-tí-iq
translation: 2 minas 57 shekels of silver under the seals of Ennam-Aššur, son of Elamma, Šu-Suen, son of Iliya, entrusted to Lamassutum and Ir'am-Aššur and Ir'am-Aššur will bring the silver to the city of Assur. He will pay it for the debt of Ennam-Aššur to the creditor. The silver will travel overland in the name of Ennam-Aššur.

akk: IGI pì-lá-aḫ-IŠTAR DUMU e-lá-ma IGI a-šur-ba-ni DUMU du-mu-uq-IŠTAR
eng: Witnessed by Pilah-Ištar, son of Elamma, and by Aššur-bāni, son of Dumuq-Ištar.
transliteration: IGI pì-lá-aḫ-IŠTAR DUMU e-lá-ma IGI a-šur-ba-ni DUMU du-mu-uq-IŠTAR
translation: Witnessed by Pilah-Ištar, son of Elamma, and by Aššur-bāni, son of Dumuq-Ištar.

akk: 1.6666 ma-na 5 GÍN KÙ.BABBAR ša ša-da-na a-ša-at ú-ṣú-ur-ša-a-šur a-na PUZUR₄-a-šur DUMU a-šur-dan a ší-a-ma-tim i-dí-nu KÙ.BABBAR ú-zu-a il₅-qé šu-ma ša-da-na ú-lá ša ki-ma ša-da-na a-na PUZUR₄-a-šur DUMU a-šur-dan i-tù-ar ú-zu-a DUMU li-bi₄-a ú-ba-áb-šu
eng: The 1.6666 mina 5 shekels of silver that Šāt-Anna, the wife of Uṣur-ša-Aššur, gave to Puzur-Aššur son of Aššur-dan for purchases, Uzuwa has received the silver. If Šāt-Anna or Šāt-Anna's representative raise claim against Puzur-Aššur son of Aššur-dan, then Uzuwa son of Libbiya will clear him.
transliteration: 1.6666 ma-na 5 GÍN KÙ.BABBAR ša ša-da-na a-ša-at ú-ṣú-ur-ša-a-šur a-na PUZUR₄-a-šur DUMU a-šur-dan a ší-a-ma-tim i-dí-nu KÙ.BABBAR ú-zu-a il₅-qé šu-ma ša-da-na ú-lá ša ki-ma ša-da-na a-na PUZUR₄-a-šur DUMU a-šur-dan i-tù-ar ú-zu-a DUMU li-bi₄-a ú-ba-áb-šu
translation: The 1.6666 mina 5 shekels of silver that Šāt-Anna, the wife of Uṣur-ša-Aššur, gave to Puzur-Aššur son of Aššur-dan for purchases, Uzuwa has received the silver. If Šāt-Anna or Šāt-Anna's representative raise claim against Puzur-Aššur son of Aššur-dan, then Uzuwa son of Libbiya will clear him.

akk: IGI na-áb-sú-in IGI DU₁₀-ṣí-lá-a-šur IGI {d}NIN.ŠUBUR-ba-ni
eng: Witnessed by Nāb-Suen, by Ṭāb-ṣill-Aššur, by Ilabrat-bāni.
transliteration: IGI na-áb-sú-in IGI DU₁₀-ṣí-lá-a-šur IGI {d}NIN.ŠUBUR-ba-ni
translation: Witnessed by Nāb-Suen, by Ṭāb-ṣill-Aššur, by Ilabrat-bāni.

akk: a-ba-ba ra-bi₄-ṣú-um ša šál-ma-a-šur a-na en-um-a-šur DUMU šál-ma-a-šur ù ṣí-li-a ša ki-ma a-lá-ḫi-im a-ḫi-šu iṣ-ba-at-ni-a-tí-ma um-ma a-ba-ba ra-bi₄-ṣú-ma a-na en-um-a-šur ù ṣí-li-a ša ki-ma a-lá-ḫi-im 22 GÚ URUDU SIG₅ i-na li-bi₄-ku-nu um-ma en-um-a-šur-ma ù ṣí-li-a ša ki-ma a-lá-ḫi-im a-ḫi-šu ke-na i-na li-bi₄-ni i-na kà-ni-iš a-na-ku ù a-ḫi-i ni-za-ku-ma a-li URUDU i-na li-bi₄-ni i-bu-ra-ni KÙ.BABBAR-áp-šu ni-ta-dí-a-ku-um a-na a-wa-tim a-ni-a-tim kà-ru-um dur₄-ḫu-mì-it i-dí-ni-a-tí-ma IGI GÍR ša a-šur ší-bu-tí-ni ni-dí-in
eng: Ababa, the attorney of Šalim-Aššur, seized us against Ennam-Aššur son Šalim-Aššur and Ṣilliya, his brother Ali-ahum's representative, and the attorney Ababa said to Ennam-Aššur and Ṣilliya, Ali-ahum's representative: 22 talents of good copper are in your possession." Ennam-Aššur and Ṣilliya, his brother Ali-ahum's representative, answered: "Yes, it is in our possession. In Kanesh I and my brother will make a settlement and wherever copper is shown as being owed by us, we shall deposit it for you." The Durhumit colony gave us for these proceedings and we gave our testimony before Aššur's dagger.
transliteration: a-ba-ba ra-bi₄-ṣú-um ša šál-ma-a-šur a-na en-um-a-šur DUMU šál-ma-a-šur ù ṣí-li-a ša ki-ma a-lá-ḫi-im a-ḫi-šu iṣ-ba-at-ni-a-tí-ma um-ma a-ba-ba ra-bi₄-ṣú-ma a-na en-um-a-šur ù ṣí-li-a ša ki-ma a-lá-ḫi-im 22 GÚ URUDU SIG₅ i-na li-bi₄-ku-nu um-ma en-um-a-šur-ma ù ṣí-li-a ša ki-ma a-lá-ḫi-im a-ḫi-šu ke-na i-na li-bi₄-ni i-na kà-ni-iš a-na-ku ù a-ḫi-i ni-za-ku-ma a-li URUDU i-na li-bi₄-ni i-bu-ra-ni KÙ.BABBAR-áp-šu ni-ta-dí-a-ku-um a-na a-wa-tim a-ni-a-tim kà-ru-um dur₄-ḫu-mì-it i-dí-ni-a-tí-ma IGI GÍR ša a-šur ší-bu-tí-ni ni-dí-in
translation: Ababa, the attorney of Šalim-Aššur, seized us against Ennam-Aššur son Šalim-Aššur and Ṣilliya, his brother Ali-ahum's representative, and the attorney Ababa said to Ennam-Aššur and Ṣilliya, Ali-ahum's representative: 22 talents of good copper are in your possession." Ennam-Aššur and Ṣilliya, his brother Ali-ahum's representative, answered: "Yes, it is in our possession. In Kanesh I and my brother will make a settlement and wherever copper is shown as being owed by us, we shall deposit it for you." The Durhumit colony gave us for these proceedings and we gave our testimony before Aššur's dagger.

akk: IGI DU₁₀-ṣí-lá-a-šur IGI šu-ki-tim IGI en-nu-um-sú-in
eng: Witnessed by Ṭāb-ṣill-Aššur, by Šukkutum, by Ennam-Suen."
transliteration: IGI DU₁₀-ṣí-lá-a-šur IGI šu-ki-tim IGI en-nu-um-sú-in
translation: Witnessed by Ṭāb-ṣill-Aššur, by Šukkutum, by Ennam-Suen."

akk: 5 GÍN KÙ.BABBAR 1 na-ru-uq ŠE-am a-na mu-la GÉME ša a-šùr-ma-sú-i en-um-a-šùr i-dí-in um-ma en-um-a-šùr-ma KÙ.BABBAR ù ú-ṭá-tám ta-al-qí-i a-dí mu-ut-ki i-lá-kà-ni a-na É-bé-tí-šu ù a ma-tí-šu lá ta-ṭá-ḫi-i šu-ma a-na bé-tí-šu ù am-tí-šu ta-ṭá-ḫi-i 5 GÍN KÙ.BABBAR ù na-ru-uq ŠE-am um-mì-ki ù a-ḫu-ki KÙ.BABBAR ù ŠE-am ú-ta-ru-nim um-ma um-ma-ša ù a-ḫu-ša nu-ta-ra-kum
eng: Ennam-Aššur gave 5 shekels of silver and 1 sack of barley to Mula, Aššur-massuʾī's maid. Ennam-Aššur said: You have received the silver and the grain. Until your husband arrives you are not to touch his house and his slave-girls. If you have touched his house and his slave-girls, your mother and your brother must return the 5 shekels of silver and the sack of barley." Her mother and her brothers said: "We shall return it to you."
transliteration: 5 GÍN KÙ.BABBAR 1 na-ru-uq ŠE-am a-na mu-la GÉME ša a-šùr-ma-sú-i en-um-a-šùr i-dí-in um-ma en-um-a-šùr-ma KÙ.BABBAR ù ú-ṭá-tám ta-al-qí-i a-dí mu-ut-ki i-lá-kà-ni a-na É-bé-tí-šu ù a ma-tí-šu lá ta-ṭá-ḫi-i šu-ma a-na bé-tí-šu ù am-tí-šu ta-ṭá-ḫi-i 5 GÍN KÙ.BABBAR ù na-ru-uq ŠE-am um-mì-ki ù a-ḫu-ki KÙ.BABBAR ù ŠE-am ú-ta-ru-nim um-ma um-ma-ša ù a-ḫu-ša nu-ta-ra-kum
translation: Ennam-Aššur gave 5 shekels of silver and 1 sack of barley to Mula, Aššur-massuʾī's maid. Ennam-Aššur said: You have received the silver and the grain. Until your husband arrives you are not to touch his house and his slave-girls. If you have touched his house and his slave-girls, your mother and your brother must return the 5 shekels of silver and the sack of barley." Her mother and her brothers said: "We shall return it to you."

akk: IGI a-šur-na-da IGI a-šur-i-dí-in IGI ta-ar-ḫu-a-lá IGI ší-li-ú-ma-an
eng: Witnessed by Aššur-nādā, by Aššur-iddin, by Tarhuala, by Šiliuman."
transliteration: IGI a-šur-na-da IGI a-šur-i-dí-in IGI ta-ar-ḫu-a-lá IGI ší-li-ú-ma-an
translation: Witnessed by Aššur-nādā, by Aššur-iddin, by Tarhuala, by Šiliuman."

akk: i-na dur₄-ḫu-mì-it i-nu-mì a-bu-ni me-tù-ni ma-ṣa-ar-tám ku-nu-ki ša a-bi-ni a-lá-ḫu-um ip-té-ma lu KÙ.BABBAR lu URUDU SIG₅ lu URUDU lá-mu-nam lu ḫu-sà-ra-am lu TÚG <gap> lu ṭup-pí ḫa-ru-mu-tim ša DAM.GÀR IGI 3 DUMU um-me-a-ni ù-šé-ṣí-a-ma a-na a-ni-na DUMU a-šur-be-el-a-wa-tim i-dí-ma i-na wa-ar-ki-tim ṭup-pu-ú É a-ni-na
eng: In Durhumit, when our father died, Ali-ahum opened the strong-room sealed by our father, and witnessed by 3 affiliated traders he took out both silver, good copper, poor copper, lapis lazuli, textiles, and certified tablets concerning customers, and he gave it to Annina son of Aššur-bel-awātim, and later the tablets (were) in Annina's house.
transliteration: i-na dur₄-ḫu-mì-it i-nu-mì a-bu-ni me-tù-ni ma-ṣa-ar-tám ku-nu-ki ša a-bi-ni a-lá-ḫu-um ip-té-ma lu KÙ.BABBAR lu URUDU SIG₅ lu URUDU lá-mu-nam lu ḫu-sà-ra-am lu TÚG <gap> lu ṭup-pí ḫa-ru-mu-tim ša DAM.GÀR IGI 3 DUMU um-me-a-ni ù-šé-ṣí-a-ma a-na a-ni-na DUMU a-šur-be-el-a-wa-tim i-dí-ma i-na wa-ar-ki-tim ṭup-pu-ú É a-ni-na
translation: In Durhumit, when our father died, Ali-ahum opened the strong-room sealed by our father, and witnessed by 3 affiliated traders he took out both silver, good copper, poor copper, lapis lazuli, textiles, and certified tablets concerning customers, and he gave it to Annina son of Aššur-bel-awātim, and later the tablets (were) in Annina's house.

akk: IGI sà-ak-li-a DUMU na-áp-ra-kà IGI PUZUR₄-a-šùr DUMU ší-ik-tí-ḫa-šu-ut IGI ili₅-ba-ni DUMU a-mur-IŠTAR
eng: Witnessed by Sakliya son of Napraka, by Puzur-Aššur son of Šikti-hašut, by Ilī-bāni son of Amur-Ištar.
transliteration: IGI sà-ak-li-a DUMU na-áp-ra-kà IGI PUZUR₄-a-šùr DUMU ší-ik-tí-ḫa-šu-ut IGI ili₅-ba-ni DUMU a-mur-IŠTAR
translation: Witnessed by Sakliya son of Napraka, by Puzur-Aššur son of Šikti-hašut, by Ilī-bāni son of Amur-Ištar.

akk: 2 ma-na 16.1666 GÍN KÙ.BABBAR ṣa-ru-pá-am i li-bi e-na-a-šur DUMU a-mu-ra a-šur-ni-šu DUMU ì-lí-ILLAT-tí i-šu
eng: Ennam-Aššur son of Amuraya owes 2 minas 16.1666 shekels of refined silver to Aššur-nīšu son of Ilī-ellitī.
transliteration: 2 ma-na 16.1666 GÍN KÙ.BABBAR ṣa-ru-pá-am i li-bi e-na-a-šur DUMU a-mu-ra a-šur-ni-šu DUMU ì-lí-ILLAT-tí i-šu
translation: Ennam-Aššur son of Amuraya owes 2 minas 16.1666 shekels of refined silver to Aššur-nīšu son of Ilī-ellitī.

akk: IGI ku-li-a DUMU a-lá-bi-im IGI ur-ad-a-šur DUMU DIRI-im IGI a-šur-ma-lik DUMU sá-ma
eng: Witnessed by Kuliya son of Ali-abum, by Urad-Aššur son of Watrum, by Aššur-malik son of Samaya.
transliteration: IGI ku-li-a DUMU a-lá-bi-im IGI ur-ad-a-šur DUMU DIRI-im IGI a-šur-ma-lik DUMU sá-ma
translation: Witnessed by Kuliya son of Ali-abum, by Urad-Aššur son of Watrum, by Aššur-malik son of Samaya.

akk: 28 TÚG ku-ta-ni ù 1 ANŠE.ḪI.A ṣa-lá-mu-um šu-bé-lúm il₅-qé šu-ma lu-qú-tum a-na ša a-we-lá-tim ù šu-bé-lim lá i-tù-ar ší-im-šu-nu KÙ.BABBAR šu-bé-lúm a-na ša-lim-a-šùr i-ša-qá-al ŠÀ.BA 0.6666 ma-na 2 GÍN KÙ.BABBAR lu pá-zu-ur-tám lu ni-ip-lá-tim šu-bé-lúm iš-qú-ul lu-qú-tám ša PUZUR₄-a-šùr DUMU i-šar-ki-da-a-šur ú-šé-li-a-ni-ni
eng: Šu-Bēlum received 28 kutānu-textiles and 1 black donkey. If the goods do not become the property of the woman and Šu-Bēlum, he must pay the proceeds from their sale in silver to Šalim-Assur. Of this, Šu-Bēlum has paid 42 shekels of silver, either smuggler's goods or balance payments. Goods that Puzur-Aššur son of Išār-kitt-Aššur brought up here.
transliteration: 28 TÚG ku-ta-ni ù 1 ANŠE.ḪI.A ṣa-lá-mu-um šu-bé-lúm il₅-qé šu-ma lu-qú-tum a-na ša a-we-lá-tim ù šu-bé-lim lá i-tù-ar ší-im-šu-nu KÙ.BABBAR šu-bé-lúm a-na ša-lim-a-šùr i-ša-qá-al ŠÀ.BA 0.6666 ma-na 2 GÍN KÙ.BABBAR lu pá-zu-ur-tám lu ni-ip-lá-tim šu-bé-lúm iš-qú-ul lu-qú-tám ša PUZUR₄-a-šùr DUMU i-šar-ki-da-a-šur ú-šé-li-a-ni-ni
translation: Šu-Bēlum received 28 kutānu-textiles and 1 black donkey. If the goods do not become the property of the woman and Šu-Bēlum, he must pay the proceeds from their sale in silver to Šalim-Assur. Of this, Šu-Bēlum has paid 42 shekels of silver, either smuggler's goods or balance payments. Goods that Puzur-Aššur son of Išār-kitt-Aššur brought up here.

akk: IGI ku-zi-zi-a IGI en-um-a-šùr DUMU ba-ba-a
eng: Witnessed by Kuziziya, by Ennam-Aššur son of Babaya.
transliteration: IGI ku-zi-zi-a IGI en-um-a-šùr DUMU ba-ba-a
translation: Witnessed by Kuziziya, by Ennam-Aššur son of Babaya.

akk: 0.5 ma-na KÙ.BABBAR i-ṣé-er a-zu a-lá-ḫu-um i-šu 5 na-ru-uq ŠE-am 5 na-ru-uq ar-ša-tim 2 UDU.ḪI.A ù 20 NINDA ṣí-ba-at KÙ.BABBAR-pì-im ù KÙ.BABBAR a-na ḫa-ar-pé-e ú-ba-lá-am
eng: Azu owes 0.5 mina of silver to Ali-ahum. 5 sacks of barley, 5 sacks of wheat, 2 sheep and 20 loaves of bread are the interest on the silver; the silver itself he will bring by harvest.
transliteration: 0.5 ma-na KÙ.BABBAR i-ṣé-er a-zu a-lá-ḫu-um i-šu 5 na-ru-uq ŠE-am 5 na-ru-uq ar-ša-tim 2 UDU.ḪI.A ù 20 NINDA ṣí-ba-at KÙ.BABBAR-pì-im ù KÙ.BABBAR a-na ḫa-ar-pé-e ú-ba-lá-am
translation: Azu owes 0.5 mina of silver to Ali-ahum. 5 sacks of barley, 5 sacks of wheat, 2 sheep and 20 loaves of bread are the interest on the silver; the silver itself he will bring by harvest.

akk: IGI ga-al-ga-li-a IGI ša-ra-ak-šu-na
eng: Witnessed by Galgaliya, by Šarakšuna.
transliteration: IGI ga-al-ga-li-a IGI ša-ra-ak-šu-na
translation: Witnessed by Galgaliya, by Šarakšuna.

akk: 2.6666 ma-na 5 GÍN KÙ.BABBAR ṣa-ru-pá-am i li-bi i-ku-pí-a en-um-a-šur i-šu ú iš-tù ší-im 2 ma-na 2-<gap> GÍN AN.NA-ki-šu KÙ.BABBAR-áp-šu ṣa-ḫu-ru <gap> GÚ AN.NA i-ku-pí-a a-na en-um-a-šur e-zi-ib i-ta-dá-an AN.NA-ki-šu KÙ.BABBAR-áp-šu en-um-a-šur i-lá-qé ú 1 su-pá-nu-um ša KÙ.BABBAR a-na 1 ma-na 7 GÍN a-ḫa-ma ša 9 GÍN iš-<gap>-ḫu-lu-im a-na en-um-a-šur i-ku-pí-a e-zi-ib
eng: Ikūn-pīya owes 2.6666 minas 5 shekels of refined silver to Ennam-Aššur; also, after the price in silver of his 2 minas 2<gap> shekels of tin has been deducted Ikūn-pīya will leave <gap> talents of tin for Ennam-Aššur. When the tin is sold, Ennam-Aššur will receive its value in silver. Also, 1 -container of silver for 1 mina 7 shekels; further, Ikūn-pīya will leave for Ennam-Aššur worth 9 shekels of <gap>
transliteration: 2.6666 ma-na 5 GÍN KÙ.BABBAR ṣa-ru-pá-am i li-bi i-ku-pí-a en-um-a-šur i-šu ú iš-tù ší-im 2 ma-na 2-<gap> GÍN AN.NA-ki-šu KÙ.BABBAR-áp-šu ṣa-ḫu-ru <gap> GÚ AN.NA i-ku-pí-a a-na en-um-a-šur e-zi-ib i-ta-dá-an AN.NA-ki-šu KÙ.BABBAR-áp-šu en-um-a-šur i-lá-qé ú 1 su-pá-nu-um ša KÙ.BABBAR a-na 1 ma-na 7 GÍN a-ḫa-ma ša 9 GÍN iš-<gap>-ḫu-lu-im a-na en-um-a-šur i-ku-pí-a e-zi-ib
translation: Ikūn-pīya owes 2.6666 minas 5 shekels of refined silver to Ennam-Aššur; also, after the price in silver of his 2 minas 2<gap> shekels of tin has been deducted Ikūn-pīya will leave <gap> talents of tin for Ennam-Aššur. When the tin is sold, Ennam-Aššur will receive its value in silver. Also, 1 -container of silver for 1 mina 7 shekels; further, Ikūn-pīya will leave for Ennam-Aššur worth 9 shekels of <gap>

akk: IGI kur-ub-a-šur IGI GÚ-tim DUMU a-lá-ḫi-im IGI ma-ri-iḫ-šu
eng: Witnessed by Kurub-Aššur, by Biltum son of Ali-ahum, by Marihšu.
transliteration: IGI kur-ub-a-šur IGI GÚ-tim DUMU a-lá-ḫi-im IGI ma-ri-iḫ-šu
translation: Witnessed by Kurub-Aššur, by Biltum son of Ali-ahum, by Marihšu.

akk: § a-ḫa-ma a-na 1 ma-na-im KÙ.BABBAR ṣa-ru-pí-im a-šu-mì i-ku-pí-a a-na i-na-a DUMU a-mu-ra-a a-pu-ul i ba-áb ḫa-ra-ni-a <gap>-ir IGI <gap> a-ḫi <gap> li-<gap>
eng: Further, I balanced for 1 mina of refined silver because of Ikūn-pīya with Innaya son of Amuraya. When I shall leave on my journey <gap>
transliteration: § a-ḫa-ma a-na 1 ma-na-im KÙ.BABBAR ṣa-ru-pí-im a-šu-mì i-ku-pí-a a-na i-na-a DUMU a-mu-ra-a a-pu-ul i ba-áb ḫa-ra-ni-a <gap>-ir IGI <gap> a-ḫi <gap> li-<gap>
translation: Further, I balanced for 1 mina of refined silver because of Ikūn-pīya with Innaya son of Amuraya. When I shall leave on my journey <gap>

akk: ša ki-ma i-dí-a-šùr DUMU ku-bi₄-dí ù ku-la É i-dí-a-bi₄-im a-na ḫu-bu-ul i-dí-a-bi₄-im ik-nu-ku-ma am-tám ù ÌR uš-té-ṣí-ú i-na šál-ší-im ú-mì-im a-šur-i-mì-tí DUMU a-mur-DINGIR ša ki-ma šál-ma-a-šur 17 ma-na KÙ.BABBAR a-na ṣí-ib-tim il₅-qé-ma a-na ḫu-bu-ul i-dí-a-bi₄-im a-na ša ki-ma i-dí-a-šùr ù ku-lá a-lá-ḫu-um DUMU i-dí-sú-en li-ba-a DUMU ú-zu-a ù šu-be-lúm DUMU šál-ma-a-šur iš-qúl-ma É-tí am-tám ù ÌR ša i-dí-a-bi₄-im a-na a-šur-i-mì-tí DUMU a-mur-DINGIR ša ki-ma šál-ma-a-šùr ú-šé-ru a-na a-wa-tim a-ni-a-tim kà-ru-um kà-né-eš i-dí-ni-a-tí-ma ṭup-pá-am ša ší-bu-tí-ni IGI GÍR ša a-šùr ni-dí-in
eng: The representatives of Iddin-Aššur son of Kūbi-idī and Kula sealed Iddin-abum's house because of Iddin-abum's debt, and they brought out the maid and slave. On the third day Aššur-imittī son of Amur-ilī, Šalim-Aššur's representative, borrowed 17 minas of silver against interest and paid it to cover Iddin-abum's debt to the representatives of Iddin-Aššur and Kula: Alāhum son of Iddin-Suen, Libbaya son of Uzuwa and Šu-Bēlum son of Šalim-Aššur, and they released Iddin-abum's houses, maid and slave to Aššur-imittī son of Amur-ilī, Šalim-Aššur's representative. The Kanesh colony gave us for these proceedings, and we gave a tablet with our testimony before Aššur's dagger.
transliteration: ša ki-ma i-dí-a-šùr DUMU ku-bi₄-dí ù ku-la É i-dí-a-bi₄-im a-na ḫu-bu-ul i-dí-a-bi₄-im ik-nu-ku-ma am-tám ù ÌR uš-té-ṣí-ú i-na šál-ší-im ú-mì-im a-šur-i-mì-tí DUMU a-mur-DINGIR ša ki-ma šál-ma-a-šur 17 ma-na KÙ.BABBAR a-na ṣí-ib-tim il₅-qé-ma a-na ḫu-bu-ul i-dí-a-bi₄-im a-na ša ki-ma i-dí-a-šùr ù ku-lá a-lá-ḫu-um DUMU i-dí-sú-en li-ba-a DUMU ú-zu-a ù šu-be-lúm DUMU šál-ma-a-šur iš-qúl-ma É-tí am-tám ù ÌR ša i-dí-a-bi₄-im a-na a-šur-i-mì-tí DUMU a-mur-DINGIR ša ki-ma šál-ma-a-šùr ú-šé-ru a-na a-wa-tim a-ni-a-tim kà-ru-um kà-né-eš i-dí-ni-a-tí-ma ṭup-pá-am ša ší-bu-tí-ni IGI GÍR ša a-šùr ni-dí-in
translation: The representatives of Iddin-Aššur son of Kūbi-idī and Kula sealed Iddin-abum's house because of Iddin-abum's debt, and they brought out the maid and slave. On the third day Aššur-imittī son of Amur-ilī, Šalim-Aššur's representative, borrowed 17 minas of silver against interest and paid it to cover Iddin-abum's debt to the representatives of Iddin-Aššur and Kula: Alāhum son of Iddin-Suen, Libbaya son of Uzuwa and Šu-Bēlum son of Šalim-Aššur, and they released Iddin-abum's houses, maid and slave to Aššur-imittī son of Amur-ilī, Šalim-Aššur's representative. The Kanesh colony gave us for these proceedings, and we gave a tablet with our testimony before Aššur's dagger.

akk: IGI ú-ra-a IGI a-ku-za IGI MAR.TU-ba-ni IGI lá-qé-pì-im IGI i-tur₄-DINGIR
eng: Witnessed by Uraya, by Akuza, by Amur-rum-bāni, by Lā-qēpum, by Itūr-ilī.
transliteration: IGI ú-ra-a IGI a-ku-za IGI MAR.TU-ba-ni IGI lá-qé-pì-im IGI i-tur₄-DINGIR
translation: Witnessed by Uraya, by Akuza, by Amur-rum-bāni, by Lā-qēpum, by Itūr-ilī.

akk: 6 GÍN KÙ.BABBAR ù 20 ak-li i-ṣé-er kà-ar-ší-ni ù a-li-li IŠTAR-lá-ma-sí tí-šu iš-tù ḫa-muš-tim ša a-šur-i-mì-tí ITU.KAM ša sà-ra-tim li-mu-um a-šur-i-mì-tí 3 GÍN KÙ.BABBAR ṣí-ba-sú ù NINDA a-na ša-na-at ú-bu-lu-nim
eng: Karšini and Alili owe 6 shekels of silver plus 20 loaves of bread to Ištar-lamassī. Reckoned from the week of Aššur-imittī, month Ša-sarrātim, eponymy Aššur-imittī, they will bring 3 shekels of silver, its interest, plus the bread within one year.
transliteration: 6 GÍN KÙ.BABBAR ù 20 ak-li i-ṣé-er kà-ar-ší-ni ù a-li-li IŠTAR-lá-ma-sí tí-šu iš-tù ḫa-muš-tim ša a-šur-i-mì-tí ITU.KAM ša sà-ra-tim li-mu-um a-šur-i-mì-tí 3 GÍN KÙ.BABBAR ṣí-ba-sú ù NINDA a-na ša-na-at ú-bu-lu-nim
translation: Karšini and Alili owe 6 shekels of silver plus 20 loaves of bread to Ištar-lamassī. Reckoned from the week of Aššur-imittī, month Ša-sarrātim, eponymy Aššur-imittī, they will bring 3 shekels of silver, its interest, plus the bread within one year.

akk: IGI wa-al-dí-DINGIR IGI i-na-aḫ
eng: Witnessed by Waldi-ilum, by Inah.
transliteration: IGI wa-al-dí-DINGIR IGI i-na-aḫ
translation: Witnessed by Waldi-ilum, by Inah.

akk: <gap> ki KÙ.BABBAR a-na ší-a-ma-tim ša-lim-a-šur i-dí-šum
eng: <gap> Šalim-Aššur gave him the silver for purchases.
transliteration: <gap> ki KÙ.BABBAR a-na ší-a-ma-tim ša-lim-a-šur i-dí-šum
translation: <gap> Šalim-Aššur gave him the silver for purchases.

akk: IGI en-na-sú-in DUMU i-ku-a-a IGI sà-li-a DUMU i-dí-a-šur IGI SIG₅-pí-a-šur IGI a-šur-na-da DUMU en-nam-a-šur
eng: Witnessed by Enna-Suen son of Ikuwaya, by Salliya son of Iddin-Aššur, by Damiq-pī-Aššur, by Aššur-nādā son of Ennam-Aššur.
transliteration: IGI en-na-sú-in DUMU i-ku-a-a IGI sà-li-a DUMU i-dí-a-šur IGI SIG₅-pí-a-šur IGI a-šur-na-da DUMU en-nam-a-šur
translation: Witnessed by Enna-Suen son of Ikuwaya, by Salliya son of Iddin-Aššur, by Damiq-pī-Aššur, by Aššur-nādā son of Ennam-Aššur.

akk: 5 ma-na KÙ.BABBAR ṣa-ru-pá-am i-ṣé-er i-dí-a-bi-im a-šur-{d}UTU-ši i-šu iš-tù ḫa-mu-uš-tim ša a-mur-IŠTAR a-na 23 ḫa-am-ša-tim i-ša-qal šu-ma i-na u₄-me-šu ma-al-ú-tim la iš-qú-ul 1.5 GÍN.TA i ITU.KAM a-na ma-na-im ú-ṣa-áb
eng: Iddin-abum owes 5 minas of refined silver to Aššur-šamši. Reckoned from the week of Amur-Ištar he must pay in 23 weeks. If he has not paid before the completion of his term, he must pay interest at the rate 1.5 shekel per month per mina.
transliteration: 5 ma-na KÙ.BABBAR ṣa-ru-pá-am i-ṣé-er i-dí-a-bi-im a-šur-{d}UTU-ši i-šu iš-tù ḫa-mu-uš-tim ša a-mur-IŠTAR a-na 23 ḫa-am-ša-tim i-ša-qal šu-ma i-na u₄-me-šu ma-al-ú-tim la iš-qú-ul 1.5 GÍN.TA i ITU.KAM a-na ma-na-im ú-ṣa-áb
translation: Iddin-abum owes 5 minas of refined silver to Aššur-šamši. Reckoned from the week of Amur-Ištar he must pay in 23 weeks. If he has not paid before the completion of his term, he must pay interest at the rate 1.5 shekel per month per mina.

akk: IGI a-mur-IŠTAR IGI la-qé-ep
eng: Witnessed by Amur-Ištar, by La-qēp.
transliteration: IGI a-mur-IŠTAR IGI la-qé-ep
translation: Witnessed by Amur-Ištar, by La-qēp.

akk: 15.3333 GÍN 15 ŠE KÙ.BABBAR i-ṣé-er kà-ar-ší-ni a-lá-ḫu-um i-šu iš-tù ḫa-mu-uš-tim ša kà-ší-im ITU.KAM be-el-té-kál-lim li-mu-um ša qá-tí a-šur-i-mì-tí <gap> a-na e-tí-šu i-ša-qal <gap>
eng: Karšini owes 15.3333 shekels 15 grains of silver to Ali-ahum. Reckoned from the week of the -official, month Bēlat-ekallim, in the eponymy after that of Aššur-imittī, he will pay at the earliest convenience.
transliteration: 15.3333 GÍN 15 ŠE KÙ.BABBAR i-ṣé-er kà-ar-ší-ni a-lá-ḫu-um i-šu iš-tù ḫa-mu-uš-tim ša kà-ší-im ITU.KAM be-el-té-kál-lim li-mu-um ša qá-tí a-šur-i-mì-tí <gap> a-na e-tí-šu i-ša-qal <gap>
translation: Karšini owes 15.3333 shekels 15 grains of silver to Ali-ahum. Reckoned from the week of the -official, month Bēlat-ekallim, in the eponymy after that of Aššur-imittī, he will pay at the earliest convenience.

akk: IGI wa-al-dí-lim IGI i-na-ar
eng: Witnessed by Waldi-ilum, by Inar.
transliteration: IGI wa-al-dí-lim IGI i-na-ar
translation: Witnessed by Waldi-ilum, by Inar.

akk: 6 GÍN KÙ.BABBAR i-ṣé-er kà-ar-ší-ni ù a-li-li <gap> IŠTAR-lá-ma-sí tí-šu iš-tù ḫa-mu-uš-tim ša a-šur-i-mì-tí ITU.KAM ša sà-ra-tim li-mu-um ša qá-té a-šur-i-mì-tí 3 GÍN KÙ.BABBAR ṣí-ba-sú ù 20 ak-li a-na ša-na-at ú-bu-lu-nim
eng: Karšini and Alili owe 6 shekels of silver to Ištar-lamassī. Reckoned from the week of Aššur-imittī, month Ša-sarrātim, in the eponymy after that of Aššur-imittī, they will bring 3 shekels of silver, its interest, plus 20 loaves of bread within one year.
transliteration: 6 GÍN KÙ.BABBAR i-ṣé-er kà-ar-ší-ni ù a-li-li <gap> IŠTAR-lá-ma-sí tí-šu iš-tù ḫa-mu-uš-tim ša a-šur-i-mì-tí ITU.KAM ša sà-ra-tim li-mu-um ša qá-té a-šur-i-mì-tí 3 GÍN KÙ.BABBAR ṣí-ba-sú ù 20 ak-li a-na ša-na-at ú-bu-lu-nim
translation: Karšini and Alili owe 6 shekels of silver to Ištar-lamassī. Reckoned from the week of Aššur-imittī, month Ša-sarrātim, in the eponymy after that of Aššur-imittī, they will bring 3 shekels of silver, its interest, plus 20 loaves of bread within one year.

akk: IGI wa-al-dí-lim IGI i-na-ar
eng: Witnessed by Waldi-ilum, by Inar.
transliteration: IGI wa-al-dí-lim IGI i-na-ar
translation: Witnessed by Waldi-ilum, by Inar.

akk: 1 ma-na KÙ.BABBAR iš-tù a-lim{ki} i-na e-lá-i-šu a-na IŠTAR-lá-ma-sí ù a-lá-ḫi-im SIG₅-pì-i-a-šùr DUMU IR-ad-ì-lí-šu i-ša-qal
eng: Damiq-pī-Aššur son of Warad-ilīšu will pay 1 mina of silver to Ištar-lamassī and Ali-ahum when he comes up from the City.
transliteration: 1 ma-na KÙ.BABBAR iš-tù a-lim{ki} i-na e-lá-i-šu a-na IŠTAR-lá-ma-sí ù a-lá-ḫi-im SIG₅-pì-i-a-šùr DUMU IR-ad-ì-lí-šu i-ša-qal
translation: Damiq-pī-Aššur son of Warad-ilīšu will pay 1 mina of silver to Ištar-lamassī and Ali-ahum when he comes up from the City.

akk: IGI a-dí-da IGI a-šùr-ba-ni IGI be-lúm-ba-ni
eng: Witnessed by Adida, by Aššur-bāni, by Bēlum-bāni.
transliteration: IGI a-dí-da IGI a-šùr-ba-ni IGI be-lúm-ba-ni
translation: Witnessed by Adida, by Aššur-bāni, by Bēlum-bāni.

akk: 8 ma-na KÙ.BABBAR ṣa-ru-pá-am PUZUR₄ <gap> a-na i-dí-a-bi-im i-dí-in i-na a-lim{ki} šu-mì DAM.GÀR-ri-im 2 ma-na KÙ.GI i-lá-pá-at
eng: Puzur-<gap> gave 8 minas of refined silver to Iddin-abum. He will book 2 minas of gold in the name of a merchant in the City.
transliteration: 8 ma-na KÙ.BABBAR ṣa-ru-pá-am PUZUR₄ <gap> a-na i-dí-a-bi-im i-dí-in i-na a-lim{ki} šu-mì DAM.GÀR-ri-im 2 ma-na KÙ.GI i-lá-pá-at
translation: Puzur-<gap> gave 8 minas of refined silver to Iddin-abum. He will book 2 minas of gold in the name of a merchant in the City.

akk: IGI la-qé-pí-im IGI la-qé-ep DUMU {d}EN.LÍL-ba-ni
eng: Witnessed by Lā-qēpum, by Lā-qēp s. of Illil-bāni.
transliteration: IGI la-qé-pí-im IGI la-qé-ep DUMU {d}EN.LÍL-ba-ni
translation: Witnessed by Lā-qēpum, by Lā-qēp s. of Illil-bāni.

akk: a-šùr-DU₁₀ a-na É PUZUR₄-li-a ú-šé-ri-ib-ni-a-tí-ma 26.3333 ma-na 8 GÍN KÙ.BABBAR ku-nu-ki-šu a-na DINGIR-na-da DUMU a-šur-na-da ip-qí-id um-ma a-šùr-DU₁₀-ma KÙ.BABBAR a-ṣé-er en-na-nim DUMU am-ri-a bi-il₅ a-na a-wa-tim a-ni-a-tim kà-ru-um wa-aḫ-šu-ša-na ṣa-ḫe-er GAL i-dí-ni-a-tí-ma IGI GÍR ša a-šur ší-bu-tí-ni ni-dí-in
eng: Aššur-ṭāb led us into Puzur-iliya's house and entrusted 26.3333 minas 8 shekels of silver under his seal to Ilī-nādā son of Aššur-nādā. Aššur-tāb said: Bring the silver to Ennānum son of Amriya." The Wahšušana colony in plenary session gave us as witnesses to these proceedings, and we gave our testimony before Aššur's dagger.
transliteration: a-šùr-DU₁₀ a-na É PUZUR₄-li-a ú-šé-ri-ib-ni-a-tí-ma 26.3333 ma-na 8 GÍN KÙ.BABBAR ku-nu-ki-šu a-na DINGIR-na-da DUMU a-šur-na-da ip-qí-id um-ma a-šùr-DU₁₀-ma KÙ.BABBAR a-ṣé-er en-na-nim DUMU am-ri-a bi-il₅ a-na a-wa-tim a-ni-a-tim kà-ru-um wa-aḫ-šu-ša-na ṣa-ḫe-er GAL i-dí-ni-a-tí-ma IGI GÍR ša a-šur ší-bu-tí-ni ni-dí-in
translation: Aššur-ṭāb led us into Puzur-iliya's house and entrusted 26.3333 minas 8 shekels of silver under his seal to Ilī-nādā son of Aššur-nādā. Aššur-tāb said: Bring the silver to Ennānum son of Amriya." The Wahšušana colony in plenary session gave us as witnesses to these proceedings, and we gave our testimony before Aššur's dagger.

akk: IGI PUZUR₄-a-šur DUMU šu-lá-ba-an IGI ku-da-tim DUMU a-mur-IŠTAR
eng: Witnessed by Puzur-Aššur son of Šu-Laban, by Kudātum son of Amur-Ištar;
transliteration: IGI PUZUR₄-a-šur DUMU šu-lá-ba-an IGI ku-da-tim DUMU a-mur-IŠTAR
translation: Witnessed by Puzur-Aššur son of Šu-Laban, by Kudātum son of Amur-Ištar;

akk: § ib-ni-{d}IM DUMU bu-zu-li-a tap-pá-i-ni
eng: Ibni-Adad son of Buzuliya was our absent partner."
transliteration: § ib-ni-{d}IM DUMU bu-zu-li-a tap-pá-i-ni
translation: Ibni-Adad son of Buzuliya was our absent partner."

akk: 20 ma-na KÙ.BABBAR ṣa-ru-pu-um i-ṣé-er i-dí-a-bi₄-im šu-{d}EN.LÍL i-šu iš-tù ḫa-mu-uš-tim ša kà-ší-im <gap> a-na 13 ḫa-am-ša-tim i-ša-qal šu-ma i-na ma-la u₄-me-šu lá eš-qú-ul 1.5 GÍN.TA i-na ITU.KAM a-na 1 ma-na-im ú-ṣa-áb
eng: Iddin-abum owes 20 minas of refined silver to Šu-Illil. Reckoned from the week of the kaššum he must pay within 13 weeks. If he has not paid at the completion of his term, he must pay interest at the rate 1.5 shekel per month per mina.
transliteration: 20 ma-na KÙ.BABBAR ṣa-ru-pu-um i-ṣé-er i-dí-a-bi₄-im šu-{d}EN.LÍL i-šu iš-tù ḫa-mu-uš-tim ša kà-ší-im <gap> a-na 13 ḫa-am-ša-tim i-ša-qal šu-ma i-na ma-la u₄-me-šu lá eš-qú-ul 1.5 GÍN.TA i-na ITU.KAM a-na 1 ma-na-im ú-ṣa-áb
translation: Iddin-abum owes 20 minas of refined silver to Šu-Illil. Reckoned from the week of the kaššum he must pay within 13 weeks. If he has not paid at the completion of his term, he must pay interest at the rate 1.5 shekel per month per mina.

akk: IGI PUZUR₄-a-šùr IGI a-šùr-i-mì-tí IGI šu-a-nim IGI a-šùr-be-el-a-wa-tim
eng: Witnessed by Puzur-Aššur, by Aššur-imitti, by Šu-Anum, by Aššur-bēl-awātim.
transliteration: IGI PUZUR₄-a-šùr IGI a-šùr-i-mì-tí IGI šu-a-nim IGI a-šùr-be-el-a-wa-tim
translation: Witnessed by Puzur-Aššur, by Aššur-imitti, by Šu-Anum, by Aššur-bēl-awātim.

akk: 41 ma-na 11.5 GÍN KÙ.BABBAR ṣa-ru-pá-am ku-nu-ku ša ki-ma šu-a-tí ú ku-nu-ki-a 3 né-pí-šu a-ḫa-ma 0.6666 ma-na 1 GÍN KÙ.BABBAR ša-du-a-sú mì-ma a-nim a-na šu-nu-nu ù ì-lí-áš-ra-ni áp-qí-id-ma a-na ṣé-er ša-lim-a-šur a-na a-lim{ki} ub-lu a-ḫa-ma 5 GÍN KÙ.BABBAR a-na ú-ku-ul-tí-šu-nu a-dí-šu-nu-tí
eng: 41 minas 11.5 shekels of refined silver, sealed by your representatives and by me - 3 packages; further, 0.6666 mina 1 shekel of silver, its transport tariff - all this I entrusted to Šu-Nūnu and Ilī-ašrannī, and they brought it to Šalim-Aššur in the City. Furthermore, 5 shekels of silver I gave them for their food.
transliteration: 41 ma-na 11.5 GÍN KÙ.BABBAR ṣa-ru-pá-am ku-nu-ku ša ki-ma šu-a-tí ú ku-nu-ki-a 3 né-pí-šu a-ḫa-ma 0.6666 ma-na 1 GÍN KÙ.BABBAR ša-du-a-sú mì-ma a-nim a-na šu-nu-nu ù ì-lí-áš-ra-ni áp-qí-id-ma a-na ṣé-er ša-lim-a-šur a-na a-lim{ki} ub-lu a-ḫa-ma 5 GÍN KÙ.BABBAR a-na ú-ku-ul-tí-šu-nu a-dí-šu-nu-tí
translation: 41 minas 11.5 shekels of refined silver, sealed by your representatives and by me - 3 packages; further, 0.6666 mina 1 shekel of silver, its transport tariff - all this I entrusted to Šu-Nūnu and Ilī-ašrannī, and they brought it to Šalim-Aššur in the City. Furthermore, 5 shekels of silver I gave them for their food.

akk: IGI a-ḫu-wa-qar DUMU šu-IŠTAR IGI ba-zi-a DUMU DINGIR-ku-ru-ub IGI DUMU qar-da-a
eng: Witnessed by Ahu-waqar son of Šu-Ištar, by Baziya son of Ilī-kurub, by the son of Qardaya.
transliteration: IGI a-ḫu-wa-qar DUMU šu-IŠTAR IGI ba-zi-a DUMU DINGIR-ku-ru-ub IGI DUMU qar-da-a
translation: Witnessed by Ahu-waqar son of Šu-Ištar, by Baziya son of Ilī-kurub, by the son of Qardaya.

akk: a-ḫa-ma 10 GÍN KÙ.BABBAR a bé-a-lim a-na šu-nu-nu 7 GÍN KÙ.BABBAR a-na ì-lí-áš-ra-ni ma-aḫ-ri-šu-nu a-dí-in
eng: Furthermore, I gave 10 shekels of silver to Šu-Nūnu as a working capital and 7 shekels of silver to Ilī-ašrannī witnessed by them.
transliteration: a-ḫa-ma 10 GÍN KÙ.BABBAR a bé-a-lim a-na šu-nu-nu 7 GÍN KÙ.BABBAR a-na ì-lí-áš-ra-ni ma-aḫ-ri-šu-nu a-dí-in
translation: Furthermore, I gave 10 shekels of silver to Šu-Nūnu as a working capital and 7 shekels of silver to Ilī-ašrannī witnessed by them.

akk: IGI ku-ra-a DUMU ú-lá-a IGI en-um-a-šur DUMU ḫu-ra-ṣí
eng: Witnessed by Kuraya son of Ulaya, by Ennam-Aššur son of hurāṣī."
transliteration: IGI ku-ra-a DUMU ú-lá-a IGI en-um-a-šur DUMU ḫu-ra-ṣí
translation: Witnessed by Kuraya son of Ulaya, by Ennam-Aššur son of hurāṣī."

akk: 8 ma-na KÙ.BABBAR ṣa-ru-pá-am i-ku-pí-a DUMU šu-a-nim i-na ší-im SÍG.ḪI.A ša ú-ší-na-lam il₅-qé
eng: Ikūn-piya son of Šu-Anum has received 8 minas of refined silver from the proceeds of Ušinalam's wool.
transliteration: 8 ma-na KÙ.BABBAR ṣa-ru-pá-am i-ku-pí-a DUMU šu-a-nim i-na ší-im SÍG.ḪI.A ša ú-ší-na-lam il₅-qé
translation: Ikūn-piya son of Šu-Anum has received 8 minas of refined silver from the proceeds of Ušinalam's wool.

akk: IGI i-dí-ku-bi₄-im IGI ú-zu-bi₄-iš-ki-im a-ḫi-šu IGI en-na-sú-in
eng: Witnessed by Iddin-Kūbum, by Uzub-iškum his brother, by Enna-Suen.
transliteration: IGI i-dí-ku-bi₄-im IGI ú-zu-bi₄-iš-ki-im a-ḫi-šu IGI en-na-sú-in
translation: Witnessed by Iddin-Kūbum, by Uzub-iškum his brother, by Enna-Suen.

akk: i-sú-ri-ik a-na a-lim{ki} i-lá-ak-ma É-tí-šu ša bu-ri-im a-šar a-ni ša-lim-a-šùr wa-áš-bu-ni a-na tù-ud-ḫi-li-a a-ḫu tù-li a-na ší-mì-im i-dí-šu-nu a-na a-wa-tim a-ni-a-tim kà-ru-um kà-ni-iš i-dí-ni-a-tí-ma ṭup-pá-am ší-bu-tí-ni IGI GÍR ša a-šùr ni-dí-in
eng: As Issu-arik will go to the City, he sold his houses by the well, where at present Šalim-Aššur is living, to Tudhiliya the brother of Tuli. The Kanesh colony gave us for these proceedings, and we gave a tablet with our testimony before the dagger of Aššur.
transliteration: i-sú-ri-ik a-na a-lim{ki} i-lá-ak-ma É-tí-šu ša bu-ri-im a-šar a-ni ša-lim-a-šùr wa-áš-bu-ni a-na tù-ud-ḫi-li-a a-ḫu tù-li a-na ší-mì-im i-dí-šu-nu a-na a-wa-tim a-ni-a-tim kà-ru-um kà-ni-iš i-dí-ni-a-tí-ma ṭup-pá-am ší-bu-tí-ni IGI GÍR ša a-šùr ni-dí-in
translation: As Issu-arik will go to the City, he sold his houses by the well, where at present Šalim-Aššur is living, to Tudhiliya the brother of Tuli. The Kanesh colony gave us for these proceedings, and we gave a tablet with our testimony before the dagger of Aššur.

akk: IGI sú-kà-lí-a DUMU a-mur-a-šùr IGI a-ku-za DUMU šu-a-nim IGI ú-ra-a DUMU ma-na-na
eng: Witnessed by Sukkalliya son of Amur-Aššur, by Akuza son of Šu-Anum, by Uraya son of Manana.
transliteration: IGI sú-kà-lí-a DUMU a-mur-a-šùr IGI a-ku-za DUMU šu-a-nim IGI ú-ra-a DUMU ma-na-na
translation: Witnessed by Sukkalliya son of Amur-Aššur, by Akuza son of Šu-Anum, by Uraya son of Manana.

akk: IGI ú-ra-a IGI ì-lí-dan IGI ma-nu-um-ba-lúm-a-šur
eng: Witnessed by Uraya, by Ilī-dan, by Mannum-balum-Aššur."
transliteration: IGI ú-ra-a IGI ì-lí-dan IGI ma-nu-um-ba-lúm-a-šur
translation: Witnessed by Uraya, by Ilī-dan, by Mannum-balum-Aššur."

akk: 56 ma-na KÙ.BABBAR i-na KÙ.BABBAR-áp a-šur-i-dí ú-ṣú-ur-ša-a-šur ù a-šur-DU₁₀ a-na ša-lim-a-šur iš-qú-lu-ma 4 ma-na KÙ.BABBAR i-ší-tám-ma ṭup-pá-am ša ú-ṣú-ur-ša-a-šur ù a-šur-DU₁₀ ša-lim-a-šur il₅-pu-ut-ma ṭup-pá-am ša 1 GÚ KÙ.BABBAR ša ḫu-bu-ul a-šur-i-dí DUMU sá-ta-a a-na ú-ṣú-ur-ša-a-šur ù a-šur-DU₁₀ ša-lim-a-šur ú-ší-ir
eng: Uṣur-ša-Aššur and Aššur-ṭāb have paid 56 minas of silver from Aššur-idī's silver to Šalim-Aššur, but 4 minas of silver remain (unpaid), and Šalim-Aššur wrote a debt note for Uṣur-ša-Aššur and Aššur-ṭāb and released the (old) tablet concerning 1 talent of silver, the debt of Aššur-idī son of Sadaya to Uṣur-ša-Aššur and Aššur-ṭāb.
transliteration: 56 ma-na KÙ.BABBAR i-na KÙ.BABBAR-áp a-šur-i-dí ú-ṣú-ur-ša-a-šur ù a-šur-DU₁₀ a-na ša-lim-a-šur iš-qú-lu-ma 4 ma-na KÙ.BABBAR i-ší-tám-ma ṭup-pá-am ša ú-ṣú-ur-ša-a-šur ù a-šur-DU₁₀ ša-lim-a-šur il₅-pu-ut-ma ṭup-pá-am ša 1 GÚ KÙ.BABBAR ša ḫu-bu-ul a-šur-i-dí DUMU sá-ta-a a-na ú-ṣú-ur-ša-a-šur ù a-šur-DU₁₀ ša-lim-a-šur ú-ší-ir
translation: Uṣur-ša-Aššur and Aššur-ṭāb have paid 56 minas of silver from Aššur-idī's silver to Šalim-Aššur, but 4 minas of silver remain (unpaid), and Šalim-Aššur wrote a debt note for Uṣur-ša-Aššur and Aššur-ṭāb and released the (old) tablet concerning 1 talent of silver, the debt of Aššur-idī son of Sadaya to Uṣur-ša-Aššur and Aššur-ṭāb.

akk: IGI a-šur-i-mì-tí DUMU a-ta-a IGI a-da-da DUMU {d}IM.GAL
eng: Witnessed by Aššur-imittī son of Ataya, by Adada son of Adad-rabi;
transliteration: IGI a-šur-i-mì-tí DUMU a-ta-a IGI a-da-da DUMU {d}IM.GAL
translation: Witnessed by Aššur-imittī son of Ataya, by Adada son of Adad-rabi;

akk: § PUZUR₄-tí-a-am-tim tap-pá-i-ni a-na a-wa-tim a-ni-a-tim kà-ru-um kà-ni-ìš ṣa-ḫe-er GAL i-dí-ni-a-tí-ma IGI GÍR ša a-šur ṭup-pá-am ni-dí-in a-da-da GÍR ša a-šur iṣ-ba-at-ma i-sá-a DUMU da-ga-ma-al-ki-im pì-šu iš-me
eng: Puzur-Ti'amtum was our (absent) partner. The plenary assembly of the Kanesh colony gave for these proceedings and we gave the tablet before Aššur's dagger. Adada seized Aššur's dagger and Isaya son of Dagan-malkum heard his statement.
transliteration: § PUZUR₄-tí-a-am-tim tap-pá-i-ni a-na a-wa-tim a-ni-a-tim kà-ru-um kà-ni-ìš ṣa-ḫe-er GAL i-dí-ni-a-tí-ma IGI GÍR ša a-šur ṭup-pá-am ni-dí-in a-da-da GÍR ša a-šur iṣ-ba-at-ma i-sá-a DUMU da-ga-ma-al-ki-im pì-šu iš-me
translation: Puzur-Ti'amtum was our (absent) partner. The plenary assembly of the Kanesh colony gave for these proceedings and we gave the tablet before Aššur's dagger. Adada seized Aššur's dagger and Isaya son of Dagan-malkum heard his statement.

akk: 1 ma-na KÙ.BABBAR ṣa-ru-pá-am en-um-a-šur DUMU šál-ma-a-šur a-na be-a-lim a-na i-tur₄-DINGIR ù e-lá-lí DUMU me-er-e PUZUR₄-a-na i-dí-in KÙ.BABBAR šál-ma-am i-na e-ra-bi-šu-nu-ma i-na a-lim{ki} i-ša-qú-lu-ú KÙ.BABBAR i qá-qá-ad šál-mì-šu-nu i-na a-lim{ki} ù GÁN-lim ra-ki-is ITU.1.KAM ša sá-ra-tim li-mu-um ša qá-tí a-šur-na-da DUMU ili₅-bi-na-ni
eng: Ennam-Aššur son of Šalim-Aššur has given 1 mina of refined silver as a working-capital to Itūr-ilī and Elāli, sons of Puzur-Anna. They will pay the correct amount of silver when they arrive from the City. They are jointly responsible for the silver, both in the City and abroad. Month Ša-sarrātim, eponymy after Aššur-nādā son of Ilī-binannī.
transliteration: 1 ma-na KÙ.BABBAR ṣa-ru-pá-am en-um-a-šur DUMU šál-ma-a-šur a-na be-a-lim a-na i-tur₄-DINGIR ù e-lá-lí DUMU me-er-e PUZUR₄-a-na i-dí-in KÙ.BABBAR šál-ma-am i-na e-ra-bi-šu-nu-ma i-na a-lim{ki} i-ša-qú-lu-ú KÙ.BABBAR i qá-qá-ad šál-mì-šu-nu i-na a-lim{ki} ù GÁN-lim ra-ki-is ITU.1.KAM ša sá-ra-tim li-mu-um ša qá-tí a-šur-na-da DUMU ili₅-bi-na-ni
translation: Ennam-Aššur son of Šalim-Aššur has given 1 mina of refined silver as a working-capital to Itūr-ilī and Elāli, sons of Puzur-Anna. They will pay the correct amount of silver when they arrive from the City. They are jointly responsible for the silver, both in the City and abroad. Month Ša-sarrātim, eponymy after Aššur-nādā son of Ilī-binannī.

akk: IGI šu-bé-lim DUMU šu-IŠTAR IGI zu-ku-a DUMU a-šur-i-dí
eng: Witnessed by Šu-Bēlum son of Šu-Ištar, by Zukuwa son of Aššur-idī.
transliteration: IGI šu-bé-lim DUMU šu-IŠTAR IGI zu-ku-a DUMU a-šur-i-dí
translation: Witnessed by Šu-Bēlum son of Šu-Ištar, by Zukuwa son of Aššur-idī.

akk: IGI a-bu-um-DINGIR IGI ša-lim-a-šùr
eng: Witnessed by Abum-ilī, witnessed by Šalim-Aššur.
transliteration: IGI a-bu-um-DINGIR IGI ša-lim-a-šùr
translation: Witnessed by Abum-ilī, witnessed by Šalim-Aššur.

akk: 11.5 ma-na URUDU ší-ku-um i-ṣé-er sú-kà-li-im lu-zi i-šu iš-tù ITU.1.KAM áb-ša-ra-ni li-mu-um ku-bi-a-a ki-ma a-wa-at kà-ri-im ṣí-ib-tam ú-ṣa-áb
eng: Sukkallum owes 11.5 minas of -copper to Luzi. Reckoned from the month Ab-šarrāni, eponymy Kūbiya, he must add interest in accordance with the rule of the colony.
transliteration: 11.5 ma-na URUDU ší-ku-um i-ṣé-er sú-kà-li-im lu-zi i-šu iš-tù ITU.1.KAM áb-ša-ra-ni li-mu-um ku-bi-a-a ki-ma a-wa-at kà-ri-im ṣí-ib-tam ú-ṣa-áb
translation: Sukkallum owes 11.5 minas of -copper to Luzi. Reckoned from the month Ab-šarrāni, eponymy Kūbiya, he must add interest in accordance with the rule of the colony.

akk: IGI ú-zu-a IGI i-dí-a-bi₄-im
eng: Witnessed by Uzuwa, by Iddin-abum.
transliteration: IGI ú-zu-a IGI i-dí-a-bi₄-im
translation: Witnessed by Uzuwa, by Iddin-abum.

akk: a-na ší-im 17 ma-na AN.NA 8.5 GÍN.TA 2 ma-na KÙ.BABBAR-áp-šu ša a-dí-da i-dí-na-ni-ma a-na-ku a-na tí-me-el-ki-a a-ṣé-er a-lá-ḫi-im ú-šé-bi-lu-šu a-na-kam ni-kà-sí a-na-ku ù a-lá-ḫu-um ni-sí-ma iš-tù ší-im 3 TÚG ku-ta-ni ša bé-ú-lá-at a-šur-kà-ší-id i-dí-na-ni-ma 8 GÍN.TA áš-ku-nu-šu-ni lu ší-im 5 ma-na AN.NA-ki-šu ša iš-tí dan-a-šur <gap> mu-ṭá ù ša <gap> iṣ-ḫi-ir-ma 9 GÍN <gap> lu KÙ.BABBAR 4 GÍN ša a-šu-mì <gap> šu-um-šu ú-ṣa-ḫi-ru 1 ma-na 7.5 GÍN KÙ.BABBAR ṣa-ru-pá-am i li-bi a-la-ḫi-im en-nam-a-šùr i-dí-i
eng: I and Ali-ahum settled accounts here concerning the price of 17 minas of tin at the rate 1:8.5 (its value in silver is 2 minas) that Adida gave to me and which I personally sent to Timelkiya to Ali-ahum: after he gave me the proceeds from 3 kutānu-textiles as Aššur-kāšid's working capital and I set down 8 shekels per piece for him, then both the proceeds from his 5 minas of tin that <gap> with Dan-Aššur <gap> the deficit <gap> was deducted and <gap> 9 shekels <gap> and some 4 shekels of silver that he deducted <gap> Ennam-Aššur set down 1 mina 7.5 shekels of refined silver as owed by Ali-ahum.
transliteration: a-na ší-im 17 ma-na AN.NA 8.5 GÍN.TA 2 ma-na KÙ.BABBAR-áp-šu ša a-dí-da i-dí-na-ni-ma a-na-ku a-na tí-me-el-ki-a a-ṣé-er a-lá-ḫi-im ú-šé-bi-lu-šu a-na-kam ni-kà-sí a-na-ku ù a-lá-ḫu-um ni-sí-ma iš-tù ší-im 3 TÚG ku-ta-ni ša bé-ú-lá-at a-šur-kà-ší-id i-dí-na-ni-ma 8 GÍN.TA áš-ku-nu-šu-ni lu ší-im 5 ma-na AN.NA-ki-šu ša iš-tí dan-a-šur <gap> mu-ṭá ù ša <gap> iṣ-ḫi-ir-ma 9 GÍN <gap> lu KÙ.BABBAR 4 GÍN ša a-šu-mì <gap> šu-um-šu ú-ṣa-ḫi-ru 1 ma-na 7.5 GÍN KÙ.BABBAR ṣa-ru-pá-am i li-bi a-la-ḫi-im en-nam-a-šùr i-dí-i
translation: I and Ali-ahum settled accounts here concerning the price of 17 minas of tin at the rate 1:8.5 (its value in silver is 2 minas) that Adida gave to me and which I personally sent to Timelkiya to Ali-ahum: after he gave me the proceeds from 3 kutānu-textiles as Aššur-kāšid's working capital and I set down 8 shekels per piece for him, then both the proceeds from his 5 minas of tin that <gap> with Dan-Aššur <gap> the deficit <gap> was deducted and <gap> 9 shekels <gap> and some 4 shekels of silver that he deducted <gap> Ennam-Aššur set down 1 mina 7.5 shekels of refined silver as owed by Ali-ahum.

akk: IGI i-ri-ší-im DUMU a-mur-{d}UTU IGI šu-a-šur <gap> a-šur IGI šu-IŠTAR DUMU šu-ki-tim
eng: Witnessed by Erišum son of Amur-Šamaš, by Šu-Aššur son of <gap>-Aššur, by Šu-Ištar son of Šukkutum.
transliteration: IGI i-ri-ší-im DUMU a-mur-{d}UTU IGI šu-a-šur <gap> a-šur IGI šu-IŠTAR DUMU šu-ki-tim
translation: Witnessed by Erišum son of Amur-Šamaš, by Šu-Aššur son of <gap>-Aššur, by Šu-Ištar son of Šukkutum.

akk: 1 ku-ta-nu-um SIG₅ 1 ku-ta-num tár-dí-ú-um 1 ra-qú-tum 1 ša a-ki-dí-e ku-nu-ki ša šál-ma-a-šùr šé-ep-IŠTAR ù ša-lim-wa-ar-dí a-na a-lá-bi₄-im ù i-dí-a-šùr ip-qí-du
eng: Šep-Ištar and Šalim-wardi have entrusted 1 kutanum of good quality, 1 kutanum of secondary quality, 1 thin textile, 1 Akkadian textile — under Šalim-Aššur's seal — to Ali-abum and Iddin-Assur.
transliteration: 1 ku-ta-nu-um SIG₅ 1 ku-ta-num tár-dí-ú-um 1 ra-qú-tum 1 ša a-ki-dí-e ku-nu-ki ša šál-ma-a-šùr šé-ep-IŠTAR ù ša-lim-wa-ar-dí a-na a-lá-bi₄-im ù i-dí-a-šùr ip-qí-du
translation: Šep-Ištar and Šalim-wardi have entrusted 1 kutanum of good quality, 1 kutanum of secondary quality, 1 thin textile, 1 Akkadian textile — under Šalim-Aššur's seal — to Ali-abum and Iddin-Assur.

akk: IGI bu-zu-a IGI DU₁₀-ṣí-lá-a-šùr
eng: Witnessed by Buzuwa, by Tab-sill-Aššur.
transliteration: IGI bu-zu-a IGI DU₁₀-ṣí-lá-a-šùr
translation: Witnessed by Buzuwa, by Tab-sill-Aššur.

akk: ṣú-ḫa-ru-ú a-sà-nim ša É ás-qú-dim ú pì-lá-aḫ-IŠTAR DUMU e-lá-ma ḫa-ra-nam iš-té-ni-iš i-li-ku-nim-ma i-na ḫu-ra-ma a-na É ku-bi-a iš-té-ni-iš e-ru-bu-ma ni-is-ḫa-tí-šu-nu É.GAL-lúm iš-té-ni-iš i-sú-ùḫ i-na wa-ar-ki-tim lu-qú-tum i-ṣí-bi-it-ma lu-qú-tám ša a-sà-nim É.GAL-lúm i-ta-ba-al AN.NA ša pí-lá-aḫ-IŠTAR É ku-bi-a ú-pá-zi-ru-ma i-na É ub-ri iš-lim-ma be-lá-num i-li-kam-ma ki-ma pí-lá-aḫ-IŠTAR im-ṣí-ma AN.NA il₅-qé ku-bi₄-ma a-na bé-lá-nim DUMU šu-a-šur AN.NA ip-qí-id um-ma bé-lá-num-ma ma-ṣa-ku a ma-lá ṭup-pí-im ša a-lim{ki} kà-ru-um ḫu-ra-ma ṣa-ḫe-er GAL i-dí-ni-a-tí-ma IGI GÍR ša a-šur ší-bu-tí-ni ni-dí-in
eng: The servants of Asānum, who belongs to the house of Asqūdum, and Pilah-Ištar, son of Elamma, together went on a business trip and in hurama they together entered Kubiya's house and the palace levied the import-tax from them together. Afterwards merchandise was seized and the palace took away Asānum's merchandise. The tin that Pilah-Ištar had hidden in Kubiya's house, was saved in the lodging and when Belānum came he claimed the right to take the tin in Pilah-Ištar's name and Kubiya entrusted the tin to Bēlānum, the son of Šu-Aššur. Bēlānum declared: I take the responsibility!" In accordance with the tablet of the City the plenary hurama colony made us available and we gave our testimony before Aššur's dagger.
transliteration: ṣú-ḫa-ru-ú a-sà-nim ša É ás-qú-dim ú pì-lá-aḫ-IŠTAR DUMU e-lá-ma ḫa-ra-nam iš-té-ni-iš i-li-ku-nim-ma i-na ḫu-ra-ma a-na É ku-bi-a iš-té-ni-iš e-ru-bu-ma ni-is-ḫa-tí-šu-nu É.GAL-lúm iš-té-ni-iš i-sú-ùḫ i-na wa-ar-ki-tim lu-qú-tum i-ṣí-bi-it-ma lu-qú-tám ša a-sà-nim É.GAL-lúm i-ta-ba-al AN.NA ša pí-lá-aḫ-IŠTAR É ku-bi-a ú-pá-zi-ru-ma i-na É ub-ri iš-lim-ma be-lá-num i-li-kam-ma ki-ma pí-lá-aḫ-IŠTAR im-ṣí-ma AN.NA il₅-qé ku-bi₄-ma a-na bé-lá-nim DUMU šu-a-šur AN.NA ip-qí-id um-ma bé-lá-num-ma ma-ṣa-ku a ma-lá ṭup-pí-im ša a-lim{ki} kà-ru-um ḫu-ra-ma ṣa-ḫe-er GAL i-dí-ni-a-tí-ma IGI GÍR ša a-šur ší-bu-tí-ni ni-dí-in
translation: The servants of Asānum, who belongs to the house of Asqūdum, and Pilah-Ištar, son of Elamma, together went on a business trip and in hurama they together entered Kubiya's house and the palace levied the import-tax from them together. Afterwards merchandise was seized and the palace took away Asānum's merchandise. The tin that Pilah-Ištar had hidden in Kubiya's house, was saved in the lodging and when Belānum came he claimed the right to take the tin in Pilah-Ištar's name and Kubiya entrusted the tin to Bēlānum, the son of Šu-Aššur. Bēlānum declared: I take the responsibility!" In accordance with the tablet of the City the plenary hurama colony made us available and we gave our testimony before Aššur's dagger.

akk: IGI a-šur-ša-du-ì-lí IGI ir-ma-a-šur DUMU a-šur-ma-lik IGI a-bu-ša-lim DUMU šu-IŠTAR
eng: Witnessed by Aššur-šadu-ilī, by Ir'am-Aššur, son of Aššūr-mālik, and by Abu-šalim, son of Šu-Ištar."
transliteration: IGI a-šur-ša-du-ì-lí IGI ir-ma-a-šur DUMU a-šur-ma-lik IGI a-bu-ša-lim DUMU šu-IŠTAR
translation: Witnessed by Aššur-šadu-ilī, by Ir'am-Aššur, son of Aššūr-mālik, and by Abu-šalim, son of Šu-Ištar."

akk: <gap> ú-ṣa-áb ITU.KAM qá-ra-a-tim li-mu-um bu-zu-zu 20 ma-na KÙ.BABBAR i da-na-ma qá-tí a-ša-kà-an
eng: <gap> month Qarra'ātum, eponymy Buzuzu. He will give me 20 minas of silver and I shall lay claim to that.
transliteration: <gap> ú-ṣa-áb ITU.KAM qá-ra-a-tim li-mu-um bu-zu-zu 20 ma-na KÙ.BABBAR i da-na-ma qá-tí a-ša-kà-an
translation: <gap> month Qarra'ātum, eponymy Buzuzu. He will give me 20 minas of silver and I shall lay claim to that.

akk: IGI a-šur-GAL IGI a-šur-{d}UTU-ši IGI pí-lá-aḫ-a-šur
eng: Witnessed by Aššur-rabi, by Aššur-šamšī, by Pilah-Aššur.
transliteration: IGI a-šur-GAL IGI a-šur-{d}UTU-ši IGI pí-lá-aḫ-a-šur
translation: Witnessed by Aššur-rabi, by Aššur-šamšī, by Pilah-Aššur.

akk: IGI PUZUR₄-{d}IM DUMU i-dí-IŠTAR IGI du-um-qá-a DUMU kur-ub-a-a <gap>
eng: Witnessed by Puzur-Adad son of Iddin-Ištar, by Dumqaya son of Kurub-Ištar.
transliteration: IGI PUZUR₄-{d}IM DUMU i-dí-IŠTAR IGI du-um-qá-a DUMU kur-ub-a-a <gap>
translation: Witnessed by Puzur-Adad son of Iddin-Ištar, by Dumqaya son of Kurub-Ištar.

akk: § mu-ḫu-ur-šu <gap> a-ṣé-er KÙ.BABBAR <gap> a-šur-ta-ak-lá-ku <gap> ak-lá-ku <gap>
eng: § <gap> receive <gap> on to of the silver <gap> Aššur-taklāku <gap>
transliteration: § mu-ḫu-ur-šu <gap> a-ṣé-er KÙ.BABBAR <gap> a-šur-ta-ak-lá-ku <gap> ak-lá-ku <gap>
translation: § <gap> receive <gap> on to of the silver <gap> Aššur-taklāku <gap>

akk: 22 ma-na 10 GÍN KÙ.BABBAR ṣa-ru-pá-am i-ṣé-er i-dí-a-bi₄-im a-šur-ma-lik i-šu a-na a-lá-ak šu-{d}EN.LÍL i-ša-qal šu-ma lá iš-qú-ul 1.5 GÍN.TA i-na ITU.KAM a-na ma-na-im ú-ṣa-áb
eng: Iddin-abum owes 22 minas 10 shekels of refined silver to Aššur-malik. He is to pay before Šu-Illil arrives. If he has not paid (in time), he will add interest at the rate 1.5 shekel per month per mina.
transliteration: 22 ma-na 10 GÍN KÙ.BABBAR ṣa-ru-pá-am i-ṣé-er i-dí-a-bi₄-im a-šur-ma-lik i-šu a-na a-lá-ak šu-{d}EN.LÍL i-ša-qal šu-ma lá iš-qú-ul 1.5 GÍN.TA i-na ITU.KAM a-na ma-na-im ú-ṣa-áb
translation: Iddin-abum owes 22 minas 10 shekels of refined silver to Aššur-malik. He is to pay before Šu-Illil arrives. If he has not paid (in time), he will add interest at the rate 1.5 shekel per month per mina.

akk: IGI a-šur-e-mu-qí IGI en-nam-a-šur DUMU me-na-a
eng: Witnessed by Aššur-emūqī, by Ennam-Aššur s. of Menaya.
transliteration: IGI a-šur-e-mu-qí IGI en-nam-a-šur DUMU me-na-a
translation: Witnessed by Aššur-emūqī, by Ennam-Aššur s. of Menaya.

akk: IGI ṣí-lu-šu-da-ga-an DUMU IŠTAR-pí-lá-aḫ IGI a-lá-ḫi-im DUMU ša-lim-a-šur
eng: Witnessed by Ṣilluš-Dagān son of Ištar-pilah, by Ali-ahum son of Šalim-Aššur.
transliteration: IGI ṣí-lu-šu-da-ga-an DUMU IŠTAR-pí-lá-aḫ IGI a-lá-ḫi-im DUMU ša-lim-a-šur
translation: Witnessed by Ṣilluš-Dagān son of Ištar-pilah, by Ali-ahum son of Šalim-Aššur.

akk: 15 ma-na URUDU ma-sí-a-am i-na áb-na-tí-ni i-na ṣé-er ú-na-bi₄ ú a-ší-a-at lu-zi i-šu iš-tù ḫa-mu-uš-tim ša a-mu-ru-um-ba-ni ú a-šur-na-da a-na 4 ḫa-am-ša-tim i-ša-qú-lu šu-ma lá iš-qú-lu ki-ma a-wa-at kà-ri-im ṣí-ib-tám ú-ṣú-bu i-na pu-ru-uš-ḫa-dim URUDU-am i-ša-qú-lu ITU.KAM ḫu-bu-ur li-mu-um i-dí-a-bu-um
eng: Unabi and Ašiat owe 15 minas of washed copper, weighed with our stones, to Luzi. Reckoned from the week of Amurrum-bāni and Aššur-nādā they must pay within 4 weeks. If they have not paid (in time), they must add interest according to the rule of the colony. They must pay the copper in Purušhaddum. Month hubur, eponymy Iddin-abum.
transliteration: 15 ma-na URUDU ma-sí-a-am i-na áb-na-tí-ni i-na ṣé-er ú-na-bi₄ ú a-ší-a-at lu-zi i-šu iš-tù ḫa-mu-uš-tim ša a-mu-ru-um-ba-ni ú a-šur-na-da a-na 4 ḫa-am-ša-tim i-ša-qú-lu šu-ma lá iš-qú-lu ki-ma a-wa-at kà-ri-im ṣí-ib-tám ú-ṣú-bu i-na pu-ru-uš-ḫa-dim URUDU-am i-ša-qú-lu ITU.KAM ḫu-bu-ur li-mu-um i-dí-a-bu-um
translation: Unabi and Ašiat owe 15 minas of washed copper, weighed with our stones, to Luzi. Reckoned from the week of Amurrum-bāni and Aššur-nādā they must pay within 4 weeks. If they have not paid (in time), they must add interest according to the rule of the colony. They must pay the copper in Purušhaddum. Month hubur, eponymy Iddin-abum.

akk: IGI i-dí-a-bi₄-im DUMU i-tur₄-DINGIR
eng: Witnessed by Iddin-abum son of Itūr-ilī.
transliteration: IGI i-dí-a-bi₄-im DUMU i-tur₄-DINGIR
translation: Witnessed by Iddin-abum son of Itūr-ilī.

akk: 1.5 ma-na 2 GÍN i ṭup-pì-im lá-pì-it 1.8333 ma-na a qá-tí-a ta-dí ŠU.NÍGIN 3 ma-na šu-mì ku-ni-lim É kà-ri-im lá-pí-it i-5 ku-ta-ni TA ša É kà-ri-im i-dí-ú-ni 2 TÚG ša ku-ni-lúm ŠÀ.BA 0.5 TÚG i qá-tí ku-ni-lim ú-ṭá-ḫa
eng: For 1 mina 32 shekels he has been registered on the tablet. 1.8333 mina you deposited as my share. In all 3.5 minas have been booked in Kūn-ilum's name in the colonial office. Of the 5 -textiles each? that they deposited in the colonial office, 2 pieces belong to Kūn-ilum, thereof I will transfer 0.5 textile from Kūn-ilum's share.
transliteration: 1.5 ma-na 2 GÍN i ṭup-pì-im lá-pì-it 1.8333 ma-na a qá-tí-a ta-dí ŠU.NÍGIN 3 ma-na šu-mì ku-ni-lim É kà-ri-im lá-pí-it i-5 ku-ta-ni TA ša É kà-ri-im i-dí-ú-ni 2 TÚG ša ku-ni-lúm ŠÀ.BA 0.5 TÚG i qá-tí ku-ni-lim ú-ṭá-ḫa
translation: For 1 mina 32 shekels he has been registered on the tablet. 1.8333 mina you deposited as my share. In all 3.5 minas have been booked in Kūn-ilum's name in the colonial office. Of the 5 -textiles each? that they deposited in the colonial office, 2 pieces belong to Kūn-ilum, thereof I will transfer 0.5 textile from Kūn-ilum's share.

akk: IGI iš-ma-{d}IŠKUR IGI bu-za-zu
eng: Witnessed by Išme-Adad, by Buzāzu.
transliteration: IGI iš-ma-{d}IŠKUR IGI bu-za-zu
translation: Witnessed by Išme-Adad, by Buzāzu.

akk: 2 me-at 70 áb-na-am e-pí-iq ša ú-nu-qí-im ra-bi-tám i-ṣé-er ḫa-bu-a-la bu-li-na ù kà-lu-a en-nam-a-šur i-šu ú áb-na-am a-na bé-tí-šu i-ša-du-du-nim
eng: habuala, Bulina and Kaluwa owe 270 stones <gap> large, to Ennam-Aššur and they must drag the stones to his house.
transliteration: 2 me-at 70 áb-na-am e-pí-iq ša ú-nu-qí-im ra-bi-tám i-ṣé-er ḫa-bu-a-la bu-li-na ù kà-lu-a en-nam-a-šur i-šu ú áb-na-am a-na bé-tí-šu i-ša-du-du-nim
translation: habuala, Bulina and Kaluwa owe 270 stones <gap> large, to Ennam-Aššur and they must drag the stones to his house.

akk: IGI ni-ki-li-it-UḪ.ME DUMU a-ra-wa IGI PUZUR₄.IŠTAR DUMU a-šur-ta-ak-lá-ku IGI du-li-a IGI ku-ku-wa
eng: Witnessed by Nikkilet, the priest, son of Arawa, by Puzur-Ištar son of Aššur-taklāku, by Duliya, by Kukuwa, the smith
transliteration: IGI ni-ki-li-it-UḪ.ME DUMU a-ra-wa IGI PUZUR₄.IŠTAR DUMU a-šur-ta-ak-lá-ku IGI du-li-a IGI ku-ku-wa
translation: Witnessed by Nikkilet, the priest, son of Arawa, by Puzur-Ištar son of Aššur-taklāku, by Duliya, by Kukuwa, the smith

akk: na-pá-ḫi-im
transliteration: na-pá-ḫi-im

akk: iš-tù en-um-a-šur me-tù-ú 2 ma-na 15 GÍN KÙ.BABBAR a-ba-ba ra-bi-ṣú-um il₅-qé ITU.KAM ku-zal-li li-mu-um en-na-sú-in DUMU šu-a-šur
eng: After Ennam-Aššur died the attorney Ababa received 2 minas 15 shekels of silver. Month, eponymy Enna-Suen son of Šu-Aššur.
transliteration: iš-tù en-um-a-šur me-tù-ú 2 ma-na 15 GÍN KÙ.BABBAR a-ba-ba ra-bi-ṣú-um il₅-qé ITU.KAM ku-zal-li li-mu-um en-na-sú-in DUMU šu-a-šur
translation: After Ennam-Aššur died the attorney Ababa received 2 minas 15 shekels of silver. Month, eponymy Enna-Suen son of Šu-Aššur.

akk: IGI e-na-aḫ-DINGIR DUMU šu-a-šur IGI a-dí-da DUMU ÌR-ad-i-li-šu IGI id-na-a
eng: Witnessed by Enah-ilī son of Šu-Aššur, by Adida son of Warad-ilišu, by Idnaya.
transliteration: IGI e-na-aḫ-DINGIR DUMU šu-a-šur IGI a-dí-da DUMU ÌR-ad-i-li-šu IGI id-na-a
translation: Witnessed by Enah-ilī son of Šu-Aššur, by Adida son of Warad-ilišu, by Idnaya.

akk: 10 ma-na KÙ.BABBAR ṣa-ru-pá-am a-mur-IŠTAR DUMU da-mu-ma i-na ší-im SÍG.ḪI.A ša ú-ší-na-lam il₅-qé
eng: Amur-Ištar son of Damuma has received 10 minas of refined silver from the proceeds of Ušinalam's wool.
transliteration: 10 ma-na KÙ.BABBAR ṣa-ru-pá-am a-mur-IŠTAR DUMU da-mu-ma i-na ší-im SÍG.ḪI.A ša ú-ší-na-lam il₅-qé
translation: Amur-Ištar son of Damuma has received 10 minas of refined silver from the proceeds of Ušinalam's wool.

akk: IGI a-šùr-i-mì-tí DUMU du-dí-ki IGI tù-ur-a-šùr DUMU ú-zu-a IGI en-na-sú-in
eng: Witnessed by Aššur-imittī son of Dudiki, by Tūr-Aššur son of Uzuwa, by Enna-Suen.
transliteration: IGI a-šùr-i-mì-tí DUMU du-dí-ki IGI tù-ur-a-šùr DUMU ú-zu-a IGI en-na-sú-in
translation: Witnessed by Aššur-imittī son of Dudiki, by Tūr-Aššur son of Uzuwa, by Enna-Suen.

akk: 8 ma-na KÙ.BABBAR ṣa-ru-pá-am ni-is-ḫa-sú DIRI ša-du-a-sú ša-bu-ú KÙ.BABBAR ša DAM.GÀR a-na a-lim{ki} a-na ší-a-ma-tim ki-ma DAM.GÀR bé-lí-a DUMU DINGIR-ku-ru-ub a-na lá-qé-ep DUMU šu-a-šur i-dí-in-ma ŠÀ.BA ša 1 ma-na KÙ.BABBAR ší-ma-am ša a-ki-dí-e SIG₅ a-na ší-tí 7 ma-na KÙ.BABBAR KÙ.BABBAR TÚG ku-ta-ni SIG₅ DIRI-tim iš-tù ša 12 GÍN.TA KÙ.BABBAR ù ša-áp-li-iš lá-qé-ep iš-tù a-lim{ki} i-na kà-ni-iš ú-šé-lá-a-ma a-na DAM.GÀR ṣú-ba-tí lá-qé-ep DUMU šu-a-šur i-da-an GÁN-lam₅ a-na-nu-um ù a-lá-nu-um iš-tí tí-ir-tí-šu-ma ša lá-qé-ep a-šu-mì DAM.GÀR e-ti-iq
eng: 8 minas of refined siler - its import duty added, its transport tariff paid for - silver belonging to a merchant - Bēliya son of Ilī-kurub gave that on behalf of the merchant to Lā-qēp son of Šu-Aššur; out of that Lā-qēp must bring up from the City to Kanesh for 1 mina of silver, a purchase of good Akkadian textiles, for the rest, 7 minas of silver, extra-fine -textiles from 12 shekels of silver per piece or less, and Lā-qēp son of Šu-Aššur must give the textiles to the merchant. From here and from there (the shipment) goes overland in the name of the merchant together with Lā-qēp's own orders.
transliteration: 8 ma-na KÙ.BABBAR ṣa-ru-pá-am ni-is-ḫa-sú DIRI ša-du-a-sú ša-bu-ú KÙ.BABBAR ša DAM.GÀR a-na a-lim{ki} a-na ší-a-ma-tim ki-ma DAM.GÀR bé-lí-a DUMU DINGIR-ku-ru-ub a-na lá-qé-ep DUMU šu-a-šur i-dí-in-ma ŠÀ.BA ša 1 ma-na KÙ.BABBAR ší-ma-am ša a-ki-dí-e SIG₅ a-na ší-tí 7 ma-na KÙ.BABBAR KÙ.BABBAR TÚG ku-ta-ni SIG₅ DIRI-tim iš-tù ša 12 GÍN.TA KÙ.BABBAR ù ša-áp-li-iš lá-qé-ep iš-tù a-lim{ki} i-na kà-ni-iš ú-šé-lá-a-ma a-na DAM.GÀR ṣú-ba-tí lá-qé-ep DUMU šu-a-šur i-da-an GÁN-lam₅ a-na-nu-um ù a-lá-nu-um iš-tí tí-ir-tí-šu-ma ša lá-qé-ep a-šu-mì DAM.GÀR e-ti-iq
translation: 8 minas of refined siler - its import duty added, its transport tariff paid for - silver belonging to a merchant - Bēliya son of Ilī-kurub gave that on behalf of the merchant to Lā-qēp son of Šu-Aššur; out of that Lā-qēp must bring up from the City to Kanesh for 1 mina of silver, a purchase of good Akkadian textiles, for the rest, 7 minas of silver, extra-fine -textiles from 12 shekels of silver per piece or less, and Lā-qēp son of Šu-Aššur must give the textiles to the merchant. From here and from there (the shipment) goes overland in the name of the merchant together with Lā-qēp's own orders.

akk: IGI DU₁₀-a-ḫi DUMU ir-bi-{d}IM IGI lá-qé-ep DUMU PUZUR₄-ša-du-e IGI en-um-a-šùr DUMU ša-lim-a-šur
eng: Witnessed by Ṭāb-ahi son of Irbi-Adad, by Lā-qēp son of Puzur-šadue, by Ennam-Aššur son of Šalim-Aššur.

translation: Witnessed by Ṭāb-ahi son of Irbi-Adad, by Lā-qēp son of Puzur-šadue, by Ennam-Aššur son of Šalim-Aššur.

akk: <gap> pí-ri-kà-ni ša a-na-na 1 lu-bu-ša-am 1 TÚG ra-qá-tám a-na a-bu-ša-lim DUMU ṣí-lá-{d}IM a-dí-in
eng: <gap> belonging to Anna-anna, 1 dress (and) 1 thin textile I gave to Abu-šalim son of Ṣill-Adad.
transliteration: <gap> pí-ri-kà-ni ša a-na-na 1 lu-bu-ša-am 1 TÚG ra-qá-tám a-na a-bu-ša-lim DUMU ṣí-lá-{d}IM a-dí-in
translation: <gap> belonging to Anna-anna, 1 dress (and) 1 thin textile I gave to Abu-šalim son of Ṣill-Adad.

eng: Witnessed by Mannum-kī-Aššur, by Kuziziya.
transliteration: IGI ma-nu-ki-a-šur IGI ku-zi-zi-a
translation: Witnessed by Mannum-kī-Aššur, by Kuziziya.

akk: ša-lim-a-šùr ù šu-be-lúm iṣ-bu-tù-ni-a-tí-ma um-ma šu-be-lúm-ma a-na ša-lim-a-šùr-ma a-bi a-ta a-na É a-bi-a a-na mì-ma a-na a-wa-tí-kà ga-ma-ri-im a-li-kam i-a-tí i pá-ni a-ḫi-e-a KÙ.BABBAR ša ta-da-nim dí-nam um-ma ša-lim-a-šùr-ma 15 ma-na KÙ.BABBAR a-ma i-na pá-ni a-ḫe-kà ta-lá-qé a-ma bu-zu-a qá-ta-tù-a um-ma ša-lim-a-šur-ma i-na ga-ma-ar a-wa-tim ki-ma ku-a-tí ma-nam tù-šé-ša-áb um-ma šu-be-lúm-ma bu-zu-a ù a-gi-a ki-ma i-a-tí ú-šé-ša-áb KÙ.BABBAR ša i pá-ni a-ḫe-e-a ta-da-na-ni KÙ.BABBAR 2 ší-na KÙ.BABBAR lu-ṣa-ḫi-ru-ni-kum um-ma ša-lim-a-šùr-ma šu-ma-ba bu-zu-a ù a-gi-a i-na ga-ma-ar a-wa-tim lá tù-uš-té-ší-ib um-ma šu-be-lúm-ma šu-ma bu-zu-a ù a-gi-a-a i-ga-ma-ar a-wa-tim lá uš-té-ší-ib a-na 5 ma-na KÙ.BABBAR ša bu-zu-a e-pu-li-ni mì-ma lá ta-da-nam a-na a-wa-tim a-ni-a-tim kà-ru-um kà-ni-iš i-dí-ni-a-tí-ma IGI GÍR ša a-šùr ší-bu-tí-ni ni-dí-in
eng: Šalim-Aššur and Šu-Bēlum seized us and Šu-Bēlum said to Šalim-Aššur: You are my father, I have come to conclude your case about everything relating to my paternal house. Give me what silver there is to give before my brothers." Šalim-Aššur answered: "You will indeed receive 15 minas of silver before your brothers." "Now, Buzuwa is my guarantor." Šalim-Aššur continued: "At the conclusion of the matter who will you have sit down on your behalf?" Šu-Bēlum answered: "I shall have Buzuwa and Agiya sit down for me. The silver that you will give me before my brothers, those two will deduct that silver for you." Šalim-Aššur said: "And if indeed you have not had Buzuwa and Agiya sit down when the case is concluded?" Šu-Bēlum answered: "If I have not had Buzuwa and Agiya sit down at the conclusion of the case, you shall not give me anything for the 5 minas of silver that Buzuwa balanced for me." The Kanesh colony gave us for these proceedings, and we gave our testimony before Aššur's dagger.
transliteration: ša-lim-a-šùr ù šu-be-lúm iṣ-bu-tù-ni-a-tí-ma um-ma šu-be-lúm-ma a-na ša-lim-a-šùr-ma a-bi a-ta a-na É a-bi-a a-na mì-ma a-na a-wa-tí-kà ga-ma-ri-im a-li-kam i-a-tí i pá-ni a-ḫi-e-a KÙ.BABBAR ša ta-da-nim dí-nam um-ma ša-lim-a-šùr-ma 15 ma-na KÙ.BABBAR a-ma i-na pá-ni a-ḫe-kà ta-lá-qé a-ma bu-zu-a qá-ta-tù-a um-ma ša-lim-a-šur-ma i-na ga-ma-ar a-wa-tim ki-ma ku-a-tí ma-nam tù-šé-ša-áb um-ma šu-be-lúm-ma bu-zu-a ù a-gi-a ki-ma i-a-tí ú-šé-ša-áb KÙ.BABBAR ša i pá-ni a-ḫe-e-a ta-da-na-ni KÙ.BABBAR 2 ší-na KÙ.BABBAR lu-ṣa-ḫi-ru-ni-kum um-ma ša-lim-a-šùr-ma šu-ma-ba bu-zu-a ù a-gi-a i-na ga-ma-ar a-wa-tim lá tù-uš-té-ší-ib um-ma šu-be-lúm-ma šu-ma bu-zu-a ù a-gi-a-a i-ga-ma-ar a-wa-tim lá uš-té-ší-ib a-na 5 ma-na KÙ.BABBAR ša bu-zu-a e-pu-li-ni mì-ma lá ta-da-nam a-na a-wa-tim a-ni-a-tim kà-ru-um kà-ni-iš i-dí-ni-a-tí-ma IGI GÍR ša a-šùr ší-bu-tí-ni ni-dí-in
translation: Šalim-Aššur and Šu-Bēlum seized us and Šu-Bēlum said to Šalim-Aššur: You are my father, I have come to conclude your case about everything relating to my paternal house. Give me what silver there is to give before my brothers." Šalim-Aššur answered: "You will indeed receive 15 minas of silver before your brothers." "Now, Buzuwa is my guarantor." Šalim-Aššur continued: "At the conclusion of the matter who will you have sit down on your behalf?" Šu-Bēlum answered: "I shall have Buzuwa and Agiya sit down for me. The silver that you will give me before my brothers, those two will deduct that silver for you." Šalim-Aššur said: "And if indeed you have not had Buzuwa and Agiya sit down when the case is concluded?" Šu-Bēlum answered: "If I have not had Buzuwa and Agiya sit down at the conclusion of the case, you shall not give me anything for the 5 minas of silver that Buzuwa balanced for me." The Kanesh colony gave us for these proceedings, and we gave our testimony before Aššur's dagger.

akk: IGI en-na-nim IGI a-gi-a
eng: Witnessed by Ennānum, by Agiya;
transliteration: IGI en-na-nim IGI a-gi-a
translation: Witnessed by Ennānum, by Agiya;

akk: § <gap> {d}IM.GAL DUMU bu-zi tap-
eng: Adad-rabi son of Buzi was our (absent) partner. "
transliteration: § <gap> {d}IM.GAL DUMU bu-zi tap-
translation: Adad-rabi son of Buzi was our (absent) partner. "

akk: šu-ma um-me-a-an ša-lim-a-šur a-na AN.NA ù <gap> na ší TÚG ša en-na-nim <gap> zu ú en-um-a-šur a-na en-na-nim i-tù-ru ma-lá AN.NA ù TÚG ṣú-ba-tí ša qá-tim i-na ba-áb DINGIR-lim i-za-ku-ú iš-tí um-mì-a-an ša-lim-a-šur en-na-nam DUMU am-ri-a en-um-a-šur ú-ba-áb
eng: If Šalim-Ašsur's investors raise claim against Ennānum concerning tin <gap> textiles belonging to Ennānum concerning tin <gap> textiles belonging to Ennānum <gap> and Ennam-Aššur, then Ennam-Aššur will release Ennānum son of Amriya with Šalim-Aššur's investors for as much tin and ordinary textiles as they clear at the gate of the God.
transliteration: šu-ma um-me-a-an ša-lim-a-šur a-na AN.NA ù <gap> na ší TÚG ša en-na-nim <gap> zu ú en-um-a-šur a-na en-na-nim i-tù-ru ma-lá AN.NA ù TÚG ṣú-ba-tí ša qá-tim i-na ba-áb DINGIR-lim i-za-ku-ú iš-tí um-mì-a-an ša-lim-a-šur en-na-nam DUMU am-ri-a en-um-a-šur ú-ba-áb
translation: If Šalim-Ašsur's investors raise claim against Ennānum concerning tin <gap> textiles belonging to Ennānum concerning tin <gap> textiles belonging to Ennānum <gap> and Ennam-Aššur, then Ennam-Aššur will release Ennānum son of Amriya with Šalim-Aššur's investors for as much tin and ordinary textiles as they clear at the gate of the God.

akk: IGI tù-ur-a-a IGI lá-qé-ep
eng: Witnessed by Turaya, by Lā-qēp.
transliteration: IGI tù-ur-a-a IGI lá-qé-ep
translation: Witnessed by Turaya, by Lā-qēp.

akk: 0.3333 ma-na ṣa-ru-pá-am i-ṣé-er a-šùr-ma-lik DUMU ta-ḫa-zi-ra DU₁₀-ṣí-lá-a-šùr DUMU lu-lu i-šu KÙ.BABBAR a-na ITU.2.KAM i-ša-qal šu-ma lá iš-qú-ul 1 GÍN.TA KÙ.BABBAR a-na <gap> i-na ITU.KAM ṣí-ib-tám ú-ṣa-áb ITU.KAM té-i-na-tim li-mu-um da-né-a DUMU a-bu-qar me-eḫ-ra-at ta-aḫ-sí-is-tim a-ni-tim ša ší-be-e-kà
eng: Aššur-malik son of Tahazira owes 0.3333 mina of refined (silver) to Ṭāb-ṣill-Aššur son of Lulu. He will pay the silver in 2 months. If he has not paid (in time) he will pay interest at the rate 1 shekel of silver per month. Month Te'inātum, eponymy Dan-Ea son of Abu-waqar. A copy of this note with your witnesses:
transliteration: 0.3333 ma-na ṣa-ru-pá-am i-ṣé-er a-šùr-ma-lik DUMU ta-ḫa-zi-ra DU₁₀-ṣí-lá-a-šùr DUMU lu-lu i-šu KÙ.BABBAR a-na ITU.2.KAM i-ša-qal šu-ma lá iš-qú-ul 1 GÍN.TA KÙ.BABBAR a-na <gap> i-na ITU.KAM ṣí-ib-tám ú-ṣa-áb ITU.KAM té-i-na-tim li-mu-um da-né-a DUMU a-bu-qar me-eḫ-ra-at ta-aḫ-sí-is-tim a-ni-tim ša ší-be-e-kà
translation: Aššur-malik son of Tahazira owes 0.3333 mina of refined (silver) to Ṭāb-ṣill-Aššur son of Lulu. He will pay the silver in 2 months. If he has not paid (in time) he will pay interest at the rate 1 shekel of silver per month. Month Te'inātum, eponymy Dan-Ea son of Abu-waqar. A copy of this note with your witnesses:

eng: Witnessed by Aššur-imittī son of Amur-Aššur, by Aššur-muttabbil son of Ennam-Aššur, by Mannum-balum-Aššur son of Ikūnum.
transliteration: IGI a-šur-i-mì-tí DUMU a-mur-a-šùr IGI a-šùr-mu-ta-bi₄-il₅ DUMU en-um-a-šùr IGI ma-num-ba-lúm-a-šùr DUMU i-ku-nim
translation: Witnessed by Aššur-imittī son of Amur-Aššur, by Aššur-muttabbil son of Ennam-Aššur, by Mannum-balum-Aššur son of Ikūnum.

akk: 5 ma-na AN.NA ù 0.6666 ma-na KÙ i li-bi i-dí-a-bi₄-im ù šu-ut ú-ku-ul-tám ša iš-tù ḫa-ḫi-im a-dí kà-ni-iš <gap>
eng: 5 minas of tin and 0.6666 minas of silver is owed by Iddin-abum. He also (owes for) the food for a trip from hahhum to Kanesh. <gap>
transliteration: 5 ma-na AN.NA ù 0.6666 ma-na KÙ i li-bi i-dí-a-bi₄-im ù šu-ut ú-ku-ul-tám ša iš-tù ḫa-ḫi-im a-dí kà-ni-iš <gap>
translation: 5 minas of tin and 0.6666 minas of silver is owed by Iddin-abum. He also (owes for) the food for a trip from hahhum to Kanesh. <gap>

akk: IGI a-šur-UTU-ši
eng: Witnessed by Aššur-šamšī.
transliteration: IGI a-šur-UTU-ši
translation: Witnessed by Aššur-šamšī.

akk: {d}IŠKUR-ba-ni ù en-na-sú-in ni-kà-sé i-sí-ú-ma 48.5 ma-na URUDU en-na-sú-in i-ša-qal 31.5 ma-na URUDU {d}IŠKUR-ba-ni i-ša-qal
eng: Adad-bāni and Ennam-Suen settled accounts and Ennam-Suen will pay 48.5 minas of copper and Adad-bāni will pay 31.5 minas of copper.
transliteration: {d}IŠKUR-ba-ni ù en-na-sú-in ni-kà-sé i-sí-ú-ma 48.5 ma-na URUDU en-na-sú-in i-ša-qal 31.5 ma-na URUDU {d}IŠKUR-ba-ni i-ša-qal
translation: Adad-bāni and Ennam-Suen settled accounts and Ennam-Suen will pay 48.5 minas of copper and Adad-bāni will pay 31.5 minas of copper.

akk: IGI PUZUR₄-a-šur
eng: Witnessed by Puzur-Aššur.
transliteration: IGI PUZUR₄-a-šur
translation: Witnessed by Puzur-Aššur.

akk: e-na-aḫ-DINGIR be-lá-num aḫ-ša-lim ù lá-qé-pu-um i mì-ig-ra-tí-šu-nu iṣ-bu-tù-ni-a-tí i-na u₄-mì-im ša e-na-aḫ-DINGIR be-lá-num ù aḫ-ša-lim KÙ.BABBAR ša ik-ri-be ša ma-za-zi-im ša šu-a-šur qá-sú-nu ma-lá i-ša-qú-lu-ni ù lá-qé-pu-um qá-sú i-ša-qal
eng: Enah-ilī, Bēlānum, Ah-šalim and Lā-qēp seized us by joint agreement. On the day when Enah-ilī, Bēlānum and Ah-šalim pay their shares of the silver of Šu-Aššur's pledge, then Lā-qēp must also pay his share.
transliteration: e-na-aḫ-DINGIR be-lá-num aḫ-ša-lim ù lá-qé-pu-um i mì-ig-ra-tí-šu-nu iṣ-bu-tù-ni-a-tí i-na u₄-mì-im ša e-na-aḫ-DINGIR be-lá-num ù aḫ-ša-lim KÙ.BABBAR ša ik-ri-be ša ma-za-zi-im ša šu-a-šur qá-sú-nu ma-lá i-ša-qú-lu-ni ù lá-qé-pu-um qá-sú i-ša-qal
translation: Enah-ilī, Bēlānum, Ah-šalim and Lā-qēp seized us by joint agreement. On the day when Enah-ilī, Bēlānum and Ah-šalim pay their shares of the silver of Šu-Aššur's pledge, then Lā-qēp must also pay his share.

akk: IGI PUZUR₄-a-na IGI a-lá-ḫi-im
eng: Witnessed by Puzur-Anna, by Ali-ahum.
transliteration: IGI PUZUR₄-a-na IGI a-lá-ḫi-im
translation: Witnessed by Puzur-Anna, by Ali-ahum.

akk: 17 ma-na KÙ.BABBAR ṣa-ru-pá-am i-na ší-im SÍG.ḪI.A ša ú-ší-na-lam a-šùr-iš-tí-kál DUMU sú-kà-li-a il₅-qé
eng: Aššuriš-tikal son of Sukalliya has received 17 minas of refined silver from the proceeds of Ušinalam's wool.
transliteration: 17 ma-na KÙ.BABBAR ṣa-ru-pá-am i-na ší-im SÍG.ḪI.A ša ú-ší-na-lam a-šùr-iš-tí-kál DUMU sú-kà-li-a il₅-qé
translation: Aššuriš-tikal son of Sukalliya has received 17 minas of refined silver from the proceeds of Ušinalam's wool.

akk: IGI en-um-a-šùr DUMU sú-in-na-da IGI a-šùr-i-mì-tí IGI iš-me-DINGIR IGI en-na-sú-in IGI i-<gap>-ni IGI a-lá+lá-<gap> a-ḫi-šu IGI e-lá-lí DUMU i-pí-li-is
eng: Witnessed by Ennam-Aššur son of Suen-nādā, by Aššur-imittī, by Išme-ilum, by Enna-Suen, by I<gap>, by Alā<gap> his brother, by Elāli son of Ippilis.
transliteration: IGI en-um-a-šùr DUMU sú-in-na-da IGI a-šùr-i-mì-tí IGI iš-me-DINGIR IGI en-na-sú-in IGI i-<gap>-ni IGI a-lá+lá-<gap> a-ḫi-šu IGI e-lá-lí DUMU i-pí-li-is
translation: Witnessed by Ennam-Aššur son of Suen-nādā, by Aššur-imittī, by Išme-ilum, by Enna-Suen, by I<gap>, by Alā<gap> his brother, by Elāli son of Ippilis.

akk: 1 me-at ku-ta-nu dam-qú-tum 10 GÚ ù it-ra-sú AN.NA 10 ku-ta-nu qá-ab-li-ú-tum li-we-sú 7.5 ANŠE ṣa-lá-mu mì-ma a-nim ša DAM.GÀR-ri-im 1 me-at 17 TÚG ku-ta-nu qá-dum li-we-tim 5 GÚ AN.NA ù it-ra-sú 5.5 ANŠE ṣa-la-mu 3 TÚG ší-li-ip-ki-e-ú ù 2 TÚG lu-bu-šu a-na ša ki-ma i-a-tí a-ḫa-am-ma 1 TÚG lu-bu-šu-um 2 TÚG ra-qá-ta-an a-na bu-ur-a-šùr 2 TÚG ší-li-ip-ki-ú 2 TÚG lu-bu-šu a-na DINGIR-ba-ni a-ḫa-ma ša a-we-el-tim 2 TÚG lu-bu-šu pá-ṣí-ú-tum a-na bu-ur-a-šùr 2 TÚG ší-li-ip-ki-ú a-na DINGIR-ba-ni ŠU.NÍGIN 15 TÚG.ḪI.A 22 ku-ta-nu ša kà-ṣa-re-e a-ḫa-ma 6 TÚG ku-sí-a-tum dam-qá-tum 2 ma-na KÙ.BABBAR ší-im-ší-na a-na qá-tí en-um-a-šùr a-dì-in 40 ma-na ni-ga-lu 30 ma-na sà-am-ru-a-tum 3.5 ma-na KÙ.BABBAR 30 ma-na AN.NA mì-ma a-nim a-na qá-tí en-um-a-šùr a-dí-in mì-ma a-nim ša in-na-a ù DAM.GÀR en-um-a-šùr i-ra-dì
eng: 100 fine, 10 talents of tin and its extras, 10 of medium quality for the packing, 7.5 black donkeys - all this, belonging to a merchant; 117 -textiles including for the packing, 5 talents of tin and its extras, 5.5 black donkeys, 3 Šilipkian textiles and 2 garments for my representatives; further, 1 garment and 2 thin textiles for Būr-Aššur; 2 Šilipkian textiles and 2 garments for Ilī-bāni; further - belonging to the lady - 2 white garments for Būr-Aššur; 2 Šilipkian textiles for Ilī-bāni; in all: 15 textiles; 22 belonging to the packers; further, 6 fine robes - their price in silver was 2 minas - I gave into the care of Ennam-Aššur; 40 minas of sickles, 30 minas of nails, 3.5 minas of silver and 30 minas of tin - all this I gave into the care of Ennam-Aššur. All this - belonging to Innaya and the merchant - Ennam-Aššur will lead.
transliteration: 1 me-at ku-ta-nu dam-qú-tum 10 GÚ ù it-ra-sú AN.NA 10 ku-ta-nu qá-ab-li-ú-tum li-we-sú 7.5 ANŠE ṣa-lá-mu mì-ma a-nim ša DAM.GÀR-ri-im 1 me-at 17 TÚG ku-ta-nu qá-dum li-we-tim 5 GÚ AN.NA ù it-ra-sú 5.5 ANŠE ṣa-la-mu 3 TÚG ší-li-ip-ki-e-ú ù 2 TÚG lu-bu-šu a-na ša ki-ma i-a-tí a-ḫa-am-ma 1 TÚG lu-bu-šu-um 2 TÚG ra-qá-ta-an a-na bu-ur-a-šùr 2 TÚG ší-li-ip-ki-ú 2 TÚG lu-bu-šu a-na DINGIR-ba-ni a-ḫa-ma ša a-we-el-tim 2 TÚG lu-bu-šu pá-ṣí-ú-tum a-na bu-ur-a-šùr 2 TÚG ší-li-ip-ki-ú a-na DINGIR-ba-ni ŠU.NÍGIN 15 TÚG.ḪI.A 22 ku-ta-nu ša kà-ṣa-re-e a-ḫa-ma 6 TÚG ku-sí-a-tum dam-qá-tum 2 ma-na KÙ.BABBAR ší-im-ší-na a-na qá-tí en-um-a-šùr a-dì-in 40 ma-na ni-ga-lu 30 ma-na sà-am-ru-a-tum 3.5 ma-na KÙ.BABBAR 30 ma-na AN.NA mì-ma a-nim a-na qá-tí en-um-a-šùr a-dí-in mì-ma a-nim ša in-na-a ù DAM.GÀR en-um-a-šùr i-ra-dì
translation: 100 fine, 10 talents of tin and its extras, 10 of medium quality for the packing, 7.5 black donkeys - all this, belonging to a merchant; 117 -textiles including for the packing, 5 talents of tin and its extras, 5.5 black donkeys, 3 Šilipkian textiles and 2 garments for my representatives; further, 1 garment and 2 thin textiles for Būr-Aššur; 2 Šilipkian textiles and 2 garments for Ilī-bāni; further - belonging to the lady - 2 white garments for Būr-Aššur; 2 Šilipkian textiles for Ilī-bāni; in all: 15 textiles; 22 belonging to the packers; further, 6 fine robes - their price in silver was 2 minas - I gave into the care of Ennam-Aššur; 40 minas of sickles, 30 minas of nails, 3.5 minas of silver and 30 minas of tin - all this I gave into the care of Ennam-Aššur. All this - belonging to Innaya and the merchant - Ennam-Aššur will lead.

akk: IGI ba-ba-li IGI pí-lá-aḫ-IŠTAR IGI bi-ta-a
eng: Witnessed by Babali, by Pilah-Ištar, by Bitaya.
transliteration: IGI ba-ba-li IGI pí-lá-aḫ-IŠTAR IGI bi-ta-a
translation: Witnessed by Babali, by Pilah-Ištar, by Bitaya.

akk: 1.3333 ma-na KÙ.BABBAR ṣa-ru-pá-am i-na ší-im SÍG.ḪI.A ša ú-ší-na-lam šu-ku-bu-um DUMU e-na-ma-nim il₅-qé
eng: Šu-Kūbum son of Ennam-Anum has received 1.3333 mina of refined silver from the proceeds of Ušinalam's wool.
transliteration: 1.3333 ma-na KÙ.BABBAR ṣa-ru-pá-am i-na ší-im SÍG.ḪI.A ša ú-ší-na-lam šu-ku-bu-um DUMU e-na-ma-nim il₅-qé
translation: Šu-Kūbum son of Ennam-Anum has received 1.3333 mina of refined silver from the proceeds of Ušinalam's wool.
