akk: IGI i-lá-áš-ra-ni DUMU sú-kà-li-a IGI en-na-sú-in DUMU i-dí-a-bi₄-im
eng: Witnessed by Ilī-ašrannī son of Sukkalliya, by Enna-Suen son of Iddin-abum.
transliteration: IGI i-lá-áš-ra-ni DUMU sú-kà-li-a IGI en-na-sú-in DUMU i-dí-a-bi₄-im
translation: Witnessed by Ilī-ašrannī son of Sukkalliya, by Enna-Suen son of Iddin-abum.

akk: 1.5 ma-na KÙ.BABBAR en-um-a-šùr DUMU ša-lim-a-šur a-na šu-IŠTAR DUMU šu-ki-tim i-nu-mì a-na a-lim{ki} i-lu-ku i-da-šu-ma 3 ma-na KÙ.BABBAR ṣa-ru-pá-am i-na tù-wa-ri-šu šu-IŠTAR a-na en-um-a-šùr i-ša-qal
eng: Ennam-Aššur son of Šalim-Aššur will give 1.5 mina of silver to Šu-Ištar son of Šukkutum when he goes to the City, and on his return Šu-Ištar will pay 3 minas of refined silver to Ennam-Aššur.
transliteration: 1.5 ma-na KÙ.BABBAR en-um-a-šùr DUMU ša-lim-a-šur a-na šu-IŠTAR DUMU šu-ki-tim i-nu-mì a-na a-lim{ki} i-lu-ku i-da-šu-ma 3 ma-na KÙ.BABBAR ṣa-ru-pá-am i-na tù-wa-ri-šu šu-IŠTAR a-na en-um-a-šùr i-ša-qal
translation: Ennam-Aššur son of Šalim-Aššur will give 1.5 mina of silver to Šu-Ištar son of Šukkutum when he goes to the City, and on his return Šu-Ištar will pay 3 minas of refined silver to Ennam-Aššur.

akk: IGI šu-ma-bi-a DUMU a-mu-ra-a IGI la-qé-ep DUMU šu-a-šùr
eng: Witnessed by Šumi-abiya son of Amuraya, by Lā-qēp son of Šu-Aššur.
transliteration: IGI šu-ma-bi-a DUMU a-mu-ra-a IGI la-qé-ep DUMU šu-a-šùr
translation: Witnessed by Šumi-abiya son of Amuraya, by Lā-qēp son of Šu-Aššur.

akk: IGI MAR.TU-ba-ni IGI pu-šu-ki-in
eng: Witnessed by Amurrum-bāni, by Pūšu-kēn.
transliteration: IGI MAR.TU-ba-ni IGI pu-šu-ki-in
translation: Witnessed by Amurrum-bāni, by Pūšu-kēn.

akk: a-na a-wa-tim a-ni-a-tim kà-ru-um kà-né-eš i-dí-ni-a-tí-ma IGI GÍR ša a-šùr ší-bu-tí-ni ni-dí-in
eng: § The Kanesh colony gave us for these proceedings and we gave our testimony before Aššur's dagger. "
transliteration: a-na a-wa-tim a-ni-a-tim kà-ru-um kà-né-eš i-dí-ni-a-tí-ma IGI GÍR ša a-šùr ší-bu-tí-ni ni-dí-in
translation: § The Kanesh colony gave us for these proceedings and we gave our testimony before Aššur's dagger. "

akk: IGI e-lá-lí DUMU i-pí-li-is IGI bi-sá-a IGI bé-lúm-ba-ni DUMU a-šur-be-el-a-wa-tim
eng: Witnessed by Elāli son of Ippilis, by Bisaya, by Bēlum-bāni son of Aššur-bēl-awātim.
transliteration: IGI e-lá-lí DUMU i-pí-li-is IGI bi-sá-a IGI bé-lúm-ba-ni DUMU a-šur-be-el-a-wa-tim
translation: Witnessed by Elāli son of Ippilis, by Bisaya, by Bēlum-bāni son of Aššur-bēl-awātim.

akk: IGI {d}MAR.TU-ba-ni IGI a-šùr-i-dí IGI šu-ku-bi-im IGI šu-ma-li-ba-a-šùr
eng: Witnessed by Amurrum-bāni, by Aššur-idī, by Šu-Kūbum, by Šumma-libbi-Aššur.
transliteration: IGI {d}MAR.TU-ba-ni IGI a-šùr-i-dí IGI šu-ku-bi-im IGI šu-ma-li-ba-a-šùr
translation: Witnessed by Amurrum-bāni, by Aššur-idī, by Šu-Kūbum, by Šumma-libbi-Aššur.

akk: 5 ma-na KÙ.BABBAR ṣa-ru-pu-um i-na ší-im SÍG.ḪI.A ša ú-ší-na-lam PUZUR₄-ša-du-we DUMU lá-qé-ep il₅-qé
eng: Puzur-šadu'e son of Lā-qēp has received 5 minas of refined silver from the proceeds of Ušinalam's wool.
transliteration: 5 ma-na KÙ.BABBAR ṣa-ru-pu-um i-na ší-im SÍG.ḪI.A ša ú-ší-na-lam PUZUR₄-ša-du-we DUMU lá-qé-ep il₅-qé
translation: Puzur-šadu'e son of Lā-qēp has received 5 minas of refined silver from the proceeds of Ušinalam's wool.

akk: IGI a-šùr-GAL DUMU ma-nu-um-šu-um-šu IGI en-na-sú-in DUMU i-dí-a-bi-im IGI i-dí-a-šùr
eng: Witnessed by Aššur-rabi son of Mannum-šumšu, by Enna-Suen son of Iddin-abum, by Iddin-Aššur.
transliteration: IGI a-šùr-GAL DUMU ma-nu-um-šu-um-šu IGI en-na-sú-in DUMU i-dí-a-bi-im IGI i-dí-a-šùr
translation: Witnessed by Aššur-rabi son of Mannum-šumšu, by Enna-Suen son of Iddin-abum, by Iddin-Aššur.

akk: IGI MAR.TU-ba-ni IGI pu-šu-ki-in
eng: Witnessed by Amurrum-bāni, by Pūšu-kēn.
transliteration: IGI MAR.TU-ba-ni IGI pu-šu-ki-in
translation: Witnessed by Amurrum-bāni, by Pūšu-kēn.

akk: a-na a-wa-tim a-ni-a-tim kà-ru-um kà-ni-iš-ki i-dí-ni-a-tí-ma ší-bu-tí-ni IGI GÍR ša a-šùr ni-dí-in
eng: § The Kanesh colony gave us for these proceedings and we gave our testimony before Aššur's dagger. "
transliteration: a-na a-wa-tim a-ni-a-tim kà-ru-um kà-ni-iš-ki i-dí-ni-a-tí-ma ší-bu-tí-ni IGI GÍR ša a-šùr ni-dí-in
translation: § The Kanesh colony gave us for these proceedings and we gave our testimony before Aššur's dagger. "

akk: ša-lim-a-šùr iṣ-ba-at-ni-a-tí-ma um-ma šu-ut-ma a-na šu-bé-lim ù en-na-sú-in-ma KÙ.BABBAR 1 GÚ ù 2 GÚ a-na ḫu-bu-ul a-bi-ku-nu i-na na-ru-qí-a ú-ša-qí-il₅ ba-a-nim ṭup-pé-e ša ḫu-bu-ul a-bi-ku-nu am-ra-ma KÙ.BABBAR-pí šu-uq-lá-nim um-ma šu-nu-ma ṭup-pu ú ma-aḫ-ru-ú ša a-bi-ni i-na ku-nu-uk šu-{d}EN.LÍL a-mur-IŠTAR ù šu-a-nim kà-an-ku-ma i-na a-lim{ki} i-ba-ší-ú šu-ma-ba i li-bi a-bi-ni ta-áb-tù-ra-am šál-ma-am i-na a-lim{ki} la-qá-am la ta-mu-a um-ma ša-lim-a-šùr-ma a-na šu-be-lim KÙ.BABBAR ša GÁN-lim a-na-ku pá-ḫu-ra-am qá-bi-a-ku mì-šu-um iš-tí DUMU da-da KÙ.BABBAR i ḫa-ḫi-im tal-qé um-ma šu-be-lúm-ma ke-na al-qé ù en-na-sú-in iš-a-al-ma um-ma šu-ut-ma mì-šu-ú i tí-me-el-ki-a KÙ.BABBAR tal-qé um-ma šu-ut-ma šu-ma al-qé a-da-gal-šu lá i-ba-ší a-na a-wa-tim a-ni-a-tim kà-ru-um kà-ni-iš i-dí-ni-a-tí-ma IGI GÍR ša a-šùr ší-bu-tí-ni ni-dí-in
eng: Šalim-Aššur seized us and said to Šu-Bēlum and Enna-Suen: I have paid some 1 or 2 talents of silver for your father's debt out of my joint-stock capital. Come on, look at the tablets concerning your father's debt and pay me my silver." They said: "Our father's tablets and copies were sealed with the seals of Šu-Illil, Amur-Ištar and Šu-Anum, and they are in the City. If indeed you can establish anything as owed by our father, will you refuse to take the full amount in the City?" Šalim-Aššur answered Šu-Bēlum: "I have personally promised to collect the silver that is abroad. Why have you taken silver from Dada's son in hahhum?" Šu-Bēlum answered: "Yes, I took it." So he asked Enna-Suen, saying: "Why have you taken silver in Timel-kiya?" He answered: "I shall look whether I took any, but there is nothing." § The Kanesh colony gave us for these proceedings and we gave our testimony before Aššur's dagger.
transliteration: ša-lim-a-šùr iṣ-ba-at-ni-a-tí-ma um-ma šu-ut-ma a-na šu-bé-lim ù en-na-sú-in-ma KÙ.BABBAR 1 GÚ ù 2 GÚ a-na ḫu-bu-ul a-bi-ku-nu i-na na-ru-qí-a ú-ša-qí-il₅ ba-a-nim ṭup-pé-e ša ḫu-bu-ul a-bi-ku-nu am-ra-ma KÙ.BABBAR-pí šu-uq-lá-nim um-ma šu-nu-ma ṭup-pu ú ma-aḫ-ru-ú ša a-bi-ni i-na ku-nu-uk šu-{d}EN.LÍL a-mur-IŠTAR ù šu-a-nim kà-an-ku-ma i-na a-lim{ki} i-ba-ší-ú šu-ma-ba i li-bi a-bi-ni ta-áb-tù-ra-am šál-ma-am i-na a-lim{ki} la-qá-am la ta-mu-a um-ma ša-lim-a-šùr-ma a-na šu-be-lim KÙ.BABBAR ša GÁN-lim a-na-ku pá-ḫu-ra-am qá-bi-a-ku mì-šu-um iš-tí DUMU da-da KÙ.BABBAR i ḫa-ḫi-im tal-qé um-ma šu-be-lúm-ma ke-na al-qé ù en-na-sú-in iš-a-al-ma um-ma šu-ut-ma mì-šu-ú i tí-me-el-ki-a KÙ.BABBAR tal-qé um-ma šu-ut-ma šu-ma al-qé a-da-gal-šu lá i-ba-ší a-na a-wa-tim a-ni-a-tim kà-ru-um kà-ni-iš i-dí-ni-a-tí-ma IGI GÍR ša a-šùr ší-bu-tí-ni ni-dí-in
translation: Šalim-Aššur seized us and said to Šu-Bēlum and Enna-Suen: I have paid some 1 or 2 talents of silver for your father's debt out of my joint-stock capital. Come on, look at the tablets concerning your father's debt and pay me my silver." They said: "Our father's tablets and copies were sealed with the seals of Šu-Illil, Amur-Ištar and Šu-Anum, and they are in the City. If indeed you can establish anything as owed by our father, will you refuse to take the full amount in the City?" Šalim-Aššur answered Šu-Bēlum: "I have personally promised to collect the silver that is abroad. Why have you taken silver from Dada's son in hahhum?" Šu-Bēlum answered: "Yes, I took it." So he asked Enna-Suen, saying: "Why have you taken silver in Timel-kiya?" He answered: "I shall look whether I took any, but there is nothing." § The Kanesh colony gave us for these proceedings and we gave our testimony before Aššur's dagger.

akk: IGI a-ku-za IGI lá-li-im IGI šu-ku-bi-im IGI a-šùr-i-mì-t
eng: Witnessed by Akuza, by Lalum, by Šu-Kūbum, by Aššur-imittī, by Itūr-ilī."
transliteration: IGI a-ku-za IGI lá-li-im IGI šu-ku-bi-im IGI a-šùr-i-mì-t
translation: Witnessed by Akuza, by Lalum, by Šu-Kūbum, by Aššur-imittī, by Itūr-ilī."

akk: 10 ma-na KÙ.BABBAR ša i-dí-a-bu-um a-na kà-ri-im iḫ-bu-lu 1 ma-na-um 4 GÍN ni-iṣ-ḫi-ir-ma 9.3333 ma-na KÙ.BABBAR ṣa-ru-pá-am iš-tí ša-lim-a-ḫi-im i-dí-a-šùr DUMU ba-bi₄-lim ù PUZUR₄-a-šùr li-ma-an il₅-qé-ma iš-tù ḫa-mu-uš-tim ša a-ku-za 1.5 GÍN.TA i-na ITU.KAM a-na 1 ma-na-im ú-ṣa-áb
eng: Of the 10 minas of silver that Iddin-abum owes to the colony we deducted 4 shekels per mina and the two eponyms, Iddin-Aššur son of Babilum and Puzur-Aššur, received 9.3333 minas of refined silver from Šalim-ahum, and reckoned from the week of Akuza he will pay interest at the rate 1.5 shekel per month per mina.
transliteration: 10 ma-na KÙ.BABBAR ša i-dí-a-bu-um a-na kà-ri-im iḫ-bu-lu 1 ma-na-um 4 GÍN ni-iṣ-ḫi-ir-ma 9.3333 ma-na KÙ.BABBAR ṣa-ru-pá-am iš-tí ša-lim-a-ḫi-im i-dí-a-šùr DUMU ba-bi₄-lim ù PUZUR₄-a-šùr li-ma-an il₅-qé-ma iš-tù ḫa-mu-uš-tim ša a-ku-za 1.5 GÍN.TA i-na ITU.KAM a-na 1 ma-na-im ú-ṣa-áb
translation: Of the 10 minas of silver that Iddin-abum owes to the colony we deducted 4 shekels per mina and the two eponyms, Iddin-Aššur son of Babilum and Puzur-Aššur, received 9.3333 minas of refined silver from Šalim-ahum, and reckoned from the week of Akuza he will pay interest at the rate 1.5 shekel per month per mina.

akk: IGI a-šur-{d}UTU-ši IGI i-dí-a-šur DUMU a-šur-ma-lik
eng: Witnessed by Aššur-šamšī, by Iddin-Aššur son of Aššur-malik.
transliteration: IGI a-šur-{d}UTU-ši IGI i-dí-a-šur DUMU a-šur-ma-lik
translation: Witnessed by Aššur-šamšī, by Iddin-Aššur son of Aššur-malik.

akk: 2 GÚ 16 ma-na AN.NA ku-nu-ki-a ù a-ḫa-ma 10.3333 ma-na KÙ.BABBAR ša ik-ri-be ša a-šùr 2 ANŠE ṣa-lá-ma-an ù u₄-nu-sú-nu 1 ku-ta-nu-um SIG₅ ša ša-tí-li mì-ma a-nim ša zu-ku-a a-ṣé-er ša ki-ma i-a-tí šu-ḫu-bur DUMU šál-ma-{d}IM da-da-a-a DUMU a-šùr-ba-ni ù a-šùr-ša-dí-li DUMU ì-lí-a-lim a-šùr-ša-dí-lí-ma ù-bi₄-il₅ um-ma a-na-ku-ma a-na ša ki-ma i-a-tí KÙ.BABBAR le-ru-ub-ma AN.NA lu-ṣí a-na i-ta-aṭ-li-im dí-na lá tù-ša-ra 6.5 GÍN KÙ.BABBAR a qá-tí-šu a-dí-in
eng: 2 talents 16 minas of tin under my seal plus further 10.3333 minas of silver from the votive offering to Aššur, 2 black donkeys and their harness, 1 good belonging to Šāt-ilī - all this belonging to Zukuwa - Aššur-šād-ilī brought to my representatives Šu-hubur son of Šalim-Adad, Dadaya son of Aššur-bāni and Aššur-šād-ilī son of Ilī-alūm. I said to my representatives: Only when the silver has come in may the tin go out. Sell for cash on delivery. Do not release on credit." I gave 6.5 shekels of silver for his expenses.
transliteration: 2 GÚ 16 ma-na AN.NA ku-nu-ki-a ù a-ḫa-ma 10.3333 ma-na KÙ.BABBAR ša ik-ri-be ša a-šùr 2 ANŠE ṣa-lá-ma-an ù u₄-nu-sú-nu 1 ku-ta-nu-um SIG₅ ša ša-tí-li mì-ma a-nim ša zu-ku-a a-ṣé-er ša ki-ma i-a-tí šu-ḫu-bur DUMU šál-ma-{d}IM da-da-a-a DUMU a-šùr-ba-ni ù a-šùr-ša-dí-li DUMU ì-lí-a-lim a-šùr-ša-dí-lí-ma ù-bi₄-il₅ um-ma a-na-ku-ma a-na ša ki-ma i-a-tí KÙ.BABBAR le-ru-ub-ma AN.NA lu-ṣí a-na i-ta-aṭ-li-im dí-na lá tù-ša-ra 6.5 GÍN KÙ.BABBAR a qá-tí-šu a-dí-in
translation: 2 talents 16 minas of tin under my seal plus further 10.3333 minas of silver from the votive offering to Aššur, 2 black donkeys and their harness, 1 good belonging to Šāt-ilī - all this belonging to Zukuwa - Aššur-šād-ilī brought to my representatives Šu-hubur son of Šalim-Adad, Dadaya son of Aššur-bāni and Aššur-šād-ilī son of Ilī-alūm. I said to my representatives: Only when the silver has come in may the tin go out. Sell for cash on delivery. Do not release on credit." I gave 6.5 shekels of silver for his expenses.

akk: IGI a-lá-ḫi-im DUMU šál-ma-a-šur IGI PUZUR₄.IŠTAR DUMU im-dí-DINGIR IGI šu-be-lim DUMU šu-li IGI a-ta-ta DUMU en-na-nim
eng: Witnessed by Ali-ahum son of Šalim-Aššur, by Puzur-Ištar son of Imdi-ilum, by Šu-Bēlum son of Šuli, by Atata son of Ennānum."
transliteration: IGI a-lá-ḫi-im DUMU šál-ma-a-šur IGI PUZUR₄.IŠTAR DUMU im-dí-DINGIR IGI šu-be-lim DUMU šu-li IGI a-ta-ta DUMU en-na-nim
translation: Witnessed by Ali-ahum son of Šalim-Aššur, by Puzur-Ištar son of Imdi-ilum, by Šu-Bēlum son of Šuli, by Atata son of Ennānum."

akk: ṭup-pá-am ša a-lim{ki} ú ra-bi-ṣa-am ša be-li-a lá ú-na-aḫ a-na a-wa-tim a-ni-a-tim kà-ru-um kà-ni-iš i-dí-ni-a-tí-ma IGI GÍR ša a-šùr ší-bu-tí-ni ni-dí-in
eng: I shall not obstruct the tablet from the City and the attorney of my lord. The Kanesh colony gave us for these proceedings and we gave our testimony before Aššur's dagger.
transliteration: ṭup-pá-am ša a-lim{ki} ú ra-bi-ṣa-am ša be-li-a lá ú-na-aḫ a-na a-wa-tim a-ni-a-tim kà-ru-um kà-ni-iš i-dí-ni-a-tí-ma IGI GÍR ša a-šùr ší-bu-tí-ni ni-dí-in
translation: I shall not obstruct the tablet from the City and the attorney of my lord. The Kanesh colony gave us for these proceedings and we gave our testimony before Aššur's dagger.

akk: IGI ú-ṣú-ra-nim DUMU sá-li-a IGI a-šùr-ták-lá-ku DUMU a-šùr-mu-ta-bi-il₅
eng: Witnessed by Uṣurānum son of Salliya, by Aššur-taklāku son of Aššur-muttabbil.
transliteration: IGI ú-ṣú-ra-nim DUMU sá-li-a IGI a-šùr-ták-lá-ku DUMU a-šùr-mu-ta-bi-il₅
translation: Witnessed by Uṣurānum son of Salliya, by Aššur-taklāku son of Aššur-muttabbil.

akk: a-wa-tù-šu-nu ša ša-lim-a-šùr šu-bé-lúm ki-ma DAM i-sú-rik₁₃ DUMU.MÍ i-sú-SUD ù DUMU.MÍ i-dí-a-bi-im ra-bi-ṣum ù šu-bé-lúm KI ša-lim-a-šùr ni-iš a-lim it-mu-ú-ma a-wa-tù-šu-nu gám-ra-ma a-na lu-qú-tim AN.NA ù TÚG.ḪI.A ša É a-šùr-bé-el-a-wa-tim i-pí-iq-du ša ma-lá dí-in a-lim šu-ku-bu-um ù a-ḫu-šu i-lu-ku-ni-ma ša-lim-a-šùr a-na lu-qú-tim AN.NA ù TÚG.ḪI.A ša-lim-a-šùr ù-kà-nu-ni a-šùr-ta-ak-lá-ku ra-bi-ṣú-um a-na lu-qú-tim a-ni-tim šu-bé-lúm a-ša-at i-sú-rik₁₃ DUMU MÍ i-sú-rik₁₃ ù DUMU MÍ i-dí-a-bi-im a-na ša-lim-a-šùr šu-ku-bi-im ù a-ḫi-šu ù-lá i-tù-ru šu-ma i-tù-ru šu-bé-lam ù ra-bi-ṣum ù-bu-bu-šu-nu
eng: Their case concerning Šalim-Aššur - Šu-Bēlum for the wife of Issu-arik, the daughter of Issu-arik and the daughter of Iddin-abum, the attorney and Šu-Bēlum swore an oath on the City with Šalim-Aššur and their case was concluded: For the goods, the tin and textiles that have been entrusted in Aššur-bēl-awātim's house in accordance with the verdict of the City assembly Šu-Kūbum and his brother will come and confirm Šalim-Aššur for the goods, the tin and textiles. Aššur-taklāku was the attorney. Šu-Bēlum, the wife of Issu-arik, the daughter of Issu-arik and the daughter of Iddin-abum must not raise claim to these goods against Šalim-Aššur, Šu-Kūbum or his brother. If they do raise claim, Šu-Bēlum and the attorney will clear them.
transliteration: a-wa-tù-šu-nu ša ša-lim-a-šùr šu-bé-lúm ki-ma DAM i-sú-rik₁₃ DUMU.MÍ i-sú-SUD ù DUMU.MÍ i-dí-a-bi-im ra-bi-ṣum ù šu-bé-lúm KI ša-lim-a-šùr ni-iš a-lim it-mu-ú-ma a-wa-tù-šu-nu gám-ra-ma a-na lu-qú-tim AN.NA ù TÚG.ḪI.A ša É a-šùr-bé-el-a-wa-tim i-pí-iq-du ša ma-lá dí-in a-lim šu-ku-bu-um ù a-ḫu-šu i-lu-ku-ni-ma ša-lim-a-šùr a-na lu-qú-tim AN.NA ù TÚG.ḪI.A ša-lim-a-šùr ù-kà-nu-ni a-šùr-ta-ak-lá-ku ra-bi-ṣú-um a-na lu-qú-tim a-ni-tim šu-bé-lúm a-ša-at i-sú-rik₁₃ DUMU MÍ i-sú-rik₁₃ ù DUMU MÍ i-dí-a-bi-im a-na ša-lim-a-šùr šu-ku-bi-im ù a-ḫi-šu ù-lá i-tù-ru šu-ma i-tù-ru šu-bé-lam ù ra-bi-ṣum ù-bu-bu-šu-nu
translation: Their case concerning Šalim-Aššur - Šu-Bēlum for the wife of Issu-arik, the daughter of Issu-arik and the daughter of Iddin-abum, the attorney and Šu-Bēlum swore an oath on the City with Šalim-Aššur and their case was concluded: For the goods, the tin and textiles that have been entrusted in Aššur-bēl-awātim's house in accordance with the verdict of the City assembly Šu-Kūbum and his brother will come and confirm Šalim-Aššur for the goods, the tin and textiles. Aššur-taklāku was the attorney. Šu-Bēlum, the wife of Issu-arik, the daughter of Issu-arik and the daughter of Iddin-abum must not raise claim to these goods against Šalim-Aššur, Šu-Kūbum or his brother. If they do raise claim, Šu-Bēlum and the attorney will clear them.

akk: IGI {d}MAR.TU-ba-ni DUMU ma-na-na IGI a-šùr-i-dí DUMU mu-mu-lá-nim IGI šu-ku-bi-im DUMU a-šùr-i-dí IGI šu-ma-li-ba-a-šùr DUMU ku-us-ku-sí-im
eng: Witnessed by Amurrum-bāni son of Manana, by Aššur-idī son of Mumulānum, by Šu-Kūbum son of Aššur-idī, by Šumma-libba-Aššur son of Kuskusum.
transliteration: IGI {d}MAR.TU-ba-ni DUMU ma-na-na IGI a-šùr-i-dí DUMU mu-mu-lá-nim IGI šu-ku-bi-im DUMU a-šùr-i-dí IGI šu-ma-li-ba-a-šùr DUMU ku-us-ku-sí-im
translation: Witnessed by Amurrum-bāni son of Manana, by Aššur-idī son of Mumulānum, by Šu-Kūbum son of Aššur-idī, by Šumma-libba-Aššur son of Kuskusum.

akk: i-nu-mì ku-ra ša-lim-a-šùr a-na ba-áb DINGIR-lim a-šu-mì KÙ.BABBAR ša ta-pá-ú-tim ša tù-um-li-a-i-um ḫa-bu-lu-ni-ma ú-šé-ri-da-šu-ni a-la-ḫu-um iš-tí be-el ed-ma-tim i-na ba-áb DINGIR-lim i-zi-iz a-na a-wa-tim a-ni-a-tim kà-ru-um kà-ni-ìš i-dí-ni-a-tí-ma ṭup-pá-um IGI GÍR ša a-šùr ba-áb DINGIR-lim ni-dí-in
eng: When Kura led Šalim-Aššur to the Gate of the God because of the silver of the partnership that the man from Tumliya owed, Ali-ahum stood with the shareholders in the Gate of the God. § The Kanesh colony gave us for these proceedings, and we gave a tablet before Aššur's dagger in the Gate of the God.
transliteration: i-nu-mì ku-ra ša-lim-a-šùr a-na ba-áb DINGIR-lim a-šu-mì KÙ.BABBAR ša ta-pá-ú-tim ša tù-um-li-a-i-um ḫa-bu-lu-ni-ma ú-šé-ri-da-šu-ni a-la-ḫu-um iš-tí be-el ed-ma-tim i-na ba-áb DINGIR-lim i-zi-iz a-na a-wa-tim a-ni-a-tim kà-ru-um kà-ni-ìš i-dí-ni-a-tí-ma ṭup-pá-um IGI GÍR ša a-šùr ba-áb DINGIR-lim ni-dí-in
translation: When Kura led Šalim-Aššur to the Gate of the God because of the silver of the partnership that the man from Tumliya owed, Ali-ahum stood with the shareholders in the Gate of the God. § The Kanesh colony gave us for these proceedings, and we gave a tablet before Aššur's dagger in the Gate of the God.

akk: IGI a-ku-za IGI MAR.TU-ba-ni IGI bu-zu-zi-im IGI lá-qé-ep
eng: Witnessed by Akuza, by Amurrum-bāni, by Buzuzum, by Lā-qēp.
transliteration: IGI a-ku-za IGI MAR.TU-ba-ni IGI bu-zu-zi-im IGI lá-qé-ep
translation: Witnessed by Akuza, by Amurrum-bāni, by Buzuzum, by Lā-qēp.

akk: IGI a-mur-IŠTAR IGI en-nam-a-šùr
eng: Witnessed by Amur-Ištar, by Ennam-Aššur.
transliteration: IGI a-mur-IŠTAR IGI en-nam-a-šùr
translation: Witnessed by Amur-Ištar, by Ennam-Aššur.

akk: a ma-lá dí-in kà-ri-im kà-ni-iš TUR GAL en-um-ì-lí DUB.SAR iṣ-ba-at-ni-a-tí-ma a-na É e-lá-ma né-ru-ub-ma ku-nu-ki ša ma-ak-na-ki-im ni-iš-ru-ma i-na ma-ak-na-ki-im 10 né-zi-ib a-na 2-šé-ni-šu ta-ma-lá-ki-šu ša ṭup-pè a-gu₅-ú-a DUMU <gap> il₅-qé
eng: In accordance with the verdict of the plenary Kanesh colony Ennam-ilī, the scribe, seized us wherepon we entered Elamma's house and broke the seals of the sealed room and we left (them) in the sealed room. Two boxes with tablets Akūa, son of Baziya took.
transliteration: a ma-lá dí-in kà-ri-im kà-ni-iš TUR GAL en-um-ì-lí DUB.SAR iṣ-ba-at-ni-a-tí-ma a-na É e-lá-ma né-ru-ub-ma ku-nu-ki ša ma-ak-na-ki-im ni-iš-ru-ma i-na ma-ak-na-ki-im 10 né-zi-ib a-na 2-šé-ni-šu ta-ma-lá-ki-šu ša ṭup-pè a-gu₅-ú-a DUMU <gap> il₅-qé
translation: In accordance with the verdict of the plenary Kanesh colony Ennam-ilī, the scribe, seized us wherepon we entered Elamma's house and broke the seals of the sealed room and we left (them) in the sealed room. Two boxes with tablets Akūa, son of Baziya took.

akk: IGI ma-sà-a DUMU a-šùr-ni-im-ri IGI ma-ṣí-ì-lí DUMU bu-zu-zi-im IGI a-mur-a-šùr DUMU a-šùr-DU₁₀
eng: Witnessed by Masaya, son of Aššur-nimrī, by Maṣi-ilī, son of Buzuzum, by Amur-Aššur, son of Aššur-ṭāb.
transliteration: IGI ma-sà-a DUMU a-šùr-ni-im-ri IGI ma-ṣí-ì-lí DUMU bu-zu-zi-im IGI a-mur-a-šùr DUMU a-šùr-DU₁₀
translation: Witnessed by Masaya, son of Aššur-nimrī, by Maṣi-ilī, son of Buzuzum, by Amur-Aššur, son of Aššur-ṭāb.

akk: ša-lim-a-šùr ù šu-be-lúm DUMU i-dí-a-bi-im ni-kà-sí ma-aḫ-ri-ni i-sí-ú-ma 1 GÚ 13 ma-na URUDU lá-mu-na-am i-ṣé-er šu-be-lim ša-lim-a-šùr i-dí-i um-ma ša-lim-a-šùr-ma a-na šu-be-lim-ma i pí-i i-sú-ri-ik a-bi-a qá-tá-at a-bi-kà al-ta-pá-at lu i-ba-ba-tí-šu KÙ.BABBAR al-qé-ma a-na ḫu-bu-li-šu ú-ša-qí-il₅ lu i-na na-ru-qí-a KÙ.BABBAR ma-da-ma a-na ḫu-bu-ul a-bi-kà ú-ša-qí-il₅ al-kam ṭup-pí-a lu-kà-li-im-kà um-ma šu-be-lúm-ma we-da-am i-a-tí tù-la-ma-da-ni qá-dum a-ḫe-a-ma šé-a-ni
eng: Šalim-Aššur and Šu-Bēlum son of Iddin-abum settled accounts before us, and Šalim-Aššur submitted 1 talent 13 minas of bad copper as a claim on Šu-Bēlum. On the orders of Issu-arik, my father, I wrote myself as your father's guarantor. I took silver from his outstanding claims and paid to cover his debt, and I paid a great deal of silver from my joint-stock capital for your father's debt. Come! Let me show you my tablets!" Šu-Bēlum answered: "You inform me alone. Sue me together with my brothers."
transliteration: ša-lim-a-šùr ù šu-be-lúm DUMU i-dí-a-bi-im ni-kà-sí ma-aḫ-ri-ni i-sí-ú-ma 1 GÚ 13 ma-na URUDU lá-mu-na-am i-ṣé-er šu-be-lim ša-lim-a-šùr i-dí-i um-ma ša-lim-a-šùr-ma a-na šu-be-lim-ma i pí-i i-sú-ri-ik a-bi-a qá-tá-at a-bi-kà al-ta-pá-at lu i-ba-ba-tí-šu KÙ.BABBAR al-qé-ma a-na ḫu-bu-li-šu ú-ša-qí-il₅ lu i-na na-ru-qí-a KÙ.BABBAR ma-da-ma a-na ḫu-bu-ul a-bi-kà ú-ša-qí-il₅ al-kam ṭup-pí-a lu-kà-li-im-kà um-ma šu-be-lúm-ma we-da-am i-a-tí tù-la-ma-da-ni qá-dum a-ḫe-a-ma šé-a-ni
translation: Šalim-Aššur and Šu-Bēlum son of Iddin-abum settled accounts before us, and Šalim-Aššur submitted 1 talent 13 minas of bad copper as a claim on Šu-Bēlum. On the orders of Issu-arik, my father, I wrote myself as your father's guarantor. I took silver from his outstanding claims and paid to cover his debt, and I paid a great deal of silver from my joint-stock capital for your father's debt. Come! Let me show you my tablets!" Šu-Bēlum answered: "You inform me alone. Sue me together with my brothers."

akk: IGI PUZUR₄-a-šùr IGI en-na-nim
eng: Witnessed by Puzur-Aššur, by Ennānum.
transliteration: IGI PUZUR₄-a-šùr IGI en-na-nim
translation: Witnessed by Puzur-Aššur, by Ennānum.

akk: a-na a-wa-tim a-ni-a-tim kà-ru-um kà-ni-iš <gap> i-dí-ni-a-tí-ma IGI GÍR ša a-šùr ṭup-pá-am ša ší-bu-tí-ni ni-dí-in
eng: § The Kanesh colony gave us for these proceedings and we gave a tablet with our testimony before the dagger of Aššur. "
transliteration: a-na a-wa-tim a-ni-a-tim kà-ru-um kà-ni-iš <gap> i-dí-ni-a-tí-ma IGI GÍR ša a-šùr ṭup-pá-am ša ší-bu-tí-ni ni-dí-in
translation: § The Kanesh colony gave us for these proceedings and we gave a tablet with our testimony before the dagger of Aššur. "

akk: 41 ma-na 11.5 GÍN KÙ.BABBAR ṣa-ru-pá-am ku-nu-ki ša ki-ma šu-a-tí ú ku-nu-ki-a 3 né-pí-šu a-ḫa-ma 0.6666 ma-na 1 GÍN KÙ.BABBAR ša-du-a-sú mì-ma a-nim a-na šu-nu-nu ù ì-lí-áš-ra-ni áp-qí-id-ma a-ṣé-er ša-lim-a-šur a-na a-lim{ki} ub-lu a-ḫa-ma 5 GÍN KÙ.BABBAR a-na ú-ku-ul-tí-šu-nu a-dí-šu-nu-tí
eng: 41 minas 11.5 shekels of refined silver, sealed by his representatives and by me - in 3 packages; further, 0.6666 mina 1 shekel of silver, its transport tariff - all this I entrusted to Šu-Nūnu and Ilī-ašrannī, and they brought it to Šalim-Aššur in the City. Furthermore, I gave them 5 shekels of silver for their food.
transliteration: 41 ma-na 11.5 GÍN KÙ.BABBAR ṣa-ru-pá-am ku-nu-ki ša ki-ma šu-a-tí ú ku-nu-ki-a 3 né-pí-šu a-ḫa-ma 0.6666 ma-na 1 GÍN KÙ.BABBAR ša-du-a-sú mì-ma a-nim a-na šu-nu-nu ù ì-lí-áš-ra-ni áp-qí-id-ma a-ṣé-er ša-lim-a-šur a-na a-lim{ki} ub-lu a-ḫa-ma 5 GÍN KÙ.BABBAR a-na ú-ku-ul-tí-šu-nu a-dí-šu-nu-tí
translation: 41 minas 11.5 shekels of refined silver, sealed by his representatives and by me - in 3 packages; further, 0.6666 mina 1 shekel of silver, its transport tariff - all this I entrusted to Šu-Nūnu and Ilī-ašrannī, and they brought it to Šalim-Aššur in the City. Furthermore, I gave them 5 shekels of silver for their food.

akk: IGI a-ḫu-wa-qar DUMU šu-IŠTAR IGI ba-zi-a DUMU DINGIR-ku-ru-ub IGI a-šur-ta-ak-lá-ku DUMU qàr-da-a
eng: Witnessed by Ahu-waqar son of Šu-Ištar, by Baziya son of Ilī-kurub, by Aššur-taklāku son of Qardaya.
transliteration: IGI a-ḫu-wa-qar DUMU šu-IŠTAR IGI ba-zi-a DUMU DINGIR-ku-ru-ub IGI a-šur-ta-ak-lá-ku DUMU qàr-da-a
translation: Witnessed by Ahu-waqar son of Šu-Ištar, by Baziya son of Ilī-kurub, by Aššur-taklāku son of Qardaya.

akk: a-ḫa-ma 10 GÍN KÙ.BABBAR a be-a-li-im a-na šu-nu-nu 7 GÍN KÙ.BABBAR a-na ì-lí-áš-ra-ni ma-aḫ-ri-šu-nu-ma a-dí-in
eng: Furthermore, I gave 10 shekels of silver as a working-capital to Šu-Nūnu and 7 shekels of silver to Ilī-ašrannī witnessed by the same men.
transliteration: a-ḫa-ma 10 GÍN KÙ.BABBAR a be-a-li-im a-na šu-nu-nu 7 GÍN KÙ.BABBAR a-na ì-lí-áš-ra-ni ma-aḫ-ri-šu-nu-ma a-dí-in
translation: Furthermore, I gave 10 shekels of silver as a working-capital to Šu-Nūnu and 7 shekels of silver to Ilī-ašrannī witnessed by the same men.

akk: 13.3333 ma-na KÙ.BABBAR ṣa-ru-pá-am i-ṣé-er i-dí-a-bi₄-im a-mur-IŠTAR i-šu u₄-mu-šu ma-al-ú
eng: Iddin-abum owes 13.3333 minas of silver to Amur-Ištar. His term has expired.
transliteration: 13.3333 ma-na KÙ.BABBAR ṣa-ru-pá-am i-ṣé-er i-dí-a-bi₄-im a-mur-IŠTAR i-šu u₄-mu-šu ma-al-ú
translation: Iddin-abum owes 13.3333 minas of silver to Amur-Ištar. His term has expired.

akk: IGI a-šur-e-mu-qí IGI en-nam-a-šur DUMU me-na-a
eng: Witnessed by Aššur-emūqi, by Ennam-Aššur son of Menaya.
transliteration: IGI a-šur-e-mu-qí IGI en-nam-a-šur DUMU me-na-a
translation: Witnessed by Aššur-emūqi, by Ennam-Aššur son of Menaya.

akk: 3 GÍN KÙ.BABBAR i-ṣé-er tù-ur-ḫa-lá en-nam-a-šur i-šu-ú ù 30 ri-ik-sí ša qá-nu-we ra-bi-ú-tim a-dí 5 u₄-me-e ú-ṣa-ba-am iš-tù ḫa-mu-uš-tim ša ma-nu-ba-lu-a-šur a-na ḫa-mu-uš-tim ša i-lá-kà-ni KÙ.BABBAR-pí i-ša-qá-lam šu-ma lá iš-qú-lam 0.5 GÍN.TA i-na ITU.KAM-im ṣí-ib-tám i-ta-na-ṣa-ba-am
eng: Turhala owes 3 shekels of silver to Ennam-Aššur, and he will add 30 large bundles of reeds within 5 days. Reckoned from the week of Mannum-balum-Aššur he will pay my silver in the next week. If he has not paid (in time) he will continue to add interest every month at the rate 0.5 shekel (per mina).
transliteration: 3 GÍN KÙ.BABBAR i-ṣé-er tù-ur-ḫa-lá en-nam-a-šur i-šu-ú ù 30 ri-ik-sí ša qá-nu-we ra-bi-ú-tim a-dí 5 u₄-me-e ú-ṣa-ba-am iš-tù ḫa-mu-uš-tim ša ma-nu-ba-lu-a-šur a-na ḫa-mu-uš-tim ša i-lá-kà-ni KÙ.BABBAR-pí i-ša-qá-lam šu-ma lá iš-qú-lam 0.5 GÍN.TA i-na ITU.KAM-im ṣí-ib-tám i-ta-na-ṣa-ba-am
translation: Turhala owes 3 shekels of silver to Ennam-Aššur, and he will add 30 large bundles of reeds within 5 days. Reckoned from the week of Mannum-balum-Aššur he will pay my silver in the next week. If he has not paid (in time) he will continue to add interest every month at the rate 0.5 shekel (per mina).

akk: IGI lá-ma-sí DUMU MÍ-aḫ-ša-lim
eng: Witnessed by Lamassī daughter of Ah-šalim.
transliteration: IGI lá-ma-sí DUMU MÍ-aḫ-ša-lim
translation: Witnessed by Lamassī daughter of Ah-šalim.

akk: 5 ma-na KÙ.BABBAR ṣa-ru-pá-am ú-zu-bi-iš-kum DUMU šu-a-nim i-na ší-im SÍG.ḪI.A ša ú-ší-na-lam il₅-qé
eng: Uzub-iškum son of Šu-Anum has received 5 minas of refined silver from the proceeds of Ušinalam's wool.
transliteration: 5 ma-na KÙ.BABBAR ṣa-ru-pá-am ú-zu-bi-iš-kum DUMU šu-a-nim i-na ší-im SÍG.ḪI.A ša ú-ší-na-lam il₅-qé
translation: Uzub-iškum son of Šu-Anum has received 5 minas of refined silver from the proceeds of Ušinalam's wool.

akk: IGI i-dí-ku-bi IGI a-lá-bi-im DUMU šu-a-šùr IGI en-na-sú-in
eng: Witnessed by Iddin-Kūbī, by Ali-abum son of Šu-Aššur, by Enna-Suen.
transliteration: IGI i-dí-ku-bi IGI a-lá-bi-im DUMU šu-a-šùr IGI en-na-sú-in
translation: Witnessed by Iddin-Kūbī, by Ali-abum son of Šu-Aššur, by Enna-Suen.

akk: <gap> a-na 5 ma-na ṭup-pá-am ša <gap> bu-<gap>-kum ì-lí-dan ù šu-{d}EN.LÍL ša 2.3333 ma-na 4.5 GÍN KÙ.BABBAR SÍG.ḪI.A 1 ma-na 10 GÍN AN.NA 6 ANŠE ṣa-lá-mu ù ú-nu-sú-nu mì-ma a-nim a-na a-mur-ša-ra-sà a-dí-in-ma a-na ku-bu-ur-na-at ú-bi-il₅
eng: <gap> for 5 minas <gap> a tablet <gap> Ilī-dan and Šu-Illil <gap> Wool worth 2.3333 minas 4.5 shekels of silver, 1 mina 10 shekels of tin, 6 black donkeys and their harness - all this I gave to Amur-šarrassa and he brought it to Kuburnat.
transliteration: <gap> a-na 5 ma-na ṭup-pá-am ša <gap> bu-<gap>-kum ì-lí-dan ù šu-{d}EN.LÍL ša 2.3333 ma-na 4.5 GÍN KÙ.BABBAR SÍG.ḪI.A 1 ma-na 10 GÍN AN.NA 6 ANŠE ṣa-lá-mu ù ú-nu-sú-nu mì-ma a-nim a-na a-mur-ša-ra-sà a-dí-in-ma a-na ku-bu-ur-na-at ú-bi-il₅
translation: <gap> for 5 minas <gap> a tablet <gap> Ilī-dan and Šu-Illil <gap> Wool worth 2.3333 minas 4.5 shekels of silver, 1 mina 10 shekels of tin, 6 black donkeys and their harness - all this I gave to Amur-šarrassa and he brought it to Kuburnat.

akk: IGI a-di-da IGI a-ba-ba IGI dam-qá-a
eng: Witnessed by Adida, by Ababa, by Damqaya.
transliteration: IGI a-di-da IGI a-ba-ba IGI dam-qá-a
translation: Witnessed by Adida, by Ababa, by Damqaya.

akk: a-na ša 2.5 ma-na <gap> KÙ.BABBAR ṣa-ru-pì-im ú ṣí-ba-tí-šu ša a-da-da ḫa-bu-lá-ku-ni ni-kà-sí ni-sí-ma <gap> ma-na KÙ.BABBAR ṣa-ru-pá-am ú 1 ku-ta-nam i-na pì ṭup-pí-šu a-na a-lá-ḫi-im i-da-an a-ḫa-ma a-na 1 ma-na 7 GÍN ša ší-ta ta-aḫ-sí-sà-tí-a a-za-kà-ar-šu-ma i-ša-qá-lam₅
eng: Concerning the 2.5 minas of refined silver and its interest that Adada owes to you, we settled accounts and he must give <gap> mina refined silver and 1 in accordance with the text of his tablet to Ali-ahum. Further, I shall formally state to him the 1 mina 7 shekels from my two memoranda, and he must pay.
transliteration: a-na ša 2.5 ma-na <gap> KÙ.BABBAR ṣa-ru-pì-im ú ṣí-ba-tí-šu ša a-da-da ḫa-bu-lá-ku-ni ni-kà-sí ni-sí-ma <gap> ma-na KÙ.BABBAR ṣa-ru-pá-am ú 1 ku-ta-nam i-na pì ṭup-pí-šu a-na a-lá-ḫi-im i-da-an a-ḫa-ma a-na 1 ma-na 7 GÍN ša ší-ta ta-aḫ-sí-sà-tí-a a-za-kà-ar-šu-ma i-ša-qá-lam₅
translation: Concerning the 2.5 minas of refined silver and its interest that Adada owes to you, we settled accounts and he must give <gap> mina refined silver and 1 in accordance with the text of his tablet to Ali-ahum. Further, I shall formally state to him the 1 mina 7 shekels from my two memoranda, and he must pay.

akk: ḫa-pu-dim IGI a-lu-lá-a DUMU i-sá-li-a 1 ma-na 10 GÍN KÙ.BABBAR iš-tí a-lu-lá-a ù <gap>{d}UTU al-qé-ú 6 TÚG.ḪI.A qá-dum 1 TÚG ša e-na-aḫ-DINGIR i-dí-nu-ni a-na É kà-ri-im a-na mì-iš-li ša a-bi-ni a-dí-i ma-lá ta-az-me-ru-ni šu-mì a-bi-ni i-na É kà-ri-im lu-up-ta-ma ú mì-iš-li ša a-bi-a i-dí-IŠTAR ù en-na-num li-ta-dí-ú a-ba-ú-a bé-lu-a a-tù-nu ú ší-tí KÙ.BABBAR ša i É kà-ri-im i-ší-tù iḫ-da-ma ša-dí-na-šu-nu 4 ma-na KÙ.BABBAR ṣa-ru-pá-am a-ḫa-ma 1 ṭup-pu-um ša 1 ma-na KÙ.BABBAR i-na É i-<gap>
eng: one, by Alulaya son of Isalia. I received 1 mina 10 shekels of silver from Alulaya and <gap>-Šamaš. I deposited at the office of the colony as a half-share of our father 6 textiles, including Enah-ilī's textile. Write our father's name in the office of the colony for what you account for them, and then Iddin-Ištar and Ennānum may deposit my father's (other) half-share. My dear fathers and lords, also, the remainder of the silver, whatever is left in the office of the colony - take care to make them pay that! 4 minas of silver, further, 1 tablet concerning 1 mina of silver in the house of <gap>
transliteration: ḫa-pu-dim IGI a-lu-lá-a DUMU i-sá-li-a 1 ma-na 10 GÍN KÙ.BABBAR iš-tí a-lu-lá-a ù <gap>{d}UTU al-qé-ú 6 TÚG.ḪI.A qá-dum 1 TÚG ša e-na-aḫ-DINGIR i-dí-nu-ni a-na É kà-ri-im a-na mì-iš-li ša a-bi-ni a-dí-i ma-lá ta-az-me-ru-ni šu-mì a-bi-ni i-na É kà-ri-im lu-up-ta-ma ú mì-iš-li ša a-bi-a i-dí-IŠTAR ù en-na-num li-ta-dí-ú a-ba-ú-a bé-lu-a a-tù-nu ú ší-tí KÙ.BABBAR ša i É kà-ri-im i-ší-tù iḫ-da-ma ša-dí-na-šu-nu 4 ma-na KÙ.BABBAR ṣa-ru-pá-am a-ḫa-ma 1 ṭup-pu-um ša 1 ma-na KÙ.BABBAR i-na É i-<gap>
translation: one, by Alulaya son of Isalia. I received 1 mina 10 shekels of silver from Alulaya and <gap>-Šamaš. I deposited at the office of the colony as a half-share of our father 6 textiles, including Enah-ilī's textile. Write our father's name in the office of the colony for what you account for them, and then Iddin-Ištar and Ennānum may deposit my father's (other) half-share. My dear fathers and lords, also, the remainder of the silver, whatever is left in the office of the colony - take care to make them pay that! 4 minas of silver, further, 1 tablet concerning 1 mina of silver in the house of <gap>

akk: ni-kà-sí ma-aḫ-ri-ni i-dí-a-bu-um ù ša-lim-a-šùr i-sí-ú-ma a-na mu-lá 10 ma-na KÙ.GI ší-ip-kà-at i-sú-rik₁₃ ša a-na ša-lim-a-šùr ša-áp-ku É áš-du ù wa-ar-kà-sà i-dí-a-bu-um ki-ma i-sú-rik₁₃ a-na ša-lim-a-šùr i-dí-in É áš-du ù wa-ar-kà-sà ša ša-lim-a-šùr
eng: Iddin-abum and Šalim-Aššur settled accounts with us as witnesses. As compensation for 10 minas of gold, Issu-arik's investment that had been invested in Šalim-Aššur, Iddin-abum gave on behalf of Issu-arik Ašdu's house and its legacy to Šalim-Aššur. Ašdu's house and its legacy belongs to Šalim-Aššur.
transliteration: ni-kà-sí ma-aḫ-ri-ni i-dí-a-bu-um ù ša-lim-a-šùr i-sí-ú-ma a-na mu-lá 10 ma-na KÙ.GI ší-ip-kà-at i-sú-rik₁₃ ša a-na ša-lim-a-šùr ša-áp-ku É áš-du ù wa-ar-kà-sà i-dí-a-bu-um ki-ma i-sú-rik₁₃ a-na ša-lim-a-šùr i-dí-in É áš-du ù wa-ar-kà-sà ša ša-lim-a-šùr
translation: Iddin-abum and Šalim-Aššur settled accounts with us as witnesses. As compensation for 10 minas of gold, Issu-arik's investment that had been invested in Šalim-Aššur, Iddin-abum gave on behalf of Issu-arik Ašdu's house and its legacy to Šalim-Aššur. Ašdu's house and its legacy belongs to Šalim-Aššur.

akk: IGI lá-qé-ep IGI a-ku-za
eng: Witnessed by Lā-qēp, by Akuza.
transliteration: IGI lá-qé-ep IGI a-ku-za
translation: Witnessed by Lā-qēp, by Akuza.

akk: a-na a-wa-tim a-ni-a-tim kà-ru-um kà-ni-iš i-dí-ni-a-tí-ma IGI GÍR ša a-šùr ší-bu-tí-ni ni-dí-in
eng: § The Kanesh colony gave us for these proceedings and we gave our testimony before Aššur's dagger.
transliteration: a-na a-wa-tim a-ni-a-tim kà-ru-um kà-ni-iš i-dí-ni-a-tí-ma IGI GÍR ša a-šùr ší-bu-tí-ni ni-dí-in
translation: § The Kanesh colony gave us for these proceedings and we gave our testimony before Aššur's dagger.

akk: IGI en-na-nim DUMU a-lá-bi-im IGI a-šur-na-da DUMU ar-nu-id IGI kà-ta-tim DUMU ma-lá-ba IGI nu-ur-sú-in DUMU {d}MUŠ-mu-ta-bi-il₅ ù KIŠIB i-dí-sú-in DUMU i-ba-a-a
eng: Witnessed by Ennānum son of Ali-abum, by Aššur-nādā son of Irnuid, by Katātum son of Malaba, by Nūr-Suen son of Nirah-muttabbil, and sealed by Iddin-Suen son of Ibaya, the barber
transliteration: IGI en-na-nim DUMU a-lá-bi-im IGI a-šur-na-da DUMU ar-nu-id IGI kà-ta-tim DUMU ma-lá-ba IGI nu-ur-sú-in DUMU {d}MUŠ-mu-ta-bi-il₅ ù KIŠIB i-dí-sú-in DUMU i-ba-a-a
translation: Witnessed by Ennānum son of Ali-abum, by Aššur-nādā son of Irnuid, by Katātum son of Malaba, by Nūr-Suen son of Nirah-muttabbil, and sealed by Iddin-Suen son of Ibaya, the barber

akk: ŠU.ḪI
transliteration: ŠU.ḪI

akk: IGI a-šur-i-mì-tí IGI a-al-DU₁₀ IGI aḫ-ša-lim DUMU i-dí-IŠTAR
eng: Witnessed by Aššur-imittī, by Ali-ṭāb, by Ah-šalim son of Iddin-Ištar.
transliteration: IGI a-šur-i-mì-tí IGI a-al-DU₁₀ IGI aḫ-ša-lim DUMU i-dí-IŠTAR
translation: Witnessed by Aššur-imittī, by Ali-ṭāb, by Ah-šalim son of Iddin-Ištar.

akk: a-na lu-zi-na ù li-ip-ta-nim qí-bi₄-ma um-ma a-šur-GAL-ma a-na lu-zi-na qí-bi₄-ma 0.6666 ma-na 6.25 GÍN KÙ.BABBAR iš-tù li-mì-im šu-sú-in i-na li-bi-kà a-dí-i
eng: To Luzina and Lipit-Anum from Aššur-rabi; to Luzina: I placed 0.6666 mina 6 1 / 4 shekels of silver in your possession in the eponymy Šu-Suen.
transliteration: a-na lu-zi-na ù li-ip-ta-nim qí-bi₄-ma um-ma a-šur-GAL-ma a-na lu-zi-na qí-bi₄-ma 0.6666 ma-na 6.25 GÍN KÙ.BABBAR iš-tù li-mì-im šu-sú-in i-na li-bi-kà a-dí-i
translation: To Luzina and Lipit-Anum from Aššur-rabi; to Luzina: I placed 0.6666 mina 6 1 / 4 shekels of silver in your possession in the eponymy Šu-Suen.

akk: IGI a-šur-GAL DUMU a-sú-a IGI šu-sú-in
eng: Witnessed by Aššur-rabi son of Asuwa, Šu-Suen, your
transliteration: IGI a-šur-GAL DUMU a-sú-a IGI šu-sú-in
translation: Witnessed by Aššur-rabi son of Asuwa, Šu-Suen, your

akk: a-ḫi-kà IGI ša-lim-a-ḫi-im i-na É-tí-kà ni-kà-sí ni-sí KÙ.BABBAR a-na li-ip-ta-nim dí-in-ma ší-ma-am ša ba-lá-ṭí-a li-il₅-qé-am ḫa-nu-nu ṣa-áb-ta-ma 1 ma-na 1 GÍN KÙ.BABBAR ša-áš-qí-lá-šu ú-mu-šu ma-al-ú
eng: brother, and Šalim-ahum we settled accounts in your house. Give the silver to Lipit-Anum and let him acquire a profitable purchase for me. Seize hanunu and have him pay 1 mina 1 shekel of silver. His terms are complete.
transliteration: a-ḫi-kà IGI ša-lim-a-ḫi-im i-na É-tí-kà ni-kà-sí ni-sí KÙ.BABBAR a-na li-ip-ta-nim dí-in-ma ší-ma-am ša ba-lá-ṭí-a li-il₅-qé-am ḫa-nu-nu ṣa-áb-ta-ma 1 ma-na 1 GÍN KÙ.BABBAR ša-áš-qí-lá-šu ú-mu-šu ma-al-ú
translation: brother, and Šalim-ahum we settled accounts in your house. Give the silver to Lipit-Anum and let him acquire a profitable purchase for me. Seize hanunu and have him pay 1 mina 1 shekel of silver. His terms are complete.

akk: IGI a-šùr-ba-ni IGI lá-qé-ep
eng: Witnessed by Aššur-bāni, by Lā-qēp.
transliteration: IGI a-šùr-ba-ni IGI lá-qé-ep
translation: Witnessed by Aššur-bāni, by Lā-qēp.

akk: <gap> ú a-lá-ḫi-im iš-tù ḫa-muš-tim ša i-tur₄-DINGIR ITU.KAM ma-ḫu-ur-ì-lí li-mu-um e-na-sú-in iš-qú-lu-nim
eng: <gap> and Ali-ahum. Reckoned from the week of Itūr-ilī, month Mahhur-ilī, in the eponymy Enna-Suen, they paid me.
transliteration: <gap> ú a-lá-ḫi-im iš-tù ḫa-muš-tim ša i-tur₄-DINGIR ITU.KAM ma-ḫu-ur-ì-lí li-mu-um e-na-sú-in iš-qú-lu-nim
translation: <gap> and Ali-ahum. Reckoned from the week of Itūr-ilī, month Mahhur-ilī, in the eponymy Enna-Suen, they paid me.

akk: IGI a-ḫu-qar DUMU šu-IŠTAR IGI a-šur-du-gul DUMU pì-lá-aḫ-IŠTAR IGI a-ni-na DUMU MAN-a-na
eng: Witnessed by Ahu-waqar son of Šu-Ištar, by Aššur-dugul son of Pilah-Ištar, by Annina son of Puzur-Anna.
transliteration: IGI a-ḫu-qar DUMU šu-IŠTAR IGI a-šur-du-gul DUMU pì-lá-aḫ-IŠTAR IGI a-ni-na DUMU MAN-a-na
translation: Witnessed by Ahu-waqar son of Šu-Ištar, by Aššur-dugul son of Pilah-Ištar, by Annina son of Puzur-Anna.

akk: 1 ma-na KÙ.BABBAR <gap> 4 TÚG ku-ta-ni <gap> ni-ik-na-<gap> KÙ.BABBAR a-ḫa-ma <gap> 2 GÍN KÙ.BABBAR <gap> ša áb-na-tim kà-ú-nam <gap> áb-na-tim <gap> uk-ta-in <gap> KÙ.BABBAR i-za-az <gap> ŠU.NÍGIN 1 ma-na 2 GÍN KÙ.BABBAR i li-bi <gap>
eng: 1 mina of silver <gap> 4 kutānu-textiles <gap> silver; further, 2 shekels of silver <gap> of the stones confirm <gap> He has confirmed the stones. The silver stands ready. In all: 1 mina 2 shekels of silver is owed by <gap>
transliteration: 1 ma-na KÙ.BABBAR <gap> 4 TÚG ku-ta-ni <gap> ni-ik-na-<gap> KÙ.BABBAR a-ḫa-ma <gap> 2 GÍN KÙ.BABBAR <gap> ša áb-na-tim kà-ú-nam <gap> áb-na-tim <gap> uk-ta-in <gap> KÙ.BABBAR i-za-az <gap> ŠU.NÍGIN 1 ma-na 2 GÍN KÙ.BABBAR i li-bi <gap>
translation: 1 mina of silver <gap> 4 kutānu-textiles <gap> silver; further, 2 shekels of silver <gap> of the stones confirm <gap> He has confirmed the stones. The silver stands ready. In all: 1 mina 2 shekels of silver is owed by <gap>

akk: IGI pì-lá-aḫ-<gap> IGI a-šur-na-da
eng: Witnessed by Pilah-<gap>, by Aššur-nādā.
transliteration: IGI pì-lá-aḫ-<gap> IGI a-šur-na-da
translation: Witnessed by Pilah-<gap>, by Aššur-nādā.

akk: šu-ma KÙ.BABBAR a-na <gap> lá iš-ta-qá-al <gap> iš-tù ḫa-mu-uš-tim ša a-šur-be-el-a-wa-tim 1 ma-na-um 3 GÍN.TA ṣí-ib-tám ú-ṣa-áb i-na ITU.KAM a-ma-nu-šu-um
eng: If he has not paid the silver in <gap> I shall count interest for him reckoned from the week of Aššur-bēl-awātim at the rate 3 shekels per mina per month.
transliteration: šu-ma KÙ.BABBAR a-na <gap> lá iš-ta-qá-al <gap> iš-tù ḫa-mu-uš-tim ša a-šur-be-el-a-wa-tim 1 ma-na-um 3 GÍN.TA ṣí-ib-tám ú-ṣa-áb i-na ITU.KAM a-ma-nu-šu-um
translation: If he has not paid the silver in <gap> I shall count interest for him reckoned from the week of Aššur-bēl-awātim at the rate 3 shekels per mina per month.

akk: <gap>-bi i-ṣé-er <gap>-ší-a a-lá-ḫu-um i-šu a-na ḫa-ar-pè-e a-ni-ú-tim i-ša-qal
eng: <gap>šia owes <gap> to Ali-ahum. He will pay at this (coming) harvest.
transliteration: <gap>-bi i-ṣé-er <gap>-ší-a a-lá-ḫu-um i-šu a-na ḫa-ar-pè-e a-ni-ú-tim i-ša-qal
translation: <gap>šia owes <gap> to Ali-ahum. He will pay at this (coming) harvest.

akk: IGI wa-al-dí-DINGIR
eng: Witnessed by Waldi-ilum.
transliteration: IGI wa-al-dí-DINGIR
translation: Witnessed by Waldi-ilum.

akk: IGI i-ku-pì-a DUMU ili₅-mì-šar IGI ba-ba-lá DUMU a-šur-DU₁₀ IGI a-šur-DU₁₀ DUMU ḫu-ra-ṣa-nim
eng: Witnessed by Ikūn-pīya son of Ilī-mīšar, by Babala son of Aššur-ṭāb, by Aššur-ṭāb son of huraṣānum.
transliteration: IGI i-ku-pì-a DUMU ili₅-mì-šar IGI ba-ba-lá DUMU a-šur-DU₁₀ IGI a-šur-DU₁₀ DUMU ḫu-ra-ṣa-nim
translation: Witnessed by Ikūn-pīya son of Ilī-mīšar, by Babala son of Aššur-ṭāb, by Aššur-ṭāb son of huraṣānum.

akk: i-nu-mì i-dí-a-bu-um a-na mu-a-tim ta-ad-nu-ma É a-šùr-be-el-a-wa-tim wa-áš-bu ša ki-ma ili₅-ba-ni ÌR ù DAM.GÀR-ru-šu e-ru-bu-ma um-ma ša ki-ma ili₅-ba-ni-ma ni-kà-sí iš-tí-ni ší-sí um-ma i-dí-a-bu-um-ma ṭup-pí-ku-nu kà-i-lá ù ṭup-pu-a lá-pu-tù-ma i-ba-ší-ú ša-lim-a-šùr a-ḫi li-li-kam-ma iš-tí-šu ší-sí-a ù am-ma ša ki-ma i-a-tí šu-{d}EN.LÍL ù a-mur-IŠTAR i-ša-ḫa-at a-ḫi-a li-zi-zu a-dí a-ḫi i-lá-kà-ni ma-ma-an ṭup-pí-a lá i-pá-té a-na a-wa-tim a-ni-a-tim kà-ru-um kà-ni-iš i-dí-ni-a-tí-ma IGI GÍR ša a-šùr i ba-áb DINGIR-lim ṭup-pá-am ni-dí-in
eng: When Iddin-abum was dying and was staying in Aššur-bēl-awātim's house, the representatives of Ilī-bāni, Wardum and his customers, came in(to the house) and Ilī-bāni's representatives said: Settle accounts with us!" - but Iddin-abum answered: "Keep your tablets, for my tablets are written and available. Let my brother Šalim-Aššur come, and then settle with him. Then my own representatives, Šu-Illil and Amur-Ištar may assist my brother. Until my brother arrives no one may open my tablets." The Kanesh colony gave us for these proceedings, and we gave our testimony before Aššur's dagger in the Gate of the God.
transliteration: i-nu-mì i-dí-a-bu-um a-na mu-a-tim ta-ad-nu-ma É a-šùr-be-el-a-wa-tim wa-áš-bu ša ki-ma ili₅-ba-ni ÌR ù DAM.GÀR-ru-šu e-ru-bu-ma um-ma ša ki-ma ili₅-ba-ni-ma ni-kà-sí iš-tí-ni ší-sí um-ma i-dí-a-bu-um-ma ṭup-pí-ku-nu kà-i-lá ù ṭup-pu-a lá-pu-tù-ma i-ba-ší-ú ša-lim-a-šùr a-ḫi li-li-kam-ma iš-tí-šu ší-sí-a ù am-ma ša ki-ma i-a-tí šu-{d}EN.LÍL ù a-mur-IŠTAR i-ša-ḫa-at a-ḫi-a li-zi-zu a-dí a-ḫi i-lá-kà-ni ma-ma-an ṭup-pí-a lá i-pá-té a-na a-wa-tim a-ni-a-tim kà-ru-um kà-ni-iš i-dí-ni-a-tí-ma IGI GÍR ša a-šùr i ba-áb DINGIR-lim ṭup-pá-am ni-dí-in
translation: When Iddin-abum was dying and was staying in Aššur-bēl-awātim's house, the representatives of Ilī-bāni, Wardum and his customers, came in(to the house) and Ilī-bāni's representatives said: Settle accounts with us!" - but Iddin-abum answered: "Keep your tablets, for my tablets are written and available. Let my brother Šalim-Aššur come, and then settle with him. Then my own representatives, Šu-Illil and Amur-Ištar may assist my brother. Until my brother arrives no one may open my tablets." The Kanesh colony gave us for these proceedings, and we gave our testimony before Aššur's dagger in the Gate of the God.

akk: IGI a-ku-za IGI lá-qé-ep IGI ṣí-lu-lu
eng: Witnessed by Akuza, by Lā-qēp, by Ṣilūlu."
transliteration: IGI a-ku-za IGI lá-qé-ep IGI ṣí-lu-lu
translation: Witnessed by Akuza, by Lā-qēp, by Ṣilūlu."

akk: 4 GÍN KÙ.BABBAR li-tí i-ṣé-er a-šur-ta-ak-lá-ku DUMU a-a-a šu-be-lúm i-šu iš-tù ḫa-mu-uš-tim ša a-šur-ta-ak-lá-ku ù e-me-me a-na ITU.KAM i-ša-qal šu-ma i-na ú-mì-šu ma-al-ú-tim lá iš-qúl 22.5 ŠE KÙ.BABBAR i-na ITU.KAM ú-ṣa-áb li-mu-um a-šur-na-da
eng: 4 shekels of -silver Aššur-taklāku son of A'aya owes to Šu-Bēlum. Reckoned from the week of Aššur-taklāku and Ememe he will pay within a month. If he does not pay when his term is due he will add 1 / 8 shekel of silver per month. Year eponymy of Aššur-nādā.
transliteration: 4 GÍN KÙ.BABBAR li-tí i-ṣé-er a-šur-ta-ak-lá-ku DUMU a-a-a šu-be-lúm i-šu iš-tù ḫa-mu-uš-tim ša a-šur-ta-ak-lá-ku ù e-me-me a-na ITU.KAM i-ša-qal šu-ma i-na ú-mì-šu ma-al-ú-tim lá iš-qúl 22.5 ŠE KÙ.BABBAR i-na ITU.KAM ú-ṣa-áb li-mu-um a-šur-na-da
translation: 4 shekels of -silver Aššur-taklāku son of A'aya owes to Šu-Bēlum. Reckoned from the week of Aššur-taklāku and Ememe he will pay within a month. If he does not pay when his term is due he will add 1 / 8 shekel of silver per month. Year eponymy of Aššur-nādā.

akk: IGI a-šur-i-dí
eng: Witnessed by Aššur-idī.
transliteration: IGI a-šur-i-dí
translation: Witnessed by Aššur-idī.

akk: IGI id-na-a DUMU i-ba-a IGI <gap>-a-šur DUMU a-šur-i-mì-tí
eng: Witnessed by Idnaya son of Ibaya, by <gap> son of Aššur-imittī."
transliteration: IGI id-na-a DUMU i-ba-a IGI <gap>-a-šur DUMU a-šur-i-mì-tí
translation: Witnessed by Idnaya son of Ibaya, by <gap> son of Aššur-imittī."

akk: i-dí-a-bu-um É-tí ša bu-ri-im a-šar ša-lim-a-šùr wa-áš-bu iš-tí tù-ud-ḫa-li-a a-ḫu tù-li iš-a-am a-na a-wa-tim a-ni-a-tim kà-ru-um kà-ni-iš i-dí-ni-a-tí-ma ṭup-pá-am ší-bu-tí-ni IGI GÍR ša a-šùr ni-dí-in
eng: Iddin-abum has bought the houses by the well, where Šalim-Aššur is living, from Tudhiliya the brother of Tuli. The Kanesh colony gave us for these proceedings, and we gave a tablet with our testimony before the dagger of Aššur.
transliteration: i-dí-a-bu-um É-tí ša bu-ri-im a-šar ša-lim-a-šùr wa-áš-bu iš-tí tù-ud-ḫa-li-a a-ḫu tù-li iš-a-am a-na a-wa-tim a-ni-a-tim kà-ru-um kà-ni-iš i-dí-ni-a-tí-ma ṭup-pá-am ší-bu-tí-ni IGI GÍR ša a-šùr ni-dí-in
translation: Iddin-abum has bought the houses by the well, where Šalim-Aššur is living, from Tudhiliya the brother of Tuli. The Kanesh colony gave us for these proceedings, and we gave a tablet with our testimony before the dagger of Aššur.

akk: IGI a-ku-za IGI ú-ra-a IGI a-šùr-ba-ni
eng: Witnessed by Akuza, by Uraya, by Aššur-bāni.
transliteration: IGI a-ku-za IGI ú-ra-a IGI a-šùr-ba-ni
translation: Witnessed by Akuza, by Uraya, by Aššur-bāni.

akk: 17 ma-na LÁ 7.5 GÍN i-ṣé-er na-áb-sú-en i-sú-rik₁₃ i-šu iš-tù ḫa-mu-uš-tim ša sú-kà-li-a a-na 13 ḫa-am-ša-tim KÙ.BABBAR i-ša-qal KÙ.BABBAR ù KÙ.GI i-na bi-ti-a i-ba-ší
eng: Nab-Suen owes 17 minas less 7.5 shekels (of silver) to Issu-arik. Reckoned from the week of Sukkalliya he must pay the silver in 13 weeks. The silver and gold is in my house.
transliteration: 17 ma-na LÁ 7.5 GÍN i-ṣé-er na-áb-sú-en i-sú-rik₁₃ i-šu iš-tù ḫa-mu-uš-tim ša sú-kà-li-a a-na 13 ḫa-am-ša-tim KÙ.BABBAR i-ša-qal KÙ.BABBAR ù KÙ.GI i-na bi-ti-a i-ba-ší
translation: Nab-Suen owes 17 minas less 7.5 shekels (of silver) to Issu-arik. Reckoned from the week of Sukkalliya he must pay the silver in 13 weeks. The silver and gold is in my house.

akk: IGI en-nam-a-a IGI en-nam-a-šur DUMU da-da IGI a-šur-na-da DUMU a-mur-lu-ṣú
eng: Witnessed by Ennamaya, by Ennam-Aššur son of Dada, by Aššur-nādā son of Amur-luṣu.
transliteration: IGI en-nam-a-a IGI en-nam-a-šur DUMU da-da IGI a-šur-na-da DUMU a-mur-lu-ṣú
translation: Witnessed by Ennamaya, by Ennam-Aššur son of Dada, by Aššur-nādā son of Amur-luṣu.

akk: en-um-a-šùr a-na a-lá-ḫi-im iṣ-ba-at-ni-a-tí-ma ṭup-pá-am na-áš-pé-er-tám la pá-tí-tám ú-kà-li-im-šu-ma um-ma en-um-a-šùr-ma ṭup-pu-um a-num ku-nu-ku-kà-a lá ku-nu-ku-kà-a a-lá-ḫu-um iš-ta-al-ma e-pu-ul-šu um-ma a-lá-ḫu-um-ma ke-na ku-nu-ku-a a-na ša ki-ma a-bi₄-ni ša ki-ma i-a-tí ú ku-a-tí ú-šé-bi₄-il₅-kà-ma mì-šu-um lá tù-kà-li-im-ší-ma a-dí u₄-mì-im a-nim tù-kà-il₅-ší na-áš-pé-er-tám lá pá-tí-tám en-um-a-šur a qá-tí-ni iš-ku-un a-na a-wa-tim a-ni-a-tim kà-ru-um kà-ni-iš i-dí-in-ni-a-tí-ma IGI GÍR ša a-šur ší-bu-tí-ni ni-dí-in
eng: Ennam-Aššur seized us against Ali-ahum and showed him a missive that was not opened, and Ennam-Aššur said: Is this tablet under your seal or not?" Ali-ahum answered, having investigated it, saying: "Yes, it is my seal. I sent it with you to our father's representatives and my own and yours, so why have you not shown it but kept it until today?" Ennam-Aššur placed the unopened missive in our hands. The Kanesh colony gave us for these proceedings and we gave our testimony before Aššur's dagger.
transliteration: en-um-a-šùr a-na a-lá-ḫi-im iṣ-ba-at-ni-a-tí-ma ṭup-pá-am na-áš-pé-er-tám la pá-tí-tám ú-kà-li-im-šu-ma um-ma en-um-a-šùr-ma ṭup-pu-um a-num ku-nu-ku-kà-a lá ku-nu-ku-kà-a a-lá-ḫu-um iš-ta-al-ma e-pu-ul-šu um-ma a-lá-ḫu-um-ma ke-na ku-nu-ku-a a-na ša ki-ma a-bi₄-ni ša ki-ma i-a-tí ú ku-a-tí ú-šé-bi₄-il₅-kà-ma mì-šu-um lá tù-kà-li-im-ší-ma a-dí u₄-mì-im a-nim tù-kà-il₅-ší na-áš-pé-er-tám lá pá-tí-tám en-um-a-šur a qá-tí-ni iš-ku-un a-na a-wa-tim a-ni-a-tim kà-ru-um kà-ni-iš i-dí-in-ni-a-tí-ma IGI GÍR ša a-šur ší-bu-tí-ni ni-dí-in
translation: Ennam-Aššur seized us against Ali-ahum and showed him a missive that was not opened, and Ennam-Aššur said: Is this tablet under your seal or not?" Ali-ahum answered, having investigated it, saying: "Yes, it is my seal. I sent it with you to our father's representatives and my own and yours, so why have you not shown it but kept it until today?" Ennam-Aššur placed the unopened missive in our hands. The Kanesh colony gave us for these proceedings and we gave our testimony before Aššur's dagger.

akk: IGI a-šur-na-da IGI ḫa-da-a IGI šu-IŠTAR
eng: Witnessed by Aššur-nādā, by hadaya, by Šu-Ištar."
transliteration: IGI a-šur-na-da IGI ḫa-da-a IGI šu-IŠTAR
translation: Witnessed by Aššur-nādā, by hadaya, by Šu-Ištar."

akk: ir-ma-a-šùr DUMU ni-dí-ba-ni PUZUR₄-a-šùr iṣ-ba-at-ma um-ma PUZUR₄-a-šur-ma a-na ir-ma-a-šùr-ma a-ma a-wi-lu-ú a-ni-ú-tum lu i-de₈-ú a-na 1 ma-na KÙ.BABBAR ša i tí-me-el-ki-a en-nam-a-šùr qá-ta-at a-mur-IŠTAR il₅-tap-tù-ni a-na en-nam-a-šur lá ta-tù-wa-ar um-ma ir-ma-a-šùr-ma lá a-tù-wa-ar
eng: Puzur-Aššur seized Irma-Aššur son of Nide-bāni and Puzur-Aššur said to Irma-Aššur: Look, may these men know that you must not raise claim against Ennam-Aššur for the 1 mina of silver for which Ennam-Aššur was booked as guarantor in Timelkiya for Amur-Ištar." Irma-Aššur answered: "I shall not raise claim."
transliteration: ir-ma-a-šùr DUMU ni-dí-ba-ni PUZUR₄-a-šùr iṣ-ba-at-ma um-ma PUZUR₄-a-šur-ma a-na ir-ma-a-šùr-ma a-ma a-wi-lu-ú a-ni-ú-tum lu i-de₈-ú a-na 1 ma-na KÙ.BABBAR ša i tí-me-el-ki-a en-nam-a-šùr qá-ta-at a-mur-IŠTAR il₅-tap-tù-ni a-na en-nam-a-šur lá ta-tù-wa-ar um-ma ir-ma-a-šùr-ma lá a-tù-wa-ar
translation: Puzur-Aššur seized Irma-Aššur son of Nide-bāni and Puzur-Aššur said to Irma-Aššur: Look, may these men know that you must not raise claim against Ennam-Aššur for the 1 mina of silver for which Ennam-Aššur was booked as guarantor in Timelkiya for Amur-Ištar." Irma-Aššur answered: "I shall not raise claim."

akk: IGI šu-IŠTAR DUMU da-da-nim IGI šu-ku-bi₄-im DUMU ú-zu-ú-a
eng: Witnessed by Šu-Ištar son of Dadānum, by Šu-Kūbum son of Uzuwa."
transliteration: IGI šu-IŠTAR DUMU da-da-nim IGI šu-ku-bi₄-im DUMU ú-zu-ú-a
translation: Witnessed by Šu-Ištar son of Dadānum, by Šu-Kūbum son of Uzuwa."

akk: i-nu-mì i-dí-a-bu-um a-na mu-a-tim ta-ad-nu-ma É a-šùr-bé-el-a-wa-tim wa-áš-bu ša ki-ma ili₅-ba-ni ÌR ù tám-kà-ru-šu e-ru-bu-ma um-ma ša ki-ma ili₅-ba-ni-ma ni-kà-sí iš-tí-ni ší-sí-ma um-ma i-dí-a-bu-um-ma ṭup-pí-ku-nu kà-i-lá ù ṭup-pu-a lá-pu-tù-ma i-ba-ší-ú ša-lim-a-šur a-ḫi li-li-kam-ma iš-tí-šu ší-sí-a ù am-ma ša ki-ma i-a-tí šu-{d}EN.LÍL ù a-mur-IŠTAR i-ša-ḫa-at a-ḫi-a li-zi-zu a-dí a-ḫi-i i-lá-kà-ni ma-ma-an ṭup-pí-a lá i-pá-té a-na a-wa-tim a-ni-a-tim kà-ru-um kà-ni-iš i-dí-ni-a-tí-ma IGI GÍR ša a-šùr ba-áb DINGIR-lim ší-bu-tí-ni ni-dí-in
eng: When Iddin-abum was dying and was staying in Aššur-bēl-awātim's house, the representatives of Ilī-bāni, Wardum and his customers, came in(to the house) and Ilī-bāni's representatives said: Settle accounts with us!" - but Iddin-abum answered: "Hold your tablets ready, for my tablets are written and available. Let my brother Šalim-Aššur come, and then settle with him. Then my own representatives, Šu-Illil and Amur-Ištar may assist my brother. Until my brother arrives no one may open my tablets." The Kanesh colony gave us for these proceedings, and we gave our testimony before Aššur's dagger in the Gate of the God.
transliteration: i-nu-mì i-dí-a-bu-um a-na mu-a-tim ta-ad-nu-ma É a-šùr-bé-el-a-wa-tim wa-áš-bu ša ki-ma ili₅-ba-ni ÌR ù tám-kà-ru-šu e-ru-bu-ma um-ma ša ki-ma ili₅-ba-ni-ma ni-kà-sí iš-tí-ni ší-sí-ma um-ma i-dí-a-bu-um-ma ṭup-pí-ku-nu kà-i-lá ù ṭup-pu-a lá-pu-tù-ma i-ba-ší-ú ša-lim-a-šur a-ḫi li-li-kam-ma iš-tí-šu ší-sí-a ù am-ma ša ki-ma i-a-tí šu-{d}EN.LÍL ù a-mur-IŠTAR i-ša-ḫa-at a-ḫi-a li-zi-zu a-dí a-ḫi-i i-lá-kà-ni ma-ma-an ṭup-pí-a lá i-pá-té a-na a-wa-tim a-ni-a-tim kà-ru-um kà-ni-iš i-dí-ni-a-tí-ma IGI GÍR ša a-šùr ba-áb DINGIR-lim ší-bu-tí-ni ni-dí-in
translation: When Iddin-abum was dying and was staying in Aššur-bēl-awātim's house, the representatives of Ilī-bāni, Wardum and his customers, came in(to the house) and Ilī-bāni's representatives said: Settle accounts with us!" - but Iddin-abum answered: "Hold your tablets ready, for my tablets are written and available. Let my brother Šalim-Aššur come, and then settle with him. Then my own representatives, Šu-Illil and Amur-Ištar may assist my brother. Until my brother arrives no one may open my tablets." The Kanesh colony gave us for these proceedings, and we gave our testimony before Aššur's dagger in the Gate of the God.

akk: IGI a-ku-za IGI lá-qé-ep IGI ṣí-lu-lu
eng: Witnessed by Akuza, by Lā-qēp, by Ṣilūlu."
transliteration: IGI a-ku-za IGI lá-qé-ep IGI ṣí-lu-lu
translation: Witnessed by Akuza, by Lā-qēp, by Ṣilūlu."

akk: 13 ma-na KÙ.BABBAR ṣa-ru-pá-am i-ṣé-er i-dí-a-bi₄-im a-mur-IŠTAR ù a-šur-i-mì-tí i-šu-ú iš-tù ḫa-mu-uš-tim ša kàr-ri-a a-na 36 ḫa-am-ša-tim i-ša-qal šu-ma la iš-qú-ul 1.5 GÍN.TA i-na ITU.KAM-im a-na ma-na-im ú-ṣa-áb
eng: Iddin-abum owes 13 minas of refined silver to Amur-Ištar and Aššur-imittī. Reckoned from the week of Karriya he must pay in 36 weeks. If he has not paid (in time), he must add interest at the rate 1.5 shekel per month per mina.
transliteration: 13 ma-na KÙ.BABBAR ṣa-ru-pá-am i-ṣé-er i-dí-a-bi₄-im a-mur-IŠTAR ù a-šur-i-mì-tí i-šu-ú iš-tù ḫa-mu-uš-tim ša kàr-ri-a a-na 36 ḫa-am-ša-tim i-ša-qal šu-ma la iš-qú-ul 1.5 GÍN.TA i-na ITU.KAM-im a-na ma-na-im ú-ṣa-áb
translation: Iddin-abum owes 13 minas of refined silver to Amur-Ištar and Aššur-imittī. Reckoned from the week of Karriya he must pay in 36 weeks. If he has not paid (in time), he must add interest at the rate 1.5 shekel per month per mina.

akk: IGI a-šur-e-mu-qí IGI en-nam-a-šur DUMU me-na-a
eng: Witnessed by Aššur-emūqi, by Ennam-Aššur son of Menaya.
transliteration: IGI a-šur-e-mu-qí IGI en-nam-a-šur DUMU me-na-a
translation: Witnessed by Aššur-emūqi, by Ennam-Aššur son of Menaya.

akk: 20 ma-na URUDU SIG₅ i ší-im ku-uk-ra i-ri-iḫ-ma i-ṣé-er {d}UTU-a-bi lá-ma-sà-tum tí-šu iš-tù ḫa-mu-uš-tim ša e-na-aḫ-DINGIR a-na 10 ḫa-am-ša-tim i-ša-qal šu-ma lá iš-qú-ul ku-uk-ra am-tum am-tí ITU.KAM té-i-na-tim li-mu-um šu-sú-in DUMU ba-bi₄-lim
eng: 20 minas of refined copper that remained from the price for Kukra are owed by Šamaš-abī to Lamassutum. From the week eponymy of Ēnah-ilī within 10 weeks he will pay. If he does not pay the slave-girl Kukra is my slave-girl. Month X, year eponymy of Šu-Suen, son of Babbilum.
transliteration: 20 ma-na URUDU SIG₅ i ší-im ku-uk-ra i-ri-iḫ-ma i-ṣé-er {d}UTU-a-bi lá-ma-sà-tum tí-šu iš-tù ḫa-mu-uš-tim ša e-na-aḫ-DINGIR a-na 10 ḫa-am-ša-tim i-ša-qal šu-ma lá iš-qú-ul ku-uk-ra am-tum am-tí ITU.KAM té-i-na-tim li-mu-um šu-sú-in DUMU ba-bi₄-lim
translation: 20 minas of refined copper that remained from the price for Kukra are owed by Šamaš-abī to Lamassutum. From the week eponymy of Ēnah-ilī within 10 weeks he will pay. If he does not pay the slave-girl Kukra is my slave-girl. Month X, year eponymy of Šu-Suen, son of Babbilum.

akk: IGI a-šur-ni-im-ri IGI be-lá-nim IGI a-mur-a-šur
eng: Witnessed by Aššur-nimrī, by Bēlānum, by Amur-Aššur.
transliteration: IGI a-šur-ni-im-ri IGI be-lá-nim IGI a-mur-a-šur
translation: Witnessed by Aššur-nimrī, by Bēlānum, by Amur-Aššur.

akk: IGI a-šùr-ma-lik IGI a-lá-ḫi-im IGI a-mur-IŠTAR IGI a-gu-a
eng: Witnessed by Aššur-malik, by Alāhum, by Amur-Ištar, by Aguwa.
transliteration: IGI a-šùr-ma-lik IGI a-lá-ḫi-im IGI a-mur-IŠTAR IGI a-gu-a
translation: Witnessed by Aššur-malik, by Alāhum, by Amur-Ištar, by Aguwa.

akk: a-ni-na a-na be-lá-nim iṣ-ba-at-ni-a-tí-ma um-ma be-lá-num-ma 5.5 ma-na KÙ.BABBAR ku-nu-ki-ni ša ki-lá-li-ni ša a-na {d}IM-ba-ni ú ib-ni-{d}IM a-na-<gap> A-ni-na ša KÙ.BABBAR KÙ.BABBAR-áp a-ni-na-<gap>
eng: Annina seized us against Bēlānum and Bēlānum said: 5.5 minas of silver under our seals, belonging to us both, that <gap> to Adad-bāni and Ibni-Adad to <gap> Annina <gap> Annina's silver <gap>
transliteration: a-ni-na a-na be-lá-nim iṣ-ba-at-ni-a-tí-ma um-ma be-lá-num-ma 5.5 ma-na KÙ.BABBAR ku-nu-ki-ni ša ki-lá-li-ni ša a-na {d}IM-ba-ni ú ib-ni-{d}IM a-na-<gap> A-ni-na ša KÙ.BABBAR KÙ.BABBAR-áp a-ni-na-<gap>
translation: Annina seized us against Bēlānum and Bēlānum said: 5.5 minas of silver under our seals, belonging to us both, that <gap> to Adad-bāni and Ibni-Adad to <gap> Annina <gap> Annina's silver <gap>

akk: IGI a-lá-ḫi-im DUMU ša-lim-a-šùr
eng: Witnessed by Ali-ahum son of Šalim-Aššur."
transliteration: IGI a-lá-ḫi-im DUMU ša-lim-a-šùr
translation: Witnessed by Ali-ahum son of Šalim-Aššur."

akk: IGI e-lá-ma DUMU i-dí-sú-in IGI ku-lá a-ḫu šu-kà-tim IGI ki-da
eng: Witnessed by Elamma son of Iddin-Suen, by Kula the brother of Šukkutum, by Kida.
transliteration: IGI e-lá-ma DUMU i-dí-sú-in IGI ku-lá a-ḫu šu-kà-tim IGI ki-da
translation: Witnessed by Elamma son of Iddin-Suen, by Kula the brother of Šukkutum, by Kida.

akk: 10 ma-na KÙ.BABBAR ṣa-ru-pá-am tù-ur-a-a DUMU ú-zu-a i-na ší-im SÍG.ḪI.A ša ú-ší-na-lam il₅-qé
eng: Tūraya son of Uzuwa has received 10 minas of refined silver from the proceeds of Ušinalam's wool.
transliteration: 10 ma-na KÙ.BABBAR ṣa-ru-pá-am tù-ur-a-a DUMU ú-zu-a i-na ší-im SÍG.ḪI.A ša ú-ší-na-lam il₅-qé
translation: Tūraya son of Uzuwa has received 10 minas of refined silver from the proceeds of Ušinalam's wool.

akk: IGI a-šùr-i-mì-tí DUMU du-dí-ki IGI en-na-sú-in IGI a-šùr-e-mu-qí DUMU i-ku-nim IGI a-šùr-DU₁₀ DUMU en-na-sú-in DUMU za-li-dí
eng: Witnessed by Aššur-imittī son of Dudiki, by Enna-Suen, by Aššur-emūqī son of Ikūnum, by Aššur-ṭāb son of Enna-Suen, (grand)son of Zalidī.
transliteration: IGI a-šùr-i-mì-tí DUMU du-dí-ki IGI en-na-sú-in IGI a-šùr-e-mu-qí DUMU i-ku-nim IGI a-šùr-DU₁₀ DUMU en-na-sú-in DUMU za-li-dí
translation: Witnessed by Aššur-imittī son of Dudiki, by Enna-Suen, by Aššur-emūqī son of Ikūnum, by Aššur-ṭāb son of Enna-Suen, (grand)son of Zalidī.

akk: 17 ma-na KÙ.BABBAR ša PUZUR₄.IŠTAR lu a-na DAM.GÀR nu-a-e ù IŠTAR-lá-ma-sí DAM a-lá-ḫi-im DUMU šál-ma-a-šur ḫa-bu-lu-ni-ma ṭup-pu-šu ḫa-ar-mu-ni iš-tù ḫa-mu-uš-tim ša ḫa-na-na-ri-im ITU.KAM áb ša-ra-ni li-mu-um en-na-sú-in DUMU šu-a-šur KÙ.BABBAR i-za-az a-na ṣí-ib-tim ú-lá i-lá-ak <gap> MU.ŠÈ ma-lá <gap> a-na <gap> zi <gap> tim lu <gap> zi a-šé-e-šu i-na u₄-mì-im ša ṭup-pá-am ša ḫu-bu-ul PUZUR₄.IŠTAR a-na ša ki-ma PUZUR₄-a-šùr ú-kà-lu-mu-ni šu-ma KÙ.BABBAR ša ki-ma PUZUR₄-a-šùr lá iš-ta-aq-lu KÙ.BABBAR a ma-lá ṭup-pì-šu a-na ṣí-ib-tim i-lá-ak šu-IŠTAR ki-ma IŠTAR-lá-ma-sí i-zi-iz
eng: As to the 17 minas of silver that Puzur-Ištar owes either to a merchant, to Anatolians or to Ištar-lamassī, wife of Ali-ahum son of Šalim-Aššur, and for which a tablet has been certified - from the week of hannan-nārum, month Ab-šarrāni in the eponymy of Enna-Suen son of Šu-Aššur the silver will stand; it will not draw interest. years <gap> I shall sue him. On the day that they show the tablet concerning Puzur-Ištar's debt to Puzur-Aššur's representatives have not paid the silver, then the silver draws interest in accordance with his tablet. Šu-Ištar represented Ištar-lamassī.
transliteration: 17 ma-na KÙ.BABBAR ša PUZUR₄.IŠTAR lu a-na DAM.GÀR nu-a-e ù IŠTAR-lá-ma-sí DAM a-lá-ḫi-im DUMU šál-ma-a-šur ḫa-bu-lu-ni-ma ṭup-pu-šu ḫa-ar-mu-ni iš-tù ḫa-mu-uš-tim ša ḫa-na-na-ri-im ITU.KAM áb ša-ra-ni li-mu-um en-na-sú-in DUMU šu-a-šur KÙ.BABBAR i-za-az a-na ṣí-ib-tim ú-lá i-lá-ak <gap> MU.ŠÈ ma-lá <gap> a-na <gap> zi <gap> tim lu <gap> zi a-šé-e-šu i-na u₄-mì-im ša ṭup-pá-am ša ḫu-bu-ul PUZUR₄.IŠTAR a-na ša ki-ma PUZUR₄-a-šùr ú-kà-lu-mu-ni šu-ma KÙ.BABBAR ša ki-ma PUZUR₄-a-šùr lá iš-ta-aq-lu KÙ.BABBAR a ma-lá ṭup-pì-šu a-na ṣí-ib-tim i-lá-ak šu-IŠTAR ki-ma IŠTAR-lá-ma-sí i-zi-iz
translation: As to the 17 minas of silver that Puzur-Ištar owes either to a merchant, to Anatolians or to Ištar-lamassī, wife of Ali-ahum son of Šalim-Aššur, and for which a tablet has been certified - from the week of hannan-nārum, month Ab-šarrāni in the eponymy of Enna-Suen son of Šu-Aššur the silver will stand; it will not draw interest. years <gap> I shall sue him. On the day that they show the tablet concerning Puzur-Ištar's debt to Puzur-Aššur's representatives have not paid the silver, then the silver draws interest in accordance with his tablet. Šu-Ištar represented Ištar-lamassī.

akk: IGI be-lúm-ba-ni DUMU a-šur-be-el-a-wa-tim IGI SIG₅-pì-a-šur DUMU wa-ar-dí-li-šu IGI lá-qé-pí-im DUMU PUZUR₄.SÁ.TU
eng: Witnessed by Bēlum-bāni son of Aššur-bēl-awātim, by Damiq-pī-Aššur son of Warad-ilīšu, by Lā-qēpum son of Puzur-šadū'e.
transliteration: IGI be-lúm-ba-ni DUMU a-šur-be-el-a-wa-tim IGI SIG₅-pì-a-šur DUMU wa-ar-dí-li-šu IGI lá-qé-pí-im DUMU PUZUR₄.SÁ.TU
translation: Witnessed by Bēlum-bāni son of Aššur-bēl-awātim, by Damiq-pī-Aššur son of Warad-ilīšu, by Lā-qēpum son of Puzur-šadū'e.

akk: 2 ma-na 10 GÍN KÙ.BABBAR ṣa-ru-pu-um ší-im AN.NA ša DAM.GÀR a-na tù-ra-am-ì-lí DUMU e-dí-a-šur en-um-a-šur i-dí-in GAN-lam₅ a-na-nu-um a-šu-mì DAM.GÀR AN.NA e-tí-iq ù a-lá-nu-um KÙ.BABBAR a-šu-mì DAM.GÀR-ma e-tí-iq a-ḫa-ma 0.5 ma-na KÙ.BABBAR ša DAM.GÀR-ri-ma en-um-a-šur a-na tù-ra-am-DINGIR iḫ-bu-ul ŠU.NÍGIN 2.6666 ma-na KÙ.BABBAR iš-tù ITU.1.KAM <gap> i-na e-lá-i-šu iš-tù a-lim{ki} tù-ra-am-DINGIR a-na DAM.GÀR KÙ.BABBAR <gap> 0.5 ma-na <gap> GAN-lam₅ e-tí-iq
eng: Ennam-Aššur has given 2 minas 10 shekels of refined silver, the price of tin belonging to a merchant, to Tūram-ilī son of Eddin-Aššur. From here the tin will cross overland in the name of a merchant, and from there silver will cross overland in the name of the merchant again. Further, Ennam-Aššur borrowed 0.5 mina of silver belonging to a merchant, from Tūram-ilī. In all: 2.6666 minas of silver. Reckoned from the month <gap> Tūram-ilī will <gap> when he comes up from the City <gap> the merchant <gap> will cross overland.
transliteration: 2 ma-na 10 GÍN KÙ.BABBAR ṣa-ru-pu-um ší-im AN.NA ša DAM.GÀR a-na tù-ra-am-ì-lí DUMU e-dí-a-šur en-um-a-šur i-dí-in GAN-lam₅ a-na-nu-um a-šu-mì DAM.GÀR AN.NA e-tí-iq ù a-lá-nu-um KÙ.BABBAR a-šu-mì DAM.GÀR-ma e-tí-iq a-ḫa-ma 0.5 ma-na KÙ.BABBAR ša DAM.GÀR-ri-ma en-um-a-šur a-na tù-ra-am-DINGIR iḫ-bu-ul ŠU.NÍGIN 2.6666 ma-na KÙ.BABBAR iš-tù ITU.1.KAM <gap> i-na e-lá-i-šu iš-tù a-lim{ki} tù-ra-am-DINGIR a-na DAM.GÀR KÙ.BABBAR <gap> 0.5 ma-na <gap> GAN-lam₅ e-tí-iq
translation: Ennam-Aššur has given 2 minas 10 shekels of refined silver, the price of tin belonging to a merchant, to Tūram-ilī son of Eddin-Aššur. From here the tin will cross overland in the name of a merchant, and from there silver will cross overland in the name of the merchant again. Further, Ennam-Aššur borrowed 0.5 mina of silver belonging to a merchant, from Tūram-ilī. In all: 2.6666 minas of silver. Reckoned from the month <gap> Tūram-ilī will <gap> when he comes up from the City <gap> the merchant <gap> will cross overland.

akk: IGI i-ku-pí-a kà-ṣa-ar áb-ša-lim IGI ša-<gap> DUMU a-šur-SIPA
eng: Witnessed by Ikūn-pīya, Ah-šalim's packer, by Ša<gap> son of Aššur-rēʾī.
transliteration: IGI i-ku-pí-a kà-ṣa-ar áb-ša-lim IGI ša-<gap> DUMU a-šur-SIPA
translation: Witnessed by Ikūn-pīya, Ah-šalim's packer, by Ša<gap> son of Aššur-rēʾī.

akk: 2 ší-na sú-pá-nu ša 2 ma-na.TA e ú ša-al-šu-um sú-pá-num 1 ma-na šu-qú-ul-ta-šu ŠU.NÍGIN 5 ma-na sí-pá-ri ku-nu-ki-a a-na a-mur-a-šur DUMU ku-ku-lá-nim áp-qí-id-ma a-na ṣé-er ku-da-tim ù dan-a-šur DUMU PUZUR₄-a-šur a-na pu-ru-uš-ḫa-dim a-na ší-a-ma-tim ú-šé-bi-il₅-šu
eng: 2 supannus of 2 minas each, and a third supannu weighing 1 mina;in all: 5 minas of bronze under my seal I entrusted to Amur-Aššur son of Kukulānum and sent it with him to Kudātum and Dan-Aššur son of Puzur-Aššur to Purušhaddum for purchases.
transliteration: 2 ší-na sú-pá-nu ša 2 ma-na.TA e ú ša-al-šu-um sú-pá-num 1 ma-na šu-qú-ul-ta-šu ŠU.NÍGIN 5 ma-na sí-pá-ri ku-nu-ki-a a-na a-mur-a-šur DUMU ku-ku-lá-nim áp-qí-id-ma a-na ṣé-er ku-da-tim ù dan-a-šur DUMU PUZUR₄-a-šur a-na pu-ru-uš-ḫa-dim a-na ší-a-ma-tim ú-šé-bi-il₅-šu
translation: 2 supannus of 2 minas each, and a third supannu weighing 1 mina;in all: 5 minas of bronze under my seal I entrusted to Amur-Aššur son of Kukulānum and sent it with him to Kudātum and Dan-Aššur son of Puzur-Aššur to Purušhaddum for purchases.

akk: IGI a-šur-ta-ak-lá-ku DUMU ma-lá-kà-a DUMU en-na-bi-lam
eng: Witnessed by Aššur-taklāku son of Malakaya, son of Ennam-Bēlum.
transliteration: IGI a-šur-ta-ak-lá-ku DUMU ma-lá-kà-a DUMU en-na-bi-lam
translation: Witnessed by Aššur-taklāku son of Malakaya, son of Ennam-Bēlum.

akk: 8 ma-na KÙ.BABBAR ṣa-ru-pá-am da-dí-a DUMU en-na-nim i-na ší-im SÍG.ḪI.A ša ú-ší-na-lam il₅-qé
eng: Dādiya son of Ennānum has received 8 minas of refined silver from the proceeds of Ušinalam's wool.
transliteration: 8 ma-na KÙ.BABBAR ṣa-ru-pá-am da-dí-a DUMU en-na-nim i-na ší-im SÍG.ḪI.A ša ú-ší-na-lam il₅-qé
translation: Dādiya son of Ennānum has received 8 minas of refined silver from the proceeds of Ušinalam's wool.

akk: IGI a-šùr-i-mì-tí DUMU du-dí-ki IGI tù-ur-a-a DUMU ú-zu-a IGI en-na-sú-in DUMU i-dí-a-bi-im
eng: Witnessed by Aššur-imittī son of Dudiki, by Tūraya son of Uzuwa, by Enna-Suen son of Iddin-abum.
transliteration: IGI a-šùr-i-mì-tí DUMU du-dí-ki IGI tù-ur-a-a DUMU ú-zu-a IGI en-na-sú-in DUMU i-dí-a-bi-im
translation: Witnessed by Aššur-imittī son of Dudiki, by Tūraya son of Uzuwa, by Enna-Suen son of Iddin-abum.

akk: 2 GÍN KÙ.BABBAR iš-tí i-tur₄-DINGIR DUMU PUZUR₄-a-na 2 ší-ni-šu ší-né-en ša wa-aḫ-šu-ša-na SIG₅ iš-tù wa-aḫ-šu-ša-na ú-šé-ba-lam šu-ma lá ú-šé-bi₄-lam 6 GÍN KÙ.BABBAR i-ša-qá-lam
eng: 2 shekels of silver owed by Itūr-ilī son of Puzur-Anna; from Wahšušana he must send two pairs of good shoes from Wahšušana; if he has not sent it he is to pay 6 shekels of silver.
transliteration: 2 GÍN KÙ.BABBAR iš-tí i-tur₄-DINGIR DUMU PUZUR₄-a-na 2 ší-ni-šu ší-né-en ša wa-aḫ-šu-ša-na SIG₅ iš-tù wa-aḫ-šu-ša-na ú-šé-ba-lam šu-ma lá ú-šé-bi₄-lam 6 GÍN KÙ.BABBAR i-ša-qá-lam
translation: 2 shekels of silver owed by Itūr-ilī son of Puzur-Anna; from Wahšušana he must send two pairs of good shoes from Wahšušana; if he has not sent it he is to pay 6 shekels of silver.

akk: IGI kà-ba-tim DUMU a-šùr-GAL
eng: Witnessed by Kabātum son of Aššur-rabi.
transliteration: IGI kà-ba-tim DUMU a-šùr-GAL
translation: Witnessed by Kabātum son of Aššur-rabi.

akk: 8 ma-na KÙ ṣa-ru-pá-am i-ṣé-er i-dí-a-bi₄-im ku-la i-šu iš-tù ḫa-mu-uš-tim ša ḫa-pì-aḫ-šu ù sú-kà-lí-a a-na 25 ḫa-am-ša-tim a-na a-lim{ki} i-lá-ak-ma iš-tí um-me-a-ni-šu 2 ma-na KÙ.GI šu-mì ku-lá i-lá-pá-at šu-ma i-na ma-lá u₄-me-šu a-na a-lim{ki} lá i-ta-lá-ak KÙ.BABBAR a-na-ku lá i-ša-qal šu-ma lá iš-qú-ul a-na 1 ma-na-im 1.5 GÍN.TA i-na 1 ITU.KAM ú-ṣa-áb
eng: Iddin-abum owes 8 minas of refined silver to Kula. Reckoned from the week of happi-ahšu and Sukkalliya he must go to the City within 25 weeks and together with his investors he must book Kula's name for 2 minas of gold. If he has not left for the City within his stipulated term, he must repay the silver to Kula. If he has not paid (in time), he must pay interest at the rate 1.5 shekel per mina per month.
transliteration: 8 ma-na KÙ ṣa-ru-pá-am i-ṣé-er i-dí-a-bi₄-im ku-la i-šu iš-tù ḫa-mu-uš-tim ša ḫa-pì-aḫ-šu ù sú-kà-lí-a a-na 25 ḫa-am-ša-tim a-na a-lim{ki} i-lá-ak-ma iš-tí um-me-a-ni-šu 2 ma-na KÙ.GI šu-mì ku-lá i-lá-pá-at šu-ma i-na ma-lá u₄-me-šu a-na a-lim{ki} lá i-ta-lá-ak KÙ.BABBAR a-na-ku lá i-ša-qal šu-ma lá iš-qú-ul a-na 1 ma-na-im 1.5 GÍN.TA i-na 1 ITU.KAM ú-ṣa-áb
translation: Iddin-abum owes 8 minas of refined silver to Kula. Reckoned from the week of happi-ahšu and Sukkalliya he must go to the City within 25 weeks and together with his investors he must book Kula's name for 2 minas of gold. If he has not left for the City within his stipulated term, he must repay the silver to Kula. If he has not paid (in time), he must pay interest at the rate 1.5 shekel per mina per month.

akk: IGI a-šùr-ba-ni IGI i-dí-sú-in
eng: Witnessed by Aššur-bāni, by Iddin-Suen.
transliteration: IGI a-šùr-ba-ni IGI i-dí-sú-in
translation: Witnessed by Aššur-bāni, by Iddin-Suen.

akk: 4.3333 ma-na 5 GÍN.TA AN.NA bi₄-il₅-tám a-dí za-al-pá ik-šu-dam 0.6666 ma-na 5 GÍN AN.NA ta-ší-a-tum ša ša-du-im 4 ma-na AN.NA ni-is-ḫa-tum ša É.GAL i-na ša i-sú-rik₁₃ ša i-ri-šum ub-lá-ni a ma-lá ṭup-pì-šu ú-sà-ni-iq-šu-ma bi₄-il₅-tum 2.5 ma-na im-ṭí i-na AN.NA ša šé-ep i-ri-ší-im 2.3333 ma-na AN.NA i-na i-šé-ra-tim ša É a-lim{ki} i-tí-ra-ma ša-lim-a-šur il₅-qé-šu
eng: 4.3333 minas 5 shekels accrued (as fees) until Zalpa on each talent of tin; 0.6666 mina 5 shekels of tin were the cost of carriage in the mountains; 4 minas of tin: the import duty of the palace - from Issu-arik's goods that Irišum brought. I checked it in accordance with his letter, and 2.5 minas were missing on each talent. Of the tin transported by Irišum 2.3333 minas of tin from the of the City Hall was in excess, and Šalim-Aššur took it.
transliteration: 4.3333 ma-na 5 GÍN.TA AN.NA bi₄-il₅-tám a-dí za-al-pá ik-šu-dam 0.6666 ma-na 5 GÍN AN.NA ta-ší-a-tum ša ša-du-im 4 ma-na AN.NA ni-is-ḫa-tum ša É.GAL i-na ša i-sú-rik₁₃ ša i-ri-šum ub-lá-ni a ma-lá ṭup-pì-šu ú-sà-ni-iq-šu-ma bi₄-il₅-tum 2.5 ma-na im-ṭí i-na AN.NA ša šé-ep i-ri-ší-im 2.3333 ma-na AN.NA i-na i-šé-ra-tim ša É a-lim{ki} i-tí-ra-ma ša-lim-a-šur il₅-qé-šu
translation: 4.3333 minas 5 shekels accrued (as fees) until Zalpa on each talent of tin; 0.6666 mina 5 shekels of tin were the cost of carriage in the mountains; 4 minas of tin: the import duty of the palace - from Issu-arik's goods that Irišum brought. I checked it in accordance with his letter, and 2.5 minas were missing on each talent. Of the tin transported by Irišum 2.3333 minas of tin from the of the City Hall was in excess, and Šalim-Aššur took it.

akk: IGI i-sú-ri-ik IGI i-ri-ší-im
eng: Witnessed by Issu-arik, witnessed by Irišum.
transliteration: IGI i-sú-ri-ik IGI i-ri-ší-im
translation: Witnessed by Issu-arik, witnessed by Irišum.

akk: 3 ma-na 16.1666 GÍN KÙ.BABBAR ki-ma a-šùr-ma-lik DUMU lu-zi-na a-šùr-GAL DUMU ma-nu-um-šu-um-šu i-na ší-im SÍG.ḪI.A ša ú-ší-na-lam il₅-qé
eng: Aššur-rabi son of Mannum-šumšu has received 3 minas 16.1666 shekel of silver on behalf of Aššur-malik son of Luzina from the proceeds of Ušinalam's wool.
transliteration: 3 ma-na 16.1666 GÍN KÙ.BABBAR ki-ma a-šùr-ma-lik DUMU lu-zi-na a-šùr-GAL DUMU ma-nu-um-šu-um-šu i-na ší-im SÍG.ḪI.A ša ú-ší-na-lam il₅-qé
translation: Aššur-rabi son of Mannum-šumšu has received 3 minas 16.1666 shekel of silver on behalf of Aššur-malik son of Luzina from the proceeds of Ušinalam's wool.

akk: IGI i-lá-áš-ra-ni DUMU sú-kà-li-a IGI en-na-sú-in DUMU i-dí-a-bi₄-im
eng: Witnessed by Ilī-ašrannī son of Sukkalliya, by Enna-Suen son of Iddin-abum.
transliteration: IGI i-lá-áš-ra-ni DUMU sú-kà-li-a IGI en-na-sú-in DUMU i-dí-a-bi₄-im
translation: Witnessed by Ilī-ašrannī son of Sukkalliya, by Enna-Suen son of Iddin-abum.

akk: 1.6666 ma-na 5 GÍN KÙ.BABBAR ku-nu-ki ša šu-ḫu-bur a-na a-lá-ḫi-im e-zi-bu ki-ma a-šùr-be-el-ša-du-e KÙ.BABBAR a-ni-na il₅-qé šu-ma a-na KÙ.BABBAR a-nim ma-ma-an a-na a-lá-ḫi-im i-tù-a-ar a-ni-na DUMU MAN-a-na ú-ba-áb-šu
eng: Concerning the 1.6666 mina 5 shekels of sealed silver that Šu-hubur left with Ali-ahum - Annina has received the silver on behalf of Aššur-bēl-šadu'e. If anyone raises claim against Ali-ahum for this silver, Annina son of Puzur-Anna will clear him.
transliteration: 1.6666 ma-na 5 GÍN KÙ.BABBAR ku-nu-ki ša šu-ḫu-bur a-na a-lá-ḫi-im e-zi-bu ki-ma a-šùr-be-el-ša-du-e KÙ.BABBAR a-ni-na il₅-qé šu-ma a-na KÙ.BABBAR a-nim ma-ma-an a-na a-lá-ḫi-im i-tù-a-ar a-ni-na DUMU MAN-a-na ú-ba-áb-šu
translation: Concerning the 1.6666 mina 5 shekels of sealed silver that Šu-hubur left with Ali-ahum - Annina has received the silver on behalf of Aššur-bēl-šadu'e. If anyone raises claim against Ali-ahum for this silver, Annina son of Puzur-Anna will clear him.

akk: IGI a-šur-ba-ni DUMU ku-ta-a IGI ili₅-ba-ni DUMU a-mur-IŠTAR
eng: Witnessed by Aššur-bāni son of Kutaya, by Ilī-bāni son of Amur-Ištar.
transliteration: IGI a-šur-ba-ni DUMU ku-ta-a IGI ili₅-ba-ni DUMU a-mur-IŠTAR
translation: Witnessed by Aššur-bāni son of Kutaya, by Ilī-bāni son of Amur-Ištar.

akk: i-dí-a-bu-um É-tí ša bu-ri-im a-šar ša-lim-a-šùr wa-áš-bu iš-tí tù-ud-ḫa-li-a a-ḫu tù-li iš-a-am a-na a-wa-tim a-ni-a-tim kà-ru-um kà-ni-iš i-dí-ni-a-tí-ma ṭup-pá-am ší-bu-tí-ni IGI GÍR ša a-šùr ni-dí-in
eng: Iddin-abum has bought the houses by the well, where Šalim-Aššur is living, from Tudhaliya the brother of Tuli. The Kanesh colony gave us for these proceedings, and we gave a tablet with our testimony before the dagger of Aššur.
transliteration: i-dí-a-bu-um É-tí ša bu-ri-im a-šar ša-lim-a-šùr wa-áš-bu iš-tí tù-ud-ḫa-li-a a-ḫu tù-li iš-a-am a-na a-wa-tim a-ni-a-tim kà-ru-um kà-ni-iš i-dí-ni-a-tí-ma ṭup-pá-am ší-bu-tí-ni IGI GÍR ša a-šùr ni-dí-in
translation: Iddin-abum has bought the houses by the well, where Šalim-Aššur is living, from Tudhaliya the brother of Tuli. The Kanesh colony gave us for these proceedings, and we gave a tablet with our testimony before the dagger of Aššur.

akk: IGI a-ku-za IGI ú-ra-a IGI a-šùr-ba-ni
eng: Witnessed by Akuza, by Uraya, by Aššur-bāni.
transliteration: IGI a-ku-za IGI ú-ra-a IGI a-šùr-ba-ni
translation: Witnessed by Akuza, by Uraya, by Aššur-bāni.

akk: 18 GÍN KÙ.BABBAR i-ṣé-er ki-da-aḫ-šu ù me-er-i-šu a-lá-ḫu-um i-šu 6 na-ru-uq mì-iš-lam ŠE-um mì-iš-lam₅ ar-ša-tum i-na ḫa-ar-pé-e i-ma-da-ad 15 GÍN KÙ.BABBAR iš-tí ḫa-ar-šu-um-nu-ma-an 5 na-ru-uq mì-iš-lúm ŠE-um mì-iš-lam₅ ar-ša-tim i ḫa-ar-pé-e i-ma-da-ad KÙ.BABBAR a-ni-am wa-al-dí-DINGIR i-dí-in
eng: Kid-ahšu and his sons owe 18 shekels of silver to Ali-ahum. He will measure out 6 sacks (of grain), half barley, half wheat at harvest time. 15 shekels of silver is owed by haršumnuman; he will measure out 5 sacks (of grain), half barley, half wheat, at harvest time. Waldi-ilum gave this silver.
transliteration: 18 GÍN KÙ.BABBAR i-ṣé-er ki-da-aḫ-šu ù me-er-i-šu a-lá-ḫu-um i-šu 6 na-ru-uq mì-iš-lam ŠE-um mì-iš-lam₅ ar-ša-tum i-na ḫa-ar-pé-e i-ma-da-ad 15 GÍN KÙ.BABBAR iš-tí ḫa-ar-šu-um-nu-ma-an 5 na-ru-uq mì-iš-lúm ŠE-um mì-iš-lam₅ ar-ša-tim i ḫa-ar-pé-e i-ma-da-ad KÙ.BABBAR a-ni-am wa-al-dí-DINGIR i-dí-in
translation: Kid-ahšu and his sons owe 18 shekels of silver to Ali-ahum. He will measure out 6 sacks (of grain), half barley, half wheat at harvest time. 15 shekels of silver is owed by haršumnuman; he will measure out 5 sacks (of grain), half barley, half wheat, at harvest time. Waldi-ilum gave this silver.

akk: IGI ḫa-pu-a-šu IGI ma-nu-ba-lúm-a-šur
eng: Witnessed by happu-aššu, by Mannum-balum-Aššur.
transliteration: IGI ḫa-pu-a-šu IGI ma-nu-ba-lúm-a-šur
translation: Witnessed by happu-aššu, by Mannum-balum-Aššur.

akk: 17 ma-na ḫu-sá-ru-um 21 GÚ URUDU SIG₅ 8 ANŠE ṣa-lá-mu ù ú-nu-sú-nu 20 ma-na ší-ku-um 1 me-at 10 ṣí-pá-ra-tum a-na iš-ri-šu ší-na-tum mì-ma a-nim a-na ma-ma-ḫi-ir ša-lim-a-šùr ip-qí-id a-na ší-a-ma-tim <gap> ma-ma-ḫi-ir ú-bi-il₅
eng: 17 minas of lapis lazuli, 21 talents of good copper, 8 black donkeys and their harness, 20 minas of šikku-copper, 110 bronze pins, 10 sets of teeth — all this Salim-Aššur entrusted to Man-mahir. Man-mahir brought it away for purchases.
transliteration: 17 ma-na ḫu-sá-ru-um 21 GÚ URUDU SIG₅ 8 ANŠE ṣa-lá-mu ù ú-nu-sú-nu 20 ma-na ší-ku-um 1 me-at 10 ṣí-pá-ra-tum a-na iš-ri-šu ší-na-tum mì-ma a-nim a-na ma-ma-ḫi-ir ša-lim-a-šùr ip-qí-id a-na ší-a-ma-tim <gap> ma-ma-ḫi-ir ú-bi-il₅
translation: 17 minas of lapis lazuli, 21 talents of good copper, 8 black donkeys and their harness, 20 minas of šikku-copper, 110 bronze pins, 10 sets of teeth — all this Salim-Aššur entrusted to Man-mahir. Man-mahir brought it away for purchases.

akk: IGI en-na-sú-en DUMU i-ku-a IGI sá-li-a DUMU i-dí-a-šùr IGI SIG₅-pì-a-šùr IGI a-šùr-na-da DUMU en-um-a-šùr
eng: Witnessed by Enna-Suen son of Ikuwa, by Salliya son of Iddin-Aššur, by Damiq-pi-Aššur, by Aššur-nada son of Ennam-Aššur.
transliteration: IGI en-na-sú-en DUMU i-ku-a IGI sá-li-a DUMU i-dí-a-šùr IGI SIG₅-pì-a-šùr IGI a-šùr-na-da DUMU en-um-a-šùr
translation: Witnessed by Enna-Suen son of Ikuwa, by Salliya son of Iddin-Aššur, by Damiq-pi-Aššur, by Aššur-nada son of Ennam-Aššur.

akk: 14 GÚ URUDU SIG₅ ša-bu-ra-am i-ṣé-er i-dí-a-šur DUMU dan-a-šur PUZUR₄.IŠTAR a-ḫi-šu ù i-ku-pí-a DUMU a-šur-i-mì-tí iš-ma-a-šur i-šu iš-tù ITU.KAM ku-zal-lu li-mu-um a-šur-i-mì-tí 1.5 ma-na.TA i-na ITU.KAM a-na GÚ ṣí-ib-tám ú-ṣú-bu URUDU i-na qá-qá-ad šál-mì-šu-nu ù ke-ni-šu-nu ra-ki-is
eng: Iddin-Aššur son of Dan-Aššur, Puzur-Ištar, his brother, and Ikūn-pīya son of Aššur-imittī owe 14 talents of good broken copper to Išim-Aššur. Reckoned from the month Kuzallu, eponymy Aššur-imittī, they will pay interest at the rate 1.5 mina per month per talent. They are jointly liable for the copper.
transliteration: 14 GÚ URUDU SIG₅ ša-bu-ra-am i-ṣé-er i-dí-a-šur DUMU dan-a-šur PUZUR₄.IŠTAR a-ḫi-šu ù i-ku-pí-a DUMU a-šur-i-mì-tí iš-ma-a-šur i-šu iš-tù ITU.KAM ku-zal-lu li-mu-um a-šur-i-mì-tí 1.5 ma-na.TA i-na ITU.KAM a-na GÚ ṣí-ib-tám ú-ṣú-bu URUDU i-na qá-qá-ad šál-mì-šu-nu ù ke-ni-šu-nu ra-ki-is
translation: Iddin-Aššur son of Dan-Aššur, Puzur-Ištar, his brother, and Ikūn-pīya son of Aššur-imittī owe 14 talents of good broken copper to Išim-Aššur. Reckoned from the month Kuzallu, eponymy Aššur-imittī, they will pay interest at the rate 1.5 mina per month per talent. They are jointly liable for the copper.

akk: IGI a-mur-a-šur DUMU a-šur-be-el-a-wa-tim IGI sú-in-SIPA DUMU a-mur-IŠTAR
eng: Witnessed by Amur-Aššur son of Aššur-bēl-awātim, by Suen-rē'ī son of Amur-Ištar.
transliteration: IGI a-mur-a-šur DUMU a-šur-be-el-a-wa-tim IGI sú-in-SIPA DUMU a-mur-IŠTAR
translation: Witnessed by Amur-Aššur son of Aššur-bēl-awātim, by Suen-rē'ī son of Amur-Ištar.

akk: ra-bi-ṣú-um ša ša-lim-a-šùr a-na en-um-a-šùr ú a-lá-ḫi-im me-er-e ša-lim-a-šùr iṣ-ba-at-ni-a-tí-ma um-ma ra-bi-ṣú-ma ṭup-pá-am ša a-bu-ku-nu KÙ.BABBAR i-na li-bi-ku-nu i-dí-ú-ni-ma ṭup-pá-am um-me-a-nu a-bi-ku-nu ú-kà-i-lu-ni-ma i-na ma-ḫa-ar kà-ri-im um-me-a-nu iš-ku-nu-šu-ni kà-ru-um i-a-tí ip-qí-id-šu ba-a-nim a ma-lá ṭup-pí-im ša a-lim{ki} KÙ.BABBAR ma-lá i-na li-bi-ku-nu <gap>-ma tí-ni <gap> KÙ.BABBAR šu-uq-lá-ma ku-un-kà-ma a-na a-lim{ki} al-kà lá tù-na-a-ni um-ma a-lá-ḫu-um-ma ba-a-am ma-lá a-bu-ni i-na li-bi-ni KÙ.BABBAR i-dí-ú-ni lu ni-iš-qú-ul-ma ú iš-té-e ra-bi-ṣí-im lá-li-kà um-ma en-um-a-šùr-ma a-na ra-bi-ṣí-im-ma a-na pu-tí-a-ma ša-lá-ni-ma ú lá-pu-ul-kà-ma ú a-pu-tí-a-ma lá-li-ik a-na a-wa-tim a-ni-a-tim kà-ru-um kà-ni-iš i-dí-ni-a-tí-ma IGI GÍR ša a-šùr ší-bu-tí-ni ni-dí-in
eng: Šalim-Aššur's attorney seized us against Ennam-Aššur and Ali-ahum, Šalim-Aššur's sons, and the attorney said: Your father's investors kept the tablet stating which silver your father set down as owed by you, and the investors placed it in front of the colony. The colony entrusted it to me. Come, in accordance with the tablet of the City pay the silver for which you were noted in the tablet, seal it and go to the City. Do not cheat me." Ali-ahum answered: "Come, let us pay what silver our father set down as owed by us and then let me go with the attorney." Ennam-Aššur answered the attorney: "Question me right here, and then I shall answer you and I shall leave right now." The Kanesh colony gave us for these proceedings and we gave our testimony before Aššur's dagger.
