transliteration: ra-bi-ṣú-um ša ša-lim-a-šùr a-na en-um-a-šùr ú a-lá-ḫi-im me-er-e ša-lim-a-šùr iṣ-ba-at-ni-a-tí-ma um-ma ra-bi-ṣú-ma ṭup-pá-am ša a-bu-ku-nu KÙ.BABBAR i-na li-bi-ku-nu i-dí-ú-ni-ma ṭup-pá-am um-me-a-nu a-bi-ku-nu ú-kà-i-lu-ni-ma i-na ma-ḫa-ar kà-ri-im um-me-a-nu iš-ku-nu-šu-ni kà-ru-um i-a-tí ip-qí-id-šu ba-a-nim a ma-lá ṭup-pí-im ša a-lim{ki} KÙ.BABBAR ma-lá i-na li-bi-ku-nu <gap>-ma tí-ni <gap> KÙ.BABBAR šu-uq-lá-ma ku-un-kà-ma a-na a-lim{ki} al-kà lá tù-na-a-ni um-ma a-lá-ḫu-um-ma ba-a-am ma-lá a-bu-ni i-na li-bi-ni KÙ.BABBAR i-dí-ú-ni lu ni-iš-qú-ul-ma ú iš-té-e ra-bi-ṣí-im lá-li-kà um-ma en-um-a-šùr-ma a-na ra-bi-ṣí-im-ma a-na pu-tí-a-ma ša-lá-ni-ma ú lá-pu-ul-kà-ma ú a-pu-tí-a-ma lá-li-ik a-na a-wa-tim a-ni-a-tim kà-ru-um kà-ni-iš i-dí-ni-a-tí-ma IGI GÍR ša a-šùr ší-bu-tí-ni ni-dí-in
translation: Šalim-Aššur's attorney seized us against Ennam-Aššur and Ali-ahum, Šalim-Aššur's sons, and the attorney said: Your father's investors kept the tablet stating which silver your father set down as owed by you, and the investors placed it in front of the colony. The colony entrusted it to me. Come, in accordance with the tablet of the City pay the silver for which you were noted in the tablet, seal it and go to the City. Do not cheat me." Ali-ahum answered: "Come, let us pay what silver our father set down as owed by us and then let me go with the attorney." Ennam-Aššur answered the attorney: "Question me right here, and then I shall answer you and I shall leave right now." The Kanesh colony gave us for these proceedings and we gave our testimony before Aššur's dagger.

akk: IGI PUZUR₄-<gap> DUMU a-šùr-DU₁₀ IGI šu-a-šùr DUMU šu-sú-in
eng: Witnessed by Puzur-<gap> son of Aššur-ṭāb, by Šu-Aššur son of Šu-Suen."
transliteration: IGI PUZUR₄-<gap> DUMU a-šùr-DU₁₀ IGI šu-a-šùr DUMU šu-sú-in
translation: Witnessed by Puzur-<gap> son of Aššur-ṭāb, by Šu-Aššur son of Šu-Suen."

akk: 3 ma-na KÙ.BABBAR ṣa-ru-pá-am ša i-ṣé-er šu-IŠTAR ni-mar-IŠTAR ù bu-zi-a a-šur-ma-lik i-šu-ú KÙ.BABBAR ki-ma a-šur-ma-lik šu-IŠTAR il₅-qé šu-ma a-šur-ma-lik a-na bu-zi-a i-tù-ar šu-IŠTAR ú-ba-áb-šu 0.3333 ma-na KÙ.BABBAR ša a-we-el-tim ú 17 GÍN KÙ.BABBAR ša DINGIR-kur-ub šu-ma a-na bu-zi-a i-tù-ru šu-IŠTAR ú-ba-áb-šu
eng: As for the 3 minas of refined silver that Šu-Ištar, Nimar-Ištar and Buziya owed to Aššur-malik, on behalf of Aššur-malik Šu-Ištar has received the silver. If Aššur-malik raises claim against Buziya, Šu-Ištar will clear him. As to the 0.3333 mina of silver belonging to the lady and the 17 shekels of silver belonging to Ilī-kurub, if they raise claim against Buziya, Šu-Ištar will clear him.
transliteration: 3 ma-na KÙ.BABBAR ṣa-ru-pá-am ša i-ṣé-er šu-IŠTAR ni-mar-IŠTAR ù bu-zi-a a-šur-ma-lik i-šu-ú KÙ.BABBAR ki-ma a-šur-ma-lik šu-IŠTAR il₅-qé šu-ma a-šur-ma-lik a-na bu-zi-a i-tù-ar šu-IŠTAR ú-ba-áb-šu 0.3333 ma-na KÙ.BABBAR ša a-we-el-tim ú 17 GÍN KÙ.BABBAR ša DINGIR-kur-ub šu-ma a-na bu-zi-a i-tù-ru šu-IŠTAR ú-ba-áb-šu
translation: As for the 3 minas of refined silver that Šu-Ištar, Nimar-Ištar and Buziya owed to Aššur-malik, on behalf of Aššur-malik Šu-Ištar has received the silver. If Aššur-malik raises claim against Buziya, Šu-Ištar will clear him. As to the 0.3333 mina of silver belonging to the lady and the 17 shekels of silver belonging to Ilī-kurub, if they raise claim against Buziya, Šu-Ištar will clear him.

akk: IGI da-dí-a IGI {d}UTU.DU₁₀ IGI tù-ta-a
eng: Witnessed by Dādiya, by Šamaš-ṭāb, by Tutaya.
transliteration: IGI da-dí-a IGI {d}UTU.DU₁₀ IGI tù-ta-a
translation: Witnessed by Dādiya, by Šamaš-ṭāb, by Tutaya.

akk: {d}UTU-e-nam
eng: Šamaš-ennam.
transliteration: {d}UTU-e-nam
translation: Šamaš-ennam.

akk: <gap> ma-na KÙ.BABBAR i-ṣé-er šu-IŠTAR šu-sú-in i-šu KI KÙ.BABBAR šu-IŠTAR uk-ta-al <gap> ší-ta am ri <gap> šu i-sú-rik₁₃ i-ta-ni-tim a-dí-šu-ma a-ma-sú ÌR-sú ú-ba-li-iṭ
eng: Šu-Ištar owes <gap> mina of silver to Šu-Suen. Šu-Ištar is held in service by the money. <gap> I gave him <gap> Issu-arik in prayer(?), and revived his maid and his slave.
transliteration: <gap> ma-na KÙ.BABBAR i-ṣé-er šu-IŠTAR šu-sú-in i-šu KI KÙ.BABBAR šu-IŠTAR uk-ta-al <gap> ší-ta am ri <gap> šu i-sú-rik₁₃ i-ta-ni-tim a-dí-šu-ma a-ma-sú ÌR-sú ú-ba-li-iṭ
translation: Šu-Ištar owes <gap> mina of silver to Šu-Suen. Šu-Ištar is held in service by the money. <gap> I gave him <gap> Issu-arik in prayer(?), and revived his maid and his slave.

akk: IGI ša-lim-a-šùr IGI i-dí-IŠTAR
eng: Witnessed by Šalim-Aššur, by Iddin-Ištar.
transliteration: IGI ša-lim-a-šùr IGI i-dí-IŠTAR
translation: Witnessed by Šalim-Aššur, by Iddin-Ištar.

akk: IGI šu-{d}EN.LÍL IGI ṣí-lu-lu
eng: Witnessed by Šu-Illil, by Ṣilūlu."
transliteration: IGI šu-{d}EN.LÍL IGI ṣí-lu-lu
translation: Witnessed by Šu-Illil, by Ṣilūlu."

akk: i-na 1 me-at 30 TÚG ku-ta-ni e-zi-ib ša kà-ṣa-ri ù ta-ad-mì-qá-tim ša iš-tù e-kál-lim ur-da-ni-ni-ma 65 TÚG.TA qá-ta-tim ik-šu-ud-ni-a-tí ŠÀ.BA 43 TÚG ku-ta-ni a-na en-um-a-šur a-dí-in ší-tí ṣú-ba-tí-kà 22 TÚG a-ḫu-ru i-na 10 ku-ta-ni SIG₅ ša ba-ri-ni ŠÀ.BA 4 TÚG en-um-a-šur il₅-qé 2 TÚG.ḪI.A a-na ba-ri en-na-nim ù en-um-a-šur i-za-zu
eng: Of the 130 -textiles - minus those of the packers and the -loans - that came down from the palace 65 textiles resulted for each of us as shares; thereof I gave 43 kutānu-textiles to Ennam-Aššur. The rest of your textiles: 22 textiles remain. Of the 10 fine that are owned jointly by us, of that Ennam-Aššur has received 4 textiles; 2 textiles stand as joint property of Ennānum and Ennam-Aššur.
transliteration: i-na 1 me-at 30 TÚG ku-ta-ni e-zi-ib ša kà-ṣa-ri ù ta-ad-mì-qá-tim ša iš-tù e-kál-lim ur-da-ni-ni-ma 65 TÚG.TA qá-ta-tim ik-šu-ud-ni-a-tí ŠÀ.BA 43 TÚG ku-ta-ni a-na en-um-a-šur a-dí-in ší-tí ṣú-ba-tí-kà 22 TÚG a-ḫu-ru i-na 10 ku-ta-ni SIG₅ ša ba-ri-ni ŠÀ.BA 4 TÚG en-um-a-šur il₅-qé 2 TÚG.ḪI.A a-na ba-ri en-na-nim ù en-um-a-šur i-za-zu
translation: Of the 130 -textiles - minus those of the packers and the -loans - that came down from the palace 65 textiles resulted for each of us as shares; thereof I gave 43 kutānu-textiles to Ennam-Aššur. The rest of your textiles: 22 textiles remain. Of the 10 fine that are owned jointly by us, of that Ennam-Aššur has received 4 textiles; 2 textiles stand as joint property of Ennānum and Ennam-Aššur.

akk: IGI tù-ur-a-a IGI lá-qé-ep DUMU šu-a-šur
eng: Witnessed by Turaya, by Lā-qēp son of Šu-Aššur.
transliteration: IGI tù-ur-a-a IGI lá-qé-ep DUMU šu-a-šur
translation: Witnessed by Turaya, by Lā-qēp son of Šu-Aššur.

akk: i 6 GÚ 22 ma-na URUDU ša i-dí-{d}MAR.TU DUMU šu-ḫu-nim a-na e-la-ma ḫa-bu-lu 1 GÚ 40 ma-na URUDU KI a-šur-SIPA DUMU i-dí-da i-ku-ul ší-tí URUDU-šu 4 GÚ 42 ma-na i-na li-bi i-dí-{d}MAR.TU i-ri-ḫa-am iš-tù ḫa-mu-uš-tim ša na-áb-su-in ù DUMU i-tur₄-DINGIR a-na 1 GÚ-tim 1 ma-na-um 0.5 ma-na.TA i ITU.KAM ú-ṣa-áb
eng: Of the 6 talents 22 minas of copper that Iddin-Amurrum, son of Šuhunum, owes to Elamma, 1 talent 40 minas of copper are due from Aššur-rē'ī, son of Idida, who used it. The remainder of his copper, 4 talents 22 minas, Iddin-Amurrum still owes to me. From the week of Nabi-Suen, son of Itūr-ilī, he will add an interest of 1.5! mina per talent per month.
transliteration: i 6 GÚ 22 ma-na URUDU ša i-dí-{d}MAR.TU DUMU šu-ḫu-nim a-na e-la-ma ḫa-bu-lu 1 GÚ 40 ma-na URUDU KI a-šur-SIPA DUMU i-dí-da i-ku-ul ší-tí URUDU-šu 4 GÚ 42 ma-na i-na li-bi i-dí-{d}MAR.TU i-ri-ḫa-am iš-tù ḫa-mu-uš-tim ša na-áb-su-in ù DUMU i-tur₄-DINGIR a-na 1 GÚ-tim 1 ma-na-um 0.5 ma-na.TA i ITU.KAM ú-ṣa-áb
translation: Of the 6 talents 22 minas of copper that Iddin-Amurrum, son of Šuhunum, owes to Elamma, 1 talent 40 minas of copper are due from Aššur-rē'ī, son of Idida, who used it. The remainder of his copper, 4 talents 22 minas, Iddin-Amurrum still owes to me. From the week of Nabi-Suen, son of Itūr-ilī, he will add an interest of 1.5! mina per talent per month.

akk: IGI da-da-ni IGI li-ba-a IGI lá-qé-ep
eng: Witnessed by Dadani, by Libbaya, by Lā-qēp.
transliteration: IGI da-da-ni IGI li-ba-a IGI lá-qé-ep
translation: Witnessed by Dadani, by Libbaya, by Lā-qēp.

akk: 41 ma-na 11.5 GÍN KÙ.BABBAR ṣa-ru-pá-am ku-nu-ki ša ki-ma ku-a-tí ù ku-nu-ki-a 3 né-pì-šu a-ḫa-ma 0.6666 ma-na 1 GÍN ša-du-a-sú mì-ma a-nim a-na šu-nu-nu ù i-lá-áš-ra-ni áp-qí-id-ma a-na ṣé-er ša-lim-a-šùr a-bi₄-ni a-na ma-lá tí-ir-tí-šu ub-lu a-ḫa-ma 5 GÍN KÙ.BABBAR a-na ú-kúl-tí-šu-nu a-dí-šu-nu-tí
eng: 41 minas 11.5 shekels of refined silver, sealed by your representatives and by me - in three packages; further 0.6666 mina 1 shekel, its transport tariff - all this I entrusted to Šu-Nūnu and Ili-ašrannī, and they have brought it to Šalim-Aššur, our father, in accordance with his orders. Furthermore, I gave them 5 shekels of silver for their food.
transliteration: 41 ma-na 11.5 GÍN KÙ.BABBAR ṣa-ru-pá-am ku-nu-ki ša ki-ma ku-a-tí ù ku-nu-ki-a 3 né-pì-šu a-ḫa-ma 0.6666 ma-na 1 GÍN ša-du-a-sú mì-ma a-nim a-na šu-nu-nu ù i-lá-áš-ra-ni áp-qí-id-ma a-na ṣé-er ša-lim-a-šùr a-bi₄-ni a-na ma-lá tí-ir-tí-šu ub-lu a-ḫa-ma 5 GÍN KÙ.BABBAR a-na ú-kúl-tí-šu-nu a-dí-šu-nu-tí
translation: 41 minas 11.5 shekels of refined silver, sealed by your representatives and by me - in three packages; further 0.6666 mina 1 shekel, its transport tariff - all this I entrusted to Šu-Nūnu and Ili-ašrannī, and they have brought it to Šalim-Aššur, our father, in accordance with his orders. Furthermore, I gave them 5 shekels of silver for their food.

akk: IGI a-ḫu-qar DUMU zu-ur-zu-ur IGI a-šùr-ták-lá-ku DUMU qar-du-um-{d}IM
eng: Witnessed by Ahu-waqar son of Zurzur, by Aššur-taklāku son of Qardum-Adad.
transliteration: IGI a-ḫu-qar DUMU zu-ur-zu-ur IGI a-šùr-ták-lá-ku DUMU qar-du-um-{d}IM
translation: Witnessed by Ahu-waqar son of Zurzur, by Aššur-taklāku son of Qardum-Adad.

akk: a-ḫa-ma 10 GÍN KÙ.BABBAR a-na bé-a-lim a-na šu-nu-nu a-dí-in 7 GÍN KÙ.BABBAR a-na bé-a-lim a-na i-lá-áš-ra-ni a-dí-in ma-aḫ-ri-šu-nu-ma
eng: Furthermore, I gave 10 shekels of silver for a working-capital to Šu-Nūnu. 7 shekels of silver I gave as a working-capital to Il-ašrannī witnessed by the same men.
transliteration: a-ḫa-ma 10 GÍN KÙ.BABBAR a-na bé-a-lim a-na šu-nu-nu a-dí-in 7 GÍN KÙ.BABBAR a-na bé-a-lim a-na i-lá-áš-ra-ni a-dí-in ma-aḫ-ri-šu-nu-ma
translation: Furthermore, I gave 10 shekels of silver for a working-capital to Šu-Nūnu. 7 shekels of silver I gave as a working-capital to Il-ašrannī witnessed by the same men.

akk: dan-a-šùr sí-ki e-na-sú-in DUMU i-dí-a-bi₄-im ú-kà-al-ma a-na ḫa-nu DUMU i-tur₄-DINGIR a-na qá-ta-tim i-dí-šu um-ma dan-a-šùr-ma a-wi-lam tù-ta-ra-am šu-ma a-wi-lam lá tù-ta-e-ra-am a-na 12 ma-na KÙ.BABBAR ù ṣí-ba-tí-šu ša ṭup-pì-im ḫa-ar-mì-im ša ḫu-bu-ul a-bi-šu ta-za-za-am um-ma e-na-sú-in-ma ša a-na ma-nim ḫa-bu-lu um-ma dan-a-šùr-ma lu a-na a-bi-a lu a-na DAM.GÀR-ri-im ḫa-bu-ul ù šu-ma ṭup-pá-am ša ša-ba-e tí-šu bi-lam-ma ṭup-pá-am du-uk a-na a-wa-tim a-ni-a-tim kà-ru-um kà-ni-ìš i-dí-ni-a-tí-ma ší-bu-tí-ni IGI GÍR ša a-šùr ni-dí-in
eng: Dan-Aššur detains Enna-Suen son of Iddin-abum and he gave him to hanu son of Itūr-ilī as guarantor. Dan-Aššur said: You will return the man. If you have not returned the man you will be responsible for 12 minas of silver and its interest in accordance with the certified tablet concerning his father's debt." Enna-Suen said: "For his debt to whom?" Dan-Aššur said: "He is indebted either to my father or anonymously. But if you have a quittance, then bring it and invalidate the tablet." The Kanesh colony gave us for these proceedings and we gave our testimony before Aššur's dagger.
transliteration: dan-a-šùr sí-ki e-na-sú-in DUMU i-dí-a-bi₄-im ú-kà-al-ma a-na ḫa-nu DUMU i-tur₄-DINGIR a-na qá-ta-tim i-dí-šu um-ma dan-a-šùr-ma a-wi-lam tù-ta-ra-am šu-ma a-wi-lam lá tù-ta-e-ra-am a-na 12 ma-na KÙ.BABBAR ù ṣí-ba-tí-šu ša ṭup-pì-im ḫa-ar-mì-im ša ḫu-bu-ul a-bi-šu ta-za-za-am um-ma e-na-sú-in-ma ša a-na ma-nim ḫa-bu-lu um-ma dan-a-šùr-ma lu a-na a-bi-a lu a-na DAM.GÀR-ri-im ḫa-bu-ul ù šu-ma ṭup-pá-am ša ša-ba-e tí-šu bi-lam-ma ṭup-pá-am du-uk a-na a-wa-tim a-ni-a-tim kà-ru-um kà-ni-ìš i-dí-ni-a-tí-ma ší-bu-tí-ni IGI GÍR ša a-šùr ni-dí-in
translation: Dan-Aššur detains Enna-Suen son of Iddin-abum and he gave him to hanu son of Itūr-ilī as guarantor. Dan-Aššur said: You will return the man. If you have not returned the man you will be responsible for 12 minas of silver and its interest in accordance with the certified tablet concerning his father's debt." Enna-Suen said: "For his debt to whom?" Dan-Aššur said: "He is indebted either to my father or anonymously. But if you have a quittance, then bring it and invalidate the tablet." The Kanesh colony gave us for these proceedings and we gave our testimony before Aššur's dagger.

akk: IGI na-zi IGI PUZUR₄-a-na IGI aḫ-ša-lim
eng: Witnessed by Nazi, by Puzur-Anna, by Ah-šalim."
transliteration: IGI na-zi IGI PUZUR₄-a-na IGI aḫ-ša-lim
translation: Witnessed by Nazi, by Puzur-Anna, by Ah-šalim."

akk: 5 GÍN KÙ.BABBAR i-ṣé-er en-um-a-šur lu-zi-i i-šu 1 TÚG ku-ta-na-am a-na ša-na-at iš-tù a-lim{ki} ša 5 GÍN KÙ.BABBAR ú-šé-lá-am šu-ma a-dí ša-na-at ku-ta-na-am iš-tù a-lim{ki} ú-lá uš-té-li-am 10 GÍN KÙ.BABBAR a-na-kam i-ša-qal ITU.KAM té-i-na-tim li-mu-um e-lá-lí sà-an-gu₅-um
eng: Ennam-Aššur owes 5 shekels of silver to Luzi. He will bring one -textile worth 5 shekels of silver up here from the City within one year. If he has not brought a up here from the City in one year, he must pay 10 shekels of silver here. Month Tē'inātum, eponymy Elāli, the high priest.
transliteration: 5 GÍN KÙ.BABBAR i-ṣé-er en-um-a-šur lu-zi-i i-šu 1 TÚG ku-ta-na-am a-na ša-na-at iš-tù a-lim{ki} ša 5 GÍN KÙ.BABBAR ú-šé-lá-am šu-ma a-dí ša-na-at ku-ta-na-am iš-tù a-lim{ki} ú-lá uš-té-li-am 10 GÍN KÙ.BABBAR a-na-kam i-ša-qal ITU.KAM té-i-na-tim li-mu-um e-lá-lí sà-an-gu₅-um
translation: Ennam-Aššur owes 5 shekels of silver to Luzi. He will bring one -textile worth 5 shekels of silver up here from the City within one year. If he has not brought a up here from the City in one year, he must pay 10 shekels of silver here. Month Tē'inātum, eponymy Elāli, the high priest.

akk: IGI a-ta-ta IGI lá-qé-ep
eng: Witnessed by Atata, by Lā-qēp.
transliteration: IGI a-ta-ta IGI lá-qé-ep
translation: Witnessed by Atata, by Lā-qēp.

akk: 2 me-at 7 ma-na URUDU ší-kam ša i-ṣé-er i-tur₄-DINGIR ù e-lá-li DUMU me-er-e PUZUR₄-a-na šál-ma-a-šur i-šu-ú URUDU ki-ma šál-ma-a-šur en-um-a-šur me-ra-šu il₅-qé ṭup-pu-um ša 2 me-at 7 ma-na URUDU ša e-li-a-ni sà-ar
eng: 207 minas of šikku-copper that Itūr-ili and Elāli sons of Puzur-Anna owe to Šalim-Aššur — on behalf of Šalim-Aššur his son Ennam-Aššur has received the copper. Any tablet concerning 207 minas of copper which may turn up is invalid.
transliteration: 2 me-at 7 ma-na URUDU ší-kam ša i-ṣé-er i-tur₄-DINGIR ù e-lá-li DUMU me-er-e PUZUR₄-a-na šál-ma-a-šur i-šu-ú URUDU ki-ma šál-ma-a-šur en-um-a-šur me-ra-šu il₅-qé ṭup-pu-um ša 2 me-at 7 ma-na URUDU ša e-li-a-ni sà-ar
translation: 207 minas of šikku-copper that Itūr-ili and Elāli sons of Puzur-Anna owe to Šalim-Aššur — on behalf of Šalim-Aššur his son Ennam-Aššur has received the copper. Any tablet concerning 207 minas of copper which may turn up is invalid.

akk: IGI šu-bé-lim DUMU šu-IŠTAR IGI a-šur-re-ṣí DUMU LUGAL-sú-in IGI zu-ku-a DUMU a-šur-i-dí
eng: Witnessed by Šu-Bēlum son of Šu-Ištar, by Aššur-rēṣī son of Šar-Suen, by Zukuwa son of Aššur-idī.
transliteration: IGI šu-bé-lim DUMU šu-IŠTAR IGI a-šur-re-ṣí DUMU LUGAL-sú-in IGI zu-ku-a DUMU a-šur-i-dí
translation: Witnessed by Šu-Bēlum son of Šu-Ištar, by Aššur-rēṣī son of Šar-Suen, by Zukuwa son of Aššur-idī.

akk: 10 ma-na KÙ.BABBAR ṣa-ru-pu-um ni-is-ḫa-sú DIRI ša-du-a-sú ša-bu a-na ḫu-bu-li-a ša É a-bi-a ú-bi₄-il₅ a-ḫa-ma 1 ma-na KÙ.BABBAR ṣa-ru-pá-am <gap> ša a-lá-ḫi-im ša e-li-tí-šu ku-nu-ki-a a-na a-šùr-dan DUMU zu-ú NU.BÀNDA áp-qí-id
eng: I brought 10 minas of refined silver, its import duty added, its transport tariff paid for, for my debt to my father's house. Further, I entrusted 1 mina of refined silver belonging to Ali-ahum from his caravan, under my seal to Aššur-dan son of Zu'u, the lieutenant.
transliteration: 10 ma-na KÙ.BABBAR ṣa-ru-pu-um ni-is-ḫa-sú DIRI ša-du-a-sú ša-bu a-na ḫu-bu-li-a ša É a-bi-a ú-bi₄-il₅ a-ḫa-ma 1 ma-na KÙ.BABBAR ṣa-ru-pá-am <gap> ša a-lá-ḫi-im ša e-li-tí-šu ku-nu-ki-a a-na a-šùr-dan DUMU zu-ú NU.BÀNDA áp-qí-id
translation: I brought 10 minas of refined silver, its import duty added, its transport tariff paid for, for my debt to my father's house. Further, I entrusted 1 mina of refined silver belonging to Ali-ahum from his caravan, under my seal to Aššur-dan son of Zu'u, the lieutenant.

akk: IGI {d}MAR.TU-ba-ni DUMU ma-na-na IGI a-mur-{d}UTU DUMU mì-šu-GAL IGI ṣí-lu-lu DUMU ú-ku
eng: Witnessed by Amurrum-bāni son of Manana, by Amur-Šamaš son of Mišu-rabi, by Ṣilulu son of Uku.
transliteration: IGI {d}MAR.TU-ba-ni DUMU ma-na-na IGI a-mur-{d}UTU DUMU mì-šu-GAL IGI ṣí-lu-lu DUMU ú-ku
translation: Witnessed by Amurrum-bāni son of Manana, by Amur-Šamaš son of Mišu-rabi, by Ṣilulu son of Uku.

akk: 16 ma-na KÙ ṣa-ru-pá-am i-ṣé-er a-šùr-eš-tí-kál ù i-dí-a-bi₄-im i-sú-rik₁₃ i-šu
eng: Aššuriš-tikal and Iddin-abum owe 16 minas of refined silver to Issu-arik.
transliteration: 16 ma-na KÙ ṣa-ru-pá-am i-ṣé-er a-šùr-eš-tí-kál ù i-dí-a-bi₄-im i-sú-rik₁₃ i-šu
translation: Aššuriš-tikal and Iddin-abum owe 16 minas of refined silver to Issu-arik.

akk: IGI a-ku-za IGI ib-ni-sú-in
eng: Witnessed by Akuza, witnessed by Ibni-Suen.
transliteration: IGI a-ku-za IGI ib-ni-sú-in
translation: Witnessed by Akuza, witnessed by Ibni-Suen.

akk: IGI ku-ra DUMU i-dí-a-šur IGI en-nam-ì-lí IGI i-dí-a DUMU i-ku-nim
eng: Witnessed by Kura son of Iddin-Aššur, by Ennam-ilī, by Idiya son of Ikūnum.
transliteration: IGI ku-ra DUMU i-dí-a-šur IGI en-nam-ì-lí IGI i-dí-a DUMU i-ku-nim
translation: Witnessed by Kura son of Iddin-Aššur, by Ennam-ilī, by Idiya son of Ikūnum.

akk: 14 ma-na KÙ.BABBAR ṣa-ru-pá-am i-na ší-im SÍG.ḪI.A ša ú-ší-na-lam bu-zu-ta-a il₅-qé
eng: Buzutaya has received 14 minas of refined silver from the proceeds of Ušinalam's wool.
transliteration: 14 ma-na KÙ.BABBAR ṣa-ru-pá-am i-na ší-im SÍG.ḪI.A ša ú-ší-na-lam bu-zu-ta-a il₅-qé
translation: Buzutaya has received 14 minas of refined silver from the proceeds of Ušinalam's wool.

akk: IGI a-šùr-i-mì-tí DUMU du-dí-ki IGI iš-me-DINGIR IGI a-šùr-ba-ni IGI en-na-sú-in IGI a-šùr-e-mu-qí IGI aḫ-ša-lim
eng: Witnessed by Aššur-imittī son of Dudiki, by Išme-ilum, by Aššur-bāni, by Enna-Suen, by Aššur-emūqi, by Ah-šalim his son
transliteration: IGI a-šùr-i-mì-tí DUMU du-dí-ki IGI iš-me-DINGIR IGI a-šùr-ba-ni IGI en-na-sú-in IGI a-šùr-e-mu-qí IGI aḫ-ša-lim
translation: Witnessed by Aššur-imittī son of Dudiki, by Išme-ilum, by Aššur-bāni, by Enna-Suen, by Aššur-emūqi, by Ah-šalim his son

akk: me-er-e-šu
transliteration: me-er-e-šu

akk: 30 GÚ URUDU sà-ḫi-ra-am ša dur₄-ḫu-mì-it i-na ṣé-er ma-ma-ḫi-ir DUMU a-mur-IŠTAR ša-lim-a-šur i-šu i-na e-ra-bi₄-šu-ma ITU.KAM i-lá-ak KÙ.BABBAR a-na ša ki-ma šu-a-tí šu ú-šé-ba-lá-ma <gap> ki-ma <gap>-dí-ú URUDU i-ša-qal <gap> šu-ma lá ú-šé-bi₄-lam-ma ki-ma a-wa-at kà-ri-im ṣí-ib-tám ú-ṣa-áb
eng: Man-mahir son of Amur-Ištar owes 30 talents of -copper from Durhumit to Šalim-Aššur. When he arrives one month will pass, and then he will send silver to his representatives, and <gap> he will pay in copper. If he has not sent it (in time), he will pay interest in accordance with the rule of the colony.
transliteration: 30 GÚ URUDU sà-ḫi-ra-am ša dur₄-ḫu-mì-it i-na ṣé-er ma-ma-ḫi-ir DUMU a-mur-IŠTAR ša-lim-a-šur i-šu i-na e-ra-bi₄-šu-ma ITU.KAM i-lá-ak KÙ.BABBAR a-na ša ki-ma šu-a-tí šu ú-šé-ba-lá-ma <gap> ki-ma <gap>-dí-ú URUDU i-ša-qal <gap> šu-ma lá ú-šé-bi₄-lam-ma ki-ma a-wa-at kà-ri-im ṣí-ib-tám ú-ṣa-áb
translation: Man-mahir son of Amur-Ištar owes 30 talents of -copper from Durhumit to Šalim-Aššur. When he arrives one month will pass, and then he will send silver to his representatives, and <gap> he will pay in copper. If he has not sent it (in time), he will pay interest in accordance with the rule of the colony.

akk: IGI en-na-sú-in IGI sà-li-a IGI a-šur-na-da IGI SIG₅-pí-a-šur
eng: Witnessed by Enna-Suen, by Salliya by Aššur-nādā, by Damiq-pī-Aššur.
transliteration: IGI en-na-sú-in IGI sà-li-a IGI a-šur-na-da IGI SIG₅-pí-a-šur
translation: Witnessed by Enna-Suen, by Salliya by Aššur-nādā, by Damiq-pī-Aššur.

akk: 11 i-lá-tim ša URUDU ku-nu-ku ša en-nam-a-šur ù ra-bi₄-ṣí-im 6 ta-ma-lá-ku ša ṭup-pé ku-nu-ku ša en-nam-a-šur a-dí-da a-lá-ḫu-um ù ra-bi-ṣú-um ša a-na e-na-aḫ-DINGIR ni-ip-qí-du nu-šé-ṣí
eng: 11 containers with copper under the seal of Ennam-Aššur and the attorney; (and) 6 boxes with tablets under the seal of Ennam-Aššur, Adida, Ali-ahum and the attorney, which we entrusted to Enah-ilī, we brought out.
transliteration: 11 i-lá-tim ša URUDU ku-nu-ku ša en-nam-a-šur ù ra-bi₄-ṣí-im 6 ta-ma-lá-ku ša ṭup-pé ku-nu-ku ša en-nam-a-šur a-dí-da a-lá-ḫu-um ù ra-bi-ṣú-um ša a-na e-na-aḫ-DINGIR ni-ip-qí-du nu-šé-ṣí
translation: 11 containers with copper under the seal of Ennam-Aššur and the attorney; (and) 6 boxes with tablets under the seal of Ennam-Aššur, Adida, Ali-ahum and the attorney, which we entrusted to Enah-ilī, we brought out.

akk: IGI a-šur-ba-ni DUMU ku-ta-a IGI be-lúm-ba-ni DUMU a-šur-be-el-a-wa-tim
eng: Witnessed by Aššur-bani son of Kutaya, by Bēlum-bani son of Aššur-bēl-awātim.
transliteration: IGI a-šur-ba-ni DUMU ku-ta-a IGI be-lúm-ba-ni DUMU a-šur-be-el-a-wa-tim
translation: Witnessed by Aššur-bani son of Kutaya, by Bēlum-bani son of Aššur-bēl-awātim.

akk: a-na en-um-a-šur qí-bi-ma um-ma šu-nu-nu-ma a-na ma-lá na-áš-pé-er-tí-kà ša a-na ṣé-ri-a ù a-ṣé-er a-šùr-kà-ší-id tù-lá-pì-tù <gap> ni-ṣa-ba-sú um-ma šu-ut-ma e-lá-an KÙ.BABBAR 1.5 ma-na <gap>-ra-dí ku-nu-ki-šu <gap>-ḫi-im a-dí-in KÙ.BABBAR mì-ma la i-dí-na-am <gap> um-ma a-na-ku-ma <gap> šé-sí-am <gap> il₅-kà <gap> ma URUDU <gap> um-ma šu-ut-ma <gap> i-dí-nim um-ma a-na-ku-ma a-ša-ar-ma KÙ.BABBAR a-dí-na-ku-ni KÙ.BABBAR-ba ke-na-tí-ma lá-dí-šu-um um-ma šu-ut-ma a-ša-qal
eng: To Ennam-Aššur from Šu-Nūnu: in accordance with your missive which you wrote to me and to Aššur-kāšid we have seized him <gap> and he said: Apart from some 1.5 mina of silver <gap> under his seal <gap> I gave." He did not give me any silver! <gap> I said: "Produce for me <gap> copper." <gap> He answered: "<gap> in court." I answered: "In case I did give you the silver, should I in fact also give that very silver to him?" He answered: "I shall pay."
transliteration: a-na en-um-a-šur qí-bi-ma um-ma šu-nu-nu-ma a-na ma-lá na-áš-pé-er-tí-kà ša a-na ṣé-ri-a ù a-ṣé-er a-šùr-kà-ší-id tù-lá-pì-tù <gap> ni-ṣa-ba-sú um-ma šu-ut-ma e-lá-an KÙ.BABBAR 1.5 ma-na <gap>-ra-dí ku-nu-ki-šu <gap>-ḫi-im a-dí-in KÙ.BABBAR mì-ma la i-dí-na-am <gap> um-ma a-na-ku-ma <gap> šé-sí-am <gap> il₅-kà <gap> ma URUDU <gap> um-ma šu-ut-ma <gap> i-dí-nim um-ma a-na-ku-ma a-ša-ar-ma KÙ.BABBAR a-dí-na-ku-ni KÙ.BABBAR-ba ke-na-tí-ma lá-dí-šu-um um-ma šu-ut-ma a-ša-qal
translation: To Ennam-Aššur from Šu-Nūnu: in accordance with your missive which you wrote to me and to Aššur-kāšid we have seized him <gap> and he said: Apart from some 1.5 mina of silver <gap> under his seal <gap> I gave." He did not give me any silver! <gap> I said: "Produce for me <gap> copper." <gap> He answered: "<gap> in court." I answered: "In case I did give you the silver, should I in fact also give that very silver to him?" He answered: "I shall pay."

akk: IGI i-ku-pì-a DUMU a-da-lá-al IGI šu-IŠTAR DUMU šu-ku-tí-im
eng: Witnessed by Ikūn-pīya son of Adallal, by Šu-Ištar son of Šukkutum."
transliteration: IGI i-ku-pì-a DUMU a-da-lá-al IGI šu-IŠTAR DUMU šu-ku-tí-im
translation: Witnessed by Ikūn-pīya son of Adallal, by Šu-Ištar son of Šukkutum."

akk: i-sú-rik₁₃ a-na a-lim{ki} i-lá-ak-ma É-tí-šu ša bu-ri-im a-šar a-ni-i ša-lim-a-šùr wa-áš-bu-ni a-na tù-ud-ḫa-li-a a-ḫu tù-li a-na ší-mì-im i-dí-šu-nu a-na a-wa-tim a-ni-a-tim kà-ru-um kà-ni-iš i-dí-ni-a-tí-ma ṭup-pá-am ší-bu-tí-ni IGI GÍR ša a-šùr ni-dí-in
eng: As Issu-arik will go to the City, he sold his houses by the well, where at present Šalim-Aššur is living, to Tudhaliya the brother of Tuli. The Kanesh colony gave us for these proceedings, and we gave a tablet with our testimony before the dagger of Aššur.
transliteration: i-sú-rik₁₃ a-na a-lim{ki} i-lá-ak-ma É-tí-šu ša bu-ri-im a-šar a-ni-i ša-lim-a-šùr wa-áš-bu-ni a-na tù-ud-ḫa-li-a a-ḫu tù-li a-na ší-mì-im i-dí-šu-nu a-na a-wa-tim a-ni-a-tim kà-ru-um kà-ni-iš i-dí-ni-a-tí-ma ṭup-pá-am ší-bu-tí-ni IGI GÍR ša a-šùr ni-dí-in
translation: As Issu-arik will go to the City, he sold his houses by the well, where at present Šalim-Aššur is living, to Tudhaliya the brother of Tuli. The Kanesh colony gave us for these proceedings, and we gave a tablet with our testimony before the dagger of Aššur.

akk: IGI sú-kà-li-a DUMU a-mur-a-šùr IGI a-ku-za DUMU šu-a-nim IGI ú-ra-a DUMU ma-na
eng: Witnessed by Sukkalliya son of Amur-Aššur, by Akuza son of Šu-Anum, by Uraya son of Manana.
transliteration: IGI sú-kà-li-a DUMU a-mur-a-šùr IGI a-ku-za DUMU šu-a-nim IGI ú-ra-a DUMU ma-na
translation: Witnessed by Sukkalliya son of Amur-Aššur, by Akuza son of Šu-Anum, by Uraya son of Manana.

akk: 1 ma-na 15 GÍN KÙ.BABBAR ṣa-ru-pá-am i-ṣé-er ú-ṣur-ša-a-šur DUMU a-ta-ta aḫ-ša-lim i-šu iš-tù ḫa-muš-tim ša a-šur-ma-lik DUMU sú-kà-li-a a-na 12 ḫa-am-ša-tim i-ša-qal šu-ma la iš-qú-ul 1.5 GÍN.TA a-na 1 ma-na-im i-na ITU.KAM ṣí-ib-tám ú-ṣa-áb ITU.1.KAM ḫu-bu-ur li-mu-um a-šur-ma-lik DUMU a-lá-ḫi-im
eng: Uṣur-ša-Aššur son of Atata owes 1 mina 15 shekels of refined silver to Ah-šalim. Reckoned from the week of Aššur-malik son of Sukkalliya he is to pay within 12 weeks. If he has not paid he will add interest at the rate 1.5 shekel per month per mina. Month hubur, eponymy Aššur-malik son of Ali-ahum.
transliteration: 1 ma-na 15 GÍN KÙ.BABBAR ṣa-ru-pá-am i-ṣé-er ú-ṣur-ša-a-šur DUMU a-ta-ta aḫ-ša-lim i-šu iš-tù ḫa-muš-tim ša a-šur-ma-lik DUMU sú-kà-li-a a-na 12 ḫa-am-ša-tim i-ša-qal šu-ma la iš-qú-ul 1.5 GÍN.TA a-na 1 ma-na-im i-na ITU.KAM ṣí-ib-tám ú-ṣa-áb ITU.1.KAM ḫu-bu-ur li-mu-um a-šur-ma-lik DUMU a-lá-ḫi-im
translation: Uṣur-ša-Aššur son of Atata owes 1 mina 15 shekels of refined silver to Ah-šalim. Reckoned from the week of Aššur-malik son of Sukkalliya he is to pay within 12 weeks. If he has not paid he will add interest at the rate 1.5 shekel per month per mina. Month hubur, eponymy Aššur-malik son of Ali-ahum.

akk: IGI PUZUR₄-a-na DUMU en-nam-a-šur IGI a-la-ḫi-im DUMU šál-ma-a-šur
eng: Witnessed by Puzur-Anna son of Ennam-Aššur, by Ali-ahum son of Šalim-Aššur.
transliteration: IGI PUZUR₄-a-na DUMU en-nam-a-šur IGI a-la-ḫi-im DUMU šál-ma-a-šur
translation: Witnessed by Puzur-Anna son of Ennam-Aššur, by Ali-ahum son of Šalim-Aššur.

akk: i-ku-pí-a a-na ra-bi-ṣí-im ša šál-ma-a-šur iṣ-ba-at-ni-a-tí-ma um-ma i-ku-pí-a-ma i-na 40 GÚ URUDU SIG₅ ša áp-qí-du ŠÀ.BA 10 GÚ URUDU a-na-ku al-qé 30 GÚ URUDU a-ta tal-qé um-ma ra-bi-ṣú-um-ma a-na-ku al-qé um-ma ra-bi-ṣú-um-ma ù DUMU šál-ma-a-šur iš-tí i-dí-a-šur-ma ša-áš-ḫi-it-ni-a-tí
eng: Ikūn-pīya seized us against the attorney of Šalim-Aššur, and Ikūn-pīya said: Of the 40 talents of good copper that I entrusted, thereof I personally took 10 talents of copper and you took 30 talents of copper." The attorney answered: "I personally took it" The attorney continued: "And the son of Šalim-Aššur has been cleared for us Iddin-Aššur."
transliteration: i-ku-pí-a a-na ra-bi-ṣí-im ša šál-ma-a-šur iṣ-ba-at-ni-a-tí-ma um-ma i-ku-pí-a-ma i-na 40 GÚ URUDU SIG₅ ša áp-qí-du ŠÀ.BA 10 GÚ URUDU a-na-ku al-qé 30 GÚ URUDU a-ta tal-qé um-ma ra-bi-ṣú-um-ma a-na-ku al-qé um-ma ra-bi-ṣú-um-ma ù DUMU šál-ma-a-šur iš-tí i-dí-a-šur-ma ša-áš-ḫi-it-ni-a-tí
translation: Ikūn-pīya seized us against the attorney of Šalim-Aššur, and Ikūn-pīya said: Of the 40 talents of good copper that I entrusted, thereof I personally took 10 talents of copper and you took 30 talents of copper." The attorney answered: "I personally took it" The attorney continued: "And the son of Šalim-Aššur has been cleared for us Iddin-Aššur."

akk: IGI en-um-a-šur IGI DU₁₀-ṣí-lá-a-šur IGI lu-lu
eng: Witnessed by Ennam-Aššur by Ṭāb-ṣill-Aššur, by Lulu."
transliteration: IGI en-um-a-šur IGI DU₁₀-ṣí-lá-a-šur IGI lu-lu
translation: Witnessed by Ennam-Aššur by Ṭāb-ṣill-Aššur, by Lulu."

akk: 1 ma-na KÙ.BABBAR ša ḫi-na-a e-lá-ma a-na i-dí-sú-en₆ ú-šé-bi₄-il₅ ṣé-eḫ-ri-lí ú-bi₄-il₅
eng: 1 mina of silver belonging to hinnāya Elamma dispatched to Iddin-Suen, Ṣeher-ilī brought it away.
transliteration: 1 ma-na KÙ.BABBAR ša ḫi-na-a e-lá-ma a-na i-dí-sú-en₆ ú-šé-bi₄-il₅ ṣé-eḫ-ri-lí ú-bi₄-il₅
translation: 1 mina of silver belonging to hinnāya Elamma dispatched to Iddin-Suen, Ṣeher-ilī brought it away.

akk: IGI na-ni-a IGI a-šur-DU₁₀
eng: Witnessed by Naniya, by Aššur-ṭāb.
transliteration: IGI na-ni-a IGI a-šur-DU₁₀
translation: Witnessed by Naniya, by Aššur-ṭāb.

akk: <gap> pá-šu-ru ša IGI i-li-šu 1 ku-sí-um ša IGI a-šùr 1 kà-sú-um ša IGI ša-ru-ma-té-en 2 ḫa-we-ru ša ṭá-áb-té-en 1 kà-sú-um ša KÙ.BABBAR ú ší-ku-tù-um ša IGI ú-qú-ur 5 kà-ku-ú 2 qá-áb-li-a-tum 1 li-bu-um ša KÙ.BABBAR 1 ni-kà-sú ú 1 ṭup-pu-um ša is-ku-ri-im mì-ma a-nim ša DUMU ku-ra i-nu-mì e-kál-lu-šu en-um-a-šur ip-té-ú <gap> ta-at ku-ra e-zi-ib
eng: <gap> tables that were in front of his gods; 1 chair that was in front of Aššur; 1 goblet that was in front of Šarru-mātēn; 2 salt-, 1 silver goblet and a flask that was in front of Uqur; 5 weapons, 2 -containers, 1 heart of silver, 1emblem and 1 wax tablet - all this, belonging to Kura's son. When Ennam-Aššur opened his main house he left Kura's <gap>
transliteration: <gap> pá-šu-ru ša IGI i-li-šu 1 ku-sí-um ša IGI a-šùr 1 kà-sú-um ša IGI ša-ru-ma-té-en 2 ḫa-we-ru ša ṭá-áb-té-en 1 kà-sú-um ša KÙ.BABBAR ú ší-ku-tù-um ša IGI ú-qú-ur 5 kà-ku-ú 2 qá-áb-li-a-tum 1 li-bu-um ša KÙ.BABBAR 1 ni-kà-sú ú 1 ṭup-pu-um ša is-ku-ri-im mì-ma a-nim ša DUMU ku-ra i-nu-mì e-kál-lu-šu en-um-a-šur ip-té-ú <gap> ta-at ku-ra e-zi-ib
translation: <gap> tables that were in front of his gods; 1 chair that was in front of Aššur; 1 goblet that was in front of Šarru-mātēn; 2 salt-, 1 silver goblet and a flask that was in front of Uqur; 5 weapons, 2 -containers, 1 heart of silver, 1emblem and 1 wax tablet - all this, belonging to Kura's son. When Ennam-Aššur opened his main house he left Kura's <gap>

akk: IGI ku-ku-wa IGI ma-nu-ki-ì-lí-a
eng: Witnessed by Kukuwa, by Mannum-kī-iliya.
transliteration: IGI ku-ku-wa IGI ma-nu-ki-ì-lí-a
translation: Witnessed by Kukuwa, by Mannum-kī-iliya.

akk: 10 GÍN KÙ.BABBAR ú ni-is-ḫa-sú wa-ta-ar ša-du-a-sú ša-bu-ú ša i-ku-pí-a a-na PUZUR₄.IŠTAR i-na a-lim{ki} ḫa-bu-lu-ú a-na-kam šu-ḫu-bu-ur il₅-qé šu-ma i-ku-pí-a a-na PUZUR₄.IŠTAR lá i-ta-ḫa-ba-al a-na KÙ.BABBAR ša il₅-qé-ú ma-na-um ma-na i-ša-qal ITU.KAM ḫu-bu-ur li-mu-um bu-zu-ta-a
eng: The 10 shekels of silver, its import duty added, its transport tariff paid for, that Ikūn-pīya owes to Puzur-Ištar in the City - Šu-hubur has received that here. If Ikūn-pīya did not owe anything to Puzur-Ištar, he must pay (a fine of) mina for mina the silver he received. Month hubur, eponymy Buzutaya.
transliteration: 10 GÍN KÙ.BABBAR ú ni-is-ḫa-sú wa-ta-ar ša-du-a-sú ša-bu-ú ša i-ku-pí-a a-na PUZUR₄.IŠTAR i-na a-lim{ki} ḫa-bu-lu-ú a-na-kam šu-ḫu-bu-ur il₅-qé šu-ma i-ku-pí-a a-na PUZUR₄.IŠTAR lá i-ta-ḫa-ba-al a-na KÙ.BABBAR ša il₅-qé-ú ma-na-um ma-na i-ša-qal ITU.KAM ḫu-bu-ur li-mu-um bu-zu-ta-a
translation: The 10 shekels of silver, its import duty added, its transport tariff paid for, that Ikūn-pīya owes to Puzur-Ištar in the City - Šu-hubur has received that here. If Ikūn-pīya did not owe anything to Puzur-Ištar, he must pay (a fine of) mina for mina the silver he received. Month hubur, eponymy Buzutaya.

akk: IGI ṣí-lu-šu-da-ga-an IGI DINGIR-ma-a-šur
eng: Witnessed by Ṣilluš-Dagān, by Ilīma-Aššur.
transliteration: IGI ṣí-lu-šu-da-ga-an IGI DINGIR-ma-a-šur
translation: Witnessed by Ṣilluš-Dagān, by Ilīma-Aššur.

akk: ša i-na ba-áb-tim ša a-šùr-be-el-ma-al-ki-im ša iš-ti DUMU a-tù-ri-a ù a-mur-a-šùr ḫi-na-a iṣ-bu-tù-ma a-na e-lá-ma ip-qí-du 2 ma-na 13.5 GÍN KÙ.BABBAR ṣa-ru-pá-am e-lá-ma a-na a-lá-ḫi-im ù a-li-li ip-qí-du KÙ.BABBAR a-na a-lá-ḫi-im a-li-li ù ḫi-na-a a ba-re-šu-nu i-lá-ak
eng: that what hinnāya had seized as part of an outstanding claim of Aššur-bēl-malkim from Atūriya's son andfrom Amur-Aššur and had entrusted to Elamma - an amount of 2 minas 13.5 shekels of refined silver, which Elamma in turn had entrusted to Ali-ahum and Ali-ilī - that this silver will become the joint property / responsibility of Ali-ahum, Ali-ilī and hinnāya.
transliteration: ša i-na ba-áb-tim ša a-šùr-be-el-ma-al-ki-im ša iš-ti DUMU a-tù-ri-a ù a-mur-a-šùr ḫi-na-a iṣ-bu-tù-ma a-na e-lá-ma ip-qí-du 2 ma-na 13.5 GÍN KÙ.BABBAR ṣa-ru-pá-am e-lá-ma a-na a-lá-ḫi-im ù a-li-li ip-qí-du KÙ.BABBAR a-na a-lá-ḫi-im a-li-li ù ḫi-na-a a ba-re-šu-nu i-lá-ak
translation: that what hinnāya had seized as part of an outstanding claim of Aššur-bēl-malkim from Atūriya's son andfrom Amur-Aššur and had entrusted to Elamma - an amount of 2 minas 13.5 shekels of refined silver, which Elamma in turn had entrusted to Ali-ahum and Ali-ilī - that this silver will become the joint property / responsibility of Ali-ahum, Ali-ilī and hinnāya.

akk: a-na a-la-ḫi-im DUMU a-dí-la-at DUMU a-ta-a a-ḫi a-ta a-na a-wa-at ṭup-pí-im i-ḫi-id-ma iš-tí a-zu-ú tí-ir-ta-kà le-zi-ba-am
eng: to Ali-ahum son of Adad-ellat, (grand)son of Ataya. My dear brother, pay heed to the words of the letter and let your message be left with Azu.
transliteration: a-na a-la-ḫi-im DUMU a-dí-la-at DUMU a-ta-a a-ḫi a-ta a-na a-wa-at ṭup-pí-im i-ḫi-id-ma iš-tí a-zu-ú tí-ir-ta-kà le-zi-ba-am
translation: to Ali-ahum son of Adad-ellat, (grand)son of Ataya. My dear brother, pay heed to the words of the letter and let your message be left with Azu.

akk: kà-ni-iš ṣa-ḫe-er GAL kà-ru-um kà-ni-iš ṣa-ḫe-er GAL dí-nam i-di-in-ma <gap> ma-na KÙ.BABBAR be-ú-lá-at zi-ki-im a-na a-šùr-i-dí ir-ma-a-šùr i-ša-qal
eng: Kanesh colony in plenary session. The Kanesh colony in plenary session passed the following verdict: <gap> mina of silver, the working capital of Zikum to Aššur-idī Ir'am-Aššur shall pay.""
transliteration: kà-ni-iš ṣa-ḫe-er GAL kà-ru-um kà-ni-iš ṣa-ḫe-er GAL dí-nam i-di-in-ma <gap> ma-na KÙ.BABBAR be-ú-lá-at zi-ki-im a-na a-šùr-i-dí ir-ma-a-šùr i-ša-qal
translation: Kanesh colony in plenary session. The Kanesh colony in plenary session passed the following verdict: <gap> mina of silver, the working capital of Zikum to Aššur-idī Ir'am-Aššur shall pay.""

akk: 8 GÍN KÙ.BABBAR i-na ṣé-er {d}MAR.TU-ba-ni i-ri-šu-um i-šu a-na pá-ḫa-ar ad-ri-im i-ša-qal šu-ma lá iš-qúl 0.3333 GÍN.TA i-na ITU.KAM ú-ṣa-áb li-mu-um ša qá-tí a-mur-a-šur DUMU kà-ri-a
eng: Amurrum-bāni owes 8 shekels of silver to Irišum. He will pay at the gathering of the threshing floor. If he has not paid he will pay interest at the rate 0.3333 shekel per month. Eponymy after that of Amur-Aššur son of Karriya.
transliteration: 8 GÍN KÙ.BABBAR i-na ṣé-er {d}MAR.TU-ba-ni i-ri-šu-um i-šu a-na pá-ḫa-ar ad-ri-im i-ša-qal šu-ma lá iš-qúl 0.3333 GÍN.TA i-na ITU.KAM ú-ṣa-áb li-mu-um ša qá-tí a-mur-a-šur DUMU kà-ri-a
translation: Amurrum-bāni owes 8 shekels of silver to Irišum. He will pay at the gathering of the threshing floor. If he has not paid he will pay interest at the rate 0.3333 shekel per month. Eponymy after that of Amur-Aššur son of Karriya.

akk: a-na gám-ri-im ù ḫu-lu-qá-e ša ILLAT ì-lí-a-lim a-na mì-ma šu-um-šu ku-na-a a-na e-lá-ma ú-lá i-tù-ar a-na 30 ma-na AN.NA ša ku-na-a a-na ILLAT ì-li-a-lim nu-du-a-e i-dí-ú qá-de₈ ILLAT-ma a-na a-wi-tí-šu i-za-sú-um
eng: For expenses and losses of the caravan of Ilī-ālum, whatsoever, Kunnāya shall not raise claim against Elamma. As for the 30 minas of tin, for which Kunnāya served Ilī-ālum's caravan a notice, it will belong to him together with (the other members of) the caravan according to its declared value.
transliteration: a-na gám-ri-im ù ḫu-lu-qá-e ša ILLAT ì-lí-a-lim a-na mì-ma šu-um-šu ku-na-a a-na e-lá-ma ú-lá i-tù-ar a-na 30 ma-na AN.NA ša ku-na-a a-na ILLAT ì-li-a-lim nu-du-a-e i-dí-ú qá-de₈ ILLAT-ma a-na a-wi-tí-šu i-za-sú-um
translation: For expenses and losses of the caravan of Ilī-ālum, whatsoever, Kunnāya shall not raise claim against Elamma. As for the 30 minas of tin, for which Kunnāya served Ilī-ālum's caravan a notice, it will belong to him together with (the other members of) the caravan according to its declared value.

akk: am-tám ku-zi-zi du-šu-ba ú šu-ni-il₅-ga a ší-mì-im i-dí-nu-ma 15 GÍN KÙ.BABBAR lá-ma-sú-tum ta-áš-qú-ul-ma am-tám ku-zi-zi ta-áš-am šu-ma um-ma du-šu-ba-ma ù šu-ni-il₅-ga-ma a-ma-at-ni ni-ta-ru 0.5 ma-na KÙ.BABBAR i-ša-qú-lu-ma am-tám i-ta-ru šu-ma ma-ma-an i-tù-ra-am um-ma šu-ut-ma am-tum i-a-tum du-šu-ba ú šu-ni-il₅-ga ú É-sú-nu a-da-ga-al šu-ma KÙ.BABBAR-pì lá i-ta-ad-nu-nim am-tum ku-zi-zi am-tí ù a ší-mì-im a-da-ší
eng: The slave-girl Kuzizi Dušuba and Šunilga sold her and 15 shekels of silverLamassutum paid and bought the slave-girl Kuzizi. If Dušuba and Šunilga say: We want to take our slave-girl along", they will pay 0.5 mina of silver and then they can take the slave-girl along. If anybody vindicates her, saying: "The slave-girl is mine!" then I have a claim on Dušuba and Šunilga and their house. Should they not give me my silver then the slave-girl Kuzizi is my slave-girl and I can sell her."
transliteration: am-tám ku-zi-zi du-šu-ba ú šu-ni-il₅-ga a ší-mì-im i-dí-nu-ma 15 GÍN KÙ.BABBAR lá-ma-sú-tum ta-áš-qú-ul-ma am-tám ku-zi-zi ta-áš-am šu-ma um-ma du-šu-ba-ma ù šu-ni-il₅-ga-ma a-ma-at-ni ni-ta-ru 0.5 ma-na KÙ.BABBAR i-ša-qú-lu-ma am-tám i-ta-ru šu-ma ma-ma-an i-tù-ra-am um-ma šu-ut-ma am-tum i-a-tum du-šu-ba ú šu-ni-il₅-ga ú É-sú-nu a-da-ga-al šu-ma KÙ.BABBAR-pì lá i-ta-ad-nu-nim am-tum ku-zi-zi am-tí ù a ší-mì-im a-da-ší
translation: The slave-girl Kuzizi Dušuba and Šunilga sold her and 15 shekels of silverLamassutum paid and bought the slave-girl Kuzizi. If Dušuba and Šunilga say: We want to take our slave-girl along", they will pay 0.5 mina of silver and then they can take the slave-girl along. If anybody vindicates her, saying: "The slave-girl is mine!" then I have a claim on Dušuba and Šunilga and their house. Should they not give me my silver then the slave-girl Kuzizi is my slave-girl and I can sell her."

akk: ša e-lá-ma ù gal-da-a ni-kà-sí i-sí-ú-ma lu gám-ru-um ša ḫa-ra-nim lu ú-ku-ul-tù-šu ba-ti-iq 1 ma-na KÙ.BABBAR ṣa-ru-pá-am i-ṣé-er gal-da-a DUMU na-ku e-lá-ma i-šu iš-tù ḫa-mu-uš-tim ša am-ri-a ù i-ku-nim 1.5 GÍN.TA a ma-na-im ú-ṣa-áb ITU.KAM ṣí-ip-im li-mu-um a-bi₄-a DUMU šu-da-ga-an a-ḫa-ma ṭup-pu-um ḫa-ar-mu-um ša be-ú-lá-ti-šu i-ba-ší a-na a-wa-tim a-ni-a-tim ni-ìš a-lim{ki} nu-ta-mì-šu-nu
eng: that Elamma and Galdaya settled accounts with the result that after both travel expenses and his food allowance have been deducted, Elamma (still) has a claim of 1 mina of refined silver on Galdaya, the son of Naku. From the week of Amriya and Ikūnum he will add 1.5 shekel per mina per month. Month VII, year-eponymy of Abiya, son of Šu-Dagan. Separately, there still exists a valid record of his working capital. We made them swear an oath by the City for these words.
transliteration: ša e-lá-ma ù gal-da-a ni-kà-sí i-sí-ú-ma lu gám-ru-um ša ḫa-ra-nim lu ú-ku-ul-tù-šu ba-ti-iq 1 ma-na KÙ.BABBAR ṣa-ru-pá-am i-ṣé-er gal-da-a DUMU na-ku e-lá-ma i-šu iš-tù ḫa-mu-uš-tim ša am-ri-a ù i-ku-nim 1.5 GÍN.TA a ma-na-im ú-ṣa-áb ITU.KAM ṣí-ip-im li-mu-um a-bi₄-a DUMU šu-da-ga-an a-ḫa-ma ṭup-pu-um ḫa-ar-mu-um ša be-ú-lá-ti-šu i-ba-ší a-na a-wa-tim a-ni-a-tim ni-ìš a-lim{ki} nu-ta-mì-šu-nu
translation: that Elamma and Galdaya settled accounts with the result that after both travel expenses and his food allowance have been deducted, Elamma (still) has a claim of 1 mina of refined silver on Galdaya, the son of Naku. From the week of Amriya and Ikūnum he will add 1.5 shekel per mina per month. Month VII, year-eponymy of Abiya, son of Šu-Dagan. Separately, there still exists a valid record of his working capital. We made them swear an oath by the City for these words.

akk: KIŠIB ku-ra-áš-mì-iš DUMU GAL-na-pá-ḫi-im KIŠIB bu-li-na DUMU ra-bi₄-ša-qí-im KIŠIB šé-zu-ur DUMU kà-zu-ba KIŠIB a-šu-wa-an DUMU ḫa-ar-ša KIŠIB a-zu DUMU kà-zu KIŠIB ú-ra-a KIŠIB {d}MAR.TU-ba-ni me-er-ú ma-na-na KIŠIB zu-ba DUMU IŠTAR-pá-li-il₅ KIŠIB a-de₈-lá-at DUMU {d}IM-ba-ni
eng: Seal of Kurašmiš son of the chief of smiths, seal of Bulina son of the chief cupbearer, seal of Šezur son of Kazuba, seal of Ašuwan son of Harša, seal of Azu son of Kazu, seal of Uraya and the seal of Amurrum-bāni, sons of Manana, seal of Zuba son of Ištar-pālil, seal of Adad-ellat son of Adad-bāni.
transliteration: KIŠIB ku-ra-áš-mì-iš DUMU GAL-na-pá-ḫi-im KIŠIB bu-li-na DUMU ra-bi₄-ša-qí-im KIŠIB šé-zu-ur DUMU kà-zu-ba KIŠIB a-šu-wa-an DUMU ḫa-ar-ša KIŠIB a-zu DUMU kà-zu KIŠIB ú-ra-a KIŠIB {d}MAR.TU-ba-ni me-er-ú ma-na-na KIŠIB zu-ba DUMU IŠTAR-pá-li-il₅ KIŠIB a-de₈-lá-at DUMU {d}IM-ba-ni
translation: Seal of Kurašmiš son of the chief of smiths, seal of Bulina son of the chief cupbearer, seal of Šezur son of Kazuba, seal of Ašuwan son of Harša, seal of Azu son of Kazu, seal of Uraya and the seal of Amurrum-bāni, sons of Manana, seal of Zuba son of Ištar-pālil, seal of Adad-ellat son of Adad-bāni.

akk: ša ḫu-bu-ul a-šur-ba-ni DUMU sú-ku-ku 0.6666 ma-na KÙ.BABBAR a-na e-tí-šu i-ša-qal šu-ma lá ìš-qú-ul 1 ma-na-um 0.3333 ma-na i-lá-ak-šu-um a-na 1 ma-na KÙ.BABBAR ḫi-na-a i-šé-e-šu ITU.KAM áb-ša-ra-ni li-mu-um ip-ḫu-ru-um
eng: of the debt of Aššur-bāni, son of Sukkuku. He will pay 0.6666 mina of silver at the agreed time. If he does not pay per mina 0.3333 mina will amount for him (and) hinnāya will sue him for 1 mina of silver. Month V, eponymy of Iphurum.
transliteration: ša ḫu-bu-ul a-šur-ba-ni DUMU sú-ku-ku 0.6666 ma-na KÙ.BABBAR a-na e-tí-šu i-ša-qal šu-ma lá ìš-qú-ul 1 ma-na-um 0.3333 ma-na i-lá-ak-šu-um a-na 1 ma-na KÙ.BABBAR ḫi-na-a i-šé-e-šu ITU.KAM áb-ša-ra-ni li-mu-um ip-ḫu-ru-um
translation: of the debt of Aššur-bāni, son of Sukkuku. He will pay 0.6666 mina of silver at the agreed time. If he does not pay per mina 0.3333 mina will amount for him (and) hinnāya will sue him for 1 mina of silver. Month V, eponymy of Iphurum.

akk: ša ḫu-bu-ul i-dí-a-bi₄-im 20 ma-na KÙ.BABBAR ṣa-ru-pá-am iš-tù ḫa-mu-uš-tim ša li-ba-a a-na 13 ḫa-am-ša-tim i-ša-qal šu-ma lá iš-qú-ul 1.5 GÍN.TA i-na ITU.KAM a-na 1 ma-na-im ú-ṣa-áb šu-ma lá-ma u₄-mu-šu im-lu-ú-ni ṭup-pu-šu ša na-ru-qí-šu il₅-ta-áp-tù 5 ma-na KÙ.GI šu-mì šu-{d}EN.LÍL i-lá-pá-at
eng: Concerning the debt of Iddin-abum: Reckoned from the week of Libbaya he must pay 20 minas of refined silver within 13 weeks. If he has not paid (in time), he must pay interest at the rate 1.5 shekel per month per mina. If they have written the tablet for his joint-stock investment before the completion of his term, he shall book 5 minas of gold in Šu-Illil's name.
transliteration: ša ḫu-bu-ul i-dí-a-bi₄-im 20 ma-na KÙ.BABBAR ṣa-ru-pá-am iš-tù ḫa-mu-uš-tim ša li-ba-a a-na 13 ḫa-am-ša-tim i-ša-qal šu-ma lá iš-qú-ul 1.5 GÍN.TA i-na ITU.KAM a-na 1 ma-na-im ú-ṣa-áb šu-ma lá-ma u₄-mu-šu im-lu-ú-ni ṭup-pu-šu ša na-ru-qí-šu il₅-ta-áp-tù 5 ma-na KÙ.GI šu-mì šu-{d}EN.LÍL i-lá-pá-at
translation: Concerning the debt of Iddin-abum: Reckoned from the week of Libbaya he must pay 20 minas of refined silver within 13 weeks. If he has not paid (in time), he must pay interest at the rate 1.5 shekel per month per mina. If they have written the tablet for his joint-stock investment before the completion of his term, he shall book 5 minas of gold in Šu-Illil's name.

akk: 1 GÚ LÁ 10 ma-na URUDU i-ṣé-er PUZUR₄-{d}EN.ZU e-lá-ma i-šu i-na ad-ri-im i-ša-qal URUDU ta-pá-ša-ta-i-am za-ak-wa-am šu-ma i-na ú-me-šu lá iš-qú-ul ki-ma a-wa-at kà-ri-im tù-ur-ḫu-mì-it ṣí-ib-ta-am ú-ṣa-áb 10 GÍN KÙ.BABBAR a-ḫa-ma i-na ku-bu-ur ú-ṭí-tí-im i-na kà-ni-iš i-ša-qal šu-ma lá iš-qú-ul i tù-ur-ḫu-mì-it i-ṣé-ri-šu a-lá-qé
eng: 50 minas of copper Puzur-Suen owes to Elamma. At the time of the threshing he will weigh out pure copper of Tappašatta. If he does not pay when his term is up, he will add interest in accordance with the rule of the Durhumit colony. Separately he will pay 10 shekels of silver in Kanesh, when the barley is ripe. If he does not pay I will collect it in Durhumit for his account.
transliteration: 1 GÚ LÁ 10 ma-na URUDU i-ṣé-er PUZUR₄-{d}EN.ZU e-lá-ma i-šu i-na ad-ri-im i-ša-qal URUDU ta-pá-ša-ta-i-am za-ak-wa-am šu-ma i-na ú-me-šu lá iš-qú-ul ki-ma a-wa-at kà-ri-im tù-ur-ḫu-mì-it ṣí-ib-ta-am ú-ṣa-áb 10 GÍN KÙ.BABBAR a-ḫa-ma i-na ku-bu-ur ú-ṭí-tí-im i-na kà-ni-iš i-ša-qal šu-ma lá iš-qú-ul i tù-ur-ḫu-mì-it i-ṣé-ri-šu a-lá-qé
translation: 50 minas of copper Puzur-Suen owes to Elamma. At the time of the threshing he will weigh out pure copper of Tappašatta. If he does not pay when his term is up, he will add interest in accordance with the rule of the Durhumit colony. Separately he will pay 10 shekels of silver in Kanesh, when the barley is ripe. If he does not pay I will collect it in Durhumit for his account.

akk: ša 24 ma-na KÙ.BABBAR ṣa-ru-pá-am i-ṣé-er i-dí-a-bi-im a-šùr-be-el-a-wa-tim i-šu-ú iš-tù ḫa-mu-uš-tim ša li-ba-a ù ì-lí-iš-tí-kál a-na 20 ḫa-am-ša-tim i-ša-qal šu-ma lá iš-qú-ul 1.5 GÍN.TA a-na ma-na-im i-na ITU.1.KAM ú-ṣa-áb šu-ma ṭup-pu-šu i-lá-pu-tù 6 ma-na KÙ.GI šu-mì a-šùr-be-el-a-wa-tim i-lá-pá-at
eng: Concerning 24 minas of refined silver that Iddin-abum owes to Aššur-bēl-awātim. Reckoned from the week if Libbaya and Iliš-tikal he must pay within 20 weeks. If he has not paid (in time), he must pay interest at the rate 1.5 shekel per mina per month. If they write his tablet, he must book 6 minas of gold in the name of Aššur-bēl-awātim.
transliteration: ša 24 ma-na KÙ.BABBAR ṣa-ru-pá-am i-ṣé-er i-dí-a-bi-im a-šùr-be-el-a-wa-tim i-šu-ú iš-tù ḫa-mu-uš-tim ša li-ba-a ù ì-lí-iš-tí-kál a-na 20 ḫa-am-ša-tim i-ša-qal šu-ma lá iš-qú-ul 1.5 GÍN.TA a-na ma-na-im i-na ITU.1.KAM ú-ṣa-áb šu-ma ṭup-pu-šu i-lá-pu-tù 6 ma-na KÙ.GI šu-mì a-šùr-be-el-a-wa-tim i-lá-pá-at
translation: Concerning 24 minas of refined silver that Iddin-abum owes to Aššur-bēl-awātim. Reckoned from the week if Libbaya and Iliš-tikal he must pay within 20 weeks. If he has not paid (in time), he must pay interest at the rate 1.5 shekel per mina per month. If they write his tablet, he must book 6 minas of gold in the name of Aššur-bēl-awātim.

akk: kà-ni-iš kà-ru-um dí-nam i-dí-in-ma a-na lu-qú-tim ma-la a-na a-šur-be-el-a-wa-tim i-pí-iq-du-ma ša-lim-a-šùr ú-šé-ṣí-ú ṭup-pá-am ša ku-nu-ki-šu ša-lim-a-šùr a-na šu-ku-bi-im i-da-an a-na kur-ub-IŠTAR šu-ku-bu-um ú-lá i-tù-a-ar šu-ma a-na šu-ku-bi-im ma-ma-an i-tù-a-ar ša-lim-a-šùr ú-ba-áb-šu
eng: Kanesh colony. The colony has passed a verdict: for all the goods that were entrusted to Aššur-bēl-awātim, and which Šalim-Aššur had taken out, Šalim-Aššur will give a tablet bearing his seal to Šu-Kūbum. Šu-Kūbum will not raise claim against Kurub-Ištar. If anyone raises claim against Šu-Kūbum, Šalim-Aššur will clear him.
transliteration: kà-ni-iš kà-ru-um dí-nam i-dí-in-ma a-na lu-qú-tim ma-la a-na a-šur-be-el-a-wa-tim i-pí-iq-du-ma ša-lim-a-šùr ú-šé-ṣí-ú ṭup-pá-am ša ku-nu-ki-šu ša-lim-a-šùr a-na šu-ku-bi-im i-da-an a-na kur-ub-IŠTAR šu-ku-bu-um ú-lá i-tù-a-ar šu-ma a-na šu-ku-bi-im ma-ma-an i-tù-a-ar ša-lim-a-šùr ú-ba-áb-šu
translation: Kanesh colony. The colony has passed a verdict: for all the goods that were entrusted to Aššur-bēl-awātim, and which Šalim-Aššur had taken out, Šalim-Aššur will give a tablet bearing his seal to Šu-Kūbum. Šu-Kūbum will not raise claim against Kurub-Ištar. If anyone raises claim against Šu-Kūbum, Šalim-Aššur will clear him.

akk: 30 ma-na SÍG.ḪI.A na-ar-ba-tim <gap>-tim ša-kà-ki-iš i-ṣé-er a-šur-ták-lá-ku DUMU ḫu-li-a lá-ma-sà-tum tí-šu iš-tù ḫa-qá a-na ITU.2.KAM ù-šé-ba-lam šu-ma lá ú-uš-té-bi₄-lam-ma a É a-lim{ki} i-ta-lá-ak i-na tù-wa-ri-šu 1 GÚ SÍG.ḪI.A na-ar-ba-tim ša-kà-ki-iš i-ša-qal ITU.1.KAM ku-zal-lu li-mu-um a-šur-na-da DUMU PUZUR₄-a-na
eng: 30 <minas> of soft, <gap> woolfor making the weft Aššur-taklāku, son of huliya, owes to Lamassutum. He will send it from haqa within two months. If he has not sent it and has departed for? the City he will weigh out on his return one talent of soft wool for making the weft. Month XI, eponymy of Aššur-nādā, son of Puzur-Anna
transliteration: 30 ma-na SÍG.ḪI.A na-ar-ba-tim <gap>-tim ša-kà-ki-iš i-ṣé-er a-šur-ták-lá-ku DUMU ḫu-li-a lá-ma-sà-tum tí-šu iš-tù ḫa-qá a-na ITU.2.KAM ù-šé-ba-lam šu-ma lá ú-uš-té-bi₄-lam-ma a É a-lim{ki} i-ta-lá-ak i-na tù-wa-ri-šu 1 GÚ SÍG.ḪI.A na-ar-ba-tim ša-kà-ki-iš i-ša-qal ITU.1.KAM ku-zal-lu li-mu-um a-šur-na-da DUMU PUZUR₄-a-na
translation: 30 <minas> of soft, <gap> woolfor making the weft Aššur-taklāku, son of huliya, owes to Lamassutum. He will send it from haqa within two months. If he has not sent it and has departed for? the City he will weigh out on his return one talent of soft wool for making the weft. Month XI, eponymy of Aššur-nādā, son of Puzur-Anna

akk: ša ḫu-bu-ul i-dí-a-bi-im 13 ma-na KÙ.BABBAR ṣa-ru-pá-am iš-tù ḫa-mu-uš-tim ša kàr-ri-a a-na 36 ḫa-am-ša-tim i-ša-qal šu-ma lá iš-qú-ul 1.5 GÍN.TA i-na ITU.KAM a-na ma-na-im ú-ṣa-áb ša a-mur-IŠTAR ù a-šùr-i-mì-tí
eng: Concerning the debt of Iddin-abum of 13 minas of refined silver. Reckoned from the week of Karriya he must pay within 36 weeks. If he has not paid (in time), he must pay interest at the rate 1.5 shekel per month per mina. Concerning Amur-Ištar and Aššur-imittī.
transliteration: ša ḫu-bu-ul i-dí-a-bi-im 13 ma-na KÙ.BABBAR ṣa-ru-pá-am iš-tù ḫa-mu-uš-tim ša kàr-ri-a a-na 36 ḫa-am-ša-tim i-ša-qal šu-ma lá iš-qú-ul 1.5 GÍN.TA i-na ITU.KAM a-na ma-na-im ú-ṣa-áb ša a-mur-IŠTAR ù a-šùr-i-mì-tí
translation: Concerning the debt of Iddin-abum of 13 minas of refined silver. Reckoned from the week of Karriya he must pay within 36 weeks. If he has not paid (in time), he must pay interest at the rate 1.5 shekel per month per mina. Concerning Amur-Ištar and Aššur-imittī.

akk: kà-ni-iš kà-ru-um dí-nam i-dí-in-ma ša-lim-a-šùr ṭup-pí-šu ù mì-ma KÙ.BABBAR a-na ḫu-bu-ul i-dí-a-bi-im ú-ša-qí-lu ŠU.NÍGIN KÙ.BABBAR a-na me-er-e i-dí-a-bi-im i-qá-bé um-ma šu-ut-ma KÙ.BABBAR a-nàm a-ḫa-a ú-ša-qí-il₅
eng: Kanesh colony: The colony has passed a verdict stating that Šalim-Aššur shall mention to Iddin-abum's sons his tablets and what silver he has paid to cover Iddin-abum's debt - all the silver, saying: This silver I paid in different places."
transliteration: kà-ni-iš kà-ru-um dí-nam i-dí-in-ma ša-lim-a-šùr ṭup-pí-šu ù mì-ma KÙ.BABBAR a-na ḫu-bu-ul i-dí-a-bi-im ú-ša-qí-lu ŠU.NÍGIN KÙ.BABBAR a-na me-er-e i-dí-a-bi-im i-qá-bé um-ma šu-ut-ma KÙ.BABBAR a-nàm a-ḫa-a ú-ša-qí-il₅
translation: Kanesh colony: The colony has passed a verdict stating that Šalim-Aššur shall mention to Iddin-abum's sons his tablets and what silver he has paid to cover Iddin-abum's debt - all the silver, saying: This silver I paid in different places."

akk: a-ḫi-šu lu-qú-tám ša ša-lim-a-šur ša i-na ḫa-ḫi-im É i-sú-ri-ik ù me-er-ú i-dí-a-bi-im iṣ-bu-tù-ni-ma a ma-lá ṭup-pí-im ša dí-in a-lim{ki} ša kà-ku-a ub-lá-ni a-na lu-qú-tim ší-a-tí en-na-sú-in ù a-nu-li a-na ša-lim-a-šur ú-lá i-tù-ru
eng: his brother. As to the goods belonging to Šalim-Aššur that were in hahhum in the house of Issu-arik, and which the sons of Iddin-abum seized - in accordance with the tablet with a verdict of the City that Kakuwa brought, Enna-Suen and Anuli must not raise claim against Šalim-Aššur with respect to these goods.
transliteration: a-ḫi-šu lu-qú-tám ša ša-lim-a-šur ša i-na ḫa-ḫi-im É i-sú-ri-ik ù me-er-ú i-dí-a-bi-im iṣ-bu-tù-ni-ma a ma-lá ṭup-pí-im ša dí-in a-lim{ki} ša kà-ku-a ub-lá-ni a-na lu-qú-tim ší-a-tí en-na-sú-in ù a-nu-li a-na ša-lim-a-šur ú-lá i-tù-ru
translation: his brother. As to the goods belonging to Šalim-Aššur that were in hahhum in the house of Issu-arik, and which the sons of Iddin-abum seized - in accordance with the tablet with a verdict of the City that Kakuwa brought, Enna-Suen and Anuli must not raise claim against Šalim-Aššur with respect to these goods.

akk: i-na ITU.1.KAM ki-ma a-wa-at kà-ri-im ṣí-ib-tám ú-ṣa-áb ITU.KAM áb-ša-ra-ni li-mu-um ša qá-té a-bu-ša-lim DAM.GÀR DUMU ì-lí-a-lúm
eng: per month he will add interest in conformity with the rule of the karum. Month V, the eponymy of the successor of Abu-salim, the trader, son of Ili-alum.
transliteration: i-na ITU.1.KAM ki-ma a-wa-at kà-ri-im ṣí-ib-tám ú-ṣa-áb ITU.KAM áb-ša-ra-ni li-mu-um ša qá-té a-bu-ša-lim DAM.GÀR DUMU ì-lí-a-lúm
translation: per month he will add interest in conformity with the rule of the karum. Month V, the eponymy of the successor of Abu-salim, the trader, son of Ili-alum.

akk: 1.5 ma-na URUDU a-na qá-tí-šu-nu ú-ra-dí
eng: I have added 1.5 mina of copper to their account.
transliteration: 1.5 ma-na URUDU a-na qá-tí-šu-nu ú-ra-dí
translation: I have added 1.5 mina of copper to their account.

akk: KIŠIB en-na-nim DUMU a-lá-bi₄-im KIŠIB a-šùr-na-da DUMU ir-nu-id KIŠIB kà-ta-tim DUMU ma-la-ba KIŠIB nu-ur-{d}EN.ZU DUMU {d}MUŠ-mu-ta-bíl
eng: Sealed by Ennānum son of Ali-abum, by Aššur-nādā son of Irnuid, by Katātum son of Malaba, by Nūr-Suen son of Nirah-muttabbil,
transliteration: KIŠIB en-na-nim DUMU a-lá-bi₄-im KIŠIB a-šùr-na-da DUMU ir-nu-id KIŠIB kà-ta-tim DUMU ma-la-ba KIŠIB nu-ur-{d}EN.ZU DUMU {d}MUŠ-mu-ta-bíl
translation: Sealed by Ennānum son of Ali-abum, by Aššur-nādā son of Irnuid, by Katātum son of Malaba, by Nūr-Suen son of Nirah-muttabbil,

akk: a-na É šál-ma-a-šùr a-na a-wa-tim né-ru-ub-ma um-ma šál-ma-a-šùr-ma i-a-tí a-na bu-ru-uš-ḫa-dim i-na ma-ak-sú-e-im a-na ḫu-bu-ul ÌR a-bu-ša-lim ša-qá-lim i-ra-de₈-ú-ni a-ta 30 TÚG ku-ta-ni ù ANŠE ṣa-lá-ma-am ša ÌR ta-lá-qé-e um-ma šu-be-lúm-ma ke-na ša ÌR-dí-a a-bu-ša-lim al-qé ša-lim-a-šur ša ni-iš a-lim{ki} úz-na-tí-ni il₅-pu-ut um-ma ša-lim-a-šur-ma a-šar ÌR a-na ÌR-dí-kà lá i-tù-ru-ú ma-a a-na ÌR-dí-a i-tù-wa-ar um-ma šu-be-lúm-ma šu-ma a-na ku-a-im i-tù-a-ar a-na TÚG.ḪI.A ù ANŠE.ḪI.A a-za-za-kum a-na a-wa-tim a-ni-a-tim kà-ru-um kà-ni-iš i-dí-ni-a-tí-ma IGI GÍR ša a-šùr ší-bu-tí-ni ni-dí-in
eng: We entered Šalim-Aššur's house to settle the case, and Šalim-Aššur said: While they are going to lead me personally to Burušhaddum in fetters to pay the debt of the slave Abu-šalim, will you on the other hand take 30 -textiles and a black donkey from the slave?"Šu-Bēlum answered: "Yes, I have taken what belongs to my slave Abu-šalim." Šalim-Aššur impressed on us what had been sworn by the City, and Šalim-Aššur said: "In case the slave does not raise claim against your slave, then, will he raise claims against my slave?" Šu-Bēlum answered: "If he raises claim against yours, then I guarantee for the textiles and the donkey for you." The Kanesh colony gave us for these proceedings, and we gave our testimony before Aššur's dagger.
transliteration: a-na É šál-ma-a-šùr a-na a-wa-tim né-ru-ub-ma um-ma šál-ma-a-šùr-ma i-a-tí a-na bu-ru-uš-ḫa-dim i-na ma-ak-sú-e-im a-na ḫu-bu-ul ÌR a-bu-ša-lim ša-qá-lim i-ra-de₈-ú-ni a-ta 30 TÚG ku-ta-ni ù ANŠE ṣa-lá-ma-am ša ÌR ta-lá-qé-e um-ma šu-be-lúm-ma ke-na ša ÌR-dí-a a-bu-ša-lim al-qé ša-lim-a-šur ša ni-iš a-lim{ki} úz-na-tí-ni il₅-pu-ut um-ma ša-lim-a-šur-ma a-šar ÌR a-na ÌR-dí-kà lá i-tù-ru-ú ma-a a-na ÌR-dí-a i-tù-wa-ar um-ma šu-be-lúm-ma šu-ma a-na ku-a-im i-tù-a-ar a-na TÚG.ḪI.A ù ANŠE.ḪI.A a-za-za-kum a-na a-wa-tim a-ni-a-tim kà-ru-um kà-ni-iš i-dí-ni-a-tí-ma IGI GÍR ša a-šùr ší-bu-tí-ni ni-dí-in
translation: We entered Šalim-Aššur's house to settle the case, and Šalim-Aššur said: While they are going to lead me personally to Burušhaddum in fetters to pay the debt of the slave Abu-šalim, will you on the other hand take 30 -textiles and a black donkey from the slave?"Šu-Bēlum answered: "Yes, I have taken what belongs to my slave Abu-šalim." Šalim-Aššur impressed on us what had been sworn by the City, and Šalim-Aššur said: "In case the slave does not raise claim against your slave, then, will he raise claims against my slave?" Šu-Bēlum answered: "If he raises claim against yours, then I guarantee for the textiles and the donkey for you." The Kanesh colony gave us for these proceedings, and we gave our testimony before Aššur's dagger.

akk: 4 GÍN KÙ.BABBAR i-ṣé-er <gap>-a-šur DAM.GÀR i-šu ITU.KAM a-lá-na-tim a-na ITU.KAM i-ša-qal šu-ma lá iš-qúl 0.3333 GÍN.TA i-na ITU.KAM ú-ṣa-áb li-mu-um a-šùr-na-da ḫa-mu-uš-tum ša qá-té kà-ar-wa-a
eng: 4 shekels of silver <gap>-Aššur owes to the creditor. Contracted in month XII. He will pay within a month. If he does not pay he will add as interest 0.3333 shekel per month Year eponymy of Aššur-nādā, week eponymy of the successor of Karwaya.
transliteration: 4 GÍN KÙ.BABBAR i-ṣé-er <gap>-a-šur DAM.GÀR i-šu ITU.KAM a-lá-na-tim a-na ITU.KAM i-ša-qal šu-ma lá iš-qúl 0.3333 GÍN.TA i-na ITU.KAM ú-ṣa-áb li-mu-um a-šùr-na-da ḫa-mu-uš-tum ša qá-té kà-ar-wa-a
translation: 4 shekels of silver <gap>-Aššur owes to the creditor. Contracted in month XII. He will pay within a month. If he does not pay he will add as interest 0.3333 shekel per month Year eponymy of Aššur-nādā, week eponymy of the successor of Karwaya.

akk: ša ni-iš a-lim{ki} ta-mu-ú-ni uz-na-tí-šu-nu al-pu-ut
eng: I impressed upon them what was sworn by the City.
transliteration: ša ni-iš a-lim{ki} ta-mu-ú-ni uz-na-tí-šu-nu al-pu-ut
translation: I impressed upon them what was sworn by the City.

akk: a-nu-pí-a ki-ma me-er-e šál-ma-a-šur a-na ga-al-ga-li-a ù ḫa-ar-šu-ma-an iṣ-ba-at-ni-a-tí-ma ṭup-pá-am ša 10 ma-na KÙ.BABBAR ša ḫu-bu-li-šu-nu iš-me-ú um-ma a-nu-pí-a-ma ṭup-pu-um lá ku-nu-ku-kà-a um-ma ga-al-ga-li-a-ma ku-nu-ku-a a-ma ḫa-ar-šu-um-nu-ma-an-ma ša-qí-il₅ KÙ.BABBAR-pì-im um-ma a-nu-pí-a-ma me-er-ú me-tim né-nu lu a-na šál-ma-a-šur KÙ.BABBAR ta-áš-qú-ul lu a-na me-er-e šál-ma-a-šur ta-áš-qú-ul a-na a-ni-e-ma ru-a-am um-ma ḫa-ar-šu-um-nu-ma-an-ma KÙ.BABBAR a-na-ku ša ṭup-pì-ni šál-ma-a-šur ú-ša-bi₄-i a-na i-id a-ša-kà-na-ku-nu-tí a-na a-wa-tim a-ni-a-tim kà-ru-um kà-né-eš i-dí-ni-a-tí-ma IGI GÍR ša a-šur ší-bu-tí-ni ni-dí-in
eng: Representing the sons of Šalim-Aššur Anupiya seized us against Galgaliya and haršumnuman, and they heard a tablet concerning 10 minas of silver, their debt. Anupiya said: Does the tablet not bear your seals?" Galgaliya answered: "They are my sealings. However, haršumnuman is the one who paid the silver." Anupiya said: "We are inheritors. Produce evidence for this, that you have either paid the silver to Šalim-Aššur or have paid to the sons of Šalim-Aššur." haršumnuman said: "I personally satisfied Šalim-Aššur with the silver of our tablet. I am willing to go to the River for you." The Kanesh colony gave us (as witnesses)for these proceedings, and we gave our testimony before Aššur's dagger.
transliteration: a-nu-pí-a ki-ma me-er-e šál-ma-a-šur a-na ga-al-ga-li-a ù ḫa-ar-šu-ma-an iṣ-ba-at-ni-a-tí-ma ṭup-pá-am ša 10 ma-na KÙ.BABBAR ša ḫu-bu-li-šu-nu iš-me-ú um-ma a-nu-pí-a-ma ṭup-pu-um lá ku-nu-ku-kà-a um-ma ga-al-ga-li-a-ma ku-nu-ku-a a-ma ḫa-ar-šu-um-nu-ma-an-ma ša-qí-il₅ KÙ.BABBAR-pì-im um-ma a-nu-pí-a-ma me-er-ú me-tim né-nu lu a-na šál-ma-a-šur KÙ.BABBAR ta-áš-qú-ul lu a-na me-er-e šál-ma-a-šur ta-áš-qú-ul a-na a-ni-e-ma ru-a-am um-ma ḫa-ar-šu-um-nu-ma-an-ma KÙ.BABBAR a-na-ku ša ṭup-pì-ni šál-ma-a-šur ú-ša-bi₄-i a-na i-id a-ša-kà-na-ku-nu-tí a-na a-wa-tim a-ni-a-tim kà-ru-um kà-né-eš i-dí-ni-a-tí-ma IGI GÍR ša a-šur ší-bu-tí-ni ni-dí-in
translation: Representing the sons of Šalim-Aššur Anupiya seized us against Galgaliya and haršumnuman, and they heard a tablet concerning 10 minas of silver, their debt. Anupiya said: Does the tablet not bear your seals?" Galgaliya answered: "They are my sealings. However, haršumnuman is the one who paid the silver." Anupiya said: "We are inheritors. Produce evidence for this, that you have either paid the silver to Šalim-Aššur or have paid to the sons of Šalim-Aššur." haršumnuman said: "I personally satisfied Šalim-Aššur with the silver of our tablet. I am willing to go to the River for you." The Kanesh colony gave us (as witnesses)for these proceedings, and we gave our testimony before Aššur's dagger.

akk: É šál-ma-a-šùr a-na a-wa-tim né-ru-ub-ma um-ma šál-ma-a-šùr-ma i-a-tí a-na bu-ru-uš-ḫa-dim i-na ma-ak-sú-im a-na ḫu-bu-ul ÌR a-bu-ša-lim ša-qá-lim i-ra-de₈-ú-ni a-ta 30 TÚG ku-ta-ni ù ANŠE ṣa-lá-ma-am ša ÌR tal-qé um-ma šu-be-lúm-ma ke-na ša ÌR-dí-a a-bu-ša-lim al-qé ša-lim-a-šur ša ni-iš a-lim{ki} úz-na-tí-ni il₅-pu-ut um-ma šál-ma-a-šur-ma a-šar ÌR a-na wa-ar-dí-kà lá i-tù-ru ma-a a-na wa-ar-dí-a i-tù-ar um-ma šu-be-lúm-ma šu-ma a-na ku-a-im i-tù-ar a-na TÚG.ḪI.A ù ANŠE a-za-za-kum a-na a-wa-tim a-ni-a-tim kà-ru-um kà-né-eš i-dí-ni-a-tí-ma IGI GÍR ša a-šur ší-bu-tí-ni ni-dí-in
eng: We entered Šalim-Aššur's house to settle the case, and Šalim-Aššur said: While they are going to lead me to Burušhaddum in fetters in order to pay the debt of the slave Abu-šalim, you on the other hand have taken 30 -textiles and a black donkey from the slave." Šu-Bēlum answered: "Yes, I have taken what belongs to my slave Abu-šalim." Šalim-Aššur impressed on us what was sworn by the City, and Šalim-Aššur said: "In case the slave does not raise claim against your slave, will he then raise claim against my slave?" Šu-Bēlum answered: "If he raises claim against yours, I shall guarantee for the textiles and the donkey." The Kanesh colony gave us for these proceedings and we gave our testimony before Aššur's dagger.
transliteration: É šál-ma-a-šùr a-na a-wa-tim né-ru-ub-ma um-ma šál-ma-a-šùr-ma i-a-tí a-na bu-ru-uš-ḫa-dim i-na ma-ak-sú-im a-na ḫu-bu-ul ÌR a-bu-ša-lim ša-qá-lim i-ra-de₈-ú-ni a-ta 30 TÚG ku-ta-ni ù ANŠE ṣa-lá-ma-am ša ÌR tal-qé um-ma šu-be-lúm-ma ke-na ša ÌR-dí-a a-bu-ša-lim al-qé ša-lim-a-šur ša ni-iš a-lim{ki} úz-na-tí-ni il₅-pu-ut um-ma šál-ma-a-šur-ma a-šar ÌR a-na wa-ar-dí-kà lá i-tù-ru ma-a a-na wa-ar-dí-a i-tù-ar um-ma šu-be-lúm-ma šu-ma a-na ku-a-im i-tù-ar a-na TÚG.ḪI.A ù ANŠE a-za-za-kum a-na a-wa-tim a-ni-a-tim kà-ru-um kà-né-eš i-dí-ni-a-tí-ma IGI GÍR ša a-šur ší-bu-tí-ni ni-dí-in
translation: We entered Šalim-Aššur's house to settle the case, and Šalim-Aššur said: While they are going to lead me to Burušhaddum in fetters in order to pay the debt of the slave Abu-šalim, you on the other hand have taken 30 -textiles and a black donkey from the slave." Šu-Bēlum answered: "Yes, I have taken what belongs to my slave Abu-šalim." Šalim-Aššur impressed on us what was sworn by the City, and Šalim-Aššur said: "In case the slave does not raise claim against your slave, will he then raise claim against my slave?" Šu-Bēlum answered: "If he raises claim against yours, I shall guarantee for the textiles and the donkey." The Kanesh colony gave us for these proceedings and we gave our testimony before Aššur's dagger.

akk: 1 ma-na 10 GÍN KÙ.BABBAR i-ṣé-er i-dí-IŠTAR i-sú-rik₁₃ i-šu šu-ma 15 GÍN KÙ.BABBAR i-na a-lá-ki-a lá eš-ta-aq-lu a-na KÙ.BABBAR ù ṣí-ba-tí-šu ša-ki-li ú-u₄-me-a a-tù-wa-ar-šum i-ri-šum
eng: Iddin-Ištar owes 1 mina 10 shekels of silver to Issu-arik. If he has not paid 15 shekels of silver when I arrive, then I shall raise claim against him for the silver and the accrued interest for the entire period. (Concerning) Irišum.
transliteration: 1 ma-na 10 GÍN KÙ.BABBAR i-ṣé-er i-dí-IŠTAR i-sú-rik₁₃ i-šu šu-ma 15 GÍN KÙ.BABBAR i-na a-lá-ki-a lá eš-ta-aq-lu a-na KÙ.BABBAR ù ṣí-ba-tí-šu ša-ki-li ú-u₄-me-a a-tù-wa-ar-šum i-ri-šum
translation: Iddin-Ištar owes 1 mina 10 shekels of silver to Issu-arik. If he has not paid 15 shekels of silver when I arrive, then I shall raise claim against him for the silver and the accrued interest for the entire period. (Concerning) Irišum.

akk: 10 ma-na KÙ.BABBAR ṣa-ru-pu-um iš-tí PUZUR₄-a-na ni-a-im iš-tù-i-ša-qal ḫa-mu-uš-tim ša a-šur-ta-ak-lá-ku ù kà-sí-a a-na 30 ḫa-am-ša-tim šu-ma lá iš-qúl 0.5 GÍN.TA i-na ITU.KAM a-na 1 ma-na-im ṣí-ib-tám ú-ṣa-áb ITU.KAM té-i-na-tim li-mu-um a-mur-a-šur
eng: 10 minas of refined silver is owed by our own Puzur-Anna. Reckoned from the week of Aššur-taklāku and Kasiya he is to pay in 30 weeks. If he has not paid (in time), he will add interest at the rate 1.5 shekel per month per mina. Month Te'inātum, eponymy Amur-Aššur
transliteration: 10 ma-na KÙ.BABBAR ṣa-ru-pu-um iš-tí PUZUR₄-a-na ni-a-im iš-tù-i-ša-qal ḫa-mu-uš-tim ša a-šur-ta-ak-lá-ku ù kà-sí-a a-na 30 ḫa-am-ša-tim šu-ma lá iš-qúl 0.5 GÍN.TA i-na ITU.KAM a-na 1 ma-na-im ṣí-ib-tám ú-ṣa-áb ITU.KAM té-i-na-tim li-mu-um a-mur-a-šur
translation: 10 minas of refined silver is owed by our own Puzur-Anna. Reckoned from the week of Aššur-taklāku and Kasiya he is to pay in 30 weeks. If he has not paid (in time), he will add interest at the rate 1.5 shekel per month per mina. Month Te'inātum, eponymy Amur-Aššur

akk: 2.5 ma-na KÙ.BABBAR ṣa-ru-pá-am i-ṣé-er PUZUR₄.IŠTAR DUMU dan-a-šur a-šur-iš-ta-kál i-šu ITU.KAM ku-zal-le li-mu-um a-šur-i-mì-tí ma-lá-ḫu-um a-na 3 ITU.KAM i-ša-qal šu-ma lá iš-qú-ul ki-ma a-wa-at kà-ri-im ṣí-ib-tám ú-ṣa-áb KÙ.BABBAR a-le-e ni-na-mu-ru-ú i-ša-qal
eng: Puzur-Ištar son of Dan-Aššur owes 2.5 minas of refined silver to Aššuriš-takal. Month Kuzallu, eponymy Aššur-imittī, the skipper. He is to pay within 3 months; if he has not paid (in time) he shall add interest according to the rule of the colony. He is to pay the silver wherever we meet.
transliteration: 2.5 ma-na KÙ.BABBAR ṣa-ru-pá-am i-ṣé-er PUZUR₄.IŠTAR DUMU dan-a-šur a-šur-iš-ta-kál i-šu ITU.KAM ku-zal-le li-mu-um a-šur-i-mì-tí ma-lá-ḫu-um a-na 3 ITU.KAM i-ša-qal šu-ma lá iš-qú-ul ki-ma a-wa-at kà-ri-im ṣí-ib-tám ú-ṣa-áb KÙ.BABBAR a-le-e ni-na-mu-ru-ú i-ša-qal
translation: Puzur-Ištar son of Dan-Aššur owes 2.5 minas of refined silver to Aššuriš-takal. Month Kuzallu, eponymy Aššur-imittī, the skipper. He is to pay within 3 months; if he has not paid (in time) he shall add interest according to the rule of the colony. He is to pay the silver wherever we meet.

akk: a-na a-šùr-mu-ta-bi-il₅ qí-bi-ma šu-ma KÙ.BABBAR lá iš-ta-qal na-áš-pè-ra-tim ta-ga-<gap>-tí
eng: To Aššur-muttabbil: If he has not paid the silver, then you must <gap> the missives.
transliteration: a-na a-šùr-mu-ta-bi-il₅ qí-bi-ma šu-ma KÙ.BABBAR lá iš-ta-qal na-áš-pè-ra-tim ta-ga-<gap>-tí
translation: To Aššur-muttabbil: If he has not paid the silver, then you must <gap> the missives.

akk: šál-ma-a-šùr a-ṣé-er a-mur-IŠTAR ú-ṭá-ḫi-ú-ni-a-tí-ma um-ma šál-ma-a-šur-ma a-na a-mur-IŠTAR-ma mì-šu-um ší-im TÚG-ba-tí-a URUDU ta-aṣ-ba-at um-ma a-mur-IŠTAR-ma ke-na 4 GÚ lá-mu-nam aṣ-ba-at ba-lu-um ḫi-na-a ú ší-bé aṣ-ba-at um-ma ša-lim-a-šur-ma ḫa-bu-ra-ta-i-am tal-qé um-ma a-mur-IŠTAR-ma ša i qá-tim <gap>-ta-šu-šu al-qé um-ma a-mur-IŠTAR-ma a-ta lu-qú-tí ša 10 ma-na KÙ.BABBAR ta-aṣ-ba-at um-ma ša-lim-a-šur mì-ma lá aṣ-ba-at-ma um-ma a-mur-IŠTAR-ma a ṣú-ḫa-ri-a a za-al-pá áš-ta-pár ṣú-ḫa-ri li-li-kam-ma lá-ta-wu um-ma a-mur-IŠTAR-ma a-na-ku a-šé-e-kà ú-ul a-ta ta-šé-e-a-ni
eng: Šalim-Aššur made us approach Amur-Ištar, and Šalim-Aššur said to Amur-Ištar: Why have you seized the copper that was the proceeds from my textiles?" Amur-Ištar answered: "Yes, I have seized 4 talents of poor copper. I seized it without hinnaya's permission and without witnesses." Šalim-Aššur said: "Did you take copper from haburat?" Amur-Ištar answered: "I took what I could grab." Amur Ištar continued: "But did you not seize my merchandise worth 10 minas of silver?" Šalim-Aššur answered: "I have seized nothing." Amur-Ištar said: "I have sent my servant to Zalpa. When my servant comes I shall discuss (further)." Amur-Ištar continued: "It is I who am suing you, not you who are suing me."
transliteration: šál-ma-a-šùr a-ṣé-er a-mur-IŠTAR ú-ṭá-ḫi-ú-ni-a-tí-ma um-ma šál-ma-a-šur-ma a-na a-mur-IŠTAR-ma mì-šu-um ší-im TÚG-ba-tí-a URUDU ta-aṣ-ba-at um-ma a-mur-IŠTAR-ma ke-na 4 GÚ lá-mu-nam aṣ-ba-at ba-lu-um ḫi-na-a ú ší-bé aṣ-ba-at um-ma ša-lim-a-šur-ma ḫa-bu-ra-ta-i-am tal-qé um-ma a-mur-IŠTAR-ma ša i qá-tim <gap>-ta-šu-šu al-qé um-ma a-mur-IŠTAR-ma a-ta lu-qú-tí ša 10 ma-na KÙ.BABBAR ta-aṣ-ba-at um-ma ša-lim-a-šur mì-ma lá aṣ-ba-at-ma um-ma a-mur-IŠTAR-ma a ṣú-ḫa-ri-a a za-al-pá áš-ta-pár ṣú-ḫa-ri li-li-kam-ma lá-ta-wu um-ma a-mur-IŠTAR-ma a-na-ku a-šé-e-kà ú-ul a-ta ta-šé-e-a-ni
translation: Šalim-Aššur made us approach Amur-Ištar, and Šalim-Aššur said to Amur-Ištar: Why have you seized the copper that was the proceeds from my textiles?" Amur-Ištar answered: "Yes, I have seized 4 talents of poor copper. I seized it without hinnaya's permission and without witnesses." Šalim-Aššur said: "Did you take copper from haburat?" Amur-Ištar answered: "I took what I could grab." Amur Ištar continued: "But did you not seize my merchandise worth 10 minas of silver?" Šalim-Aššur answered: "I have seized nothing." Amur-Ištar said: "I have sent my servant to Zalpa. When my servant comes I shall discuss (further)." Amur-Ištar continued: "It is I who am suing you, not you who are suing me."

akk: 2 GÍN KÙ.KI i-ṣé-er i-dí-na-bi-im DUMU šu-IŠTAR a-lá-ḫu-um i-šu iš-tù ITU.1.KAM ḫu-bu-ur a-na ITU.2.KAM i-ša-qal šu-ma lá iš-qú-ul ki-ma a-wa-at kà-ri-im ṣí-ib-tám ú-ṣa-áb li-mu-um ṣí-lu-lu
eng: Iddin-abum son of Šu-Ištar owes 2 shekels of gold to Ali-ahum. Reckoned from the month huburhe will pay in 2 months. If he has not paid in time, he will add interest according to the rule of the colony. Eponym: Ṣilulu.
transliteration: 2 GÍN KÙ.KI i-ṣé-er i-dí-na-bi-im DUMU šu-IŠTAR a-lá-ḫu-um i-šu iš-tù ITU.1.KAM ḫu-bu-ur a-na ITU.2.KAM i-ša-qal šu-ma lá iš-qú-ul ki-ma a-wa-at kà-ri-im ṣí-ib-tám ú-ṣa-áb li-mu-um ṣí-lu-lu
translation: Iddin-abum son of Šu-Ištar owes 2 shekels of gold to Ali-ahum. Reckoned from the month huburhe will pay in 2 months. If he has not paid in time, he will add interest according to the rule of the colony. Eponym: Ṣilulu.

akk: a-wa-tù-šu-nu ša šál-ma-a-šùr šu-bé-lúm ki-ma DAM i-sú-rik₁₃ DUMU.MÍ i-sú-rik₁₃ ù DUMU.MÍ i-dí-a-bi-im ra-bi-ṣum ù šu-be-lúm KI ša-lim-a-šur ni-iš a-lim{ki} it-mu-ú-ma a-wa-tù-šu-nu gám-ra <gap> ù a-ḫu-šu i-lu-ku-ni-ma ša-lim-a-šùr a-na lu-qú-tim AN.NA ú TÚG.ḪI.A ša-lim-a-šùr ú-kà-nu-ni a-šùr-ta-ak-lá-ku ra-bi-ṣú-um a-na lu-qú-tim a-ni-tim šu-be-lúm a-ša-at i-sú-rik₁₃ DUMU.MÍ i-sú-rik₁₃ ù DUMU.MÍ i-dí-a-bi-im a-na ša-lim-a-šùr šu-ku-bi₄-im ù a-ḫi-šu ú-lá i-tù-ru šu-ma i-tù-ru šu-be-lúm ù MAŠKIM ú-bu-bu-šu-nu
eng: Their case concerning Šalim-Aššur - Šu-Bēlum for the wife of Issu-arik, the daughter of Issu-arik and the daughter of Iddin-abum, the attorney and Šu-Bēlum (on his own) swore an oath on the City with Šalim-Aššur and their case was concluded. <gap> Šu-Kūbum and his brother will come and confirm Šalim-Aššur for the goods, the tin and textiles. Aššur-taklāku was the attorney. Šu-Bēlum, the wife of Issu-arik, the daughter of Issu-arik and the daughter of Iddin-abum must not raise claim to these goods against Šalim-Aššur, Šu-Kūbum or his brother. If they do raise claim, Šu-Bēlum and the attorney will clear them.
transliteration: a-wa-tù-šu-nu ša šál-ma-a-šùr šu-bé-lúm ki-ma DAM i-sú-rik₁₃ DUMU.MÍ i-sú-rik₁₃ ù DUMU.MÍ i-dí-a-bi-im ra-bi-ṣum ù šu-be-lúm KI ša-lim-a-šur ni-iš a-lim{ki} it-mu-ú-ma a-wa-tù-šu-nu gám-ra <gap> ù a-ḫu-šu i-lu-ku-ni-ma ša-lim-a-šùr a-na lu-qú-tim AN.NA ú TÚG.ḪI.A ša-lim-a-šùr ú-kà-nu-ni a-šùr-ta-ak-lá-ku ra-bi-ṣú-um a-na lu-qú-tim a-ni-tim šu-be-lúm a-ša-at i-sú-rik₁₃ DUMU.MÍ i-sú-rik₁₃ ù DUMU.MÍ i-dí-a-bi-im a-na ša-lim-a-šùr šu-ku-bi₄-im ù a-ḫi-šu ú-lá i-tù-ru šu-ma i-tù-ru šu-be-lúm ù MAŠKIM ú-bu-bu-šu-nu
translation: Their case concerning Šalim-Aššur - Šu-Bēlum for the wife of Issu-arik, the daughter of Issu-arik and the daughter of Iddin-abum, the attorney and Šu-Bēlum (on his own) swore an oath on the City with Šalim-Aššur and their case was concluded. <gap> Šu-Kūbum and his brother will come and confirm Šalim-Aššur for the goods, the tin and textiles. Aššur-taklāku was the attorney. Šu-Bēlum, the wife of Issu-arik, the daughter of Issu-arik and the daughter of Iddin-abum must not raise claim to these goods against Šalim-Aššur, Šu-Kūbum or his brother. If they do raise claim, Šu-Bēlum and the attorney will clear them.

akk: ša-lim-a-šùr a-ṣé-er a-mur-IŠTAR ú-ṭá-ḫi-ni-a-tí-ma um-ma ša-lim-a-šùr-ma a-na a-mur-IŠTAR-ma mì-šu-um ší-im ṣú-ba-tí-a URUDU ta-aṣ-ba-at um-ma a-mur-IŠTAR-ma 4 GÚ URUDU lá-mu-na-am ke-na aṣ-ba-at ba-lu-um ḫi-na-a ù ší-bi aṣ-ba-at um-ma ša-lim-a-šùr-ma ḫa-bu-ra-ta-i-a-am tal-qé um-ma a-mur-IŠTAR-ma ša i-na qá-tim aḫ-ta-šu-šu al-qé a-ta lu-qú-tí ša 10 ma-na KÙ.BABBAR lá ta-aṣ-ba-at um-ma ša-lim-a-šùr-ma mì-ma ú-lá aṣ-ba-at um-ma a-mur-IŠTAR-ma a-na ṣú-ḫa-ri-a a-na za-al-pá áš-ta-pá-ar ṣú-ḫa-ri li-li-kam-ma lá-ta-wi um-ma a-mur-IŠTAR-ma a-na-ku a-šé-e-kà ú-ul a-ta ta-šé-e-a-ni
eng: Šalim-Aššur made us approach Amur-Ištạr, and Šalim-Aššur said to Amur-Ištar: Why have you seized the copper that was the proceeds from my textiles?" Amur-Ištar answered: "Yes, I have seized 4 talents of poor copper. I seized it without hinnaya's permission and without witnesses." Šalim-Aššur said: "Did you take copper from haburat?" Amur-Ištar answered: "I took what I could grab. But did you not seize my merchandise worth 10 minas of silver?" Šalim-Aššur answered: "I have seized nothing." Amur-Ištar said: "I have sent my servant to Zalpa. When my servant comes I shall discuss (further)." Amur-Ištar continued: "It is I who am suing you, not you who are suing me."
transliteration: ša-lim-a-šùr a-ṣé-er a-mur-IŠTAR ú-ṭá-ḫi-ni-a-tí-ma um-ma ša-lim-a-šùr-ma a-na a-mur-IŠTAR-ma mì-šu-um ší-im ṣú-ba-tí-a URUDU ta-aṣ-ba-at um-ma a-mur-IŠTAR-ma 4 GÚ URUDU lá-mu-na-am ke-na aṣ-ba-at ba-lu-um ḫi-na-a ù ší-bi aṣ-ba-at um-ma ša-lim-a-šùr-ma ḫa-bu-ra-ta-i-a-am tal-qé um-ma a-mur-IŠTAR-ma ša i-na qá-tim aḫ-ta-šu-šu al-qé a-ta lu-qú-tí ša 10 ma-na KÙ.BABBAR lá ta-aṣ-ba-at um-ma ša-lim-a-šùr-ma mì-ma ú-lá aṣ-ba-at um-ma a-mur-IŠTAR-ma a-na ṣú-ḫa-ri-a a-na za-al-pá áš-ta-pá-ar ṣú-ḫa-ri li-li-kam-ma lá-ta-wi um-ma a-mur-IŠTAR-ma a-na-ku a-šé-e-kà ú-ul a-ta ta-šé-e-a-ni
translation: Šalim-Aššur made us approach Amur-Ištạr, and Šalim-Aššur said to Amur-Ištar: Why have you seized the copper that was the proceeds from my textiles?" Amur-Ištar answered: "Yes, I have seized 4 talents of poor copper. I seized it without hinnaya's permission and without witnesses." Šalim-Aššur said: "Did you take copper from haburat?" Amur-Ištar answered: "I took what I could grab. But did you not seize my merchandise worth 10 minas of silver?" Šalim-Aššur answered: "I have seized nothing." Amur-Ištar said: "I have sent my servant to Zalpa. When my servant comes I shall discuss (further)." Amur-Ištar continued: "It is I who am suing you, not you who are suing me."

akk: 20 ma-na KÙ.BABBAR ṣa-ru-pá-am <gap> i-ṣé-er i-dí-a-bi₄-im šu-{d}EN.LÍL i-šu iš-tù ḫa-mu-uš-tim ša li-ba-a a-na 13 ḫa-am-ša-tim i-ša-qal šu-ma lá iš-qú-ul 1.5 GÍN.TA i-na ITU.KAM a-na 1 ma-na-im ú-ṣa-áb šu-ma lá-ma u₄-me-šu ṭup-pu-šu i-lá-pu-tù 5 ma-na KÙ.GI šu-mì šu-{d}EN.LÍL i-lá-pá-at
eng: Iddin-abum owes 20 minas of refined silver to Šu-Illil. Reckoned from the week of Libbaya he must pay in 13 weeks. If he has not paid (in time), he must add interest at the rate 1.5 shekel per month per mina. If they write his tablet before his term is up, he shall book 5 minas of gold in the name of Šu-Illil.
transliteration: 20 ma-na KÙ.BABBAR ṣa-ru-pá-am <gap> i-ṣé-er i-dí-a-bi₄-im šu-{d}EN.LÍL i-šu iš-tù ḫa-mu-uš-tim ša li-ba-a a-na 13 ḫa-am-ša-tim i-ša-qal šu-ma lá iš-qú-ul 1.5 GÍN.TA i-na ITU.KAM a-na 1 ma-na-im ú-ṣa-áb šu-ma lá-ma u₄-me-šu ṭup-pu-šu i-lá-pu-tù 5 ma-na KÙ.GI šu-mì šu-{d}EN.LÍL i-lá-pá-at
translation: Iddin-abum owes 20 minas of refined silver to Šu-Illil. Reckoned from the week of Libbaya he must pay in 13 weeks. If he has not paid (in time), he must add interest at the rate 1.5 shekel per month per mina. If they write his tablet before his term is up, he shall book 5 minas of gold in the name of Šu-Illil.

akk: 3 GÍN KÙ.BABBAR i li-bi šu-li-i
eng: 3 shekels of silver is in the possession of Šuli.
transliteration: 3 GÍN KÙ.BABBAR i li-bi šu-li-i
translation: 3 shekels of silver is in the possession of Šuli.

akk: IGI i-tur₄-DINGIR DUMU a-mur-IŠTAR IGI a-ta-ta
eng: Witnessed by Itūr-ilī son of Amur-Ištar, by Atata
transliteration: IGI i-tur₄-DINGIR DUMU a-mur-IŠTAR IGI a-ta-ta
translation: Witnessed by Itūr-ilī son of Amur-Ištar, by Atata

akk: i-dí-sú-in DUMU i-ba-a ša a-na ša-lim-a-šùr DUMU i-sú-rik₁₃ ra-bi-ṣa-am e-ḫu-za-ni ù ṭup-pá-am ša a-lim a-na ša-sú-ḫi-šu il₅-qé-a-ni i-mì-ig-ru-ma ni-iš a-lim{ki} i-na kà-ni-iš it-mu-ú i-dí-sú-in ki-ma a-ḫa-tí-šu a-ḫi-šu ù a-ḫa-at a-bi-šu i-dí-sú-in it-ma ša-lim-a-šùr a-na ḫu-bu-ul i-ba-a-a lá i-tù-ar-šu-nu-tí a-ḫu-um a-na a-ḫi-im lá i-tù-ar a-na a-wa-tim a-ni-a-tim ni-iš a-lim it-mu-ú ITU.1.KAM ḫu-bu-ur li-mu-um a-lá-ḫu-um
eng: Iddin-Suen son of Ibaya who had hired an attorney against Šalim-Aššur son of Issu-arik, and had received a tablet from the City assembly about his extradition - (those two) settled (their differences) and swore an oath by the City in Kanesh. Iddin-Suen swore on behalf of his sister, his brother and his father's sister. Šalim-Aššur must not raise claim against them for Ibaya's debt. The two must not raise claim against each other. For this matter they swore the oath by the City. Month hubur, eponymy Ali-ahum.
transliteration: i-dí-sú-in DUMU i-ba-a ša a-na ša-lim-a-šùr DUMU i-sú-rik₁₃ ra-bi-ṣa-am e-ḫu-za-ni ù ṭup-pá-am ša a-lim a-na ša-sú-ḫi-šu il₅-qé-a-ni i-mì-ig-ru-ma ni-iš a-lim{ki} i-na kà-ni-iš it-mu-ú i-dí-sú-in ki-ma a-ḫa-tí-šu a-ḫi-šu ù a-ḫa-at a-bi-šu i-dí-sú-in it-ma ša-lim-a-šùr a-na ḫu-bu-ul i-ba-a-a lá i-tù-ar-šu-nu-tí a-ḫu-um a-na a-ḫi-im lá i-tù-ar a-na a-wa-tim a-ni-a-tim ni-iš a-lim it-mu-ú ITU.1.KAM ḫu-bu-ur li-mu-um a-lá-ḫu-um
translation: Iddin-Suen son of Ibaya who had hired an attorney against Šalim-Aššur son of Issu-arik, and had received a tablet from the City assembly about his extradition - (those two) settled (their differences) and swore an oath by the City in Kanesh. Iddin-Suen swore on behalf of his sister, his brother and his father's sister. Šalim-Aššur must not raise claim against them for Ibaya's debt. The two must not raise claim against each other. For this matter they swore the oath by the City. Month hubur, eponymy Ali-ahum.

akk: 5 GÚ URUDU iš-tí ku-ur-zi-a ù šu-ni-sà-ba iš-tù ḫa-mu-uš-tim ša a-bi-ì-lí a-na 4 ḫa-am-ša-tim i-ša-qú-lu šu-ma lá iš-qú-lu ki-ma a-wa-at kà-ri-im ṣí-ib-tám ú-ṣú-bu ITU.KAM a-lá-na-tim li-mu-um a-al-DU₁₀ 3 GÚ 23 ma-na URUDU iš-tí ì-lí-iš-ta-kál 5 GÚ URUDU iš-tí ku-ra u₄-mu-šu 1 ITU.KAM e-tí-qú 4 GÚ URUDU KI a-šur-i-mì-tí iš-tù ḫa-mu-uš-tim ša ku-lu-uk-lu a-na 3 ḫa-am-ša-tim i-ša-qal šu-ma lá iš-qúl ki-ma a-wa-at kà-ri-im ṣí-ib-tám ú-ṣa-áb ITU.KAM ša sà-ra-tim li-mu-um ša i qá-tí a-al-DU₁₀ il₅-qé-ú ša mì-ma a-we-li a-ni-ú-tim ṭup-pì-šu-nu ḫa-ru-mu-tim a-na a-ta-ta DUMU LUGAL-sú-in e-zi-ib
eng: 5 talents of copper is owed by Kurziya and Šu-Nisaba. Reckoned from the week of Abī-ilī they are to pay within 4 weeks. If they have not paid (in time) they are to add interest according to the rule of the colony. Month Allanātum, eponymy Ali-ṭāb. 3 talents 23 minas of copper is owed by Iliš-tikal; 5 talents of copper is owed by Kura. His terms are overdue by 1 month. 4 talents of copper is owed by Aššur-imittī. Reckoned from the week of Kuluklu he is to pay within 3 weeks. If he has not paid (in time) he is to add interest according to the rule of the colony. Month Ša-sarrātim, eponymy he who took over from Ali-ṭāb. With respect to all these men I have left their certified tablets with Atata son of Šar-Suen.
